The related software will be utilized to aid in building and solving models. The topics to be covered: linear programming, what-if analysis, dual theory, transportation and assignment.

description.zh: 本校體育課程目標為鍛鍊健全身心、促進身心健全發展、培養運動道德、發揚團隊精神及養成終身運動習慣。四技一、二年級實施專項分組教學，由具有專長之教師授課。開課項目：籃球、排球、桌球、羽球、保齡球、射箭、高爾夫球、網球、體操遊戲、慢速壘球、太極拳、國際標準舞、體適能、國術。學生得按自己興趣選擇修習。
description.en: All students are required to attend two hours per week of Physical Education class. This requirement applies to Freshman and Sophomore students, classes are interest-oriented, thus giving students the opportunity to select specific activities they are interested in. Choices include Basketball, Volleyball, Table Tennis, Badminton, Bowling, Archery, Golf, Tennis, Gymnastics, Slow pitch, Tai Chi Chuan, Ballroom Dancing, Physical Fitness and martial arts, to mention a few.

notes: 請選：體育室 \ 體育專項

name.zh: 學院指定向度 - 社會與法治
name.en: College designated dimension curriculum：Social and Rules of Law

description.zh: 各學院指定向度學分規定如下：機電學院：人文與藝術向度課程 4 學分、社會與法治向度課程 4 學分、創新與創業向度課程 4 學分。工程學院：人文與藝術向度課程 4 學分、社會與法治向度課程 4 學分、創新與創業向度課程 4 學分。管理學院：人文與藝術向度課程 4 學分、社會與法治向度課程 4 學分、自然與科學向度課程 4 學分。設計學院：人文與藝術向度課程 4 學分、社會與法治向度課程 4 學分、創新與創業向度課程 4 學分。人社學院：社會與法治向度課程 4 學分、自然與科學向度課程 4 學分、創新與創業向度課程 4 學分。修完學院指定向度課程 12 學分，剩餘 6 學分可在人文與藝術向度、社會與法治向度、自然與科學向度及創新與創業向度自由修滿，達到通識畢業 18 學分。
description.en: The dimension credits stipulated by each college are as follows：College of Mechanical and Electrical Engineering：4 credits for the humanities and art curriculum, 4 credits for the Social and Rules of Law curriculum, and 4 credits for the innovation and entrepreneurship curriculum.College of Engineering： 4 credits for the humanities and art curriculum, 4 credits for the Social and Rules of Law curriculum, and 4 credits for the innovation and entrepreneurship curriculum.College of Management： 4 credits for the humanities and art curriculum, 4 credits for the Social and Rules of Law curriculum, and 4 credits for the nature and science curriculum.College of Design： 4 credits for the humanities and art curriculum, 4 credits for the Social and Rules of Law curriculum, and 4 credits for the innovation and entrepreneurship curriculum.

notes: 請選：通識中心 / 博雅課程

name.zh: 學院指定向度 - 創新與創業
name.en: College designated dimension curriculum：Innovation and Entrepreneurship

description.zh: 學院指定向度 - 創新與創業
description.en: 各學院指定向度學分規定如下：機電學院：人文與藝術向度課程4學分、社會與法治向度課程4學分、創新與創業向度課程4學分。電資學院：人文與藝術向度課程4學分、自然與科學向度課程4學分、創新與創業向度課程4學分。工程學院：人文與藝術向度課程4學分、社會與法治向度課程4學分、創新與創業向度課程4學分。管理學院：人文與藝術向度課程4學分、社會與法治向度課程4學分、自然與科學向度課程4學分。設計學院：人文與藝術向度課程4學分、社會與法治向度課程4學分、創新與創業向度課程4學分。人社學院：社會與法治向度課程4學分、自然與科學向度課程4學分、創新與創業向度課程4學分。修完學院指定向度課程12學分，剩餘6學分可在人文與藝術向度、社會與法治向度、自然與科學向度及創新與創業向度自由修滿，達到通識畢業18學分。

notes: 請選：通識中心 / 博雅課程

description.zh: 以英語語言、教學法、及學生在專業領域的英語需求為主軸，專業英文 ESP 系列課程涵蓋以下關鍵面向：學術英文、專業實踐 / 應用英文、內容和語言整合英文教學，議題與趨勢，以及語言技巧能力。 此系列課程專為本校大二修習校訂共同英文的學生設計，強化英語能力，並應用英文於專業領域之發展。
description.en: Drawing upon the English language, pedagogy, students’ needs for English in specialized domains, the ESP series encompass the following key dimensions: English for general academic purposes, English for professional practice / application, content and language integrated learning, issues and trends, and integrative language skills for testing and communication. The courses are designed for the second year (sophomore), non-native English speaking students to strengthen their English competence and become more proficient in their fields of study.

notes: 請選校院級課程 \ 大二專業英文 (五)

description.zh: 本課程講授家具工程製圖技術及相關知識，著重在家具工程製圖與一般工程製圖的主要差別，其能讓學生將所設計的家具產品以圖面表達其細部結構與工程要件。
description.en: This is the lecture of furniture engineering drawing technique and related knowledge, It emphases on the main difference between furniture engineering drawing and normal engineering drawing. The aim is for students to present thedetailed construction and main parts of their furniture design product by drawing.

notes: 家室組

description.zh: 行銷是由物品的流通及製造者對消費者或使用者所提供之服務等商業活動所構成的。包括產品、產銷地點、通路及價格等四個主要原理。行銷研究是幫助經營者去發展及研究市場並研擬更好之行銷計劃，包括四種主要活動：研究計劃、收集情報、分析及發表。
description.en: This course aims to provide the student with knowledge of marketing, including product strategy, physical distribution, channel and pricing. Case study and discuss through activities (planning, investigation, analysis and presentation) that carry out strategic marketing are employed from time to time.

notes: 產品組；排一般教室

description.zh: 講授並整合產品設計之基本理論、方法及程序。藉設計題目之演練，以分組討論之方式，引導同學學習組織表達及分析思考之能力；並以個別指導之方式，引導同學磨練創意之思考及熟練之表達技巧。
description.en: This course intergral the theoretical principle methodology and the process of produces design Guide the design student to work on design projects through group discussion and individual practice with creative thinking and presentation technique.

notes: 產品組

description.zh: 介紹傳統以及特殊加工法、製造法、金屬、非金屬材料之製造加工。
description.en: In the design and manufacturing of a product is is essential that the machine as wellas the process be understood, Manufacturing requires tools and machines that can produce products economically as well as accurately. Economy depends to a large extent on the proper selection of a machine or process that will give a satisfactory finished porduct. This course serves as an introduction to various manufacturing, foundry, special casting, and special working process.

notes: 產品組

description.zh: 課程講授家具結構之專業知識與應用技術，理論與實務並重。內容包括開發流程、產品工程、基本力學、木材特性、複合板特性、木材接合、機械扣件、框類家具結構特性、板類家具結構特性、殼類家具結構特性等。
description.en: This course is introducing the knowledge and technique of furniture construction, both theory and practicing. The contents include R&D procedure, product engineering, basic mechanics, characteristics of wood, characteristics of composite board,, wood joints, mechanical fasteners, characteristics of frame type furniture, characteristics of panel type furniture, characteristics of shell type furniture etc.

notes: 家室組

description.zh: 作為實務室內設計訓練重要的理論基礎之一，本課程銜接「室內建築學」的課程教學；導引學生學習室內設計專案所涉包含基地平面計畫、風格與裝飾、家具與設備、色彩與材質、人因尺度等設計基本的概念與應用原理。
description.en: Being one of the plinths of the formal interior design training, the course extends the lecture of Interior Architecture to learn the concepts and the applications of site-planning, decoration, furniture, color scheme, materials, human factors etc. in the process of a professional interior design project.

notes: 家室組

description.zh: 練習設計構想草圖速繪法；從基本幾何形體至複雜產品、空間循序漸進；常用材質（木質、金屬、透明材質、石材及皮革等）之表現技法；產品精描、透視圖法、三視圖、爆炸圖、組立圖等之精描，說明圖板及各種畫材（麥克筆、粉彩、色鉛筆及水彩）等之應用。
description.en: This course put emphasis on offering students having enough skills on :1.Abilities to sketch their idea visible to the others.2.Coloring design sketches to let the drawings have better comprehensibility.3.Good skill for Renderings. Medias for this course shall include markers, pastels water colors and color pencils.

notes: 家室組

description.zh: 本課程為整合家具與室內設計之基礎課程。藉由相關設計競賽活動或產學合作計畫案，以創意激發的訓練為主，透過實際設計程序的演練，習得設計的方法並培養解決問題的能力。
description.en: This course is a foundational program that integrates furniture design and interior design. Through related design competitions or industry-academia cooperation projects, creativity is emphasized in the training, and students will learn design methods and cultivate problem-solving abilities by practicing actual design procedures.

notes: 家室組

description.zh: 1. 進階的設計表現技法，藉由意象表徵，仿生擬人，情境描繪等方法，探求設計表達的背後的意義。2. 設計表現法主要素求是由簡易材料之運用以手繪快速描繪出蘊釀中造形，呈現將來產品形態。3. 發表的概念草圖與版面設計規劃技巧，也是本課程的訓練重點。4. 本課程以團對合作來執行設計表達。
description.en: 1.By mean of symbol, future scenarios to present the design means. 2.To use the simple tools, for present the concepts. 3.The presentation design is one of key subjects. 4.To use the teamwork to establish the design presentation experiences.

notes: 產品組

description.zh: 本課程為產品設計專案程序之理論與實務設計與創造性思考，專案與程序，劇本法邏輯，目標澄清，設計研究與調查，構想展開與評估，細部改善，語意法，專案設計策略。
description.en: This course focuses on concept and methods on product design project. It includes: Design Logic, Scenario Planning, Expression, Legibility, Semantics, Problem Solving, Concept Generation Evolution, Technology and Market.

notes: 兩組必修

description.zh: 課程主要藉由 Rhinoceros 曲面軟體之泛用性，針對產品外觀造形設計之實務需求、學習正確之曲面軟體建模技巧與觀念、並能應用在其它相關設計領域；幫助學生創意發想與造型創作不設限，並大大縮短產品開發時程並提升工作效率。
description.en: To be an effective designer today, you need tools to quickly develop your designs and accurately communicate them to everyone in the product research, development, marketing, and manufacturing or construction process.This course introduces the computer aided modeling design，teach students how to use Rhinoceros software to create accurately and high quality surface model and document your designs ready for rendering, animation, drafting, engineering, analysis, and manufacturing or construction.

notes: 設計 753 電腦教室，上限 40 人

description.zh: 本課程通過理論與實際案例介紹 3D 創作與空間設計軟體：3DS MAX 的概念與應用範圍，接續將 3D 環境建構的方法導入實務案例練習操作，最後透過專題設定進行學生自己的內容創作。課程目的是訓練學生在運用 3DS MAX 軟體進行 3D 模型、角色造型、空間和相關物件的建構能力，並接續應用在空間展示的內容設計和表現。
description.en: This course content is about 3D creation and space design software through theoretical and practical cases: 3DS MAX - the concept and application scope, and then teacher introduces the methods of 3D environment construction into practical case practice operations, and finally creates students' own creation project. The purpose of the course is to train students to use the 3DS MAX software to construct 3D models, character modeling, space, and related objects, and use the result and performance to space display.

notes: 家室組，設計 301 電腦教室，上限 30 人 配合 USR 計畫

description.zh: 本校體育課程目標為鍛鍊健全身心、促進身心健全發展、培養運動道德、發揚團隊精神及養成終身運動習慣。四技一、二年級實施專項分組教學，由具有專長之教師授課。開課項目：籃球、排球、桌球、羽球、保齡球、射箭、高爾夫球、網球、體操遊戲、慢速壘球、太極拳、國際標準舞、體適能、國術。學生得按自己興趣選擇修習。
description.en: All students are required to attend two hours per week of Physical Education class. This requirement applies to Freshman and Sophomore students, classes are interest-oriented, thus giving students the opportunity to select specific activities they are interested in. Choices include Basketball, Volleyball, Table Tennis, Badminton, Bowling, Archery, Golf, Tennis, Gymnastics, Slow pitch, Tai Chi Chuan, Ballroom Dancing, Physical Fitness and martial arts, to mention a few.

notes: 請選：體育室 \ 體育專項

name.en: College designated dimension curriculum：Social and Rules of Law

description.en: The dimension credits stipulated by each college are as follows：College of Mechanical and Electrical Engineering：4 credits for the humanities and art curriculum, 4 credits for the Social and Rules of Law curriculum, and 4 credits for the innovation and entrepreneurship curriculum.College of Engineering： 4 credits for the humanities and art curriculum, 4 credits for the Social and Rules of Law curriculum, and 4 credits for the innovation and entrepreneurship curriculum.College of Management： 4 credits for the humanities and art curriculum, 4 credits for the Social and Rules of Law curriculum, and 4 credits for the nature and science curriculum.College of Design： 4 credits for the humanities and art curriculum, 4 credits for the Social and Rules of Law curriculum, and 4 credits for the innovation and entrepreneurship curriculum.

notes: 請選：通識中心 / 博雅課程

name.zh: 學院指定向度 - 創新與創業
name.en: College designated dimension curriculum：Innovation and Entrepreneurship

description.zh: 學院指定向度 - 創新與創業
description.en: 各學院指定向度學分規定如下：機電學院：人文與藝術向度課程4學分、社會與法治向度課程4學分、創新與創業向度課程4學分。電資學院：人文與藝術向度課程4學分、自然與科學向度課程4學分、創新與創業向度課程4學分。工程學院：人文與藝術向度課程4學分、社會與法治向度課程4學分、創新與創業向度課程4學分。管理學院：人文與藝術向度課程4學分、社會與法治向度課程4學分、自然與科學向度課程4學分。設計學院：人文與藝術向度課程4學分、社會與法治向度課程4學分、創新與創業向度課程4學分。人社學院：社會與法治向度課程4學分、自然與科學向度課程4學分、創新與創業向度課程4學分。修完學院指定向度課程12學分，剩餘6學分可在人文與藝術向度、社會與法治向度、自然與科學向度及創新與創業向度自由修滿，達到通識畢業18學分。

notes: 請選：通識中心 / 博雅課程

description.zh: 以英語語言、教學法、及學生在專業領域的英語需求為主軸，專業英文 ESP 系列課程涵蓋以下關鍵面向：學術英文、專業實踐 / 應用英文、內容和語言整合英文教學，議題與趨勢，以及語言技巧能力。 此系列課程專為本校大二修習校訂共同英文的學生設計，強化英語能力，並應用英文於專業領域之發展。
description.en: Drawing upon the English language, pedagogy, students’ needs for English in specialized domains, the ESP series encompass the following key dimensions: English for general academic purposes, English for professional practice / application, content and language integrated learning, issues and trends, and integrative language skills for testing and communication. The courses are designed for the second year (sophomore), non-native English speaking students to strengthen their English competence and become more proficient in their fields of study.

notes: 請選校院級課程 \ 大二專業英文 (五)

description.zh: 本課程分四年（八學期）教授， 四學年課程培養的核心專業能力如下: ■ 第一年：以建築設計的基礎為範疇。訓練造型基礎，包括尺度、比例﹑秩序與韻律、實虛、量體與空間等造型的基本設計能力。 ■ 第二年 ：以人與空間為範疇，並學習建築的內部構成要素。在具備設計基礎能力之後，進一步接觸建築的基本向度與原理的設計練習，包括身體與空間、使用行為模式、建築物理環境、構造與結構系統、建築構成系統、建築的類型與形態。 ■ 第三年 ：都市建築為主要範疇。將建築的關注聚焦到與其連結的環境系統或城市紋理，學習從外部環境或都市理論回饋到建築的規劃設計。第四年：即畢業設計，培養學生針對特定建築問題之探究能力，鼓勵以建築思索如何關注社會、文化與自然的課題，最終以設計方案回應之。
description.en: This four-year course will be taught within eight semesters and aims to train students in the core competencies as follows:■ First year: foundations of architectural designTraining of fundamental modeling, including basic designing concepts such as scale, proportion, order and rhythm, solid and void, volume, and space■ Second year: people and space, and internal elements of architectureBeyond competency in elementary design, further practicing basic aspects and principles of architecture design, including human body and space, user behavior model, physical environment of buildings, construction and structure system, architectural composition system, architectural type and form, etc.■ Third year: Urban architectureFocus of environmental system or urban structure relating to architecture, which helps students apply what they have learned from the external environment or urban theory to the planning and design of buildings■ Fourth year: Graduation projectCultivating ca

description.zh: 本課程中學生可以了解建築的一般材料的特性和建築構造的原理，我們強調那些與組件組成相關的知識，學生可以在他們的設計工作中使用這些知識。
description.en: In this course student can understand the property of general material of building and the principles of building construction, we stress those knowledge related with component composition, that student can used in their design work.

description.zh: 介紹建築計劃的基本精神，方法，及各種類型建築的建築計劃案例分析一．建築計劃基本精神１．建築與生活、生產的關係２．建築計劃之定位３．建築計劃之構成、內容４．建築計劃學的發展過程二．建築計劃的方法１．需求的產生與界定２．建築計劃的調查方法３．建築計劃的分析方法４．建築計劃的定量計劃（尺寸與規模計劃）５．建築計劃的調查方法（空間、機能、集合與複合）三．建築計劃案例分析
description.en: Introduce the basic philosophy & methods of architecture planning. Case studies ofdifferent building types. The topic include：1、the basic philosophy of architecture planningl the relationship between planning and living、productionl the scope of architecture planning l the content of architecture planningl the developing period of architecture planning2、the methods of architecture planningl the happening of needs & its definitionl the investigation methods of architecture planning l the analysis methods of architecture planning l the quantity planning of architecture planning （size & scale planning）l space、function、accumulate & complex 3、case study of architecture planning

description.zh: 本課程主要教導學生認識建築物理環境之基本理論，包含光環境、溫熱環境、空氣環境、音環境等，做為學習建築環境控制系統與建築設備之基礎。本課程內容分為七大部分，包括 (一) 建築氣象學概論、(二) 建築微氣候環境、(三) 建築採光與照明、(四) 建築傳熱與隔熱、(五) 室內通風換氣、(六) 濕氣與結露、(七) 隔音與吸音等課題。本學期介紹物理環境基本學理外，同時輔以相關案例補充說明，幫助學生在建築設計中能關注到使用者舒適、健康需求，並使其建築設計符合節能的永續建築要求。
description.en: In this course, students will learn about the fundamental theories of architecture physics which include luminous environment, thermal environment, air environment, and sound environment as an introduction to understanding Systems of Environment Control and Architectural Equipment. The course is divided into 7 sections, (1) Introduction to Architecture Meteorology, (2) Architecture Microclimate, (3) Natural Lighting and Illumination of architecture, (4) Thermal Conduction and Proofing of Architecture, (5) Indoor Air Change and Ventilation, (6) Humidity and Condensation, and (7) Sound absorption and proofing. In this semester, other than introducing the fundamental theories, related case studies are also incorporated as additional support to help students to be attentive toward issues such as comfort and health in their architectural design class at the same time to encourage the utilization of such knowledge to create energy saving and sustainable architectural designs.

description.zh: 現代主義運動，帶動了新建築的發展，也致使廿世紀的建築有了全新的可能。工業革命之後所帶動的，不僅僅是生產與製造的工業化，也不僅僅是資本的集中以及資本量的大幅成長。整個十九世紀的發展都是為了邁向一個全新的紀元，營建材料的開發、營建技術的發展、空間概念的突破，開創新的建築面貌以及新的建築歷史。這個將近兩百年的建築發展，影響了廿世紀的建築教育，並且提供養分，供給新的世代的建築新發展。本課程將就十九、廿世紀的建築發展的歷史脈絡進行梳理，學生將由本課程理解今日其所進行的建築設計之來源。
description.en: The Modern Movement of Architecture leads the development of new architecture, it thus deduce a whole new possibility of architecture. The Industrial Revolution is the motor of the whole movement. The building construction is industrialized under this overall influence to the society, not only on the concentration of capitals. The social life has been changed. Nineteenth Century is a struggling period with European tradition, moving forward to a new imagination, on the development of construction material, technics, also on the breakthrough on the spatial concept.This evolution on architecture influences architectural education of 20th Century, and feeds the new creation of architecture. This course is to understand this historic evolution and context, to understand the source and establish knowledge in face of their future architectural activities.

description.zh: 本課程主要是在教導學生了解力學之概念與分析方法，使其具備學習結構學之基礎能力，其主要授課內容包括：1. 力學之基本概念及平衡條件、2. 構材之斷面性質如形心、重心、面積一次矩、慣性矩及其應用、3. 結構構材承受軸向載重、扭力、彎矩之分析及設計應用、4. 應力及應變之關係、5. 梁之變形，柱之性質以及各種分析理論。
description.en: This course introduced the concept of mechanics and provided the principles of structural analysis, the course consists of(1) Equations of equilibrium(2) Frame Section Properties (3) Shear and moment diagrams (4) Relationships of stress and strainDeflection of beams and Column characteristics

notes: 新聘兼任老師

description.zh: 介紹及討論創造性藝術之特性、藝術與工程間的關連、美學在工程上之重要性以及美的形式原理。
description.en: This course is an introduction to the study and practice of fundamental principles of design in terms of creative arts, relationship between art and engineering, and the importance of aesthetics applying to design.

description.zh: 本校體育課程目標為鍛鍊健全身心、促進身心健全發展、培養運動道德、發揚團隊精神及養成終身運動習慣。四技一、二年級實施專項分組教學，由具有專長之教師授課。開課項目：籃球、排球、桌球、羽球、保齡球、射箭、高爾夫球、網球、體操遊戲、慢速壘球、太極拳、國際標準舞、體適能、國術。學生得按自己興趣選擇修習。
description.en: All students are required to attend two hours per week of Physical Education class. This requirement applies to Freshman and Sophomore students, classes are interest-oriented, thus giving students the opportunity to select specific activities they are interested in. Choices include Basketball, Volleyball, Table Tennis, Badminton, Bowling, Archery, Golf, Tennis, Gymnastics, Slow pitch, Tai Chi Chuan, Ballroom Dancing, Physical Fitness and martial arts, to mention a few.

notes: 請選：體育室 \ 體育專項

name.zh: 學院指定向度 - 社會與法治
name.en: College designated dimension curriculum：Social and Rules of Law

description.zh: 各學院指定向度學分規定如下：機電學院：人文與藝術向度課程 4 學分、社會與法治向度課程 4 學分、創新與創業向度課程 4 學分。工程學院：人文與藝術向度課程 4 學分、社會與法治向度課程 4 學分、創新與創業向度課程 4 學分。管理學院：人文與藝術向度課程 4 學分、社會與法治向度課程 4 學分、自然與科學向度課程 4 學分。設計學院：人文與藝術向度課程 4 學分、社會與法治向度課程 4 學分、創新與創業向度課程 4 學分。人社學院：社會與法治向度課程 4 學分、自然與科學向度課程 4 學分、創新與創業向度課程 4 學分。修完學院指定向度課程 12 學分，剩餘 6 學分可在人文與藝術向度、社會與法治向度、自然與科學向度及創新與創業向度自由修滿，達到通識畢業 18 學分。
description.en: The dimension credits stipulated by each college are as follows：College of Mechanical and Electrical Engineering：4 credits for the humanities and art curriculum, 4 credits for the Social and Rules of Law curriculum, and 4 credits for the innovation and entrepreneurship curriculum.College of Engineering： 4 credits for the humanities and art curriculum, 4 credits for the Social and Rules of Law curriculum, and 4 credits for the innovation and entrepreneurship curriculum.College of Management： 4 credits for the humanities and art curriculum, 4 credits for the Social and Rules of Law curriculum, and 4 credits for the nature and science curriculum.College of Design： 4 credits for the humanities and art curriculum, 4 credits for the Social and Rules of Law curriculum, and 4 credits for the innovation and entrepreneurship curriculum.

notes: 請選：通識中心 / 博雅課程

notes: 請選：通識中心 / 博雅課程

description.zh: 以英語語言、教學法、及學生在專業領域的英語需求為主軸，專業英文 ESP 系列課程涵蓋以下關鍵面向：學術英文、專業實踐 / 應用英文、內容和語言整合英文教學，議題與趨勢，以及語言技巧能力。 此系列課程專為本校大二修習校訂共同英文的學生設計，強化英語能力，並應用英文於專業領域之發展。
description.en: Drawing upon the English language, pedagogy, students’ needs for English in specialized domains, the ESP series encompass the following key dimensions: English for general academic purposes, English for professional practice / application, content and language integrated learning, issues and trends, and integrative language skills for testing and communication. The courses are designed for the second year (sophomore), non-native English speaking students to strengthen their English competence and become more proficient in their fields of study.

notes: 請選校院級課程 \ 大二專業英文 (一)

description.zh: 先修課程：4401011 或負責教授同意介紹結構體在受到張力、壓力、剪力、扭力及彎曲等外力狀態下之變形，分析應力，應變及變形，莫耳圓，壓力容器，樑，柱。
description.en: Introduction of the deformation, Strain and stress of structure (Beam, Column, Pressure vessel) under several different loading condition equations, Compression, Shear force, Torsion and Bending moment.

description.zh: 先修課程：負責教授同意物質熱力學特性，改變能量形式之基本原理，熱力學第一及第二定律，可逆性與可用性，動力循環，冷凍循環，混合氣，化學反應。
description.en: Thermodynamic Properties of Substance, Energy Forms, The First Law of Thermodynamics, The Second Law of Thermodynamics, Irreversibility & Availability, Power Cycle, Refrigeration Systems, Mixtures, Chemical Reactions.

description.zh: 先修課程：4401011 或負責教授同意力、質量與加速度，質點運動學，質點動力學，功與能，衝量與動量，剛體運動，剛體系的動力學。
description.en: Relations of Forces、Masses and Acceleration, Kinematics of Particles, Dynamics of Particles, Work and Energy, Impulses and Momentum, Kinematics of Rigid Bodies, Dynamics of Systems of Rigid Bodies.

description.zh: 電之基本概念，直流基本電路，電場與磁場，電磁效應，交流之基本概念，交流基本電路，電機基本原理，變壓器，三相感應電動機，單向交流電動機，同步電機，直流電機之分類及特性，直流電機之控制，伺服電動機之分類及特性，電機之維護。
description.en: Introduction to Electricity, DC Circuit Analysis, Electric Field and Magnetic Field, Magnetic Effect, AC Circuit Analysis, Principles of electrical Machinery, Transformers, Three-phase Induction Motor, Single-phase Induction Motor, Synchronous Electric Machinery, DC Electric Machinery, Control of DC Motor, Maintenance of Electric Machinery.

description.zh: 先修課程：微積分或負責教授同意常微分方程式，線性常微分方程式，拉普拉氏轉換，級數及傅立葉級數，線性代數及矩陣，積分定理。
description.en: Ordinary Differential Equations, Laplace Transforms, Power Series, Linear Algebra, Matrices.

description.zh: 先修課程：無。本實習內容為汽車電系實習，包括：引擎電系，起動系統及充電系統檢測，點火系統檢測，電池之檢測與換裝，電腦控制系統檢測，電腦診斷系統，檢測車輛新式電子設備，檢修汽車空調系統。95 學年度前入學者適用下列實習內容：結構力學分析與實習。學生將學習使用套裝電腦應用軟體，了解並學習如何做常用的結構力學前處理、分析及後處理。 課程著重學生實作練習。
description.en: Automobile Electrical System Service Shop Practice , Include Service of the Engine Electrical System , Starting and Charging System, Ignition System, Battery inspection and replacement, Computer Control System, Computer Diagnostic System, New Electronic Equipment Inspection , Air Condition Test and Repair.For those students who enter the school before 2006 Fall Semester , this class is to utilize computers to do the experiments on different vehicle/engineering problems. Student will learn the basic concept of Finite Element Method (FEM), learn how to utilize FEM in Vehicle Engineering to solve problems. Classes include Geometry modeling, creating FEA models, learning different analysis types (such as Statics, Normal mode, Buckling, and Optimization).

notes: 1 週【停開】

The courses are designed for the second year (sophomore), non-native English speaking students to strengthen their English competence and become more proficient in their fields of study.

description.zh: 冷凍空調概論、基礎知識與定義、空氣熱力學、基本冷凍循環與應用分析、壓縮理論及壓縮機性能分析、冷凍空調系統組成 - 壓縮機、冷凝器、冷媒控制器、蒸發器、冷凍介質－冷媒、二次冷媒吸收劑及冷凍油、冷媒管路及配件、空調處理過程及空調維護分析。
description.en: Refrigeration & air conditioning Introduction Fundamentals & definitions Psychrometrics Basic refrigeration cycles & application analysis Compression cycle theory & performance of compressors Compression system compositions- compressor, condenser, refrigerant controls Cooling mediums- refrigerants, secondary refrigerants, absorbents, refrigeration oils. Refrigerant piping & accessories. Air conditioning processes & cycles analysis.

description.zh: 教授電腦工程繪圖基礎，包括立體三維空間的投影觀念、幾何學製圖方法，訓練繪製草圖、各種物件之三視圖；並能正確標註尺寸，公差與配合，使具備繪製各式管路、鋼架、氣油壓及機械設備之相關標準工程圖的能力。
description.en: Instructing the basis of computer engineering drawing, including the concepts of orthographic projection of 3D space and the methods of geometry graphics. Training the skills to raw sketch, various 3D views. Learning to mark dimensions, tolerance and fittings correctly. This lesson also demands students to able to be familiarized the drawings of steel structures, hydraulic and fluid systems, and related mechanical devices.

notes: 計中電腦教室，英文授課

description.zh: (1) 基本電路元件介紹；(2) 基本電路理論回顧；(3) 半導體特性介紹；(4) 半導體二極體電路分析技巧；(5) 半導體二極體之應用：整流器，濾波器，剪波器，箝位器，倍壓器；(6) 其他特殊二極體：發光二極體，齊納二極體，…; (7) 雙極接合面電晶體工作原理；(8) 雙極接合面電晶體直流偏壓電路；(9) 雙極接合面電晶體交流小信號電路分析；(10) 場效電晶體之分類：接合面型，金氧半增強型，金氧半衰減型，金氧半垂直型，金氧半互補型；(11) 場效電晶體工作原理；(12) 場效電晶體直流偏壓電路；(13) 場效電晶體交流小信號電路分析
description.en: (1) Introduction to basic circuit components; (2)The review of basic circuit theories; (3)Introduction to the characteristics of semiconductors; (4)Circuit analysis techniques for semiconductor PN diode; (5)The applications of PN diode: Rectifier, Filter, Clipper, Clamper, and Voltage-doubler; (6)Special diodes: Light emitting diode(LED), Zener diode, etc.; (7)The operation principles of bipolar junction transistor(BJT); (8)DC biasing circuits for BJTs; (9)Small signal analysis for BJT circuits; (10)The classification of field effect transistor(FET): JFET, Enhancement-MOS, Depletion-MOS, VMOS, and CMOS; (11)The operation principles of FET; (12)DC bias circuits for FETs; (13)Small signal analysis for FET circuits

description.zh: 本課程將介紹工程上、物理上系統解析的相關數學工具，內容包括：1. 常微分方程式：一階，二階，及高階常微分方程，2. 拉譜拉斯轉換，3. 特殊函數。
description.en: This course intends to introduce the mathematical principles and practices that today's engineers need to know. The course contents are 1.Ordinary Differential Eqs: 1st order, 2nd order and higher order ODEs. 2. Laplace transform, 3. Special function.

description.zh: 網路拓樸理論及特立勤定理；節點與網路分析；迴路與切集分析；狀態變數法；自然頻率；網路函數；雙埠網路；計算機輔助分析（PSPICE）；傅氏分析；拉氏轉換。
description.en: 1. The power of single phase and poly- phase, and complex frequency and power factor correction; the phasor conception to the Damped sinusoidal forcing function.2. The resonant of frequency response, quality factor and the width of a resonance response curve of half-power frequencies.3. Magnetically coupled circuits and Two-port networks.4. Fourier Analysis and Laplace Transform Techniques.

description.zh: 本校體育課程目標為鍛鍊健全身心、促進身心健全發展、培養運動道德、發揚團隊精神及養成終身運動習慣。四技一、二年級實施專項分組教學，由具有專長之教師授課。開課項目：籃球、排球、桌球、羽球、保齡球、射箭、高爾夫球、網球、體操遊戲、慢速壘球、太極拳、國際標準舞、體適能、國術。學生得按自己興趣選擇修習。
description.en: All students are required to attend two hours per week of Physical Education class. This requirement applies to Freshman and Sophomore students, classes are interest-oriented, thus giving students the opportunity to select specific activities they are interested in. Choices include Basketball, Volleyball, Table Tennis, Badminton, Bowling, Archery, Golf, Tennis, Gymnastics, Slow pitch, Tai Chi Chuan, Ballroom Dancing, Physical Fitness and martial arts, to mention a few.

notes: 請選：體育室 \ 體育專項

name.zh: 學院指定向度 - 自然與科學
name.en: College designated dimension curriculum：Nature and Science

description.zh: 各學院指定向度學分規定如下：機電學院：人文與藝術向度課程 4 學分、社會與法治向度課程 4 學分、創新與創業向度課程 4 學分。電資學院：人文與藝術向度課程 4 學分、自然與科學向度課程 4 學分、創新與創業向度課程 4 學分。工程學院：人文與藝術向度課程 4 學分、社會與法治向度課程 4 學分、創新與創業向度課程 4 學分。管理學院：人文與藝術向度課程 4 學分、社會與法治向度課程 4 學分、自然與科學向度課程 4 學分。設計學院：人文與藝術向度課程 4 學分、社會與法治向度課程 4 學分、創新與創業向度課程 4 學分。人社學院：社會與法治向度課程 4 學分、自然與科學向度課程 4 學分、創新與創業向度課程 4 學分。修完學院指定向度課程 12 學分，剩餘 6 學分可在人文與藝術向度、社會與法治向度、自然與科學向度及創新與創業向度自由修滿，達到通識畢業 18 學分。
description.en: NA

notes: 請選：通識中心 / 博雅課程

name.zh: 學院指定向度 - 創新與創業
name.en: College designated dimension curriculum：Innovation and Entrepreneurship

description.zh: 學院指定向度 - 創新與創業
description.en: 各學院指定向度學分規定如下：機電學院：人文與藝術向度課程4學分、社會與法治向度課程4學分、創新與創業向度課程4學分。電資學院：人文與藝術向度課程4學分、自然與科學向度課程4學分、創新與創業向度課程4學分。工程學院：人文與藝術向度課程4學分、社會與法治向度課程4學分、創新與創業向度課程4學分。管理學院：人文與藝術向度課程4學分、社會與法治向度課程4學分、自然與科學向度課程4學分。設計學院：人文與藝術向度課程4學分、社會與法治向度課程4學分、創新與創業向度課程4學分。人社學院：社會與法治向度課程4學分、自然與科學向度課程4學分、創新與創業向度課程4學分。修完學院指定向度課程12學分，剩餘6學分可在人文與藝術向度、社會與法治向度、自然與科學向度及創新與創業向度自由修滿，達到通識畢業18學分。

notes: 請選：通識中心 / 博雅課程

description.zh: 本課程透過希臘英雄的偉大冒險故事以及希伯來聖經傳統中的聖哲事蹟來探索早期西方文明的兩大源頭（希臘與希伯來文化）所呈現出的主要風貌。
description.en: The main features of two great sources of early western civilizations, that is (1) Greek mythology and tragedies, and (2) Hebrew Biblical tradition, will be introduced to the students in the most exciting stories about Greek heroes and heroines as well as Biblical figures and events.

description.zh: 本課程旨在進一步加強學生的口語表達溝通之能力。經由合宜的活動設計，如小組討論，與英語談話情境的塑造，如面談，學生將獲得充分機會以演練聽講的技巧。
description.en: This course is designed to develop oral communication skills at a higher level. Stimulated theme-based scenarios and authentic content will be used to engage students with the purpose of generating lively conversation, and video films. Activities include task-based pair and small-group discussion for maximum practice and personalization.

notes: A 組 - 學號尾號數奇數，僅限英文系學生修讀

description.zh: 本科目旨在探討現實世界裡語言和溝通的種種現象，如：社會中之語言變化、大眾媒體的語言使用等，並介紹應用語言學門之緣起和現況。學生將需要分享自己對於本地或國際有關語言應用議題的觀察，例如：職場溝通模式、辨識性言詞分析、語言教學 / 測試趨勢、口筆翻譯項目、語言在新型媒體中之應用等。
description.en: This course aims to explore a variety of phenomena in language and communication in the real world, e.g., language variations in societies, language in the mass media, etc. It will also provide an overview of the historical background and the existing profile of applied linguistics as an academic discipline. Students are expected to share their own observations on AL-related issues, e.g., workplace communication modes, critical discourse analysis, language instruction/testing trends, translation/ interpretation projects, language use in the new forms of media, etc., in the local or international context.

description.zh: 本課程使學生具有基礎韓語能力，並加強會話及閱讀能力訓練。
description.en: The focus of this course is to enable students to have basic Korean abilities and to strengthen the training or drilling of conversation and reading comprehension of the Korean language.

description.zh: 本課程使學生具有基礎日語能力，並加強會話及閱讀能力訓練。
description.en: The focus of this course is to enable students to have basic Japanese abilities and to strengthen the training or drilling of conversation and reading comprehension of the Japanese language.

description.zh: 本課程使學生具有基礎西班牙語能力，並加強會話及閱讀能力訓練。
description.en: The focus of this course is to enable students to have basic Spanish abilities and to strengthen the training or drilling of conversation and reading comprehension of the Spanish language.

description.zh: 本課程使學生具有基礎德語能力，並加強會話及閱讀能力訓練。
description.en: The focus of this course is to enable students to have basic German abilities and to strengthen the training or drilling of conversation and reading comprehension of the German language.

name.zh: 學院指定向度 - 社會與法治
name.en: College designated dimension curriculum：Social and Rules of Law

description.zh: 各學院指定向度學分規定如下：機電學院：人文與藝術向度課程 4 學分、社會與法治向度課程 4 學分、創新與創業向度課程 4 學分。工程學院：人文與藝術向度課程 4 學分、社會與法治向度課程 4 學分、創新與創業向度課程 4 學分。管理學院：人文與藝術向度課程 4 學分、社會與法治向度課程 4 學分、自然與科學向度課程 4 學分。設計學院：人文與藝術向度課程 4 學分、社會與法治向度課程 4 學分、創新與創業向度課程 4 學分。人社學院：社會與法治向度課程 4 學分、自然與科學向度課程 4 學分、創新與創業向度課程 4 學分。修完學院指定向度課程 12 學分，剩餘 6 學分可在人文與藝術向度、社會與法治向度、自然與科學向度及創新與創業向度自由修滿，達到通識畢業 18 學分。
description.en: The dimension credits stipulated by each college are as follows：College of Mechanical and Electrical Engineering：4 credits for the humanities and art curriculum, 4 credits for the Social and Rules of Law curriculum, and 4 credits for the innovation and entrepreneurship curriculum.College of Engineering： 4 credits for the humanities and art curriculum, 4 credits for the Social and Rules of Law curriculum, and 4 credits for the innovation and entrepreneurship curriculum.College of Management： 4 credits for the humanities and art curriculum, 4 credits for the Social and Rules of Law curriculum, and 4 credits for the nature and science curriculum.College of Design： 4 credits for the humanities and art curriculum, 4 credits for the Social and Rules of Law curriculum, and 4 credits for the innovation and entrepreneurship curriculum.

notes: 請選：通識中心 / 博雅課程

name.zh: 學院指定向度 - 自然與科學
name.en: College designated dimension curriculum：Nature and Science

description.zh: 各學院指定向度學分規定如下：機電學院：人文與藝術向度課程 4 學分、社會與法治向度課程 4 學分、創新與創業向度課程 4 學分。電資學院：人文與藝術向度課程 4 學分、自然與科學向度課程 4 學分、創新與創業向度課程 4 學分。工程學院：人文與藝術向度課程 4 學分、社會與法治向度課程 4 學分、創新與創業向度課程 4 學分。管理學院：人文與藝術向度課程 4 學分、社會與法治向度課程 4 學分、自然與科學向度課程 4 學分。設計學院：人文與藝術向度課程 4 學分、社會與法治向度課程 4 學分、創新與創業向度課程 4 學分。人社學院：社會與法治向度課程 4 學分、自然與科學向度課程 4 學分、創新與創業向度課程 4 學分。修完學院指定向度課程 12 學分，剩餘 6 學分可在人文與藝術向度、社會與法治向度、自然與科學向度及創新與創業向度自由修滿，達到通識畢業 18 學分。
description.en: NA

notes: 請選：通識中心 / 博雅課程

description.zh: 以英語語言、教學法、及學生在專業領域的英語需求為主軸，專業英文 ESP 系列課程涵蓋以下關鍵面向：學術英文、專業實踐 / 應用英文、內容和語言整合英文教學，議題與趨勢，以及語言技巧能力。 此系列課程專為本校大二修習校訂共同英文的學生設計，強化英語能力，並應用英文於專業領域之發展。
description.en: Drawing upon the English language, pedagogy, students’ needs for English in specialized domains, the ESP series encompass the following key dimensions: English for general academic purposes, English for professional practice / application, content and language integrated learning, issues and trends, and integrative language skills for testing and communication. The courses are designed for the second year (sophomore), non-native English speaking students to strengthen their English competence and become more proficient in their fields of study.

notes: 請選校院級課程 \ 大二專業英文 (四)

description.zh: 本課程的重點在於闡述統計學之基本概念，主要的內容涵蓋三個領域：敘述統計、機率理論與推論統計，其中包含概念介紹、敘述統計、機率理論、推論統計。另有統計學的應用領域於推論未知的情況以作為相關決策之依據，並包含統計軟體使用介紹。
description.en: The purpose of Statistics is to give students an introductory of statistical thinking, methods development and the assessment of credibility and value of inferences made from data. A conceptual introduction to the field of statistics and its many applications with extensive coverage of data collection and analysis as needed to evaluate the reported results of statistical students and make a good decision will be included as well. The statistical software introduction will also be introduced in the class.

description.zh: 本課程適合一般大專行銷管理之授課。其目的在尋求優良的產品行銷管理方法，以求企業之良好利潤。本課程授課內容在使學生瞭解行銷管理之觀念，產品設計、產品運銷、促銷及訂價。相關之授課內容包括：市場區隔、市場組織、購買行為、產品開發、零售、批發、促銷、廣告及訂價程序等。
description.en: The marketing course is suitable to college student. The purpose is to find good method of product marketing, in order to pursuit good profit of enterprise. The course contents' goal makes student understand the idea of marketing, product design, product transportation, promotion and price setting. The related course includes: market segmentation, market organization, the behavior of buying, product development, retailing, whole-saling promotion, advertising and price setting process.

notes: 以經管系學生優先

description.zh: 本課程之目的在使同學對財務管理之專業知識產生一概略的認識，期望同學能瞭解資金之運用、籌措及管理之一些觀念及技巧，並做為未來進行相關財務決策或進一步研究財務理論之基礎。本課程會將攸關財務的主題加以介紹，包含：1. 財務報表分析 2. 時間價值，債券與股票 3. 投資決策與折現分析 4. 風險、報酬與資金成本 5. 公司融資政策 6. 資本結構與股利政策 7. 財務規畫 8. 合併與購併 9. 風險管理
description.en: This purpose of this course is to help undergraduate students to understand the basic concept and issues in corporate finance.This course will focus on basic issues in corporate finance, such as:1. Financial Statement Analysis 2. Valuing Bonds and Stocks3. Capital Budgeting Decisions4. Risk, Return, and Cost of Capital5. Corporate Financing Decisions6. Capital Structure and Dividend Policy7. Financial Planning8. Mergers and Acquisitions9. Risk Management

name.en: Database System and Database System and Applications

description.zh: 資料庫系統與應用課程的目的在研習資料庫設計與管理技術及其在企業的應用。本課程方向包括：資料庫管理系統架構、關聯式資料模式、關聯式資料庫設計理論、關聯查詢最佳化、關聯式資料庫管理系統：以 MS SQL Server 為例，以實務性方式，培養學生對資料庫系統設計開發之能力。
description.en: The objective of this course is to study the techniques of how to design and manage a database system. The topics contained in this course are: database system structure, relational database, E-R model, relational database design, query optimization, relational database management system-MS SQL Server etc. After studying this course, students should be able to design databases and manage database systems.

description.zh: 本課程為財務會計領域之進階課程，針對已具初級會計學之學生深入講授財務會計之理論、觀念、方法及程序。本課程全面納入國際財務報導準則 (IFRS)﹐內容包括：介紹財務報導觀念架構、主要財務報表編製、講解資產負債表中有關資產、負債、股東權益以及現金流量表與租賃會計等，修習本課程可使學生對 IFRS 有全面整體了解及運用之能力，亦有助於將來參加會計乙級、記帳士及公務人員高考等證照考試。
description.en: This curriculum enters the step curriculum for the financial accounting. Intermediate accounting requires ever increasing knowledge and refinement of skills. Our goal is to achieve the most educational effective blend of concepts and practice relation to the current intermediate accounting body of knowledge. This course strives to provide the material needed to understand this subject area using IFRS. It may also be helpful to participate in accountant the license test and the government workers examination.

description.zh: 人際關係是探討對自我的了解及對人的認知，包括性格、態度、魅力、溝通、壓力、挫折和情緒等重要課題的處理；幫助同學學習與各種不同品味、信念、立場與生活方式的人作有效率的溝通，開放的表達出自己的感覺與想法，以建立良好的合作關係，從而開發潛能、爭取更好的發展機會。溝通是人際關係中重要的手段，本課程提供學生對溝通知識的了解，並熟悉溝通的實務運用。課程重心涵蓋溝通的本質與觀念性架構，溝通的理論與模型，溝通的規劃、執行與控制，溝通的策略與技能。
description.en: Interpersonal Relationship is to discuss about self-understanding and perception of other people, including how to handle key issues related to character, attitude, attractiveness, communication, pressure, frustration and emotion. It helps students to learn effective communication, open their minds to express personal feeling and thought, and try to communicate with other people having different tastes, convictions, standpoints and ways of living so as to establish a harmonic and cooperative relationship and develop personal potential and strive for better opportunity of development. The course discuss about the communication issue from business manager. It introduces the concepts of communication and the practice about communication. The core of the course include the knowledge of communication and structure、theory and models.

description.zh: 本校體育課程目標為鍛鍊健全身心、促進身心健全發展、培養運動道德、發揚團隊精神及養成終身運動習慣。四技一、二年級實施專項分組教學，由具有專長之教師授課。開課項目：籃球、排球、桌球、羽球、保齡球、射箭、高爾夫球、網球、體操遊戲、慢速壘球、太極拳、國際標準舞、體適能、國術。學生得按自己興趣選擇修習。

This requirement applies to Freshman and Sophomore students, classes are interest-oriented, thus giving students the opportunity to select specific activities they are interested in. Choices include Basketball, Volleyball, Table Tennis, Badminton, Bowling, Archery, Golf, Tennis, Gymnastics, Slow pitch, Tai Chi Chuan, Ballroom Dancing, Physical Fitness and martial arts, to mention a few.

description.zh: 以英語語言、教學法、及學生在專業領域的英語需求為主軸，專業英文 ESP 系列課程涵蓋以下關鍵面向：學術英文、專業實踐 / 應用英文、內容和語言整合英文教學，議題與趨勢，以及語言技巧能力。 此系列課程專為本校大二修習校訂共同英文的學生設計，強化英語能力，並應用英文於專業領域之發展。
description.en: Drawing upon the English language, pedagogy, students’ needs for English in specialized domains, the ESP series encompass the following key dimensions: English for general academic purposes, English for professional practice / application, content and language integrated learning, issues and trends, and integrative language skills for testing and communication. The courses are designed for the second year (sophomore), non-native English speaking students to strengthen their English competence and become more proficient in their fields of study.

notes: 請選校院級課程 \ 大二專業英文 (二)

description.zh: 透過原理解說與系統實作，使學生熟悉物件導向設計原理及 C++ 進階程式設計技術，內容含：1. C++ 物件模型 2. 類別與物件 3. 建構者與解構者 4. 繼承 5. 虛擬函式與多型 6. 運算子溢載 7. 例外處理 8. 泛型程式設計 9. 標準模板程式庫 10. 期末專題設計
description.en: To familiarize the student with an overview of the object-oriented programming (OOP) paradigm and advanced techniques of the C++ language. Topics include: 1. C++ Object Model 2. Classes and Objects 3. Constructors and Destructors 4. Inheritance 5. Virtual Functions and Polymorphism 6. Operator Overloading 7. Exceptions 8. Generic Programming 9. Standard Template Library 10. Term Project

description.zh: 資料表示法：定點系統 (fixed point system)，浮點系統 (floating point system)，2. 運算工作：定點之加減乘除，快速之運算，浮點運算，3. 指令與控制：各種指令介紹，中斷，硬體控制單元設計 (hardwired control)，微程式控制單元設計 (microprogramming)，4. 記憶系統：記憶體之層次 (memory hierarchy)，虛擬記憶系統 (virtual memory)，快速記憶 (cache memory)。
description.en: 1. data representation (fixed point and floating point systems) 2. arithmetic and logic operations 3. command and control (hardwired control and microprogramming) 4. memory organization (cache and virtual memory)

description.zh: １. 電腦網路概述與網路階層結構２. 路由與交換技術與協定 ３. 錯誤、流量與擁塞控制 ４. 媒體存取控制 ５. 區域網路技術與應用６. 網際網路協定與標準７. 網路互連技術８. 網路機制效能評估
description.en: １.Computer network overview and layered communications２. Routing and switching protocol３.Error, flow and congestion control ４.Medium access control ５.Local area networks６. Network protocols and standards ７.Network interconnection８.Performance analysis

description.zh: 本校體育課程目標為鍛鍊健全身心、促進身心健全發展、培養運動道德、發揚團隊精神及養成終身運動習慣。四技一、二年級實施專項分組教學，由具有專長之教師授課。開課項目：籃球、排球、桌球、羽球、保齡球、射箭、高爾夫球、網球、體操遊戲、慢速壘球、太極拳、國際標準舞、體適能、國術。學生得按自己興趣選擇修習。
description.en: All students are required to attend two hours per week of Physical Education class. This requirement applies to Freshman and Sophomore students, classes are interest-oriented, thus giving students the opportunity to select specific activities they are interested in. Choices include Basketball, Volleyball, Table Tennis, Badminton, Bowling, Archery, Golf, Tennis, Gymnastics, Slow pitch, Tai Chi Chuan, Ballroom Dancing, Physical Fitness and martial arts, to mention a few.

notes: 請選：體育室 \ 體育專項

description.zh: 本課程包含: (1) 一階常微分方程式，(2) 高階常微分方程式，(3) 常微分方程之冪級數解法，(4) 邊界值問題，(5) 拉普拉斯轉換
description.en: This course contains: (1)First-order ODEs,(2)Higher-order ODEs,(3)Series solutions of ODEs,(4)Boundary value problems,(5)Laplace Transform

description.zh: 了解電磁學之基本觀念與應用。（１） 電磁模型（２） 向量分析（３） 靜電場（４） 靜電問題解法（５） 靜電流（６） 靜磁場（７） 時變場與馬克斯威爾定理（８） 平面電磁波（９） 傳輸線理論與應用（１０） 波導及共腔共振器（１１） 天線反輻射原理
description.en: To make the students understand the basic concepts and applications of Electromafneties which includes : 1.Electromafnetic Model. 2.The Vector Analysis. 3.Static Electric Fields. 4.Electrostatic Problems`Solutions. 5.Steady Eletric Currents. 6.Steat Mafnetic Fields. 7.Time Varying Fields and Maxwells`Equations. 8.Plane Electromapnetic Waves. 9.Theory and Applications of Transmission Lines. 10.Wavef uide and Carity Resonators. 11.Antenna and Radiation Theory.

description.zh: 即使科學昌明如此，但我們日常生活中使用的、不斷推陳出新的照相機、攝錄影機、影印機等，在在都說明幾何光學現在仍然是主宰設計的工具。光學主要是藉著對光本質方面的瞭解，發展有關的理論基礎與計算法則，並進而用在日常生活且增益人類福祉的一門科學。幾何光學則是光學理論中，一連串近似運算的結果，著重在成像的效果和應用的一門工具性知識。本系之幾何光學是一學期、三學分、每週三小時的課程，教學內容大致包含以下三部份：一、介紹光的性質、在介面上反射、折射之有關定理、成像的原因及應用。二、分析像差現象及其成因與評估。三、淺介透鏡之設計。
description.en: Light is the principal means by which we gain knowledge of the world. From putting continually the improved camera, video cassette recorder, copying machine, etc., to market can just account for how important a designing tool the Geometric-Optics is.To build a solid basic theory and a rule for calculating through understanding thoroughly the nature of light is the central goal of Optics. Using the basic theory of optics and processes of approximate estimate, the Geometric-Optics put its point on image formation and its applications.Here in our department, the Geometric-Optics is a 3-credit, 3-hour per week, one-semester course. There are three consecutives parts in the one-semester lecture:The 1st part : (a)the nature of light, (b)the related theorems about reflection and refraction, (c) image formation.The 2nd part : the formation and correctness of aberrations.The 3rd part : the designing of lenses.

description.zh: 本課程為光電科學之概念介紹，本課程包括光的特性、固態物理概念、光的調變、顯示器、雷射、光偵測器、光纖維波導以及光通訊系統。
description.en: The course of Introduction to Optoelectronic Engineering introduces the concepts of the science of electro-optics. It consists properties of light, concepts of solid state physics, modulation of light, display devices, lasers, photo-detectors, fiber optical wave-guide and optical communication systems.

description.zh: 克希荷夫定律 (KCL, KVL) 及網目電位法、節點電流法及重疊定律、戴維寧定律、諾頓定律等之電路計算技巧應用；RLC 電路之一階、二階電路之暫態自然響應及相量式之餘弦波函數穩態分析。
description.en: Some useful techniques of circuit analysis in mesh current method, nodal analysis, superposition principle and thevenin's theorems and so on; the first order and second order equation for natural response in RLC circuits and phasor concept to forced response in sinusoidal steady-state equation.

description.zh: 先修課程：3001011 或負責教授同意。力、質量與加速度、質點運動學、質點動力學、功與能、衝量與動量、剛體運動、剛體系的動力學。
description.en: Force and Acceleration, Kinematics of a Particle, Kinetics of a Particle, Work and Energy, Impulse and Momentum, Kinematics of a Rigid Body, Kinetics of a Rigid Body.

description.zh: 先修課程：微積分或負責教授同意。常微分方程式、線性常微分方程式、拉普拉氏轉換、級數及傅立葉級數、線性代數及矩陣、積分定理。
description.en: Introduction of the deformation, Strain and stress of structure (Beam, Column, Pressure vessel) under different loading conditions such as Tension, Compression, Shear force, Torsion and Bending moment.

description.zh: 先修課程：3001011 或負責教授同意。介紹結構體在受到張力、壓力、剪力、扭力及彎曲等外力狀態下之變形，分析應力、應變及變形，莫耳圓、壓力容器、樑、柱。
description.en: Prerequisite: ME111 or Consent of InstructorIntroduction of the deformation, strain and stress of structures (Beam, Column, Pressure vessel) under several different loading conditions such as Tension, Compression, Shear force, Torsion and Bending moment.

description.zh: 先修課程：負責教授同意。物質熱力學特性、改變能量形式之基本原理、熱力學第一及第二定律、可逆性與可用性、動力循環、冷凍循環、混合氣、化學反應。
description.en: Prerequisite: Consent of InstructorThermodynamic Properties of Substance, Energy Forms, The First Law Thermodynamics, The Second Law of Thermodynamics, Irreversibility & Availability, Power Cycle, Refrigeration Systems, Mixtures, and Chemical Reactions.

notes: 半導體二與機電二合開

description.zh: 1. 簡介 2. 網路定律及元件 3. 電路分析簡介 4. 節點電壓及迴路電流 5. 網路特性 6. 一階電路 7. 二階電路 8. 線性非時變電路 9. 電力網路與穩定度分析 10. 電路幾何學
description.en: This course is designed for students who have taken the course in introductory electrical engineering.1. Basic Concepts 2.Kirchhoff's Laws and Elements. 3.Circuit Analysis. 4.Node Voltages and Loop Currents. 5.Characteristics of Circuits. 6.First-Order Circuits 7.Second-Order Circuits 8.Linear Time-Invariant Circuits 9.Network Functions and Stability 10.Circuit Topology and General Circuit Analysis

description.zh: 1. 簡介 2. 線性電路 3. 運算放大器 4. 二極體 5. 非線性電路應用 6. 接面場效電晶體 (JFET) 7. 金屬氧化物半導體場效電晶體 (MOSFET) 8. 雙極性接面電晶體 (BJT)
description.en: This course is to study the characteristics of the semiconductor devices and design of the electronic circuits. This course will contain as following subjects:1.Basic Concepts. 2.Linear Circuits. 3.Differential and Multistage Amplifiers. 4.The pn Junction Diode 5.Non-linear Circuits. 6.Field-Effect Transistors (FETs) 7.MOS Digital Circuits 8.Bipolar Digital Circuits

notes: 限機電學士班學生修課

description.zh: 冷凍空調概論、基礎知識與定義、空氣熱力學、基本冷凍循環與應用分析、壓縮理論及壓縮機性能分析、冷凍空調系統組成 - 壓縮機、冷凝器、冷媒控制器、蒸發器、冷凍介質－冷媒、二次冷媒吸收劑及冷凍油、冷媒管路及配件、空調處理過程及空調維護分析。
description.en: Refrigeration & air conditioning Introduction Fundamentals & definitions Psychrometrics Basic refrigeration cycles & application analysis Compression cycle theory & performance of compressors Compression system compositions- compressor, condenser, refrigerant controls Cooling mediums- refrigerants, secondary refrigerants, absorbents, refrigeration oils. Refrigerant piping & accessories. Air conditioning processes & cycles analysis.

notes: 三 ABC 二教 304、機電二和技優二合開

description.zh: 本校體育課程目標為鍛鍊健全身心、促進身心健全發展、培養運動道德、發揚團隊精神及養成終身運動習慣。四技一、二年級實施專項分組教學，由具有專長之教師授課。開課項目：籃球、排球、桌球、羽球、保齡球、射箭、高爾夫球、網球、體操遊戲、慢速壘球、太極拳、國際標準舞、體適能、國術。學生得按自己興趣選擇修習。
description.en: All students are required to attend two hours per week of Physical Education class. This requirement applies to Freshman and Sophomore students, classes are interest-oriented, thus giving students the opportunity to select specific activities they are interested in. Choices include Basketball, Volleyball, Table Tennis, Badminton, Bowling, Archery, Golf, Tennis, Gymnastics, Slow pitch, Tai Chi Chuan, Ballroom Dancing, Physical Fitness and martial arts, to mention a few.

notes: 請選：體育室 \ 體育專項

name.zh: 學院指定向度 - 人文與藝術
name.en: College designated dimension curriculum：Humanities and Art

description.zh: 各學院指定向度學分規定如下：機電學院：人文與藝術向度課程 4 學分、社會與法治向度課程 4 學分、創新與創業向度課程 4 學分。電資學院：人文與藝術向度課程 4 學分、自然與科學向度課程 4 學分、創新與創業向度課程 4 學分。工程學院：人文與藝術向度課程 4 學分、社會與法治向度課程 4 學分、創新與創業向度課程 4 學分。管理學院：人文與藝術向度課程 4 學分、社會與法治向度課程 4 學分、自然與科學向度課程 4 學分。設計學院：人文與藝術向度課程 4 學分、社會與法治向度課程 4 學分、創新與創業向度課程 4 學分。
description.en: The dimension credits stipulated by each college are as follows：CMEE：4 credits for the humanities and art curriculum, 4 credits for the Social and Rules of Law curriculum, and 4 credits for the innovation and entrepreneurship curriculum.EECS：4 credits for the humanities and art curriculum, 4 credits for the nature and science curriculum, and 4 credits for the innovation and entrepreneurship curriculum.College of Engineering：4 credits for the humanities and art curriculum, 4 credits for the Social and Rules of Law curriculum, and 4 credits for the innovation and entrepreneurship curriculum.College of Management：4 credits for the humanities and art curriculum, 4 credits for the Social and Rules of Law curriculum, and 4 credits for the nature and science curriculum.College of Design： 4 credits for the humanities and art curriculum, 4 credits for the Social and Rules of Law curriculum, and 4 credits for the innovation and entrepreneurship curriculum.CHASS：4 credits for t

notes: 請選：通識中心 / 博雅課程

name.zh: 學院指定向度 - 創新與創業
name.en: College designated dimension curriculum：Innovation and Entrepreneurship

description.zh: 學院指定向度 - 創新與創業
description.en: 各學院指定向度學分規定如下：機電學院：人文與藝術向度課程4學分、社會與法治向度課程4學分、創新與創業向度課程4學分。電資學院：人文與藝術向度課程4學分、自然與科學向度課程4學分、創新與創業向度課程4學分。工程學院：人文與藝術向度課程4學分、社會與法治向度課程4學分、創新與創業向度課程4學分。管理學院：人文與藝術向度課程4學分、社會與法治向度課程4學分、自然與科學向度課程4學分。設計學院：人文與藝術向度課程4學分、社會與法治向度課程4學分、創新與創業向度課程4學分。人社學院：社會與法治向度課程4學分、自然與科學向度課程4學分、創新與創業向度課程4學分。修完學院指定向度課程12學分，剩餘6學分可在人文與藝術向度、社會與法治向度、自然與科學向度及創新與創業向度自由修滿，達到通識畢業18學分。

notes: 請選：通識中心 / 博雅課程

description.zh: 以英語語言、教學法、及學生在專業領域的英語需求為主軸，專業英文 ESP 系列課程涵蓋以下關鍵面向：學術英文、專業實踐 / 應用英文、內容和語言整合英文教學，議題與趨勢，以及語言技巧能力。 此系列課程專為本校大二修習校訂共同英文的學生設計，強化英語能力，並應用英文於專業領域之發展。
description.en: Drawing upon the English language, pedagogy, students’ needs for English in specialized domains, the ESP series encompass the following key dimensions: English for general academic purposes, English for professional practice / application, content and language integrated learning, issues and trends, and integrative language skills for testing and communication. The courses are designed for the second year (sophomore), non-native English speaking students to strengthen their English competence and become more proficient in their fields of study.

notes: 請選校院級課程 \ 大二專業英文 (二)

description.zh: 基本儀器介紹；電子零件之認識；二極體電路（特性）；運算放大器；電晶體電路（特性）；A/D ，D/A 轉換器；類比乘法器。運算放大器應用；線性電壓調整器；電壓參考及電流源；電壓比較器；電壓控制振盪器；鎖相迴路；頻率－電壓轉換器；類比－數位轉換器；數位－類比轉換器；特殊裝置語言合成電路。
description.en: Course Title:Electronics and Electronics Lab.Description:The properties of semiconductor and fabrication of a PNdiode and BJT, and their characteristics are explained. Part 2concentrates on analog circuit and system. Method of biasing adiscrete BJT or EET are given, and stability of the operating point isdiscussed. The small-signal model for each device is abstained and usedto calculate the performance of low frequency single stage andcascaded amplifiers. The feedback concepts of AMP. OP AMP, itscharacteristics and applications are described.

notes: 必修：電機、電子、資工、光電。

description.zh: 瞭解工程系統中常用數學之原理及應用，內容包含：1. 常微分一階、二階及高階方程式之解法，2. 拉普拉斯 (Laplace) 變換及其在電路上之應用，3. 向量分析及其在電磁學上之應用。
description.en: 1.Ordinary differential equations of the first order2.Linear ordinary differential equations of the second order3.Laplace transforms4.Vector analysis and its application to electormagnetics

notes: 必修：電機、電子、光電。選修：資工。

description.zh: 瞭解電路元件之基本特性及其組合電路之分析方法，內容包含：1. 電路元件：電壓及電流源，主動元件，2. 電路特性：歐姆定律，柯希荷夫電壓與電流定律等，3. 一階及二階電路：電路之微分方程描述及各種輸入信號之響應，4. 穩態分析與頻率響應：分析電路之頻域，5. 電腦輔助電路分析：如使用 SPICE 工具。
description.en: 1.Introduction to linear circuit analysis2.Resistve circuit 3.Kirchhoff laws4.Thevenin and Norton theorem5.First and second order circuit6.Node and loop analysis7.Steady state response and analysis8.SPICE tool

notes: 必修：電機、電子、資工、光電。

description.zh: 1. 集合，序列與函數 2. 基礎邏輯 3. 關聯式 4. 計數（排列，組合）5. 圖與樹（基礎圖論）6. 遞迴式與演算法 7. 有向圖
description.en: 1.Sets Sequences and Function2.Elementary Logic3.Relations4.Counting5.Graph and Tree6.Recursion Trees and Algorithms7.Digraphs

notes: 必修：資工。選修：電機、電子、光電。

description.zh: 透過原理解說與系統實作，使學生熟悉物件導向設計原理及 C++ 進階程式設計技術，內容含：1. C++ 物件模型 2. 類別與物件 3. 建構者與解構者 4. 繼承 5. 虛擬函式與多型 6. 運算子溢載 7. 例外處理 8. 泛型程式設計 9. 標準模板程式庫 10. 期末專題設計
description.en: To familiarize the student with an overview of the object-oriented programming (OOP) paradigm and advanced techniques of the C++ language. Topics include: 1. C++ Object Model 2. Classes and Objects 3. Constructors and Destructors 4. Inheritance 5. Virtual Functions and Polymorphism 6. Operator Overloading 7. Exceptions 8. Generic Programming 9. Standard Template Library 10. Term Project

notes: 必修：資工。選修：電機、電子、光電。

description.zh: 本課程主要介紹在計算機科學中常見或基本的資料結構，探討的主題包括: ADT (抽像資料型態) 及複雜度，靜態結構與儲存表示，陣列，堆疊，佇列，串列，樹狀結構，遞迴，排序，搜尋。
description.en: This course is mainly aimed at introducing the data structures commonly used in programming languages which include ADT (abstract data type) and complexity, static structures and their storage representations, arrays, stacks, queues, linked lists, trees, recursion, sorting, and searching.

notes: 資工二和電資二合開。必修：資工。選修：電機、電

description.zh: 1. 靜電場 (I): 在真空中的靜電場 2. 靜電場 (II): 介電材料 3. 靜電場 (III): 解 Laplace's 和 Poisson's Equations 的一般方法 4. 相對論 (I): 基本概念 5. 相對論 (II): 移動電荷的電磁場 6. 磁場 (I): 穩定電流和非磁性材料 7. 磁場 (II): 感應電動勢和磁場 8. 磁場 (III): 磁性材料
description.en: 1. Electrostatic Field I：Electrostatic Field in a Vacuum2. Electrostatic Field II：Dielectric Material3. Electrostatic Field Ⅲ：Genernal Methods for Solving Laplace's and Poisson's Equations4. Relativity I：The Basic Concepts5. Relativity II：The Electric and Magnetic Field of Moving Electric Charges6. Magnetic Fields I：Steady Currents and Nonmagnetic Materials7. Magnetic Fields II：Induced Electromotance and Magnetic Energy8. Magnetic Fields Ⅲ：Magnetic Materials

notes: 必修：光電。選修：電機、電子、資工。希望不排六教

description.zh: 本課程之教學目標在使學生瞭解信號與系統之基本概念及分析方法，以作為控制，通訊，電子電路，濾波器設計及數位信號處理等課程修習之基礎。課程內容包含：(1) 標準訊號及訊號表示法 (2) 連續系統的數學分析 (3) 離散系統的數學分析 (4) 拉氏轉換分析 (5) Z - 轉換分析 (6) 傅立葉分析 (7) 工程應用。
description.en: course title : signals and systemsdescription : this course contains the properties of signals , systems , LTI systems , and basis linear transforms . this is a basic course in the field of control and communication .

description.zh: 本校體育課程目標為鍛鍊健全身心、促進身心健全發展、培養運動道德、發揚團隊精神及養成終身運動習慣。四技一、二年級實施專項分組教學，由具有專長之教師授課。開課項目：籃球、排球、桌球、羽球、保齡球、射箭、高爾夫球、網球、體操遊戲、慢速壘球、太極拳、國際標準舞、體適能、國術。學生得按自己興趣選擇修習。
description.en: All students are required to attend two hours per week of Physical Education class. This requirement applies to Freshman and Sophomore students, classes are interest-oriented, thus giving students the opportunity to select specific activities they are interested in. Choices include Basketball, Volleyball, Table Tennis, Badminton, Bowling, Archery, Golf, Tennis, Gymnastics, Slow pitch, Tai Chi Chuan, Ballroom Dancing, Physical Fitness and martial arts, to mention a few.

notes: 請選：體育室 \ 體育專項

name.zh: 學院指定向度 - 自然與科學
name.en: College designated dimension curriculum：Nature and Science

description.zh: 各學院指定向度學分規定如下：機電學院：人文與藝術向度課程 4 學分、社會與法治向度課程 4 學分、創新與創業向度課程 4 學分。電資學院：人文與藝術向度課程 4 學分、自然與科學向度課程 4 學分、創新與創業向度課程 4 學分。工程學院：人文與藝術向度課程 4 學分、社會與法治向度課程 4 學分、創新與創業向度課程 4 學分。管理學院：人文與藝術向度課程 4 學分、社會與法治向度課程 4 學分、自然與科學向度課程 4 學分。設計學院：人文與藝術向度課程 4 學分、社會與法治向度課程 4 學分、創新與創業向度課程 4 學分。人社學院：社會與法治向度課程 4 學分、自然與科學向度課程 4 學分、創新與創業向度課程 4 學分。修完學院指定向度課程 12 學分，剩餘 6 學分可在人文與藝術向度、社會與法治向度、自然與科學向度及創新與創業向度自由修滿，達到通識畢業 18 學分。
description.en: NA

notes: 請選：通識中心 / 博雅課程

name.en: College designated dimension curriculum：Innovation and Entrepreneurship

description.zh: 學院指定向度 - 創新與創業
description.en: 各學院指定向度學分規定如下：機電學院：人文與藝術向度課程4學分、社會與法治向度課程4學分、創新與創業向度課程4學分。電資學院：人文與藝術向度課程4學分、自然與科學向度課程4學分、創新與創業向度課程4學分。工程學院：人文與藝術向度課程4學分、社會與法治向度課程4學分、創新與創業向度課程4學分。管理學院：人文與藝術向度課程4學分、社會與法治向度課程4學分、自然與科學向度課程4學分。設計學院：人文與藝術向度課程4學分、社會與法治向度課程4學分、創新與創業向度課程4學分。人社學院：社會與法治向度課程4學分、自然與科學向度課程4學分、創新與創業向度課程4學分。修完學院指定向度課程12學分，剩餘6學分可在人文與藝術向度、社會與法治向度、自然與科學向度及創新與創業向度自由修滿，達到通識畢業18學分。

description.zh: 以英語語言、教學法、及學生在專業領域的英語需求為主軸，專業英文 ESP 系列課程涵蓋以下關鍵面向：學術英文、專業實踐 / 應用英文、內容和語言整合英文教學，議題與趨勢，以及語言技巧能力。 此系列課程專為本校大二修習校訂共同英文的學生設計，強化英語能力，並應用英文於專業領域之發展。
description.en: Drawing upon the English language, pedagogy, students’ needs for English in specialized domains, the ESP series encompass the following key dimensions: English for general academic purposes, English for professional practice / application, content and language integrated learning, issues and trends, and integrative language skills for testing and communication. The courses are designed for the second year (sophomore), non-native English speaking students to strengthen their English competence and become more proficient in their fields of study.

notes: 請選校院級課程 \ 大二專業英文 (五)

description.zh: 本課程是針對有志從事文化創意產業的學生而設計的創意策略與企劃課程。課程從廣告的基本概念開始說明，如產品的開發策略、市場規模估計、競爭產品的研究和分析、消費者行為研究、SWOT、3C 等。本課程的目的是以創新思考和市場行銷概念引導學生，並鼓勵學生從當前的創意產業中，發掘潛在機會，以創造新鮮且有趣的想法。
description.en: This course is a strategy and general project management for students interested in pursuing careers in the cultural and creative industry. The course starts from the basic concepts and functions in the advertising, such as the development of product strategy, market size estimation, competitor identification and analysis, consumer behavior research, SWOT, 3Cs, and so on. This course aims to guide students equipped with innovation thinking and marketing sense. Additionally, the course drives students to look through potential opportunities in the creative industry and to implement new and interesting ideas.

description.zh: 建立專業知識基礎與實務能力為教學目標，利用影像製作軟體學習數位影像製作，結合平面設計及動畫設計，學習 photoshop、painter、AI 軟體操作，透過課程學習影像製作與合成的各種可能性，訓練軟體操作能力，培養設計美感。
description.en: This class aims to establish professional knowledge and practical ability for learners, the use of digital video production software learning video production, combined with graphic design and animation design, learning Photoshop, Painter, and Illustrator software operations, and synthetic video production courses through various possibilities, training software ability to operate and develop the design aesthetic.

notes: 計中電腦教室

description.zh: 課程規劃教授近代工藝設計的演進歷程，並融入工藝時尚跨界合作之案例介紹，協助學生認識當代設計思潮並體會工藝產品的機能與造形之美。配合當前文化創意產業政策與時尚產業的發展，瞭解工藝設計與時尚趨勢之未來發展。
description.en: The course introduces the evolution of modern craft design, and integrates the case of cross-border cooperation between craftsmanship and fashion. It aims to help students understand contemporary design and experience the beauty of function and form. In addition, the course cooperates with the cultural and creative industry policy and the development of the fashion industry, trying to help students explore the future of craft design and fashion.

notes: 配合 USR 計畫

description.zh: 本課程旨在經由對文化經濟學的認知，解讀文化經濟的發展邏輯與運行機制，建構文化經濟知識體系，期能為文化市場與文化產業發展提供理論基礎與思維座標。課程主要內容，一為在經濟邏輯運行下的文化活動，諸如文化產品、文化事業、文化資本、文化產業、文化市場等；另一為經濟活動所反映與體現的文化因素，以及對經濟運行產生作用的思維價值等。
description.en: The course aims through awareness of cultural economics to interpret the development logic and operating mechanism of cultural economy and to construct a cultural economic knowledge system, and is expected to provide the theoretical basis and thinking coordinates for the development of cultural markets and cultural industries.The main content of the course is economic logics underpinned cultural activities, such as cultural products, cultural business, cultural capital, cultural industries and cultural markets; on the other hand, cultural factors reflected and experienced by economic activities, as well as the value of thinking which plays an important role in economic activities.

description.zh: 無論是故事的大框架，或僅只是簡短的情節片段，都是人們表達抒陳極具效能的方式。打從幼兒坐在母親膝上開始，故事就是他認識社會與世界的方法，幾千年來的人類文明即是藉由故事流傳而累積，生生不息。不論東方或西方，希臘哲學家柏拉圖與中國的《毛詩大序》裡早就以故事來做為智慧傳達的工具。故事的影響力在歷史上不但成了治國與社會道德責任的重要工具，亦成為反主流價值表述手段。故事力甚至影響著個人外在環境與內心流動交錯中尋求意義的方法，引領人的行為。然而，在當今資訊發達的世代，說故事已經不再是文藝家的權力，故事力已經成領導統御與個人魅力的利器，情節的力量更成為品牌價值建構的關鍵。無論是個人或是團體，說故事的能力已經成為社群媒體認識與被認識重要的一課，也因此對於數位內容的創造者來說更顯特別重要。在學會如何說一個好故事之前，且讓我們來追本朔源，抽絲剝繭，比較東西文化經典故事的組成與架構，從做一個好的聆聽者做起，再來說一個自己的故事。培養學生敘事底蘊，以精讀中西方故事經典原形，配合批評理論，檢視時代與社會變遷對於故事原形轉化的影響原素，啟發學生的故事力與創作力的文化底蘊，以及創意轉化時的視野與氣度 。
description.en: As soon as a child sat on his mother's lap, the story is his way of understanding the world. Human civilization for thousands of years circulated tirelessly through the accumulated stories. From both the East and the West, the Plato and China's "Book of Poetry", even the Analects of Confucius, Zhuangzi, mythology, Buddhism, or the Greek philosophy of "Dialogue" all recorded with the form of stories. The influence of the story not only became the rule of history and an important tool of social and moral teachings, they also became the anti-mainstream values expressions. The story even forms meanings in personal investigations. Moreover, in today's information society, story is no longer the power of writers and artists, the story has become the skills of leadership and charisma, and the power of the plot has become the key to the construction of marking brands.

notes: 上限 15 人

description.zh: 教導同學在攝影棚內，如何正確使用人造光源，來詮釋靜物的質感與氣氛。
description.en: Teach students in the studio, how to properly use artificial light to interpretationStill release texture and atmosphere.

notes: 上限 15 人

name.en: Course Description Seminars on the Aesthetics of Life

description.zh: 「生活美學」是文化生活發展的重要內核，也是文化產業化、產業文化化過程中必要關涉的範疇與議題，本課程旨在探索中國歷代文化生活的重要元素及其呈現模式，取材雅富美感的行為文化，進而尋覓發展成為體驗經濟模式的途徑，達到由文化復育到文化設計的目的。「生活美學」是現代人據各家美學定義所推論出的新名詞，專應用於生活；「文化設計」乃取用生活美學諸元素，作人際禮儀的規劃設計。透過提煉、體驗設計與推廣，實現傳承古風、用古於今、達到充實且深刻的現代生活美學追求。 課程的規劃結合三個面向，將人際互動需求、「茶」與「香」的美席設計、茶鄉文化實務再造三者連結，作實驗性文化美學設計。期擬提供人情交流重整的精緻平台，並可望成為一項跨域連結新創產業的前導。
description.en: Life Aesthetics is the kernel of cultural life; it has become integral in the process toward cultural industrialization and industrial culturalization. Life aesthetics is not only inscribed in our cultural experiences, but also affiliated with the "creative life," This course will examine the important elements constituting cultural lives across different dynasties in Chinese history and investigate their patterns of presentations. By integrating old with new, tradition with modernity, cultural heritage with contemporary practices, students are empowered in their imagination and creativity in cultural designs, This course comprises three stages. the focus is primarily on the ideas of heaven and mankind and their correlativity, including concepts of solar terms and rhythm of life, permanence and non-permanence, patriarchal clan system and people's beliefs and ethics. The course ends with presentations of students' application projects.

description.zh: 本課程主要目的在促進學生進一步瞭解檔案策展與加值應用之概念與方法，並著重於檔案典藏單位及其所典藏檔案之展示規劃及應用。透過本課程之授課內容，學生可培養以下幾個能力：（1）認識檔案策展之基本概念；（2）理解檔案加值應用之原則與倫理；（3）具備檔案評估、規劃及檔案資料應用之專業素養。
description.en: This course will introduce the basic concepts and practical issues in archives curating and value added. And then, focus on the exhibition planning and application of archives and archival material. By attending the class students will: (1) Understand basic concepts and methods of archives curation. (2) Gain in-deep understanding the principles and ethics of archives value added. (3) Possess the archival intelligence to use, evaluate and curate the archival material.

description.zh: 本校體育課程目標為鍛鍊健全身心、促進身心健全發展、培養運動道德、發揚團隊精神及養成終身運動習慣。四技一、二年級實施專項分組教學，由具有專長之教師授課。開課項目：籃球、排球、桌球、羽球、保齡球、射箭、高爾夫球、網球、體操遊戲、慢速壘球、太極拳、國際標準舞、體適能、國術。學生得按自己興趣選擇修習。
description.en: All students are required to attend two hours per week of Physical Education class. This requirement applies to Freshman and Sophomore students, classes are interest-oriented, thus giving students the opportunity to select specific activities they are interested in. Choices include Basketball, Volleyball, Table Tennis, Badminton, Bowling, Archery, Golf, Tennis, Gymnastics, Slow pitch, Tai Chi Chuan, Ballroom Dancing, Physical Fitness and martial arts, to mention a few.

notes: 請選：體育室 \ 體育專項

name.zh: 學院指定向度 - 社會與法治

description.en: The dimension credits stipulated by each college are as follows：College of Mechanical and Electrical Engineering：4 credits for the humanities and art curriculum, 4 credits for the Social and Rules of Law curriculum, and 4 credits for the innovation and entrepreneurship curriculum.College of Engineering： 4 credits for the humanities and art curriculum, 4 credits for the Social and Rules of Law curriculum, and 4 credits for the innovation and entrepreneurship curriculum.College of Management： 4 credits for the humanities and art curriculum, 4 credits for the Social and Rules of Law curriculum, and 4 credits for the nature and science curriculum.College of Design： 4 credits for the humanities and art curriculum, 4 credits for the Social and Rules of Law curriculum, and 4 credits for the innovation and entrepreneurship curriculum.

notes: 請選：通識中心 / 博雅課程

name.zh: 學院指定向度 - 自然與科學
name.en: College designated dimension curriculum：Nature and Science

description.zh: 各學院指定向度學分規定如下：機電學院：人文與藝術向度課程 4 學分、社會與法治向度課程 4 學分、創新與創業向度課程 4 學分。電資學院：人文與藝術向度課程 4 學分、自然與科學向度課程 4 學分、創新與創業向度課程 4 學分。工程學院：人文與藝術向度課程 4 學分、社會與法治向度課程 4 學分、創新與創業向度課程 4 學分。管理學院：人文與藝術向度課程 4 學分、社會與法治向度課程 4 學分、自然與科學向度課程 4 學分。設計學院：人文與藝術向度課程 4 學分、社會與法治向度課程 4 學分、創新與創業向度課程 4 學分。人社學院：社會與法治向度課程 4 學分、自然與科學向度課程 4 學分、創新與創業向度課程 4 學分。修完學院指定向度課程 12 學分，剩餘 6 學分可在人文與藝術向度、社會與法治向度、自然與科學向度及創新與創業向度自由修滿，達到通識畢業 18 學分。
description.en: NA

notes: 請選：通識中心 / 博雅課程

description.zh: 以英語語言、教學法、及學生在專業領域的英語需求為主軸，專業英文 ESP 系列課程涵蓋以下關鍵面向：學術英文、專業實踐 / 應用英文、內容和語言整合英文教學，議題與趨勢，以及語言技巧能力。 此系列課程專為本校大二修習校訂共同英文的學生設計，強化英語能力，並應用英文於專業領域之發展。
description.en: Drawing upon the English language, pedagogy, students’ needs for English in specialized domains, the ESP series encompass the following key dimensions: English for general academic purposes, English for professional practice / application, content and language integrated learning, issues and trends, and integrative language skills for testing and communication. The courses are designed for the second year (sophomore), non-native English speaking students to strengthen their English competence and become more proficient in their fields of study.

notes: 請選校院級課程 \ 大二專業英文 (四)

description.zh: 本課程之目的在訓練學生，使學生熟悉經常使用之統計方法與理論，能利用已知之資料整理、分析未知之現象，打好修習其他相關學科之基礎。課程內容包括：機率理論、推定、假設檢定、迴歸分析、變異數分析等。
description.en: The purpose of this course is to train student and to provide a background in the theory and methodology of general statistical issues. Topics include: probability theory, inference, hypothesis testing, regression analysis and variance analysis.

description.zh: 讓學生了解投資的基本觀念，課程內容主管要介紹證券 (股票、債券)、期貨、選擇權的投資，以及證券的評價模式和 CAPM 等訂價模式說明。驟。
description.en: The course helps stdents to understand the knowledge of investment. It includes security. Future option and CAPM Models.

notes: 請協助安排先鋒教室

description.zh: 介紹資料庫系統之基本概念，熟悉基本指令及操作方法，使之能輕易建立資料檔案，並可對其資料進行擷取、添加、刪除、修改、編輯、排序、建立索引及產生標準報表列印等，且開發一套簡易應用軟體。
description.en: This course introduces the basic concepts of database system. The students can understand the operation process in order to develop the data file. In addition, the retrieval, add, delete, modify, edit and sorting of data files are also provided. Finally, the students can develop a DBMS for themselves.

description.zh: 值此一網際網路和數位經濟時代，資料通訊與網路已經顯著影響企業經營、管理及決策與策略規劃同時也影響人們之生活及活動。它的應用非常廣泛、無所不在且多元。 商業公司及企業可以運用資料通訊及網路化資訊系統來提升競爭優勢及執行績效、經營者決策及客戶服務效率與全球化商務、產品及服務。資料通訊可以在各種設置上以有線及無線的方式使用。因此，本課程的開課目標旨在學習並瞭解資料通訊及網路之基本原理、基礎建設、技術、管理及企業應用等之議題。本課程主要探討之主題包括 (1) 資料通訊基本原理、(2) 資料傳輸技術、(3) 網路應用、(4) 有線及無線區域網路、(5) 有線及無線廣域網路、(6) 網際網路與 TCP/IP、(7) 網路安全、(8) 網路設計、(9) 網路管理、(10) 分散資料處理、(11) 主從、內部網路與雲端運算、(12) 第四代行動網路和往後世代等。
description.en: In this era of Internet economy, businesses and enterprises may leverage data communications (DC) and networked information systems to enhance competitive advantages, streamline managerial decision making, and customer services. DC may be adopted in a variety of devices on both wire and wireless modes. Consequently, the objectives of this course aim to study the issues of fundamentals, infrastructure, technologies, management and business applications on data communications and networks. The major topics of this course contains (1)Fundamentals of DC, (2)Technologies of data transmission, (3)Network applications, (4)Wired and wireless local area networks, (5)Wired and wireless wide area networks, (6)The Internet and TCP/IP, (7)Network security, (8)Design networks, (9)Network administration, (10)Distributed data processing, (11)Client/Server, Intranet, and cloud computing, (12)Fourth generation (4G) Mobile networks and onwards.

name.en: Selective News and Events in Finance

description.zh: 本課程主要目的在於讓學生透過熟悉財金時事所使用之英文專業名詞、市場術語，以及行業慣有之英文論述結構等提升財金領域之專業英文閱讀能力；此外，本課程亦將著重於訓練學生之英譯能力。
description.en: The major purpose of this course is to promote learners’ reading ability by training them to understand terminologies, jargons and description structure of writings in finance news and events. In addition, this course also aims to train the learners’ ability of translating English into Chinese.

name.zh: Python 在金融領域上的應用
name.en: Application of Python in the financial field

description.zh: 本課程偏重在如何將 Python 應用在金融實務領域上：怎麼取得網路上費的資料，怎麼使用 Python 視覺化功能分析，怎麼使用 Python 進行有用的回測，怎麼做投資組合最佳化配置。
description.en: This course focuses on how to apply Python in the field of financial practice: how to acquire free data online, how to utilize Python's visualization capabilities for analysis, how to conduct useful backtesting using Python, and how to optimize investment portfolio allocation.

description.zh: 本課程的重點在於闡述管理學之基本概念，主要的內容涵蓋四個領域：(1) 瞭解管理學之理論與相關學者之研究報告；(2) 討論企業界管理應用實務案例；(3) 探討多國化管理之趨勢與差異及 (4) 如何落實管理理論研討與趨勢。另外一有管理相關功能實務應用之討論與介紹
description.en: The purpose of Management has four distinct objectives:(1) to introduce a new management paradigm；(2) to effectively combine the basic concepts of management and organizational behavior into a single volume, including the management functional and departmental descriptions；(3) to discuss business management applications in practice and (4) to effectively implement the management basic ideas. The planning, organization, decision, leadership and monitoring among variety culture will be covered and discussed in the class as well.

description.zh: 本校體育課程目標為鍛鍊健全身心、促進身心健全發展、培養運動道德、發揚團隊精神及養成終身運動習慣。四技一、二年級實施專項分組教學，由具有專長之教師授課。開課項目：籃球、排球、桌球、羽球、保齡球、射箭、高爾夫球、網球、體操遊戲、慢速壘球、太極拳、國際標準舞、體適能、國術。學生得按自己興趣選擇修習。

This requirement applies to Freshman and Sophomore students, classes are interest-oriented, thus giving students the opportunity to select specific activities they are interested in. Choices include Basketball, Volleyball, Table Tennis, Badminton, Bowling, Archery, Golf, Tennis, Gymnastics, Slow pitch, Tai Chi Chuan, Ballroom Dancing, Physical Fitness and martial arts, to mention a few.
