name.zh: 學院指定向度 - 人文與藝術
name.en: College designated dimension curriculum：Humanities and Art

description.zh: 各學院指定向度學分規定如下：機電學院：人文與藝術向度課程 4 學分、社會與法治向度課程 4 學分、創新與創業向度課程 4 學分。電資學院：人文與藝術向度課程 4 學分、自然與科學向度課程 4 學分、創新與創業向度課程 4 學分。工程學院：人文與藝術向度課程 4 學分、社會與法治向度課程 4 學分、創新與創業向度課程 4 學分。管理學院：人文與藝術向度課程 4 學分、社會與法治向度課程 4 學分、自然與科學向度課程 4 學分。設計學院：人文與藝術向度課程 4 學分、社會與法治向度課程 4 學分、創新與創業向度課程 4 學分。
description.en: The dimension credits stipulated by each college are as follows：CMEE：4 credits for the humanities and art curriculum, 4 credits for the Social and Rules of Law curriculum, and 4 credits for the innovation and entrepreneurship curriculum.EECS：4 credits for the humanities and art curriculum, 4 credits for the nature and science curriculum, and 4 credits for the innovation and entrepreneurship curriculum.College of Engineering：4 credits for the humanities and art curriculum, 4 credits for the Social and Rules of Law curriculum, and 4 credits for the innovation and entrepreneurship curriculum.College of Management：4 credits for the humanities and art curriculum, 4 credits for the Social and Rules of Law curriculum, and 4 credits for the nature and science curriculum.College of Design： 4 credits for the humanities and art curriculum, 4 credits for the Social and Rules of Law curriculum, and 4 credits for the innovation and entrepreneurship curriculum.CHASS：4 credits for t

notes: 請選：通識中心 / 博雅課程

description.zh: 本課程希望在一學年中，能使學生對微分及積分有充分的瞭解、培養邏輯推理、啟發思考創造、強化計算演繹並注重應用與作圖，以建立同學未來學習工程數學及相關專業課程之數學基礎，充分達到學以致用的目的。課程內容包括：1. 極限與連續，2. 導數及其應用，3. 不定積分與定積分，4. 超越函數及其反函數，5. 積分法則，6. 不定型與瑕積分，7. 定積分的應用，8. 空間幾何與向量微積分，9. 偏導數，10. 重積分。
description.en: This course aims at developing comprehension of Derivation and Integral、activating capabilities of Logic Inference and Induction、enlightening confidence and independence、strengthening calculating abilities with an emphasis on its application and diagram、furnishing a sound basis for future specialty. The content includes: 1.Limits and Continuity, 2.Derivative and Application, 3.Indefinite and Definite Integral, 4.Transcendental Functions and their Inverses, 5.Techniques of Integration, 6.Indeterminate Forms and Improper Integral, 7.Application of Integration, 8.Basic Vector Analysis, 9.Partial Derivative, 10.Multiple Integration.

description.zh: 本校之普通物理課程專為工程科系背景之同學設計，主要的目的是鼓勵同學參與大自然運行奧秘、法則之探索，並供給爾後修習專業課程之堅實基礎。本課程之內容包含力學、熱力學、聲學、電磁學、光學及近代物理。教授者可按每週三小時、二個學期的時間設計、再參酌各系不同之需求、加強或節略某些章節。
description.en: The course is designed for the students with engineering background. The theme of this course is to encourage students to participate in the discovery of laws and wonder of nature, and to solidate the foundation for the particular courses of study for different departments. The contents of this course include mechanics, dynamics, thermodynamics, electromagnetics, optics, and foundation of modern physics, etc.. The lecturers will emphasize or abridge certain contents based on the individual needs of departments. For this course, there will be 3 credits for each of two semesters, and 3 lecture hours per week.

description.zh: 介紹單位換算與有效數位，元素的原子結構、化學方程式平衡與計算，反應熱，氣體與氣體定律，大氣層與環境污染，週期表，化學鍵，化合物的分子結構，熱力學，動力學，反應機構，平衡常數，氧化與還原，酸鹼反應，電化學，混合物的分離及現代科技材料，奠定良好化學基礎。
description.en: The course is designed for chemical engineering major. The topics explore chemistry at a greater depth and with more emphasis on concepts, problems, and calculations. Topics include significant figures, thermochemistry, gases, quantum theory and the electronic structure of atoms, periodic relationships, chemical bonding, chemical reaction, oxidation-reduction reaction, chemical kinetics, chemical equilibrium, acids and bases, changes of states, synthetic polymer materials, electrochemistry.

description.zh: 配合化學課程之進展，教導學生學習各項基本實驗操作及儀器設備之技巧，進行各項實驗課程，如 COD 的測定，氮莫耳體積之測定，錯合物之生成，氧化還原滴定，蒸汽壓，測量溶解度，反應速率，化學平衡，耐綸 - 6,6 之製備以訓練學生養成手腦並用的務實科學素養。
description.en: Following the progress of the course of chemistry, introduce chemical engineering students to learn basically operations and techniques for several kinds of devices. Scheduling laboratory experiments include the determination of COD, the determination of molar nitrogen volume, the synthesis of complex, the determination of redox titration, vapor pressure, the determination the solubility, rates of chemical reactions, chemical equilibrium, and the preparation of Nylon-6, 6. This course is designed to train students how to use their brain and hands simultaneously and to settle down their science concepts.

description.zh: 本課程是針對近代生物學感興趣的學生所設計，內容涵蓋生命與能量、細胞與分子生物學、生物多樣性、動植物的結構與功能、遺傳訊息的傳遞、生命的演化與生態。讓學生瞭解生命體系的輪廓，為生物科技的基礎課程。
description.en: A one-term introductory course intended for students interesting in modern life science. This course will cover topics in energy and life, cellular and molecular biology, biological diversity, structure and function of plant and animal, and transmission genetics. Principles of evolution and ecology will also be covered.

notes: (選化工系必修；餘 3 系選修)

description.zh: 本課程主要針對各種材料（金屬、陶瓷、高分子、複合材料）之基本原理，性質及應用，做概要性的介紹。內容包括材料之晶體結構與晶體缺陷，固體材料之原子擴散，相圖與相變化，材料製程及應用，材料之物理性質（光性質、電性質、磁性質及熱性質），材料之機械性質（強度、延展性、硬度、韌性、疲勞、潛變），材料之強化機構與方法。
description.en: This course is a basic topics of Materials Science.

notes: (選材資系必修；餘 3 系選修)

description.zh: 本校體育課程目標為鍛鍊健全身心、促進身心健全發展、培養運動道德、發揚團隊精神及養成終身運動習慣。四技一、二年級實施專項分組教學，由具有專長之教師授課。開課項目：籃球、排球、桌球、羽球、保齡球、射箭、高爾夫球、網球、體操遊戲、慢速壘球、太極拳、國際標準舞、體適能、國術。學生得按自己興趣選擇修習。
description.en: All students are required to attend two hours per week of Physical Education class. This requirement applies to Freshman and Sophomore students, classes are interest-oriented, thus giving students the opportunity to select specific activities they are interested in. Choices include Basketball, Volleyball, Table Tennis, Badminton, Bowling, Archery, Golf, Tennis, Gymnastics, Slow pitch, Tai Chi Chuan, Ballroom Dancing, Physical Fitness and martial arts, to mention a few.

notes: 請選：體育室 \ 體育專項

description.zh: 「全民國防教育法」自民國 95 年 2 月開始施行，以國際情勢、國防政策、全民國防、防衛動員、國防科技五大主軸作為全民國防教育的課程規畫。「國際情勢」單元，主要論述區域安全與兩岸情勢發展，培育學生宏觀的國際視野；更進一步說明在全球化浪潮下，國際重要的安全議題及我國的因應之道。「國防政策」單元，在論述我國國防政策內涵及大陸政策的發展，使學生認識當前國防政策施政方針，增進國防安全知識；並介紹我國國家安全法制與危機管理機制，藉此體認國家安全的重要性，加強全民國防意識。「全民國防」單元，主要論述國家意識及全民防衛的概念、內涵與重要性，並介紹國防與經濟、文化、心理的關聯，讓學生理解國防事務其實與生活息息相關，加強全民國防意識，增進對國家的認同。「防衛動員」單元，在探討全民防衛動員的意義與功能，說明全民防衛動員對國家安全的重要性；並介紹青年服勤動員內涵，讓學生體會自己在全民防衛動員體系中所扮演的角色，進而涵養愛國意識，深化全民國防共識。「國防科技」單元，主要使學生了解武器系統概況，並認識國防科技發展與我國國防產業現況，引發對國防科技的興趣，進而認同國防、支持國防。
description.en: In order to meet the requirement of Act of All-Out Defense Education that put into action in February 2006, the curriculum of All-Out Defense Education Military Training planned by Ministry of Education is divided into five sections: International Situations, National Defense Policies, Civil Defense, Defense Mobilization, and Military Technology. In International Situations, the object is to cultivate students’ broader international perspectives through discussing Asian-Pacific regional security and the development of cross-strait relation. In Civil Defense, the object is to make students aware that national defense affairs are closely related to their daily life. In Defense Mobilization, the object is to let students recognize their roles in all-out defense mobilization system. In Defense Technology, the main object is to let students overview the development of weapon systems, and understand the current development of the nation’s defense technology and defense industry.

name.en: First step to achieving the goals of universities

description.zh: 大學入門是針對大一新生所開授之全校性課程。用以協助學生：(一) 認識高等教育的理念、目的與價值 (二) 有效學習 (三) 涵養正視困境並妥適因應能力。藉以實踐自我鍛鍊，自我掌握，自我經營並建構宏觀視界的高等教育宗旨。
description.en: "First step to achieving the goals of universities" is a campus-wide course provided for all of the first-year students at this school. The course is designed to help first-year students to achieve the following aims and objectives:(1) understanding the basic idea, goals, and fundamental value of higher education at college level;(2) learning proper study attitudes and methods effectively;(3) cultivating the required abilities and skills of responding appropriately to setbacks and difficult situations in order to acquire self-knowledge, self-control, and self-management, so that they may construct the knowledge and imagination that are needed in planning for grand visions of achieving the goals of higher education.

description.zh: 本校科技大學的國文課程，以能力及素養之培植為導向，並以精深致用為授課標的，方能不負大學國文課程之名，並符合本校重視實務應用的優良傳統。依授課教師之取擇，課程可概分為兩大類。一、文學類：著重在文學品味力、語文敏感力、文學創意力與實作創造力等能力的深化。二、思想類：著重在批判思辨力、邏輯推演力、決斷力、組織整合力、論述力與品格實踐力等能力的提升。期盼藉由這兩大方面的磨礪，為學「生」未來的「生」存、「生」活與「生」命，開展出璀璨的「三生」有幸。
description.en: The Chinese language curriculum of the University of Science and Technology of this university is oriented to the cultivation of ability and literacy, and is taught with intensive application. Only then can it live up to the name of the university's Chinese language curriculum and conform to the school's fine tradition of emphasizing practical application.Depending on the choice of the instructor, the courses can be divided into two categories.1. Literature: Focus on the deepening of literary taste, language sensitivity, literary creativity and practical creativity.2. Thinking category: Focus on the improvement of critical thinking ability, logical deduction ability, decision ability, organizational integration ability, discussion ability and character practice ability.It is hoped that through the cultivation and training of these two aspects, we will develop a brilliant three lives for the future survival, life and life of students.

name.zh: 學院指定向度 - 人文與藝術
name.en: College designated dimension curriculum：Humanities and Art

description.zh: 各學院指定向度學分規定如下：機電學院：人文與藝術向度課程 4 學分、社會與法治向度課程 4 學分、創新與創業向度課程 4 學分。電資學院：人文與藝術向度課程 4 學分、自然與科學向度課程 4 學分、創新與創業向度課程 4 學分。工程學院：人文與藝術向度課程 4 學分、社會與法治向度課程 4 學分、創新與創業向度課程 4 學分。管理學院：人文與藝術向度課程 4 學分、社會與法治向度課程 4 學分、自然與科學向度課程 4 學分。設計學院：人文與藝術向度課程 4 學分、社會與法治向度課程 4 學分、創新與創業向度課程 4 學分。
description.en: The dimension credits stipulated by each college are as follows：CMEE：4 credits for the humanities and art curriculum, 4 credits for the Social and Rules of Law curriculum, and 4 credits for the innovation and entrepreneurship curriculum.EECS：4 credits for the humanities and art curriculum, 4 credits for the nature and science curriculum, and 4 credits for the innovation and entrepreneurship curriculum.College of Engineering：4 credits for the humanities and art curriculum, 4 credits for the Social and Rules of Law curriculum, and 4 credits for the innovation and entrepreneurship curriculum.College of Management：4 credits for the humanities and art curriculum, 4 credits for the Social and Rules of Law curriculum, and 4 credits for the nature and science curriculum.College of Design： 4 credits for the humanities and art curriculum, 4 credits for the Social and Rules of Law curriculum, and 4 credits for the innovation and entrepreneurship curriculum.CHASS：4 credits for t

notes: 請選：通識中心 / 博雅課程

description.zh: 本課程分四年（八學期）教授， 四學年課程培養的核心專業能力如下: ■ 第一年：以建築設計的基礎為範疇。訓練造型基礎，包括尺度、比例﹑秩序與韻律、實虛、量體與空間等造型的基本設計能力。 ■ 第二年 ：以人與空間為範疇，並學習建築的內部構成要素。在具備設計基礎能力之後，進一步接觸建築的基本向度與原理的設計練習，包括身體與空間、使用行為模式、建築物理環境、構造與結構系統、建築構成系統、建築的類型與形態。 ■ 第三年 ：都市建築為主要範疇。將建築的關注聚焦到與其連結的環境系統或城市紋理，學習從外部環境或都市理論回饋到建築的規劃設計。第四年：即畢業設計，培養學生針對特定建築問題之探究能力，鼓勵以建築思索如何關注社會、文化與自然的課題，最終以設計方案回應之。
description.en: This four-year course will be taught within eight semesters and aims to train students in the core competencies as follows:■ First year: foundations of architectural designTraining of fundamental modeling, including basic designing concepts such as scale, proportion, order and rhythm, solid and void, volume, and space■ Second year: people and space, and internal elements of architectureBeyond competency in elementary design, further practicing basic aspects and principles of architecture design, including human body and space, user behavior model, physical environment of buildings, construction and structure system, architectural composition system, architectural type and form, etc.■ Third year: Urban architectureFocus of environmental system or urban structure relating to architecture, which helps students apply what they have learned from the external environment or urban theory to the planning and design of buildings■ Fourth year: Graduation projectCultivating ca

notes: 建築一和創意一合開 (限主修建築系選課)，新增一位新聘

description.zh: 本課程目標針對大一新生入門介紹建築專業分支領域。由建築學基本涵構作概略介紹，輔以案例介紹及適當實地參觀研討，進而了解建築學相關知識體系，並對未來四年建築專業課程內容有全盤性認識，進ㄧ步結合未來出路願景。著重訓練思考及觀察能力，以利學生認識建築學之整體關聯性，進而建立其全方位學習藍圖。內容包括建築相關產業與建造程序、體驗建築、建築單位尺寸、建築結構系統之美、建築設計風格、建築教育、新一代建築師、建築構造與材料、建築的社會文化性、建築與環境共生、建築與都市發展、建築相關法令等。
description.en: This course gives a brief introduction with those knowledge related architecture and construction for the freshmen of department of Architecture, that students may have a whole concept about each professional courses for the future 4 years. This course is focus on training the ability of thinking & observation of students to establish the integrated structure of Architecture.

notes: 建築一和創意一合開 (限主修建築系選課)

description.zh: 本課程整體目標為奠定學生建築製圖基礎能力，以期培育學生成為符合建築業界所需之人才；針對建築製圖之知識、技能、態度進行授課；主要為灌輸學生建築製圖基本常識、觀念；以所學實際運用於各種圖說之實際練習與操作。課程內容有 (1) 製圖用筆、比例尺、三角板、圓規等工具之介紹與應用；(2) 各種線條與工程字傳授與練習；(3) 建築圖說符號之說明與應用；(4) 三視圖與輔助視圖之講解及練習理解；(5) 空間應有尺度介紹與圖說練習；(6) 人物、植栽、舖面等點景之介紹與練習；(7) 建築平、立、剖面之陰影等建築表現法指導與操作。本課程符合系教育目標如下： 1. 訓練學生建築設計與工程基礎專業能力； 2. 透過實作方式彙整建築設計與建築構造之技能； 3. 引導建立建築專業道德倫理態度； 4. 整合建築理論與實務提升就業競爭力。
description.en: This is a fundamental course in architecture. The goal of the course is to establish the basic ability in handmade graphics. This class introduces fundamental issues in graphics such as(1) Introduce the graphics tools. (2) The usage of architectural graphic symbols. (3)Lines and fonts. (4)Reading and practicing three-dimensional diagrams. (5) Handling the relationship between space and scale. (6) Drawing practice on Landscape and human figure. (7)Shades and Shadows on the architectural graphics. After this course the students will acquire the following aspects: 1). Basic knowledge in architectural design and engineering. 2). Practical skill in architectural design and structure. 3). Correct attitude in architectural professions moral. 4). Integrate theory and real-life practice.

notes: 建築一和創意一合開 (限主修建築系選課)

description.zh: 以傳授設計原理、平面及立體設計觀念、美的形式原理、平面及立體的構成練習、對各種材料特性的應用經驗以及造形與色彩的研究達到設計感覺的養成並提高計畫性創造能力，是發展實用性及機能性以前之設計訓練的基礎。
description.en: This course aims to develop the ability of students to meet specific sensory needs through the creation of abstract visual order in the form of two-dimension and three-dimension. The visual organization of design elements including line, plane, volume, and the analysis of their abstract relationships and principles of order are studied.

description.zh: 以手繪與數位平行並進，訓練學生三維思考、設計與表達呈現的能力。
description.en: Introduce both freehand and computational techniques in visual representation. Develop abilities in 3D thinking and comunication.

description.zh: 包括製作模型所需用之各種機械設備操作、使用工具等之加工技術。
description.en: Training students to operate some basical equipment such as bench work, sheet metal, machining, and welding machines safely and correctly, giving them the primary skills in model making.

notes: 木工

description.zh: 本課程的授課內容如下：1. 木造技術發展史 2. 2. 磚造技術發展史 3. 3.RC 造技術發展史 4. 4. 鋼骨造技術發展史 5. 混合構造技術發展史
description.en: The course content about followings:1. Developmental history of wooden construction2. Developmental history of brick construction3. Developmental history of RC construction4. Developmental history of steel construction5. Developmental history of mixed construction

notes: 建築一和創意一合開 (限主修建築系選課)

description.zh: 本課程為每學期建築設計輔助配套課程，目的在協助同學加強必要的設計能力與技巧，並提升專業設計能力。同學也因此得以藉此課程加強自身的建築表現能力，例如表達、繪圖與獲得更進一步的構築知識。
description.en: As a parts and accessories to Architectural Design course, the goal of this seminar is to help students enhance their design proficiency superior to the excellent skill level of design. A student who completes this course will be able to perform a good presentation works such as oral, drawing, construction processing, etc. And will have better understanding in design presentation.

notes: 建築一和創意一合開 (限主修建築系選課)

description.zh: 一、 從廣域範圍介紹自然生態與人文資源永續發展之道二、 藉由我國現階段環境發展策略及個案經驗，實務討論生態環境課題與措施。三、 課程內容涵蓋台灣自然與生態環境現況、森林、山坡地、農地、能源、海洋、自然保育、人文環境保育、環境法規、環境影響評估。
description.en: 1. It will introduce the sustainable development of natural ecology and human resources through wide range.2. It will emphasize with students to discuss the issues and strategies on environmental ecology. Those discussions will depend on national environmental development policies and special cases in recent years.3. This course will include Taiwan nature and ecology, forest, lands lope , farmland, coastal area, natural conservation , human resources ,environmental impact assessment.

notes: 建築一和創意一合開 (限主修建築系選課)

description.zh: 本課程主要針對目前之軟體來調查並學習如何在三度空間表現、模擬、動畫、掃瞄及虛擬實境的運用。
description.en: The utilization of computer-aided visualization techniques through the use and investigation of commercially available software for photo-realistic rendering, lighting simulation, animation, scanning, raster graphics and virtual reality.

description.zh: 講述知識性內容包括瞭解設計的意義以及各種幫助人類生活的各種設 計領域並討論思想性內容，包括啟發思考及評判的態度以培養正確之設計觀。
description.en: Talking about the beginning of design, observe commodities on the surounding market places, and find how companies provide their commodities for the cansumers "wisely" to atract buyers. Discussion and practice on creativity. Introduce product development techniques, product design processes and how to evaluate good products for human beings.

notes: 請安排 PBL 或可供貼 / 評圖教室

description.zh: 本校體育課程目標為鍛鍊健全身心、促進身心健全發展、培養運動道德、發揚團隊精神及養成終身運動習慣。四技一、二年級實施專項分組教學，由具有專長之教師授課。開課項目：籃球、排球、桌球、羽球、保齡球、射箭、高爾夫球、網球、體操遊戲、慢速壘球、太極拳、國際標準舞、體適能、國術。學生得按自己興趣選擇修習。
description.en: All students are required to attend two hours per week of Physical Education class. This requirement applies to Freshman and Sophomore students, classes are interest-oriented, thus giving students the opportunity to select specific activities they are interested in. Choices include Basketball, Volleyball, Table Tennis, Badminton, Bowling, Archery, Golf, Tennis, Gymnastics, Slow pitch, Tai Chi Chuan, Ballroom Dancing, Physical Fitness and martial arts, to mention a few.

notes: 請選：體育室 \ 體育專項

description.zh: 「全民國防教育法」自民國 95 年 2 月開始施行，以國際情勢、國防政策、全民國防、防衛動員、國防科技五大主軸作為全民國防教育的課程規畫。「國際情勢」單元，主要論述區域安全與兩岸情勢發展，培育學生宏觀的國際視野；更進一步說明在全球化浪潮下，國際重要的安全議題及我國的因應之道。「國防政策」單元，在論述我國國防政策內涵及大陸政策的發展，使學生認識當前國防政策施政方針，增進國防安全知識；並介紹我國國家安全法制與危機管理機制，藉此體認國家安全的重要性，加強全民國防意識。「全民國防」單元，主要論述國家意識及全民防衛的概念、內涵與重要性，並介紹國防與經濟、文化、心理的關聯，讓學生理解國防事務其實與生活息息相關，加強全民國防意識，增進對國家的認同。「防衛動員」單元，在探討全民防衛動員的意義與功能，說明全民防衛動員對國家安全的重要性；並介紹青年服勤動員內涵，讓學生體會自己在全民防衛動員體系中所扮演的角色，進而涵養愛國意識，深化全民國防共識。「國防科技」單元，主要使學生了解武器系統概況，並認識國防科技發展與我國國防產業現況，引發對國防科技的興趣，進而認同國防、支持國防。
description.en: In order to meet the requirement of Act of All-Out Defense Education that put into action in February 2006, the curriculum of All-Out Defense Education Military Training planned by Ministry of Education is divided into five sections: International Situations, National Defense Policies, Civil Defense, Defense Mobilization, and Military Technology. In International Situations, the object is to cultivate students’ broader international perspectives through discussing Asian-Pacific regional security and the development of cross-strait relation. In Civil Defense, the object is to make students aware that national defense affairs are closely related to their daily life. In Defense Mobilization, the object is to let students recognize their roles in all-out defense mobilization system. In Defense Technology, the main object is to let students overview the development of weapon systems, and understand the current development of the nation’s defense technology and defense industry.

name.en: First step to achieving the goals of universities

description.zh: 大學入門是針對大一新生所開授之全校性課程。用以協助學生：(一) 認識高等教育的理念、目的與價值 (二) 有效學習 (三) 涵養正視困境並妥適因應能力。藉以實踐自我鍛鍊，自我掌握，自我經營並建構宏觀視界的高等教育宗旨。
description.en: "First step to achieving the goals of universities" is a campus-wide course provided for all of the first-year students at this school. The course is designed to help first-year students to achieve the following aims and objectives:(1) understanding the basic idea, goals, and fundamental value of higher education at college level;(2) learning proper study attitudes and methods effectively;(3) cultivating the required abilities and skills of responding appropriately to setbacks and difficult situations in order to acquire self-knowledge, self-control, and self-management, so that they may construct the knowledge and imagination that are needed in planning for grand visions of achieving the goals of higher education.

description.zh: 本校科技大學的國文課程，以能力及素養之培植為導向，並以精深致用為授課標的，方能不負大學國文課程之名，並符合本校重視實務應用的優良傳統。依授課教師之取擇，課程可概分為兩大類。一、文學類：著重在文學品味力、語文敏感力、文學創意力與實作創造力等能力的深化。二、思想類：著重在批判思辨力、邏輯推演力、決斷力、組織整合力、論述力與品格實踐力等能力的提升。期盼藉由這兩大方面的磨礪，為學「生」未來的「生」存、「生」活與「生」命，開展出璀璨的「三生」有幸。
description.en: The Chinese language curriculum of the University of Science and Technology of this university is oriented to the cultivation of ability and literacy, and is taught with intensive application. Only then can it live up to the name of the university's Chinese language curriculum and conform to the school's fine tradition of emphasizing practical application.Depending on the choice of the instructor, the courses can be divided into two categories.1. Literature: Focus on the deepening of literary taste, language sensitivity, literary creativity and practical creativity.2. Thinking category: Focus on the improvement of critical thinking ability, logical deduction ability, decision ability, organizational integration ability, discussion ability and character practice ability.It is hoped that through the cultivation and training of these two aspects, we will develop a brilliant three lives for the future survival, life and life of students.

name.zh: 學院指定向度 - 社會與法治
name.en: College designated dimension curriculum：Social and Rules of Law

description.zh: 各學院指定向度學分規定如下：機電學院：人文與藝術向度課程 4 學分、社會與法治向度課程 4 學分、創新與創業向度課程 4 學分。工程學院：人文與藝術向度課程 4 學分、社會與法治向度課程 4 學分、創新與創業向度課程 4 學分。管理學院：人文與藝術向度課程 4 學分、社會與法治向度課程 4 學分、自然與科學向度課程 4 學分。設計學院：人文與藝術向度課程 4 學分、社會與法治向度課程 4 學分、創新與創業向度課程 4 學分。人社學院：社會與法治向度課程 4 學分、自然與科學向度課程 4 學分、創新與創業向度課程 4 學分。修完學院指定向度課程 12 學分，剩餘 6 學分可在人文與藝術向度、社會與法治向度、自然與科學向度及創新與創業向度自由修滿，達到通識畢業 18 學分。
description.en: The dimension credits stipulated by each college are as follows：College of Mechanical and Electrical Engineering：4 credits for the humanities and art curriculum, 4 credits for the Social and Rules of Law curriculum, and 4 credits for the innovation and entrepreneurship curriculum.College of Engineering： 4 credits for the humanities and art curriculum, 4 credits for the Social and Rules of Law curriculum, and 4 credits for the innovation and entrepreneurship curriculum.College of Management： 4 credits for the humanities and art curriculum, 4 credits for the Social and Rules of Law curriculum, and 4 credits for the nature and science curriculum.College of Design： 4 credits for the humanities and art curriculum, 4 credits for the Social and Rules of Law curriculum, and 4 credits for the innovation and entrepreneurship curriculum.

notes: 請選：通識中心 / 博雅課程

name.zh: 文化事業發展與人才培育
name.en: Cultural Vocation Development and its Men Power Cultivation

description.zh: 文化事業是以「文化」為素材所開展的事業，性質上以文化、美學或社會價值為訴求，但也往往同時兼具經濟價值。本課程旨在介紹文化事業的內涵與範疇，比較其與當前政府推展的「文化創意產業」間的異同，其中「文化」、「文化政策」、「國際文化生態」等都是觸及的議題。其次，討論「高品質的文化服務」與「從業人員的素養」，探討從事者應具備的基本能力與人格特質，並借重測驗工具協助同學理解個人人格特質組成及分布。 對於重要文化事業區塊，或將採取主題介述方式，邀請業界人士進行講座，而實地參訪與場景演練也是重要的教學活動。
description.en: Cultural Vocation is a developing vocation base on culture. The scope of the nowadays so-called "Cultural Business" has more or less been verlapped with "The Business of Culture and Creativeness" with the essence of emphasis not only on the economic values but also on those of culture, esthetics and society. The course will be focused on introductory methodology through main topic discussions by inviting professionals from different realms of industries for panel symposiums. In addition, on-site visits and case simulations are also to be included as important educational activities. The initial courses will be discussions on cultural relevant topics such as "Culture", "Cultural policies", "Cultural Development" and "International Cultural Systems". Further various scopes and contents of "Cultural Vocation" and status quo of its development will be introduced and discussed.

description.zh: 本課程旨在讓學生認識中國及台灣本土的文學題材，熟悉各家的文學特色，進而懂得欣賞，並且能夠將之轉譯成文化符碼，靈活應用。然礙於文學作品繁多，課程時間有限，是以無法按照時間序，以史的方式一一介紹文學作品。是以為了避內容過於概論性或過於淺薄，本課程將以主題來進行教學。亦即依文類、時代、作家或風格來帶領同學由深而廣，逐漸培養同學賞析文學的能力。
description.en: This course aims to introduce students to literary topics in China and Taiwan, familiarize them with the literary characteristics of various authors, and enable them to appreciate and translate them into cultural codes for flexible application. However, due to the vast number of literary works and limited course time, it is not possible to introduce literary works in a chronological or historical manner. Therefore, in order to avoid overly general or shallow content, this course will be taught thematically. That is, students will be guided from depth to breadth by literary genres, time periods, authors, or styles, gradually cultivating their ability to appreciate literature.

description.zh: 課程旨在讓學生學習電腦 2D 與 3D 軟體之技能，俾能應用於文化商品設計之製圖，並配合其他各種參數式 3D 與材質編修電腦軟體之整合。
description.en: The course aims to enable students to learn the skills of computer 2D and 3D software which could be applied to the drawing of cultural product design, and the integration with parametric 3D and materials edit computer software.

name.zh: 基礎程式設計與人工智慧入門實作
name.en: Fundamental Programming and Introduction to Practical Artificial Intelligence

description.zh: 本課程為非資訊科系的程式設計入門課程，期能讓學生瞭解運算思維概念，並對資訊程式運作與設計方式有初步掌握。課程將以 Python 語言為實作演練工具，透過實際規劃、編寫、除錯與測試等階段，逐步培養學生基本程式設計能力。課程也將規劃人工智慧 (AI) 入門概念與基本做法，並由學生實際動手完成 AI 應用於文化發展領域議題的專題作品，讓學生能體會 AI 新科技對產業發展的現況，並思考面對未來 AI 新時代的準備方向。
description.en: This course is an introductory programming course for non-computer science majors, aiming to facilitate students understand the concept of computational thinking and gain a preliminary grasp of information program operation and design methods. The course will employ Python as the implementation and practice tool, gradually cultivating students' basic programming skills through practical planning, coding, debugging, and testing stages. Furthermore, the course will introduce the concepts and basic practices of Artificial Intelligence (AI). Students will have hands-on experience completing a project applying AI to cultural development issues. This allows students to appreciate the status of AI technology in industry and contemplate the preparation directions for the upcoming AI era.

notes: 計中電腦教室

description.zh: 本課程以衣食住行、飲食男女等日常活動、交往、思維為主軸，考察一般人的歷史活動與日常生活在各時期的變化。當歷史不再只是帝王將相的豐功偉業或名流大家的傳奇生活，升斗小民的日常生活看似微不足道，點點滴滴的匯聚而成的正是一個社會的大歷史。
description.en: This course focuses on different aspects of daily activities of ordinary people throughout historical periods trying to explore the development and structure of their culture including clothing, housing, foods, family functions, and transportation. By taking a close look at their interactions, concerns, manners and customs can the students gain an insight into the other side of history far beyond kings and queens, wars and struggles that construct orthodox historical accounts and documents.

description.zh: 本校體育課程目標為鍛鍊健全身心、促進身心健全發展、培養運動道德、發揚團隊精神及養成終身運動習慣。四技一、二年級實施專項分組教學，由具有專長之教師授課。開課項目：籃球、排球、桌球、羽球、保齡球、射箭、高爾夫球、網球、體操遊戲、慢速壘球、太極拳、國際標準舞、體適能、國術。學生得按自己興趣選擇修習。
description.en: All students are required to attend two hours per week of Physical Education class. This requirement applies to Freshman and Sophomore students, classes are interest-oriented, thus giving students the opportunity to select specific activities they are interested in. Choices include Basketball, Volleyball, Table Tennis, Badminton, Bowling, Archery, Golf, Tennis, Gymnastics, Slow pitch, Tai Chi Chuan, Ballroom Dancing, Physical Fitness and martial arts, to mention a few.

notes: 請選：體育室 \ 體育專項

name.zh: 學院指定向度 - 人文與藝術
name.en: College designated dimension curriculum：Humanities and Art

description.zh: 各學院指定向度學分規定如下：機電學院：人文與藝術向度課程 4 學分、社會與法治向度課程 4 學分、創新與創業向度課程 4 學分。電資學院：人文與藝術向度課程 4 學分、自然與科學向度課程 4 學分、創新與創業向度課程 4 學分。工程學院：人文與藝術向度課程 4 學分、社會與法治向度課程 4 學分、創新與創業向度課程 4 學分。管理學院：人文與藝術向度課程 4 學分、社會與法治向度課程 4 學分、自然與科學向度課程 4 學分。設計學院：人文與藝術向度課程 4 學分、社會與法治向度課程 4 學分、創新與創業向度課程 4 學分。
description.en: The dimension credits stipulated by each college are as follows：CMEE：4 credits for the humanities and art curriculum, 4 credits for the Social and Rules of Law curriculum, and 4 credits for the innovation and entrepreneurship curriculum.EECS：4 credits for the humanities and art curriculum, 4 credits for the nature and science curriculum, and 4 credits for the innovation and entrepreneurship curriculum.College of Engineering：4 credits for the humanities and art curriculum, 4 credits for the Social and Rules of Law curriculum, and 4 credits for the innovation and entrepreneurship curriculum.College of Management：4 credits for the humanities and art curriculum, 4 credits for the Social and Rules of Law curriculum, and 4 credits for the nature and science curriculum.College of Design： 4 credits for the humanities and art curriculum, 4 credits for the Social and Rules of Law curriculum, and 4 credits for the innovation and entrepreneurship curriculum.CHASS：4 credits for t

notes: 請選：通識中心 / 博雅課程

description.zh: 本課程希望在一學年中，能使學生對微分及積分有充分的瞭解、培養邏輯推理、啟發思考創造、強化計算演繹並注重應用與作圖，以建立同學未來學習工程數學及相關專業課程之數學基礎，充分達到學以致用的目的。課程內容包括：1. 極限與連續，2. 導數及其應用，3. 不定積分與定積分，4. 超越函數及其反函數，5. 積分法則，6. 不定型與瑕積分，7. 定積分的應用，8. 空間幾何與向量微積分，9. 偏導數，10. 重積分。
description.en: This course aims at developing comprehension of Derivation and Integral、activating capabilities of Logic Inference and Induction、enlightening confidence and independence、strengthening calculating abilities with an emphasis on its application and diagram、furnishing a sound basis for future specialty. The content includes: 1.Limits and Continuity, 2.Derivative and Application, 3.Indefinite and Definite Integral, 4.Transcendental Functions and their Inverses, 5.Techniques of Integration, 6.Indeterminate Forms and Improper Integral, 7.Application of Integration, 8.Basic Vector Analysis, 9.Partial Derivative, 10.Multiple Integration.

notes: 限管理學院學生修讀

description.zh: 介紹程式語言基本資料處理的概念， 包含基本輸入與輸出、程式的流程控制、函數的應用等指令之撰寫、程式之編輯、編譯、聯絡與程式之執行，並發展一套應用程式。
description.en: This course introduces the basic data processes of C++ language. They include input/output, program process control, application of functions, program editing and execution, and so on.

description.zh: 本課程主要使學生能強化會計學的基本觀念，並以國際會計原則 (IFRS) 為架構，熟悉會計流程與財務報表之編製。課程內容包含會計恆等式與財務報表的介紹、借貸法則、會計處理程序 (分錄、過帳、試算) 與調整、結帳與會計循環的完成、買賣業會計、存貨的會計處理、現金、應收帳款、不動產、廠房與設備、無形資產、負債、股東權益、以及投資活動的會計處理，最後則是現金流量表的編制，與財務報表的運用與分析。
description.en: This course is an introduction to the basic concepts and standards underlying financial accounting systems. Several important concepts will be studied in detail, including: cash, accounts and notes receivable, inventory, marketable securities, equity investments, PPE, intangibles, debt, equity issuance, and dividends. The course emphasizes the construction of the basic financial accounting statements - the income statement, retained earnings statement, statement of financial position, and statement of cash flows - as well as their interpretation. Financial accounting focuses on providing information that is relevant and useful for external users. This course expands your knowledge of understanding of the basic language and conceptions of accounting. The basic accounting concepts that will help you solve problems and exercises designed to transaction recording and financial statement preparation.

name.zh: 數位科技與人工智慧導論
name.en: Introduction to Digital Technology and Artificial Intelligence

description.zh: 數位科技與人工智慧是資訊科技發展的兩大重要驅動力，本課程旨在培養本系學生在此領域學習的藍圖與概念建立。本課程將介紹數位科技與人工智慧的基本概念、原理與應用。在數位科技方面，將涵蓋 IT 基礎設施、網際網路、資訊安全、虛擬化與雲端，IoT 等主題。在人工智慧方面，將涵蓋機器學習、深度學習、自然語言處理、電腦視覺等主題。
description.en: Digital Technology and Artificial Intelligence are two major driving forces of the development of information technology. This course aims to cultivate students' learning blueprints and concepts in this field. This course will introduce the basic concepts, principles and applications of digital technology and artificial intelligence.In the areas of digital technology, it will cover topics such as IT infrastructure, the Internet, information security, virtualization and cloud computing, and IoT. In the areas of artificial intelligence, it will cover topics such as machine learning, deep learning, natural language processing, and computer vision.

description.zh: 課程的目標期待透過理論與案例研究幫助學生理解「金融科技」，包括改變付款方式的破壞力、分析不斷變化的監管環境，並對人工智慧、區塊鏈、上雲、行動銀行、開放銀行、機器人顧問、眾籌、P2P 借貸等金融科技議題有著更深入的了解；此外，也介紹資訊安全與目前監管機構在金融科技的角色。
description.en: The objective of the course is to help students understand "Financial Technology" through theory and case studies, including the disruptive impact of changing payment methods, analyzing the constantly evolving regulatory environment, and gaining a deeper understanding of financial technology topics such as artificial intelligence, blockchain, cloud computing, mobile banking, open banking, robo-advisors, crowdfunding, peer-to-peer lending, etc. Additionally, it introduces information security and the role of current regulatory agencies in financial technology.

description.zh: 本校體育課程目標為鍛鍊健全身心、促進身心健全發展、培養運動道德、發揚團隊精神及養成終身運動習慣。四技一、二年級實施專項分組教學，由具有專長之教師授課。開課項目：籃球、排球、桌球、羽球、保齡球、射箭、高爾夫球、網球、體操遊戲、慢速壘球、太極拳、國際標準舞、體適能、國術。學生得按自己興趣選擇修習。
description.en: All students are required to attend two hours per week of Physical Education class. This requirement applies to Freshman and Sophomore students, classes are interest-oriented, thus giving students the opportunity to select specific activities they are interested in. Choices include Basketball, Volleyball, Table Tennis, Badminton, Bowling, Archery, Golf, Tennis, Gymnastics, Slow pitch, Tai Chi Chuan, Ballroom Dancing, Physical Fitness and martial arts, to mention a few.

notes: 請選：體育室 \ 體育專項

description.zh: 「全民國防教育法」自民國 95 年 2 月開始施行，以國際情勢、國防政策、全民國防、防衛動員、國防科技五大主軸作為全民國防教育的課程規畫。「國際情勢」單元，主要論述區域安全與兩岸情勢發展，培育學生宏觀的國際視野；更進一步說明在全球化浪潮下，國際重要的安全議題及我國的因應之道。「國防政策」單元，在論述我國國防政策內涵及大陸政策的發展，使學生認識當前國防政策施政方針，增進國防安全知識；並介紹我國國家安全法制與危機管理機制，藉此體認國家安全的重要性，加強全民國防意識。「全民國防」單元，主要論述國家意識及全民防衛的概念、內涵與重要性，並介紹國防與經濟、文化、心理的關聯，讓學生理解國防事務其實與生活息息相關，加強全民國防意識，增進對國家的認同。「防衛動員」單元，在探討全民防衛動員的意義與功能，說明全民防衛動員對國家安全的重要性；並介紹青年服勤動員內涵，讓學生體會自己在全民防衛動員體系中所扮演的角色，進而涵養愛國意識，深化全民國防共識。「國防科技」單元，主要使學生了解武器系統概況，並認識國防科技發展與我國國防產業現況，引發對國防科技的興趣，進而認同國防、支持國防。
description.en: In order to meet the requirement of Act of All-Out Defense Education that put into action in February 2006, the curriculum of All-Out Defense Education Military Training planned by Ministry of Education is divided into five sections: International Situations, National Defense Policies, Civil Defense, Defense Mobilization, and Military Technology. In International Situations, the object is to cultivate students’ broader international perspectives through discussing Asian-Pacific regional security and the development of cross-strait relation. In Civil Defense, the object is to make students aware that national defense affairs are closely related to their daily life. In Defense Mobilization, the object is to let students recognize their roles in all-out defense mobilization system. In Defense Technology, the main object is to let students overview the development of weapon systems, and understand the current development of the nation’s defense technology and defense industry.

name.en: First step to achieving the goals of universities

description.zh: 大學入門是針對大一新生所開授之全校性課程。用以協助學生：(一) 認識高等教育的理念、目的與價值 (二) 有效學習 (三) 涵養正視困境並妥適因應能力。藉以實踐自我鍛鍊，自我掌握，自我經營並建構宏觀視界的高等教育宗旨。
description.en: "First step to achieving the goals of universities" is a campus-wide course provided for all of the first-year students at this school. The course is designed to help first-year students to achieve the following aims and objectives:(1) understanding the basic idea, goals, and fundamental value of higher education at college level;(2) learning proper study attitudes and methods effectively;(3) cultivating the required abilities and skills of responding appropriately to setbacks and difficult situations in order to acquire self-knowledge, self-control, and self-management, so that they may construct the knowledge and imagination that are needed in planning for grand visions of achieving the goals of higher education.

description.zh: 本校科技大學的國文課程，以能力及素養之培植為導向，並以精深致用為授課標的，方能不負大學國文課程之名，並符合本校重視實務應用的優良傳統。依授課教師之取擇，課程可概分為兩大類。一、文學類：著重在文學品味力、語文敏感力、文學創意力與實作創造力等能力的深化。二、思想類：著重在批判思辨力、邏輯推演力、決斷力、組織整合力、論述力與品格實踐力等能力的提升。期盼藉由這兩大方面的磨礪，為學「生」未來的「生」存、「生」活與「生」命，開展出璀璨的「三生」有幸。
description.en: The Chinese language curriculum of the University of Science and Technology of this university is oriented to the cultivation of ability and literacy, and is taught with intensive application. Only then can it live up to the name of the university's Chinese language curriculum and conform to the school's fine tradition of emphasizing practical application.Depending on the choice of the instructor, the courses can be divided into two categories.1. Literature: Focus on the deepening of literary taste, language sensitivity, literary creativity and practical creativity.2. Thinking category: Focus on the improvement of critical thinking ability, logical deduction ability, decision ability, organizational integration ability, discussion ability and character practice ability.It is hoped that through the cultivation and training of these two aspects, we will develop a brilliant three lives for the future survival, life and life of students.

name.zh: 學院指定向度 - 人文與藝術
name.en: College designated dimension curriculum：Humanities and Art

description.zh: 各學院指定向度學分規定如下：機電學院：人文與藝術向度課程 4 學分、社會與法治向度課程 4 學分、創新與創業向度課程 4 學分。電資學院：人文與藝術向度課程 4 學分、自然與科學向度課程 4 學分、創新與創業向度課程 4 學分。工程學院：人文與藝術向度課程 4 學分、社會與法治向度課程 4 學分、創新與創業向度課程 4 學分。管理學院：人文與藝術向度課程 4 學分、社會與法治向度課程 4 學分、自然與科學向度課程 4 學分。設計學院：人文與藝術向度課程 4 學分、社會與法治向度課程 4 學分、創新與創業向度課程 4 學分。
description.en: The dimension credits stipulated by each college are as follows：CMEE：4 credits for the humanities and art curriculum, 4 credits for the Social and Rules of Law curriculum, and 4 credits for the innovation and entrepreneurship curriculum.EECS：4 credits for the humanities and art curriculum, 4 credits for the nature and science curriculum, and 4 credits for the innovation and entrepreneurship curriculum.College of Engineering：4 credits for the humanities and art curriculum, 4 credits for the Social and Rules of Law curriculum, and 4 credits for the innovation and entrepreneurship curriculum.College of Management：4 credits for the humanities and art curriculum, 4 credits for the Social and Rules of Law curriculum, and 4 credits for the nature and science curriculum.College of Design： 4 credits for the humanities and art curriculum, 4 credits for the Social and Rules of Law curriculum, and 4 credits for the innovation and entrepreneurship curriculum.CHASS：4 credits for t

notes: 請選：通識中心 / 博雅課程

description.zh: 本課程教授近代百年設計，以平面設計為主軸，同時亦對當時設計運動所影響的設計相關領域，包括產品、服飾、室內與建築設計風格，做關聯性的介紹。透過近代百年設計發展主要運動的介紹，建立學生對於設計史的知識與設計文化涵養的紮根，並學習思考設計運動時代下的美學思潮脈絡與發展關係。
description.en: This course introduces students to graphic design as well as the influence of design movement in the fields of products, fashion, interior and architecture design that shaped the twentieth century in design. Through the introduction of the twentieth century in design, this course advances student’s understanding of design history and cultural enrichment. Students take an in-depth look at the context and development of movements that are significant in the history of design.

notes: 排一般教室，限本系生修，限 70 人

description.zh: 課程規劃的目標為以互動設計的理論為基礎，實務導向為原則，使學習者能將學術界的理論與產業界的實務加以結合以充實對於互動設計具有的了解。學習的內容包含互動設計系統構成要素、實務與理論基礎、方法與技術、科技支援與應用等單元，各單元並包含不同互動設計個案的研討，使理論能與實務進行驗證。課程亦安排至相關領域業界的參訪以及互動相關展覽參觀，以加深對於互動設計實務的印象與了解。
description.en: The course aims to develop broad understanding on interaction design for students, based on theory and practice course structure. Course topics include essential factors of interactive system, interaction design theory and practice, methods and techniques, technical support and application. Course also incorporates case studies, company visits and exhibitions relevant to interaction design to enhance the understanding of integrating theory and practice.

notes: 排一般教室，限本系生 70 人

description.zh: 本課程旨在瞭解設計的基本要素與美的形式原理，應用各種媒材的特性與構成，從平面及立體的構成的實作練習中，激發出設計美感與創造力。透過「使用者 — 產品 — 環境」三者間互動關係的深入探討，掌握住視覺傳達與多媒體的基本語彙，作為互動設計的基礎，創造出全新的體驗與感受。
description.en: The course is to prepare students for understanding the basic elements of design and the form and principle of art. To achieve these goals, the course provides opportunities for students to apply characteristics and compositions of diverse media for the form of two-dimension and three-dimension in practice. Also, the course arouses student’s design aesthetics and creativity. To explore the context of user-product-environment, students understand visual communication and multimedia language as a basis of interaction design toward completely new experiences and sensation.

notes: 限本系生修 (外系勿選), 轉 / 復生需先修一再修二

description.zh: 本課程之目的在於介紹情境劇本法 (scenario) 之相關知識與其在互動設計上之應用。藉由此課程的學習，學生可以了解如何使用代表性的角色擬定以及故事板的操作以發現關鍵設計議題。透過方法的了解以及實作模擬，學生能具備業界所需之互動情境或介面設計應有之情境敘事技巧與能力。課程內容包含情境故事法介紹、人 - 機 - 境概念、互動情境模擬、代表性角色擬定以及故事板製作。學生評量方式則包含報告撰寫以及作業繳交。
description.en: The aim of the course is to introduce basic knowledge and application of scenario technique on interaction design. Through this course, students can understand how to define the characters of an interactive scenario and develop storyboard to draw out key design theme. Students will be capable of scenario technique for practical interaction design. Course contents include introduction of scenario method, human-machine-scenario, interactive scenario narration, character mapping and storyboard. Students will be evaluated by reports and their works.

notes: 排一般教室，限本系媒體組必修優先，限 40 人

description.zh: 應用設計手繪工具與技法於各種設計作品圖面呈現，培養學生對空間、形體、材質、介面、裝置、比例等簡潔繪畫技巧與圖示性設計圖表達能力。
description.en: Students will learn to sketch by hand in various tools and technologies on design drawings. The simple painting tips as, spatial perceptive, presentation of form and materials, interfaces media types and installations, and proportion as well as abilities of the infographic design presentation will be taught in this class.

notes: 排一般教室，限本系生修，限 70 人

description.zh: 介紹數位向量繪圖的基礎原理與應用。
description.en: Introduction to the digital techniques and applications of vector graphics in visual arts.

notes: 互動一 / 外生一合開，限本系生，大一媒體組資電類優先

description.zh: 介紹電腦輔助設計的基本概念與技術。
description.en: Introduction to the fundamental concepts and technologies for Computer-Aided Design.

notes: 互動一 / 外生一合開，本系生優先 (35 人), 預選 13 人

description.zh: 本校體育課程目標為鍛鍊健全身心、促進身心健全發展、培養運動道德、發揚團隊精神及養成終身運動習慣。四技一、二年級實施專項分組教學，由具有專長之教師授課。開課項目：籃球、排球、桌球、羽球、保齡球、射箭、高爾夫球、網球、體操遊戲、慢速壘球、太極拳、國際標準舞、體適能、國術。學生得按自己興趣選擇修習。
description.en: All students are required to attend two hours per week of Physical Education class. This requirement applies to Freshman and Sophomore students, classes are interest-oriented, thus giving students the opportunity to select specific activities they are interested in. Choices include Basketball, Volleyball, Table Tennis, Badminton, Bowling, Archery, Golf, Tennis, Gymnastics, Slow pitch, Tai Chi Chuan, Ballroom Dancing, Physical Fitness and martial arts, to mention a few.

notes: 請選：體育室 \ 體育專項

description.zh: 中文課程共分四年三階段授課。 第一、二年以華語教學為主，授課重點為：（一）華語基本句型句法；（二）華語基本會話；（三）生活語言；（四）標音系統。第三年 (一學期)，除延續第一、二年華語授課重點外，以段落朗讀和基本認字為主要訓練，並給與中國文字書寫訓練。 第四年 (一學期)，加強會話能力，認字與閱讀能力，並傳授中國文化。
description.en: The course of Chinese is categorized as three individual stages for four years. In the first year, the course focuses on: (a) Basic Sentence Patterns, (b) Basic Conversation, (c) Languages in the Real Life and (d) the phonetic system for the Chinese language. In the second and the third year (one semester), the training focuses on paragraph reading and term/character recognition-in addition to the teaching themes set in the first year. Writing courses are also added during this stage. In the fourth year (one semester), we add more emphasis on the conversational ability, term/character recognition and reading ability. More culture-related information will be included.

notes: 限本班生修讀

description.zh: 本課程旨在瞭解設計的基本要素與美的形式原理，應用各種媒材的特性與構成，從平面及立體的構成的實作練習中，激發出設計美感與創造力。透過「使用者 — 產品 — 環境」三者間互動關係的深入探討，掌握住視覺傳達與多媒體的基本語彙，作為互動設計的基礎，創造出全新的體驗與感受。
description.en: The course is to prepare students for understanding the basic elements of design and the form and principle of art. To achieve these goals, the course provides opportunities for students to apply characteristics and compositions of diverse media for the form of two-dimension and three-dimension in practice. Also, the course arouses student’s design aesthetics and creativity. To explore the context of user-product-environment, students understand visual communication and multimedia language as a basis of interaction design toward completely new experiences and sensation.

notes: 排一般教室，限本系生修，復學系生需修過 1 再修 2

description.zh: 課程規劃的目標為以互動設計的理論為基礎，實務導向為原則，使學習者能將學術界的理論與產業界的實務加以結合以充實對於互動設計具有的了解。學習的內容包含互動設計系統構成要素、實務與理論基礎、方法與技術、科技支援與應用等單元，各單元並包含不同互動設計個案的研討，使理論能與實務進行驗證。課程亦安排至相關領域業界的參訪以及互動相關展覽參觀，以加深對於互動設計實務的印象與了解。
description.en: The course aims to develop broad understanding on interaction design for students, based on theory and practice course structure. Course topics include essential factors of interactive system, interaction design theory and practice, methods and techniques, technical support and application. Course also incorporates case studies, company visits and exhibitions relevant to interaction design to enhance the understanding of integrating theory and practice.

notes: 排一般教室，限本系生修，限 20 人

description.zh: 本校體育課程目標為鍛鍊健全身心、促進身心健全發展、培養運動道德、發揚團隊精神及養成終身運動習慣。四技一、二年級實施專項分組教學，由具有專長之教師授課。開課項目：籃球、排球、桌球、羽球、保齡球、射箭、高爾夫球、網球、體操遊戲、慢速壘球、太極拳、國際標準舞、體適能、國術。學生得按自己興趣選擇修習。
description.en: All students are required to attend two hours per week of Physical Education class. This requirement applies to Freshman and Sophomore students, classes are interest-oriented, thus giving students the opportunity to select specific activities they are interested in. Choices include Basketball, Volleyball, Table Tennis, Badminton, Bowling, Archery, Golf, Tennis, Gymnastics, Slow pitch, Tai Chi Chuan, Ballroom Dancing, Physical Fitness and martial arts, to mention a few.

notes: 請選：體育室 \ 體育專項

description.zh: 「全民國防教育法」自民國 95 年 2 月開始施行，以國際情勢、國防政策、全民國防、防衛動員、國防科技五大主軸作為全民國防教育的課程規畫。「國際情勢」單元，主要論述區域安全與兩岸情勢發展，培育學生宏觀的國際視野；更進一步說明在全球化浪潮下，國際重要的安全議題及我國的因應之道。「國防政策」單元，在論述我國國防政策內涵及大陸政策的發展，使學生認識當前國防政策施政方針，增進國防安全知識；並介紹我國國家安全法制與危機管理機制，藉此體認國家安全的重要性，加強全民國防意識。「全民國防」單元，主要論述國家意識及全民防衛的概念、內涵與重要性，並介紹國防與經濟、文化、心理的關聯，讓學生理解國防事務其實與生活息息相關，加強全民國防意識，增進對國家的認同。「防衛動員」單元，在探討全民防衛動員的意義與功能，說明全民防衛動員對國家安全的重要性；並介紹青年服勤動員內涵，讓學生體會自己在全民防衛動員體系中所扮演的角色，進而涵養愛國意識，深化全民國防共識。「國防科技」單元，主要使學生了解武器系統概況，並認識國防科技發展與我國國防產業現況，引發對國防科技的興趣，進而認同國防、支持國防。
description.en: In order to meet the requirement of Act of All-Out Defense Education that put into action in February 2006, the curriculum of All-Out Defense Education Military Training planned by Ministry of Education is divided into five sections: International Situations, National Defense Policies, Civil Defense, Defense Mobilization, and Military Technology. In International Situations, the object is to cultivate students’ broader international perspectives through discussing Asian-Pacific regional security and the development of cross-strait relation. In Civil Defense, the object is to make students aware that national defense affairs are closely related to their daily life. In Defense Mobilization, the object is to let students recognize their roles in all-out defense mobilization system. In Defense Technology, the main object is to let students overview the development of weapon systems, and understand the current development of the nation’s defense technology and defense industry.

name.en: First step to achieving the goals of universities and Engineering Ethics

description.zh: 大學入門是針對大一新生所開授之全校性課程。用以協助學生：(一) 認識高等教育的理念、目的與價值 (二) 有效學習 (三) 涵養正視困境並妥適因應能力。藉以實踐自我鍛鍊，自我掌握，自我經營並建構宏觀視界的高等教育宗旨。依據提供服務準則，工程師們須以誠實公平公正正當和奉獻保護公共健康，安全及幸福。工程師們必須以專業標準的行為履行最高的倫理準則。本課程以（1）工程倫理概述（2）衝突與抉擇（3）守則與解說（4）個案分析，提供學生瞭解及研析。
description.en: "First step to achieving the goals of universities" is a campus-wide course provided for all of the first-year students at this school. The course is designed to help first-year students to achieve the following aims and objectives:(1) understanding the basic idea, goals, and fundamental value of higher education at college level;(2) learning proper study attitudes and methods effectively;(3) cultivating the required abilities and skills of responding appropriately to setbacks and difficult situations in order to acquire self-knowledge, self-control, and self-management. Accordingly, the services provided by engineers require honesty, impartiality, fairness, and equity and must be dedicated to protection of the public health, safety and welfare. This course offers (1).Description of engineering ethics (2).Conflict and selection (3).Rule and explanation (4).Case study for student studied.

description.zh: 本校科技大學的國文課程，以能力及素養之培植為導向，並以精深致用為授課標的，方能不負大學國文課程之名，並符合本校重視實務應用的優良傳統。依授課教師之取擇，課程可概分為兩大類。一、文學類：著重在文學品味力、語文敏感力、文學創意力與實作創造力等能力的深化。二、思想類：著重在批判思辨力、邏輯推演力、決斷力、組織整合力、論述力與品格實踐力等能力的提升。期盼藉由這兩大方面的磨礪，為學「生」未來的「生」存、「生」活與「生」命，開展出璀璨的「三生」有幸。
description.en: The Chinese language curriculum of the University of Science and Technology of this university is oriented to the cultivation of ability and literacy, and is taught with intensive application. Only then can it live up to the name of the university's Chinese language curriculum and conform to the school's fine tradition of emphasizing practical application.Depending on the choice of the instructor, the courses can be divided into two categories.1. Literature: Focus on the deepening of literary taste, language sensitivity, literary creativity and practical creativity.2. Thinking category: Focus on the improvement of critical thinking ability, logical deduction ability, decision ability, organizational integration ability, discussion ability and character practice ability.It is hoped that through the cultivation and training of these two aspects, we will develop a brilliant three lives for the future survival, life and life of students.

name.zh: 學院指定向度 - 人文與藝術
name.en: College designated dimension curriculum：Humanities and Art

description.zh: 各學院指定向度學分規定如下：機電學院：人文與藝術向度課程 4 學分、社會與法治向度課程 4 學分、創新與創業向度課程 4 學分。電資學院：人文與藝術向度課程 4 學分、自然與科學向度課程 4 學分、創新與創業向度課程 4 學分。工程學院：人文與藝術向度課程 4 學分、社會與法治向度課程 4 學分、創新與創業向度課程 4 學分。管理學院：人文與藝術向度課程 4 學分、社會與法治向度課程 4 學分、自然與科學向度課程 4 學分。設計學院：人文與藝術向度課程 4 學分、社會與法治向度課程 4 學分、創新與創業向度課程 4 學分。
description.en: The dimension credits stipulated by each college are as follows：CMEE：4 credits for the humanities and art curriculum, 4 credits for the Social and Rules of Law curriculum, and 4 credits for the innovation and entrepreneurship curriculum.EECS：4 credits for the humanities and art curriculum, 4 credits for the nature and science curriculum, and 4 credits for the innovation and entrepreneurship curriculum.College of Engineering：4 credits for the humanities and art curriculum, 4 credits for the Social and Rules of Law curriculum, and 4 credits for the innovation and entrepreneurship curriculum.College of Management：4 credits for the humanities and art curriculum, 4 credits for the Social and Rules of Law curriculum, and 4 credits for the nature and science curriculum.College of Design： 4 credits for the humanities and art curriculum, 4 credits for the Social and Rules of Law curriculum, and 4 credits for the innovation and entrepreneurship curriculum.CHASS：4 credits for t

notes: 請選：通識中心 / 博雅課程

description.zh: 本課程希望在一學年中，能使學生對微分及積分有充分的瞭解、培養邏輯推理、啟發思考創造、強化計算演繹並注重應用與作圖，以建立同學未來學習工程數學及相關專業課程之數學基礎，充分達到學以致用的目的。課程內容包括：1. 極限與連續，2. 導數及其應用，3. 不定積分與定積分，4. 超越函數及其反函數，5. 積分法則，6. 不定型與瑕積分，7. 定積分的應用，8. 空間幾何與向量微積分，9. 偏導數，10. 重積分，11. 級數。
description.en: This course aims at developing comprehension of Derivation and Integral、activating capabilities of Logic Inference and Induction、enlightening confidence and independence、strengthening calculating abilities with an emphasis on its application and diagram、furnishing a sound basis for future specialty. The content includes: 1.Limits and Continuity, 2.Derivative and Application, 3.Indefinite and Definite Integral, 4.Transcendental Functions and their Inverses, 5.Techniques of Integration, 6.Indeterminate Forms and Improper Integral, 7.Application of Integration, 8.Basic Vector Analysis, 9.Partial Derivative, 10.Multiple Integration, 11.Infinite Series.

description.zh: 本課程的目的是為了：1. 驗證物理理論之真實性，2. 培養同學認真的科學態度與方法，3. 培養同學數據處理的能力，4. 啟發同學自行設計解決量度問題的方法。課程之施行為一學分三小 時，內容偏重電磁、光學、近物之實驗。
description.en: In this course there will be 1 credit for one semester; and 3 laboratorial hours per week. The experiments contains electromagnetics, optics, and modern physics, etc.. The purposes of this course are 1. to identify the physical laws, 2. to cultivate students' earnest manner and methods of science, 3. to cultivate their ability of data reduction, 4. to instruct them to solve the problems of measurements by self-designments.

description.zh: 本校之普通物理課程專為工程科系背景之同學設計，主要的目的是鼓勵同學參與大自然運行奧秘、法則之探索，並供給爾後修習專業課程之堅實基礎。本課程之內容包含力學、熱力學、聲學、電磁學、光學及近代物理。教授者可按每週三小時、二個學期的時間設計、再參酌各系不同之需求、加強或節略某些章節。
description.en: The course is aimed directly at the students with engineering background. The theme of this course is to encourage students to participate in the discovery of laws and wonder of nature. And to solidate the foundation for the particular courses of study for different departments. The contents of this course include mechanics, dynamics, thermodynamics, electromagnetics, optics, and foundation of modern physics, etc.. The lecturers will design this course under deliberating the differences of each departments to emphasize or to omit some contents. The course is designed for 6 credits for two semesters; 3 credits for each semester, and 3 lecture hours per week.

description.zh: 修本課程之學生必須是已經具備國手身分，學生必須每星期至少 5 天至訓練單位或企業實習。不但可以專心參加選手訓練，同時可以修實習學分。修此課程，必須事先提出申請，經由技優專班辦公室核准。
description.en: Students who take this course must already have a qualification for the WorldSkills International Competition. Students must go to the training unit or the business for an internship at least 5 days a week. You can not only concentrate on participating in player training, but you can also take internship credits. To take this course, you must first submit an application, which is approved by the Office.

notes: 限本專班入圍正取國手的學生參加。

description.zh: 碩士學位論文寫作
description.en: A student must write a thesis to fulfill the partial requirements for the Master degree.

notes: 碩士班

name.zh: 研究討論 - 電力工程

description.zh: 本課程將邀請專家學者以專題演講方式，介紹電力工程之最新科技與應用。研究生亦被安排報告其研究計畫與進度。參與者透過密集討論、書面報告、或舉行口頭發表等方式，可以有效率地交換意見，獲得更深入而廣泛的認識。
description.en: This course will introduce the latest technology and application on the power engineering via seminar. Speakers are the Well-known scholars and specialists. Graduate students will also be arranged to report their graduate studies. The participants are encouraged to have intensive discussion, written reports, or further oral presentation. Efficient opinion exchange would be also expected to derive more extensive interest.

notes: 甲組學生

name.zh: 研究討論 - 電力電子工程

description.zh: 專題報告、專題演講、研究小組討論
description.en: Case Study. Seminar. Group meeting.

notes: 乙組學生，請安排先鋒教室

name.zh: 研究討論 - 控制工程

description.zh: 本研究討論課程之目的在使研究生學習控制工程之最新科技。受邀演講之著名專家學者透過廣泛的討論分享其研究結果與經驗，選修此課程之研究生亦須就其研究主題進行正式報告。
description.en: The seminar course is designed for graduate students to learn the latest technology in the area of control engineering. Renowned researchers and scholoars are invited to share their research results and experience through extensive discussion. Furthermore, all students in this course are required to make formal presentations on their specialized topics.

notes: 丙組、己組學生

name.zh: 研究討論 - 通訊與訊號處理工程
name.en: Graduate seminar – Communications and Signal Processing Engineering

description.zh: 本研究討論課程之目的在使研究生學習通訊與訊號處理工程領域之最新科技。受邀演講之著名專家學者透過廣泛的討論分享其研究結果與經驗，選修此課程之研究生亦須就其研究主題進行正式報告。
description.en: The seminar course is designed for graduate students to learn the latest technology in the area of Communications and Signal Processing Engineering. Renowned researchers and scholars are invited to share their research results and experience through extensive discussion. Furthermore, all students in this course are required to make formal presentations on their specialized topics.

notes: 丁組、己組學生

name.zh: 研究討論 - 計算機科學

description.zh: 本研究討論課程之目的在使研究生學習計算機科學領域之最新科技。受邀演講之著名專家學者透過廣泛的討論分享其研究結果與經驗，選修此課程之研究生亦須就其研究主題進行正式報告。
description.en: The seminar course is designed for graduate students to learn the latest technology in Computer Science. Renowned researchers and scholars are invited to share their research results and experiences through extensive discussion. Furthermore, all students in this course are required to make formal presentations on their specialized topics.

notes: 戊組、己組學生

description.zh: 現代控制理論簡介、線性空間分析、狀態方程式及響應，可控制性及可觀測性、穩定性分析、狀態回授及估測、控制器設計及應用、觀測
description.en: Introduction of Modern Control Theory﹒Linear space Analysis , State equation and Response, Controllability and Observability , Stability Analysis, State Feedback and Estimation, Controller Design and Applications, Observer Design and Applications, Nonlinear systems, Time varying Systems, Applications of Modern Control theory.﹒

notes: 電機所、電資外生班和機械外生班合開

description.zh: 1. 二極體電路分析與設計 2. 電晶體電路分析與設計 3. FET 電路分析與設計 4. 放大器頻率響應分析及頻率補償 5. 功率放大器分析與設計 6. 回授放大器分析與設計 7. 差動及運算放大器分析與設計 8. 震盪器分析與設計 9. 主動濾波器分析與設計
description.en: 1. Diode circuit Analysis and Design2. Transistor circuit Analysis and Design3. Transistor circuit Analysis and Design4. FET circuit Analysis and Design5. Amplifier Frequency response Analysis and Componstaion6. Power Amplifier Analysis and Design7. Feedback Amplifier Analysis and Design8. Differential and Operational Amplifier Analysis and Design9. Oscillator Analysis and Design10. Active Filter Analysis and Design

notes: 電機碩班、半導體學位學程合開，預選限 58 人。

description.zh: 1. 機率空間 2. 隨機變數、向量、程序 3. 期望值，隨機序列的收斂性和大數法則 4. 穩定性隨機程序 5. 有用的隨機程序
description.en: 1. probability space2. Random variable, vectors and processes3. Expectation ,converges of random sequence and Law of large number4. Stationary processes and ergodic propertis5. Useful random processes

description.zh: 這門課程主要是介紹資料庫系統的理論與應用，內容包含有： 1. 資料庫系統的介紹與架構 2. ER 資料模式 3. 檔案儲存結構 4. 關連式資料模式 5. SQL 查詢語言 6. ER 資料模式與關連式資料模式之間的轉換 7. 資料庫正規化 8. 最佳化查詢 9. 交易處理
description.en: This course provides introduction to both database system theory and application. These are the following : o 1. Database System Concepts and Architecture -2. Data Modeling Using the Entity-Relationship Model --3. Record Storage and Primary File Organizations -4. -The Relational Data Model -5. SQL -6. ER- and ERR-to Relational Mapping -7. Functional Dependencies and Normalization for Relational Databases -8. Query Processing and Optimization -9. Transaction Processing Concepts

notes: 電機系和創新 AI、資安合開，預選限 36 人。

description.zh: 本課程介紹各種常用之進階影像處理理論，課程內容含蓋：１. 空間域影像強化２. 頻域影像強化３. 影像還原４. 彩色影像處理５. 型態學影像處理６. 影像分割 7. 物件辨認 8. 小波理論
description.en: This course contains the advanced topics in digital image compression. It includes １Image Enhancement in Spatial Domain ２. Image Enhancement in Frequency Domain ３. Image Restoration ４.Color Image Processing ５. Morphological Image Processing ６. Image Segmentation 7. Object Recognition 8. Wavelet and Multiresolution Processing

name.zh: 電力電子電路分析與設計
name.en: Analysis and Design of Power Electronics Circuit

description.zh: 1. 電力電子電路簡介 2. 電路規劃與設計 3. 動態分析與控制 4. 諧波分析與切換技術 5. 功率積體電路 6. 電力電子電路系統
description.en: 1. Introduction of Power Electronic Circuit 2.Circuit Planning and Design 3. Dynamic Analysis and Control 4. Harmonic Analysis and Switching Technique 5. Power Integrated Circuit 6. Power Electronic Circuit System.

description.zh: 本課程旨在全面介紹網絡和分佈式計算技術。 與傳統課程不同，它採用自上而下的主題方法，從應用層開始，然後描述傳輸層和網路層，最後涵蓋實體層。課程從應用層向下延伸到實體層，讓學生在學習網路的早期就接觸重要概念來激發他們的興趣。 本課程專注於互聯網和網路的基本重要問題，對計算機科學和電氣工程感興趣的學生提供良好的基礎，而無需廣泛的程式或數學知識。
description.en: The course aims to provide a comprehensive introduction to networking and distributed computing technologies. Unlike traditional course, it pursues a top-down approach to the topic, starting with the application layer and then describing the transport and network layers, finally covering the physical layer. The course works its way from the application layer down toward the physical layer, motivating readers by exposing them to important concepts early in their study of networking. Focusing on the Internet and the fundamentally important issues of networking, this course provides an excellent foundation for students interested in computer science and electrical engineering, without requiring extensive knowledge of programming or mathematics.

description.zh: 電腦視覺簡介及其應用影像形成偵測與配對影像分割以特徵為基礎的定位運動推論結構運動估計影像縫合計算攝影學立體對應三維重建影像辨識
description.en: Introduction and Applications of Computer VisionImage FormationDetection and MatchingSegmentationFeature-Based AlignmentStructure from MotionMotion EstimationImage StitchingComputational PhotographyStereo Correspondence3D ReconstructionRecognition

description.zh: 1. 數學基礎 2. Lyapunov 穩定度 3. Lyapunov 方法 4. LaSalle 定理與 Barbalat 引理 5. Lagrange 系統之穩定分析 6. 時間延遲系統之穩定分析
description.en: 1. Mathematical background2. Lyapunov stability3. Lyapunov method4. LaSalle's theorem and Barbalat's lemma5. Stability analysis of Lagrange systems6. Stability analysis of time-delay systems

name.zh: 電腦輔助積體電路系統設計實務
name.en: Computer-Aided VLSI System Design and Practice

description.zh: 本課程希望協助學生瞭解如何以標準積體電路系統設計流程來設計超大型積體電路系統，旨在採用多種數位與類比電腦輔助設計軟體來訓練學生，使其能熟悉並使用超大型積體電路系統的設計軟體，培育學生具備超大型積體電路系統設計實務與經驗。本課程的主要內容包括：1. 超大型積體電路簡介；2. 晶片製程介紹；3.MOSFET 元件；4. MOSFET 走線；5.Hspice 軟體介紹 ；6. Hspice 電路模擬；7. 類比電路佈局與實作；8.Verilog HDL (硬體描述語言)；9. 電路合成 ；10. 自動測試圖樣產生；11. 時脈靜態分析；12. 電路佈局與佈線；13.DRC 與 LVS 檢測；14. 寄生參數萃取與佈局後模擬；15. 設計功能驗證 16. 設計方案報告
description.en: Students will learn how to design VLSI circuits and systems based on a standard VLSI system design flow, where various electronic design automation (EDA) tools will be used extensively in the semester. Those EDA tools includes analog and digital circuits and systems. The main purpose of this course includes the following:1. VLSI Introduction.2. Manufacturing Process.3. MOSFET Devices.4. MOSFET Wires.5. Hspice Software.6. Hspice Simulation.7. Analog IC Layout and Practice.8. Verilog-HDL.9. Synthesis.10. Design for Testability and Automatic Test Pattern Generation.11. Static Timing Analysis.12. Placement and Routing.13. Design Rule Check, Layout Versus Schematic.14. Layout Parasitic Extraction and Simulation.15. Design Verification.16. Project Presentation.

notes: 電機碩班、半導體學位學程合開

description.zh: 專題報告專題演講、研究小組討論
description.en: Case Study. Seminar. Group meeting.

notes: 甲組

description.zh: 專題報告專題演講、研究小組討論
description.en: Case Study. Seminar. Group meeting.

notes: 乙組

description.zh: 專題報告專題演講、研究小組討論
description.en: Case Study. Seminar. Group meeting.

notes: 丙組

description.zh: 專題報告專題演講、研究小組討論
description.en: Case Study. Seminar. Group meeting.

notes: 丁組

name.zh: 行動裝置應用程式設計

description.zh: 課程內容包括：1. 行動裝置應用程式設計概觀 2.Android SDK 與 Eclipse 開發工具 3. 圖形使用者介面 4. 多媒體程式設計 5. 定位及內建感測器程式設計 6. 資料庫程式設計 7.App Store 應用軟體及行銷 8. 期末專題製作
description.en: The course content includes: 1. Overview 2. Android SDK and Eclipse Development Tools 3. Graphical User Interface 4. Multimedia Application Design 5. Location and Sensors Application Design 6. Database Application Design 7. App Store and Applications Marketing 8.Final Project

description.zh: 1. 簡介 2. 數學基礎 - 機率 - 隨機程序：自相關函數與功率密度函數，高斯程序、白雜訊 - 正交開展與線性濾波 - 取樣與量化 3. 最佳接收器設計 - 信號的幾何表示 - 最大事後機率與最大可能接收原理 - 相配濾波器 - 錯誤機率 4. 數位調變與多工技術 - 數位調變：振幅移鍵調變、相位移鍵調變、四相振幅調變、頻率移鍵調變 - 數位調變的取捨條件：錯誤機率、功率、頻寬與複雜度 - 多工技術：分頻多工、分時多工、分碼多工 5. 消息理論簡介 - 源編碼與熵 - 通道編碼與通訊容量
description.en: 1. Introduction2. Mathematical Preliminaries- Probability- Random processes: autocorrelation function and power spectral density, Gaussian processes, white noise- Orthonormal expansions and linear filtering - Sampling and quantization3. Optimal Receiver Design - Geometric interpretation of signals - MAP and ML receiver principles - Matched filters - Probability of error 4. Digital Modulation and Multiplexing- Digital modulation: ASK, PSK, QAM, FSK- Digital modulation tradeoffs: error probability, power, bandwidth and complexity- Multiplexing: FDMA, TDMA and CDMA5. Introduction to Information Theory - Source coding and entropy - Channel coding and capacity

notes: 電子系和電資外生所合開

description.zh: 1. 傅利葉分析與訊號取樣，2. 離散時序系統之頻率響應與電路設計， 3.Infinite Impulse Response 數位濾波器設計：Bilinear 轉換式，Impulse-invariance 方式，Step-invariance 方式，高通、帶通、帶拒濾波器轉換式，4.Finite Impulse Response 數位濾波器設計：FourierSeries 方法，Window 方法，5. 離散與快速傅利葉轉換：DFT、FFT 等演算法。
description.en: 1.Fourier analysis and signal sampling2.Frequcy response of discrete time system3.IIR digital filter design4.FIR digital filter design5.Discrete fourier transform6.Fast fourier transform

description.zh: 1. 天線基礎 2. 長導線天線 3. 孔徑型天線 4. 陣列分析與合成 5. 自阻抗與互阻抗 6. 信號饋入結構
description.en: 1.Fundamental of antennas2.Long-wire antennas3.Aperture-type antennas4.Array analysis and synthesis5.Self-impedance and mutual-impedance6.Feeding structures

description.zh: 1. 寬頻和超寬頻通道模型 2.CDMA 3. 多使用者偵測 4.MIMO 5. 時空傳輸技術 6. 標準中其他無線傳輸技術
description.en: 1.wideband and ultrawideband channel modeling2.code-division multiple access (CDMA)3.multiuser detection4.multiple-input multiple output (MIMO)5.spatial multiplexing/space-time coding and in between6.other transmission technology in standards: OFDMA, UWB, etc.

description.zh: 1. 高頻介質材料特性 2. 介質共振器簡介 3. 圓柱型介電波導理論 4. 簡易共振模型分析法 5. 精密分析法 6. 介質共振器耦合特性 7. 介質共振器之高頻電路應用
description.en: 1.The Characteristics of High-frequency Dielectric Materials2.The Introduction of Dielectric Resonators3.Theory of Cylindrical Dielectric Waveguides4.Simple Resonate Model for Analysis5.Rigorous Analysis Methods6.The Characteristis of Coupling7.The DR's Practical applications at High Frequencies

notes: 電子系和電資外生所合開

description.zh: 一、射頻網路分析 二、射頻集總元件 三、射頻耦合線圈與變壓器 四、射頻集總元件阻抗匹配 五、射頻分佈元件 六、射頻傳輸線變壓器 七、射頻分佈元件阻抗匹配 八、射頻放大器阻抗匹配
description.en: 1.RF Network Analysis 2.RF Lumped Elements 3.RF Coupled Coils and Transformers 4.RF Impedance Matching Using Lumped Ellements 5.RF Distributed Elements 6.RF Traansmission Line Transformers 7.RF Impedance Matching Using Distributed Elements 8.RF Amplifier Impedance Matching

description.zh: 1. 射頻向量網路分析儀校準 2. 射頻頻譜分析儀操作 3. 單埠射頻網路散射參數量測 4. 雙埠射頻網路散射參數量測 5. 射頻變壓器耦合係數量測 6. 射頻基板參數量測 7. 射頻傳輸線參數量測 8. 射頻放大器穩定性量測 9. 射頻放大器參數量測 10. 射頻放大器雜音指數量測 11. 射頻振盪器參數量測 12. 射頻天線參數量測
description.en: 1.Calibration of RF Vector Network Analyzer2.Operation of RF Spectrum Analyzer3.S-Parameter Measurements of 1-Port RF Networks4.S-Parameter Measurements of 2-Port RF Networks5.Coupling Coefficient Measurements of RF Transformers6.Parameter Measurements of RF Substrates7.Parameter Measurements of RF Transmission Lines8.Stability Measurements of RF Amplifiers9.Parameter Measurements of RF Amplifiers10.Noise Figure Measurements of RF Amplifiers11.Parameter Measurements of RF Oscillators12.Parameter Measurements of RF Antennas

description.zh: 此門課程的主要目標，將以介紹高等積體電路設計為主，讓學生了解高等積體電路設計的理論、概念、流程及方法。課程將理論與實際並重，讓學生具有實際的高等積體電路設計能力。
description.en: 1. Introduction 2. Advanced VLSI System and Architecture Design 3. Advanced VLSI Design Technique and Concept4. Still Image/Video Compression VLSI Design5. Digital Television VLSI Design6. Digital Camera VLSI Design7. Digital Watermarking VLSI Design

description.zh: 針對學生之學習研究心得報告，集體討論，以訓練學生研究之能力。
description.en: Case Study. Seminar. Group meeting..

notes: 碩士班

description.zh: 為取得工學碩士必修課程，3 至 6 個學分需先經系所核可。
description.en: For the degree of Master of Engineering 3 to 6 credits with department approval.

description.zh: 針對大學所習之廣義生產管理再作深入的闡述，一方面做公開的個案分析研討，以收進一步的學習之效，同時要求學生做實務專題研究
description.en: Production and operation management,case study and analysis,and independent study.

description.zh: 此課程將介紹各種實驗之配置法及統計分析方法和結論，其中包括：一因子實驗・區集和拉丁方格・不完全區集設計・多因子實驗・部份因子實驗・巢狀或階層實驗・變異數分析・迴歸分析・交互變異分析
description.en: Introduce the experiment design methods and conclusion. Such as: one factor experiment, Latin square, Multi factors experiment, ANOVA, regression.

description.zh: 排程主要在規劃與排定活動執行的優先順序，以使各項資源得到最佳的運用。本課程除了介紹排程的基本理論外，對排程於各種問題的應用亦有闡述。課程的主要目的在使學生學習排程的基本概念與法則，並瞭解排程於各種生產型態的應用。
description.en: Scheduling consists of planning and prioritizing activities that need to be performed in an orderly sequence of operation. It is a tool that optimizes use of available resources. This course focuses on theoretical as well as applied aspects of scheduling of resources. The purpose of this course is to guide the students to learn the basic concept and rules of sequencing and scheduling, and to understand the different scheduling application aspects for various shop floors.

description.zh: 本課程引入生活性的學習方法來誘發學生學習動機，並培養可在社會與職場運用的四項英文基本技能。課程目標在幫助學生在生活實境習得英文，為他們裝備可溝通表達於日常、社交活動，並提升職涯的整合性英文技能。每堂課程都注重在以學生為中心的學習活動中帶入全真、應用性高的英文技巧。課程設計涵蓋的功能包括課堂分享與作業、日常互動英文以及專業英文練習。主要課題包括溝通，簡報與談判技巧，應用閱讀與寫作，聽力技巧運用，語言與文化。
description.en: This course introduces real-world based learning approaches for students to raise their learning aspirations and to develop four essential English skills that are applicable in social and professional encounters. This course aims to help students practice English in most real-life settings and to equip them with integrated skills to advance their careers. Every class session focuses on bringing authentic and applied English in student-centered leaning activities. The class design covers the functions like information sharing and task-based activities, social interactions, and professional English practices. Essential topics include communication, techniques of negotiation and presentation, applied reading and writing, strategies for developing listening skills and language learning across cultures.

name.zh: 使用者經驗資料收集與分析
name.en: User Experience Data Collection and Analysis

description.zh: 產品與服務的開發與設計主要在提升使用者的經驗。以此課程教授使用者經驗的概念與其資料收集與分析的方法。學生將能了解使用者經驗的概念、其資料的收集的方法與資料形式，以及相關之實驗設計與統計分析的方法。
description.en: The primary objective of the development and design of products and services is to enhance user experience. The concept of user experience and the methods for its data collection and analysis will be taught in the course. Students will learn the user experience concept, the methods of data collection and the formats of collected data, as well as related methods of experimental design and statistical analysis.

description.zh: 本課程提供供應鏈中協同管理的重要多面向，探討供應商、零售商及終端消費者間腳色互動及運作，以及能促使供應鏈鄭和及協同之機制。課程目標在使 (1) 在現今高度競合產業環境中，提供對整合及協同供應鏈的理解、專業管理及未來願景。(2) 提供學生具高階供應鏈管理者之必要認知及知識。
description.en: The course takes a broad view of the critical facets of supply chain coordination and management, expanding beyond internal company operations to include the suppliers, the retailers and the end consumers. Aligning supply chain management with integrated strategies and policies. The goal of the course is (a) to provide professionals with the vision and skill set necessary to understand and manage the integration and coordination of activities within today's increasingly complicated supply chains and (b) to equip students with the knowledge and perceptions demanded for supply chain management leaders today.

description.zh: 本課程主要探討高等應用統計的相關原理方法與應用案例，包括一般資料分析、信度效度、迴歸分析、主成分分析、多元尺度分析、區別分析、抽樣調查等。課程將配合個案進行討論。
description.en: The objective of this course is to help students understand the data analysis and applications. The major contents include reliability and effectiveness of data, regression analysis, principle component analysis, multi-dimensional scaling, logistic analysis and sampling analysis. The course will also include some practical example discussions.

notes: 工管博和管理博

description.zh: 隨工業物聯網的快速發展，越來越多的感測數據得以被記錄，除了依賴專家的經驗判斷，更可藉由數據分析的結果提供決策上的輔助。本課程將介紹資料科學的基本分析架構，從問題定義、數據前處理、特徵工程、模型建立、結果解釋與評估等，除課堂講授資料科學工具與方法外，並利用作業、個案研究、案例資料，以訓練同學資料分析的能力與解決問題的經驗。
description.en: With the advanced technology in Industrial Internet of Things, amount of sensors are installed to collect data during manufacturing production and service process. In addition to rely on domain knowledge, we can also construct a data-driven model and extract useful information and rule for decision support and management.. This course will introduce analytics framework of data science including problem definition, data preprocessing, feature engineering, model construction, and result evaluation and interpretation. In addition to lecture, this course also training students how to analyze the data and problem solving through homework, term project and case studies.

description.zh: 本課程主要是介紹六標準差方法。六標準差 (Six Sigma) 是一套管理系統，它是透過聆聽顧客的聲音 (Voice of Customer)，經由關鍵品質 (Critical to Quality) 的分析，利用專案的方式，以流程改善工具解決有問題的企業流程。本課程著重了解 “Six Sigma” 理論、分析工具及統計應用軟體 (Minitab) 之運用，針對六標準差綠帶、黑帶專業培訓課程，藉由理論分析與實際操作使用的說明，協助學生將”Six Sigma” 導入企業，以獲得關鍵流程的改進。
description.en: This course primarily introduces the Six Sigma methodology. Six Sigma is a management system that listens to the Voice of Customer, analyzes Critical to Quality factors, and utilizes project-based approaches with process improvement tools to address problematic business processes. The course focuses on understanding the theory of Six Sigma, analysis tools, and the application of statistical software (Minitab). It is designed for Green Belt and Black Belt professional training in Six Sigma. Through theoretical analysis and practical exercises, the course assists students in implementing Six Sigma in enterprises to achieve improvements in key processes.

description.zh: 本課程之目標在於建構產業分析之思維架構及洞悉市場發展之研究能力，以因應市場之快速變遷，並介紹學生瞭解總體經濟與產業景氣分析，公司經營財務報表分析，投資標的評價與技術分析。透過研究方法之介紹及預測手法之教導並輔以個案實作以達其效。
description.en: The objective of the course is to construct the infrastructure of industry analysis and to build up the research capability for changing market development. The fundamental analysis of macro economy and business cycle, financial statement analysis and investment valuation methods are also studied. By introducing the methodologies and forecasting tools, the case study is implied in this class.

description.zh: 本課程之主要目的除介紹基本之類神經理論外，更在於運用現有之類神經網路於工業工程領域內之相關運用，將以現有之資料庫實地解決分類、分群、預測、監控等實際問題，使學生能夠了解類神經網路之基礎理論外，更可深入運用此工具。
description.en: The objective of this course is not only to explore the basic theoretical basis of Neural Networks, but also further introduce the versatility the applications of artificial neural networks. This course will briefly review the essence of Perceptron, Backpropagation, ART, Hopfield NN, and Fuzzy Neural Networks, and then adopts the data (offered by public database such as UCI) to on-hand practice in applying ANN in classification, clustering, prediction and diagnostics.

description.zh: 讀書報告、專題討論、機電系統產品介紹與討論、Seminar 心得等。可重覆修習。
description.en: Case Study, Mechatronics in Industry, Seminars.

notes: 綜三演講廳，系主任

description.zh: 先修課程：負責教授同意。膜披覆製程是近年來高科技產業技術一項前途被看好的製程技術之一，廣用於刀具、模具、光學元件、感測器及半導體工業等等。此門課程將提供此項技術之介紹、相關配備、原理與能量提供方式、將包括：沉積技術與應用、化學氣相沉積法、物理氣相沉積法、電鍍技術、真空工程、直流電源、射頻電源、微波、熱燈絲等各種能量介紹、以及膜的成核與生長理論。
description.en: The technology of films coating has advanced dramatically. This advancement was driven primarily by the need for new products and devices in the electronics and optical industries etc.. The rapid progress in various devices would not have been possible without the development of new files coating technology, improved film characteristic and superior file qualities. This course is intended to serve us a guide for the student or practitioner in the field, as a review and overview of this rapidly evolving technology for the graduate students in several branches of science and engineering.

notes: 機電甲組選修；製科。機械外。機電博。創新半導體。鐵道合

description.zh: 碩士學位論文.
description.en: Thesis for master degree's partially requirement.

notes: 碩士班

description.zh: 妥善地利用資源可促使資源生生不息，不當地濫用卻會帶來大地反撲，禍及人類，如何在建設的同時，大興土木之際，顧及生態體系，及為本課程之主要重點。課程內容包括環境生態系統、生態學之基本法則、質能傳遞、污染物對生態之影響。
description.en: The main purpose of this course is to learn how to use the natural sources for industrial development but alse maintain the ecological balance. Improper usage of natural resourses will bring adverse results. The topic will include:fundamental ecology, mass and energy transfer and the impact of industrial development on ecology.

name.zh: 數值分析在結構工程上之應用
name.en: Applications of Structures Engineering by Numerical Analysis

description.zh: 電腦基本知識，中英文文書處理系統的基本設計理念與現有系統實習，電腦工作底稿功能架構說明及應用實習，資料庫管理系統基本觀念，工程資訊管理系統基本觀念，資料庫設計及資料庫軟體系統使用練習，簡易型之統計繪圖軟體及工程應用實例，其他現代電腦科技發展與其在結構上之應用個案。
description.en: Applications of Structures Engineering by Numerical AnalysisThe application of computer about civil engineering, such as officials Dispatch to handle in Chinese and English, the software of drawings and using software of data base etc.

notes: 土木 205

description.zh: 1. 政府採購法簡介 2. 標準作業模式 3. 特別採購模式 4. 建築師及工程顧問之甄選及聘用 5. 公平合約之訂定 6. 異議申訴制度 7. 其他
description.en: the management of financial affairs1. the introduction of government purchasing law2. standard working model3. specific purchasing model4. the choose and employ of architect and engineering consultant5. the making of fair restrict6. the making of reporting objection 7. others

notes: 土木 206

description.zh: 本課程使學生熟悉混凝土之材料組成、物理及力學性質，以及混凝土之配比及其近代發展。課程中亦包含混凝土之非線性分析，如潛變、乾縮及斷裂行為等。
description.en: This course provides students with material composition, physical and mechanical properties of concrete proportion and its modern development. Courses will also be included in the nonlinear analysis of concrete, creep, shrinkage and the failure theory and so on.

notes: 上限 10 人 / 與土木四合開 / 土木 205

name.zh: 工程軟體 API 應用程式開發
name.en: API Development for Engineering Computer Software

description.zh: 許多現成的工程軟體並無法滿足所有客製化的需求，因此會開放作謂的「應用程式介面」（Application Programming Interfaces, API）供使用者進行二次開發，使其能自行拼湊、重組與創造需要的功能。本課程以建築資訊塑模（BIM）或人工智慧（AI）應用為主要示範案例，訓練學生有系統地理解 API 的規格說明文件，並且有效率地開發 API 應用程式，以達到各種工程應用軟體的客製化應用，並提升不同軟體間的交互操作性。
description.en: Many engineering software packages may not fully meet all customized requirements, thus they provide Application Programming Interfaces (APIs) for users to engage in secondary development. This course takes Building Information Modeling (BIM) and Artificial Intelligence (AI) applications as primary demonstration examples, and trains the enrolled students to systematically understand API documentations as well as efficiently develop API applications. It can help the enrolled students to customize their software for solving the engineering problems. In addition, it also enhances the interoperability between different engineering software packages.

notes: 土木 106

description.zh: 本課程主要教授學生：(1) 橋梁之功能及組織、(2) 橋梁之種類、(3) 橋梁之上部結構、(4) 橋梁之下部結構：(a) 基礎 (b) 橋台 (c) 橋墩、(5) 橋梁之伸縮設施、(6) 橋面排水設施、(7) 欄杆及照明設施、(8) 跨海大橋、陸橋、高架橋及跨河大橋等簡介。
description.en: Planning, desing, constroution and maintenance of the various bridges.

notes: 上限 20 人 / 與土木四合開

description.zh: 本課程主要目的在於提供方法，用來分析任何型式的結構物受任意動荷重所產生的應力與變化。
description.en: The primary purpose of this course is to present methods for analyzing the stresses and deflections developed in any given type of structure whenit is subjected to an arbitary dynamic loading.

description.zh: 本課程將針對如何從土壤動力試驗評估土壤的動態力學參考數導入，作為理論解或者數值解的輸入值，以預測土壤在震動下的變形行為，以及分析土壤與結構物的動態互制行為。內容包括：波傳遞理論，土壤的動力性質，土壤的液化，基礎的振動問題，等等..
