description.en: This course will teach how to evaluate the soil's dynamic material properties by means of dynamic laboratory testing.Based on the analytical and numerical solution,the behaviour of soil-structure dynamic interaction can be predicted.

notes: 土木 505

description.zh: 本課程適合碩士論文及大學專題報告實務應用。針對環境中的危害因子之認識、測定方法、採樣技術、分析方法，做一完整的解說，並讓學生能熟悉環境測定的進行，取得正確的量測數據。無進行實驗時，亦可使用模式數值解析方式，解決問題。無論是實驗或模式，最後仍應回歸數據統計分析，及專業圖表繪製。
description.en: This course is suitable for the practical application of master's thesis and university report. Give a complete explanation of the knowledge, measurement methods, sampling techniques, and analysis methods of environmental hazards, and enable students to be familiar with environmental measurement and obtain correct measurement data. When there is no experiment, the model analysis can also be used to solve the problem. Whether it is an experiment or a model, the final regression data should be statistical analysis, and professional figure/table drawing.

notes: 土木 308

description.zh: 近年發生之福島核災、印度新德里爆炸案等各種天然及人為災害已顯著影響到人類的生活品質與安全。本課程目標有三：(1) 了解各種災害形成原因及環境背景因素；(2) 評估災害對社會、環境及人類之影響及因應措施；(3) 新穎技術可擴大環境監測尺度並預警災害。較為代表性之災害會於課堂中案例講述，加深同學學習印象。工程背景較為薄弱之學生，亦適合選修此課程。學習成效：學生可獲得：(1) 災害管理內涵與重要觀念。(2) 評估災害風險與危機管理。(3) 研擬災前的災後復原重建計畫。
description.en: The recurrent occurrences of various natural and manmade disasters like the December 2004 Tsunami, the bomb blasts in the cinema halls of Delhi and many such incidences have diverted our focus towards safety of one’s own life. The goals of this course are three-fold: (1) To educate students about the underlying natural process that give rise to hazards. (2) To emphasize how society evaluates and confronts the dangers posed by these natural processes from a political, social, and ethical perspective. (3) Expose students to the technological innovations that are allowing an increasing large human population to monitor, predict, and warn society about natural hazards and impending disasters. Case studies of recent and past natural disasters will be discussed. This course is designed for students without an extensive background in science or math and can be used to partly satisfy minor programs in Environmental Geosciences.Learning Outcomes: Upon completion of this course, students will

notes: 土木 308

description.zh: 資料研析方法，水文統計與迴歸分析，小流域洪水推估 (含基本水文系統實驗), 基本水文系統實驗，頻率分析 (2), 水文演算，水力演算，降雨逕流模擬，地理資訊系統 (GIS) 結合地文單位歷線，序率水文模式，HEC-2,6 講解與實習，專題討論.
description.en: Introduction,Data error analysis,Hydrological statistics,Frequency analysis,Stochastic analysis,Hydrological routing,Hydraulic routing,GIUH plus GIS,Small watershed flood prediction(including Lab.experiment),Seminar.

notes: 土木 308

description.zh: 本課程是較大學部的「岩石力學」課程為之深入探討岩石行為的課程，將針對岩石的指數性質、透水性、強度及變形性做更詳細的研究，並將比較岩石和土壤的不同，以及介紹機率概念在岩石力學上的應用。上課時將以研究論文為主，，書籍、報告為輔，其涵蓋的課程內容大致如下：1、岩石的指數性質 2、岩石和土壤的不同 3、岩體分類法 4、岩石的透水性 5、立體投影圖 6、岩石的強度 7、岩石的破壤準則 8、岩石的變形性 9、弱面的分析 10、機率在岩石力學上的應用
description.en: Compared to the undergraduate Rock Mechanics course, this is a more advanced course to examine the behaviors of rocks under different stress conditions。 It will focus on the index properties, the permeability properties, the strength properties, and the deformation properties of rocks。 In addition, it will address the difference between rocks and soils by contrast。 Finally, this course will introduce students to the concept of probability, and how it can be applied to the Rock Mechanics。 The students taking this course will have plenty of reading assignments, and are required to participate in the classroom discussions。

notes: 土木 205

description.zh: 本課程將探討明渠中穩定流、非穩定流、均勻流、非均勻流之流體特性。
description.en: Open channel hydraulics treats the motion of water in conduits that have a free surface, that is, in which the flow of water is not completely bounded by the channel perimeter and one surface is exposed to atmospheric pressure. The flows can be steady (time-invariant) or unsteady, uniform (space-invariant) or non-uniform (gradually, rapidly, or spatially varied). For engineers, open channels are very common for the conveyance of natural waters, storm discharges, sewage collection systems, and aqueducts for water distribution systems. Knowledge of the mechanics of open-channel flow, then, is important for the proper design of these facilities.

notes: 土木 308

description.zh: 應用統計學之目的乃教導學生機率與統計的理論，其強調利用統計方法及資料分析之技巧，以解決工程上可能面臨的問題，因此本課程將大量引用真實資料及實例，以說明如何處理相關的問題。本課程的包含的內容將涵蓋資料分析、機率、隨機變數、機率分佈、推估、假設檢定、取樣、線性迴歸、機率過程、變異數分析及多變量分析。
description.en: This is a comprehensive course in probability and statistics for students in engineering and technology discipline. It emphasizes modern statistical methods and data analysis using real data and examples to offer students exposure to practical applications. This course will provide an opportunity to learn how probabilistic analysis and statistical reasoning and testing can be applied to a wide range of problems in civil engineering. Topics to be covered will include data analysis, probability, random variables, probability distributions, estimation, hypothesis testing, sampling, linear regression, statistical process control and analysis of variance.

notes: 土木 308

description.zh: 地下水為地球上可資利用且蘊藏最豐富之淡水資源，本課程以介紹地下水文相關理論及實務為主，有助於學生了解地下水之開發利用與經營管理。課程內容包括地下水之來源、流動及開發應用，以及各項天然或人為化學汙染對地下水系統質與量之影響評估 。
description.en: This course is concerned with the theory and practice of hydrology, the science of water in subsurface environments which are helpful for groundwater resource exploitation and management. It is divided into two main parts: (1) basic concepts dealing with the origin, movement of groundwater, and its recovery from wells, and (2) a qualitative and quantitative assessment of the chemistry of natural and contaminated systems.

notes: 土木 308

description.zh: 專題報告，專題演講，研究小組討論 Case Study, Seminar
description.en: Case Study, Seminar

description.zh: 碩士論文寫作
description.en: A Student must write a thesis to fulfill the partial requirements for the Master degree.

description.zh: 本課程著重於中英文口頭報告能力之培養，在模擬發表過程中，培養學生使用正確的表達用法，並建立適當之應對方式。
description.en: This course offers opportunities for students to develop their oral presentation skills in both Chinese and English languages via simulated presentations in class. Students will learn how to present their papers precisely and how to engage a conversation properly.

notes: 車輛四、車輛所合開

description.zh: 1. 輪胎模型 2. 輪胎性能參數 3. 穩態操控 4. 暫態操控 5. 四輪操控 6. 乘坐舒適性分析
description.en: To provide an overview of ground vehicle handling and ride performance through the development, analysis and interpretation of vehicle models. The course is divided into three major parts: Tire modeling, Handling, and Ride. For each part, case study examples will be used to illustrate the important design considerations.

description.zh: 本課程主要是針對研究所學生所開設，課程目標為介紹學生電力電子學的基本電路及分析切換式電源的操作原理。課程章節內容包含了電力電子系統介紹，二極體整流器，直流至直流切換式轉換器，切換式直流至交流變流器，零電壓及零電流切換，切換式直流電源供應器，電力調節器與不斷電系統，馬達驅動器介紹，家庭及工業之應用及 公用電力之應用。
description.en: This course is mainly designed for graduate students. The objective of this course is to introduce fundamental circuits of power electronics and analyze operation principles of switching mode power. This course includes Introduce to power electronic system, Diode Rectifiers, DC-DC Switch-Mode Converters, Switch-Mode DC-AC Inverters, Zero-Voltage or Zero-Current Switchings, Switching DC Power Supplies, Power Conditioners and Uninterruptible Power Supplies, Introduction to Motor Drives, Residential and Industrial Applications and Electric Utility Applications.

description.zh: 本課程之目標為增進研究生之英文閱讀能力與寫作技巧。介紹英文科技論文的慣用語法、用字與閱讀技巧，並分析撰寫英文報告與學術論文之章法與組織要領。
description.en: Objective of this course is to improve reading ability and writing skill for graduate students. This course introduces grammar, terms and phrases that are frequently used in English technical articles. Structures of English essay and thesis will also be explained.

description.zh: 本課程為研究所熱流科學基礎課程之一，內容主要包括質量、動量與能量守恆方程式的推導，以及它們的解析與近似解，應用範圍包含非旋轉流、低雷諾數流以及高雷諾數 (邊界層) 流等等。
description.en: This course is one of the fundamental courses in the thermofluid sciences for graduate students. Based upon the concept of conservation, the equations of mass, momentum, and energy will be derived. This course will deal with solutions of these equations, both exact and approximate. The application of solutions includes irrotational flow, low Reynolds number flow, and high Reynolds number (boundary layer) flow, etc.

description.zh: 課程內容包含：系統定義、資料分析、迴歸方法、系統元件數值模建立、數值計算方法、系統性能模擬及數值佳化方法。
description.en: The course materials are as follows: definition of system, analysis of data, regression method, modeling equipment, numerical calculation, simulation and optimization of system

notes: 計中電腦教室

description.zh: 本課程使學生充分瞭解燃料電池專業學科基礎知識，並進一步啟發及增進學生未來能源科技發展知能。燃料電池是一種電化學的發電裝置，其運作原理係利用電化學反應將燃料內之化學能直接轉換為電能，因其在能量轉換過程中並不經過熱機過程，因此能量轉換效率較高。本課程之授課綱要可分為以下幾項：燃料電池系統簡介、燃料電池效率及開迴路電壓、燃料電池工作電壓、質子交換膜燃料電池、磷酸燃料電池、鹼性燃料電池、直接甲醇燃料電池、固態氧化物燃料電池、燃料電池的燃料供應、燃料電池電力傳輸、燃料電池系統分析。
description.en: This course enables students to fully understand the basics of professional disciplines of the fuel cell, and to further inspire and enhance the knowledge of students about future energy technology. Fuel cell is an electrochemical power generating device. It can directly convert the chemical energy of fuel into the electrical energy via the electrochemical reaction. Because it does not go through the process of thermal engine in the energy conversion process, and therefore a higher energy conversion efficiency. Teaching outlines of the course can be divided into the followings:Introduction to fuel cell system, Efficiency and open voltage, Operational fuel cell voltages, Proton exchange membrane fuel cell, Phosphoric acid fuel cell, Alkaline fuel cell, Direct methanol fuel cell, Solid oxide fuel cell, Fueling fuel cell, Delivering fuel cell power, Analysis of fuel cell system.

description.zh: 系統功能分析，空調系統設計概要，負荷計算理論，送風與風管系統分析，送水系統分析，冷卻水塔熱質傳分析，主機系統性能分析
description.en: System function analysis, introduction to system designs of air-conditioning, theories on cooling load calculation, air moving and duct system analysis, water system analysis, heat and mass transfer in cooling towers, performance analysis of chillers

notes: 日職能源所合開

description.zh: 本課程包含下列課題 1. 空氣清淨機構理論。2. 無塵室構造、建造及確效。3. 空氣過濾理論。4. 無塵室設計專案。5. 論文研讀。
description.en: This course covers the following Topics.1.Theory of air cleaning Mechanism.2.Clean room configuration, construction and verification.3.Air filtration theory.4.Paper discussion.

name.zh: 電腦輔助能源與熱流科學分析
name.en: Computer-Aided Analysis on Energy ad Thermofluid Sciences

description.zh: 本課程適合修過工程數學及基礎熱流的碩博士班學生選修。授課內容主要是應用 Matlab 及 CFD 套裝軟體分析能源與熱流科學領域的相關問題，並著重於案例分析。課程內容主要包括利用數值分析解析邊界層問題、有限差分法求解穩態與暫態熱傳導以及二維強制驅動流問題，案例分析包括室內氣流運動、潔淨室氣流分佈、熱交換器性能分析、儲冰系統分析、電子散熱以及氫能系統等。
description.en: This course is suitable for the graduate students who have taken fundamental courses of engineering mathematics and thermofluid sciences. The objective of this course is to apply Matlab and CFD packages to analyze the problems related to energy and thermofluid sciences. Case study is the focus of this course. Course contents mainly include the application of numerical methods on solving boundary-layer problems, analyzing steady and transient heat conduction problems, and 2-D lid-driven flow problems by finite difference method. Case study covers room air flow motion, clean room simulation, heat exchanger performance, electronic cooling, thermal ice storage system and hydrogen energy, etc.

name.zh: 能源績效量測驗證與碳管理
name.en: Energy Performance Measurement and Verification and Carbon Management

description.zh: 因應全球淨零碳排趨勢，能源管理與碳管理為國家各產業提升競爭力的重要環節。本課程將從 ISO50001 能源管理與 ISO14064 碳管理制度出發，講授能源管理、能源績效評估、碳管理、和績效提升 / 減碳計算之量測與驗證方法學。講授內容涵蓋：關鍵觀念、節能 / 減碳技術、績效 / 減碳量測與驗證方法、節能 / 減碳統計分析方法學、和案例 EXCEL 操作與討論。
description.en: In response to the global trend of net-zero carbon emissions, energy management and carbon management are important links in improving the competitiveness of various industries in the country. This course will start from the ISO50001 energy management and ISO14064 carbon management systems and teach the measurement and verification methodologies of energy management, energy performance assessment, carbon management, and performance improvement/carbon reduction calculations. The teaching contents cover: key concepts, energy saving/carbon reduction technology, performance/carbon reduction measurement and verification methods, energy saving/carbon reduction statistical analysis methodology, and EXCEL case practice and discussion.

description.zh: 中文概述：碩士學位論文寫作
description.en: A student must write a thesis to fulfill the partial requirements for the Master degree.

description.zh: 中文概述：專題報告、專題演講、研究小組討論。
description.en: Case study. Seminar. Group meeting.

notes: 碩二，計中電腦教室

description.zh: 本課程為訓練學生具有敏銳的觀察能力及細密的思考能力，以發現技職教育的相關問題，並擬定完善可行的研究計畫，遂行研究工作，經客觀分析程序，並作成研究論。課程內容括技職教育研究概論、研究設計、研究方法、取樣與量測、資料處理、報告撰寫。
description.en: This course is a survey of research methodology that is relevant to the technological education. It discusses how to design quantitative research, collect, and report the data. It also highlights the difference between quantitative research and qualitative research.

description.zh: 本課程在探討技職教育行政理論包括組織、領導、決策、溝通、效能研究等及其相關實務之研究。期培育學生分析當前技職教育行政問題，並研訂技職教育的改善措施。
description.en: The aims of the course are to explore the theory and practice of educational administration, especially the educational organization, leadership, decision making, communication, etc. Students are expected to apply related theory to analyze VTE issues after the class.

description.zh: 探討網路教學與學習之相關原理，以及實務應用。內容包括有網路學習之優點、特性、限制、科技、媒體、平台、教材、教師角色與管理、學生角色與任務、實際案例、未來趨勢等。
description.en: To explore theories and practical application Web-based instruction and learning including WBL advantages, characteristics, limitations, technology, media, platforms, materials, teacher roles and management, student roles and tasks, practical cases, and future trends etc..

name.en: Theory and practice of Technical-Vocational Education

description.zh: 課程內容包括：技職教育的理論基礎、能力本位、建教合作、生計教育、職業輔導、技職課程與教學等理念與實務。
description.en: Course content include: theoretical foundations and developmental trends of technical and vocational education, competence-based instruction, cooperative education, career education, vocational guidance, technical and vocational education curriculum.

name.zh: 網路學習社群專題研究
name.en: Special Topic on Web-Based Learning Community

description.zh: 探討網路學習社群之相關原理，以及實務應用。內容包括有網路學習社群之理論基礎、優點、特性、限制、科技、媒體、環境、形成要素、成員角色與任務、線上討論與知識分享、成功因素、經營管理、實際案例、未來趨勢等。
description.en: To explore advnced issues on Web-based learning community (WBCL)including WBCL theoretical fundamental, advantages, characteristics, limitations, technology, media, environment, formed factors, member roles and tasks, online discussion, successful factors, operation and management, practical cases, and future trrnds etc..

notes: 計中電腦教室

name.zh: 遊戲式數位學習專題研究

description.zh: 探討遊戲式數位學習之相關原理、設計、以及實務應用。內容包括遊戲式數位學習之優點、特性、限制、科技、媒體、設計與發展、系統、實際案例、未來趨勢等。
description.en: The course aims to explore advanced issues on game-based e-learning including its characteristics, advantages and limitations, technology and media involved, design and development, system and practical cases, and future trends, etc.

notes: 計中電腦教室

description.zh: 管理心理學係運用行為科學的方法，事實及歷程，以處理人們在工作中的行為及心理的一門科學。本課程希望讓學生了解管理心理學如何影響他們的生活與工作，並能有效地運用管理技巧來處理企業中的人與事。
description.en: Administrative psychology is a science, which makes use of the method, fact, and process of the behavior science to handle people's behavior and minds in their work. This curriculum is expected to make students understand how administrative psychology affect their life and work, and how to use the management skill to effectively deal with the personnel and matter in the enterprise.

name.zh: 數位教學設計專題研究
name.en: Special topics of the instructional design of e-learning

description.zh: 本課程將針對數位學習教學設計的相關研究進行探討以及對現行數位教學設計實例分析、未來趨勢、及對未來研究的方向探討。
description.en: The course is designed to research on instructional design of e-learning and related issues including systematic design and special topics related to instructional design of e-learning and discussion for the future trends.

notes: 計中電腦教室

description.zh: 本課程將透過每週專題演講方式，讓學生了解有機材料之最新開發成品或最先進之研究成果。演講者之安排將以校外知名專家學者及校內各計畫執行者為主。
description.en: This course will provide important information regarding to the latest development or application on the organic materials. Speakers being invited are well-known scholars in organic area. Graduate students or thesis advisors will also be invited to report any in interesting result from their graduate studies.

notes: 碩一單號選修

description.zh: 學生與教授討論擬定之研究題目，在教授個別指導下，進行實驗之研究，以培養學生尋找相關資料，文獻及獨立研究的訓練，並將其研究成果撰寫成碩士論文。
description.en: To make students able to carry out independent study in master level. Students will be assigned a research topic. An independent experimental design, data analysis, and final master thesis are necessary for this course.

description.zh: 本課程主要探討高分子在溶液及固態時的物理化學現象及其應用。內容包括輔 G 熱力學？高分子的微結構及定性。輔 G 熱力學探討統計熱力學、晶格理論、Flory-Huggin 理論、Flory-Krigbaum 理論、相分離、θ- 溫度、滲透壓、GPC 測分子量、高分子膠體。? 高分子之微結構包括有高分子之形狀、自由旋轉分子鏈距離、光散射、中子散射、排拒體積、碎形、霍氏光譜及核磁共振儀在高分子微結構之分析。
description.en: The course is to investigate the physical phenomena of macromolecules in the solution and solid state. It includes the solution thermodynamics and chemical microstructure of polymer chains.The solution thermodynamics is to study lattice theory, statistical thermodynamics, Flory-Huggin theory, Flory-Krigbaum theory, phase separation, θ-temperature, Osmometry, GPC, and polymer gels.Light scattering and Neutron scattering are used to characterize the polymer microstructure. Polymer radius of gyration, freely rotating chains, excluded volume, fractal, and scaling are also discussed. Finally, spectroscopy methods are used to study polymerization models and microstructure.

name.en: Analysis and Identification of Organic Materials

description.zh: 本課程包含材料的結構鑑定和材料的性質分析。材料的結構鑑定方法有：元素分析、吸收光譜法、振動光譜法、核磁共振光譜法、質譜法、x - 射線光譜法和電子顯微鏡法。材料的性質分析包含：材料熱性質 (DSC, TGA, TMA,DMA) 和材料機械性質 (伸張、壓縮、剪力強度等)。
description.en: The materials of the course include structure identification and property analysis of materials. Methods of structure identification of materials are : elemental analysis, absorption spectroscopy, vibration spectroscopy, nuclear magnetic resonance spectroscopy, mass spectrometry, x-ray spectroscopy and electron microscopy. Metheds of property analysis of materials are : thermal properties of materials (DSC,TGA,TMA,DMA) and mechanical properties of materials (tensile, compression and shear strengths).

description.zh: 本課程主要探討各種高分子之聚合方法及動力學之研究，如逐步聚合、遊離基連鎖聚合、乳化聚合、離子連鎖聚合、連鎖共聚合反應、開環聚合、立體規則高分子之合成，未終止的游離基聚合方法。從分子量的分佈，結構物性之關係，作高分子聚合之最佳化設計，並且探討這些聚合方法如何應用在最新的科技上，如光電材料、複合材料。
description.en: This course is to elucidate the polymer synthesis and Kinetics studies. The synthesis includes step polymerization, free radical chain polymerization, emulsion polymerization, ionic chain polymerization, chain copolymerization, ring opening polymerization, sterospecific polymerization and living free radical polymerization. The synthesis scheme is optimized with the structure-properties relationship and molecular design. The potential application of these methods in high-tech materials, such as optoelectronics, and composites, will be elucidated.

description.zh: 此課程屬於高等無機化學特論，針對研究所學生有志於從事應用研究或投入化學工業而開設，有機金屬不只是化學家重要的研究工具也是化學工程師在設計反應的利器。課程內容包括：主族有機金屬、過渡元素之有機金屬化合物、硼族有機金屬、銅銀金之有機金屬、18 價電子原理、s, p 受體予體、有機錫
description.en: The advanced course for inorganic chemistry is designed for graduates who plan to initiate their academic research in the chemical field or work in chemical plants. Organometallics provides not only the powerful tools for chemist in their research but also for chemical engineers in the design of their reactors. The course covers the following topics: (1) Main-group organometallics (2) Organometallic compounds of the transition elements (3) Organometallics of the boron group (4) Organometallics of Copper, Silver and Gold (5) The 18-Valence-Electron (18-VE) Rule (6) s, p donors and acceptors (7) Organotin

description.zh: 本門授課之目的在於介紹奈米材料及其製程 (包括化學法及物理法奈米材料法)，並探討奈米材料的未來發展及應用。所包括的課程主題如下：1. 奈米材料與奈米化學簡介。2. 奈米材料與結構分析 3. 量子力學；4. 奈米材料自我組成 5. 奈米材料模擬 6. 碳化奈米材料 7 奈米材料製成 8. 奈米材料的應用；9. 奈米材料的遠景與未來發展。
description.en: The course introduces nanomaterials and their preparation processes (including chemical method and physical methods). Future development and applications are also discussed. This course will cover the following topics:1. Introduction of nanomaterials and Nano-chemistry; 2. Nanomaterials: structure and analysis; 3. Quantum mechanics; 4. Nanomaterials: self-assembly; 5. Nanomaterials: simulation; 6. Carbon-based nanomaterials; 7. Synthesis and processing 8. Growth and application of semiconductor nanoparticles; 9. Prospective future of nanomaterials.

notes: 分子四和高分所合開

description.zh: 本課程主要目的在提供學生開啟個人對於建築與都市設計領域相關議題的獨立研究能力。因此，本課程將包含如何建構研究設計、寫作與參考文獻的能力。
description.en: The aims of this course are to provide students with opportunity to initiate personal research into architecture and urban design related topic. Therefore, the course includes a training of developing research, writing and bibliographic skills.

notes: 建都所與建築四合開，設計館 251 授課

description.zh: 本課程區分為四個實習，共一學年之都市設計實習，每學期應從事幾項實習，依該學期之情況而定：(一) 大型基地開發之建築規劃與都市設計實習：參照台北市都市發展局擬定之「都市設計與土地使用開發許可」之審議標準，練習建築、敷地與都市設計三者整合關係之設計實習。(二) 都市更新地區都市設計實習：以台北市更新地區為範例，選定基地範圍從事都市更新地區之改造，建立地區未來像，並擬定都市設計準則。(三) 都市計畫通盤檢討地區都市設計實習：依據都市計畫通盤檢討第八條規定，都市計畫通盤檢討地區必須依據該地區之交通、產業、文化、生態及基地等因素，擬定都市設計準則；以台北市都市計畫通盤檢討為例，練習都市設計準則之訂定，或以都市計畫細部計畫為例，研擬土地使用分區管制與設計準則。(四) 新發展區都市設計實習：選定一個地區，可能是擴大都市發展地區或新市鎮、新社區之規劃設計實習。
description.en: There are four exercises for one academic year. The exercises to be undertaken depend on when and how it is appropriate:(1) Exercise on building planning and urban design for large-scale land development project(2) Exercise practice on urban design for district renewal planning(3) Exercise of overall review district urban design out of the total urban design (4) Exercise on urban design for new development area

description.zh: 研究生相較於大學期間訓練的最主要差別在於其必須從事個人的學術研究。因此，研究生須要資訊與洞察力以達成獲得較高學位之論文寫作能力。故本課程主要內容包括： 一、 研究的特性 二、 智慧收集 -「什麼」的問題 三、 研究 -「何故」的問題 四、 良好研究的特質 五、 研究的基本類型 六、 從事研究的技能 七、 研究倫理 八、 研究設計練習
description.en: The necessity for personal academic research is the key cultural change that postgraduate students will encounter compared with their undergraduate days. Thus, postgraduate students need information and insights to develop the capacity to operate successfully achieving a higher-level degree. To examine these concerns, the course includes: 1. Characteristics of research 2. Intelligence-gathering-the "what" questions 3. Research-the "why" questions 4. Characteristics of good research 5. Basic types of research 6. The craft of doing research 7. Research ethics 8. Research design practice

description.zh: 本課程授課主要內容分為三部分：第一部份為都市防災概論，此部分主要針對國內外文獻作一回顧，進而瞭解都市防災整體架構，區分為（1）文獻回顧；（2）防災基本計畫；及（3）防災整體架構等。期使國內都市計畫能逐步邁向防災都市計畫，以建立『安全都市』為目標。此部分的主要內容區分為：（1）都市災害風險理念的形成；（2）防災都市計畫與地區防災系統規劃；（3）都市計畫防災系統規劃原則；（4）都市計畫防災作業準則內容架構；（5）都市計畫防災作業準則；（6）安心都市計畫的形成與實現。第三部分為實務操作部分，以草屯鎮為例，藉九二一大地震的實例，深入探討災情調查的方法，實際調查狀況及研訂災後重建的程序與計畫內容，期望成為國內都市重建計畫的範例，主要內容區分為：（1）緒論；（2）重建理論；（3）草屯鎮現況發展；（4）災情調查方法與重建程序之建立；（5）災情調查分析與重建計畫內容研訂等。
description.en: The subject will be presented in three partsPart One - (1) Literature retrospection; (2) Fundamental planning for disaster prevention; (3) An integrated disaster prevention organization.Part Two -The major contents to be addressed include (1) Formation of urban disaster cataclysm and risk; (2) Urban disaster prevention plan and regional disaster protection system planning; (3) Principles for planning disaster prevention system in urban plan; (4) Operational standards and organization for urban disaster prevention; (5) Operational guidelines for urban disaster prevention; (6) Realization and formation of trouble free urban plan.Party Three -. The major contents are (1) Introduction; (2) rehabilitation theory; (3) Current development in Tsaotun City; (4) Establishment of damage survey method and rehabilitation procedures; (5) Detail analysis of damage survey report and preparation of rehabilitation plan content.

description.zh: 施工歷史可以被視為了解建築理論的關鍵基礎。按照慣例，建築學院提供建築歷史方面的研究方面，包括建築風格和哲學的發展，或者建築材料和建築技術的最新進展。此外，關於建築的理論辯論也更加關注哲學的討論，而不是物理建築的表現。但是，建築理論主要討論材料和建築系統的表示。因此，材料的構造方法實際上會極大地影響建築理論的解釋。因此，該課程可以分為兩個部分：首先，將回顧東西方世界的建設歷史以及現代時期。其次，將討論結構論和相對論的爭論。本課程的目的是發展與會學生的能力，使他們能夠回顧自己論點的要點，並運用適當的理論來支持或爭論他們對建築理論的理解。
description.en: Construction history could be considered as the key foundation to understand architectonic theories. Conventionally, architectural academies provide study aspects either in architectural histories in terms of development of architectural style and philosophy or in the latest progress of architectural materials and construction techniques. Moreover, theoretical debates of architecture also pay more attentions to philosophical discussions instead of physical construction presentation.Nevertheless, architectonic theories mainly discuss the presentation of materials and construction systems. Therefore, construction methods of materials in fact affect the interpretation of architectonic theories significantly. As a result, this course can be divided into two sections: firstly the construction history of Eastern and Western worlds as well as modern period of time will be reviewed. Secondly the architectonic and relative theoretic debates will be discussed. The purpose of the course is to d

notes: 建築四與建都所合開

name.zh: 建築設計與理論研究方法

description.zh: 隨著跨學門的多元連結，當代建築學的設計與史論研究向度越趨廣泛且複雜。為回應此變動的條件，研究方法作為知識體系建構的工具，亦需重新思考如何提供理解當代建築學和認識論的新興維度。因此，本課程首先以「研究為一門藝術的概念」- 透過理解自身意識與研究的關係，作為開啟研究的初步引導。接著，將從人文社會科學研究方法的基礎出發，探討如何在建築學門內適切轉化及運用此些方法。透過本課程，學習者將能夠有效辯證和梳理不同研究主體 (知識論) 以及該研究所對應之方法邏輯 (方法論), 並以此作為設計研究的基礎建構。同時，期待學習者能夠理解在建築研究中，學門的部分特殊性質所衍伸出的方法論修正，並鼓勵為當代建築設計與史論研究提供新的思路。
description.en: With the growing interdisciplinary connections, contemporary architectural design, theoretical research, and historical dimensions have become increasingly expansive and intricate. In response to these evolving conditions, research methods, as essential tools for constructing knowledge systems, need to be reconsidered in order to offer fresh insights into understanding contemporary architecture and its epistemology.This course starts by embracing the concept of "research as an art" as a foundational guide to initiate research, emphasizing the crucial relationship between self-awareness and the research process. It then builds upon the established research methods in the humanities and social sciences, exploring how to effectively adapt and apply these methods within the field of architecture. Throughout the course, learners will learn to skillfully articulate and organize diverse research subjects (epistemology) and their corresponding methodological frameworks (methodology), estab

notes: 配合 USR 計畫

name.en: Theories and Practice in English for Professional Purposes

description.zh: 本課程旨在研討專業英文研究及應用，課程包括專業領域英語文之語域分析，探討各領域中的語法及詞彙特點，並進一步分析不同領域中之修辭及言語萹章使用，進而研討語言溝通目標功能分析並結合策略研究，以將理論應用於專業實務及研究中。
description.en: This course is intended for graduate students who are pre-experienced in working in specific fields of professions. For other students who are inexperienced in the workplace are required to have consolidated knowledge and observations of the world industries. It aims to address the applicability of theories in EPP and the plethora of situations raised from such applications. The course will provide theoretical studies for applications in respect to register analysis, rhetorical and discourse analysis, functionality analysis and skills and strategies. It is also expected that the course will describe other models in EPP studies.

name.zh: 語音學和英語發音教學

description.zh: 傳統發音教學大多根據教師直覺認為語音是該如何產製的、或發音課本中教條式的規則。在這堂課，學生將透過具體的聲學和構音資料、來學習重要語音學原則，並學習將原則正確地應用在發音教學當中。學生也將探討如何將這些知識轉化成不同年齡層和語言程度之學生可以接受的內容。
description.en: Traditionally, pronunciation teaching has been based on "armchair data" (e.g., the instructor's intuition on how a sound should be articulated) or prescriptive statements in pronunciation textbooks. In this course, students will learn fundamental principles of phonetics through experimental acoustic and articulatory data and learn how to apply them to pronunciation teaching. Students will be challenged to translate what they have learned to digestible pronunciation instructions for students of different ages and proficiency levels.

description.zh: 本課程旨在介紹英語全球化、全球英語，以及英語作為國際語言的發展與相關論述，並針對英語在全球擴散的現象，檢視相關的概念與理論。本課程將探討因英語全球化所造成，在社會語言學、文化、政治經濟與教育等方面的重要議題，以及與全球英語相關的議題與爭論。
description.en: This course aims to provide students with an overview of the spread of the English language around the world, the emergence of English varieties, and the development of the popularization of English as a lingua franca. It examines the various concepts and theories developed in academia to account for the unprecedented global expansion of English. Through readings and class discussion, this course will look at key sociolinguistic, cultural, politico-economic and educational issues arising from the spread of English as well as the current issues and debates surrounding Global Englishes. Students will be encouraged to conduct original research on or detailed analysis of the implications of English as the international language.

description.zh: 碩士學位論文寫作
description.en: A student must write a thesis to fulfill the partial requirements for the Master degree.

description.zh: 專題報告、專題演講、研究小組討論
description.en: Case Study, Seminar, Group Meeting.

notes: 綜三演講廳

description.zh: 先修課程：指導教授同意科技研發專案管理之個案研究。有關科技開發案之技術開發管理，人力責任管理及時間任務管理等 PDCA (Plan, Do, Check, Action) 之實務探討
description.en: The cases study of the management of R/D projects. The method of PDCA (Plan, Do, Check, Action) cycling will be studied and discussed in each case.

notes: 製科、機電合開

description.zh: 先修課程：負責教授同意。精密機械之機械控制，電氣控制，數值控制，幾何數據處理，驅動系統，適應控制系統，監視系統與診斷系統，機器人控制，電腦整合精密機械系統．
description.en: Mechanical control, electrical control, numerical control, geometric data processing, drive systems, adaptive control systems, monitoring and diagnostic systems, Computer Integrated precision Machinery Systems.

notes: 製科◎；限 25 人

description.zh: 先修課程：負責教授同意本課程介紹如何應用數值分析理論求解工程問題。1. 數值方法基本觀念及其領域 2. 數值方法之誤差及穩定性 3. 非線性代數方程式之數值解法 4. 聯立代數方程式之數值解法 5. 矩陣特徵值求法 6. 非線性聯立方程式之數值解法 7. 多項式插值法及曲線配湊 8. 數值微分與積分 9. 常微分方程式之數值解法 10. 偏微分方程式之數值解法
description.en: To introduce the numerical analysis techniques for solving engineering problems.1. Introduction to the basic concepts of the numerical analysis2. The errors and stability of the numerical methods3. Numerical methods of solving nonlinear algebraic equations4. Numerical methods of solving systems of linear equations.5. Algebraic eigen-value problems6. Numerical methods of solving systems of nonlinear equations7. Numerical interpolation and curve fitting8. Numerical differentiation and integration9. Numerical solution of ordinary differential equations10. Numerical solution of partial differential equation

notes: 製科、機電、外生專班合開；限 20 人

description.zh: 本課程介紹電子顯微鏡之結構，成像及繞射原理，以及在材料科學方面之應用，課程內容包括穿透式電子顯微鏡之構造，電磁透鏡與成像原理，電子繞射原理，繞射圖型分析，試片之製作方法。掃描式電子顯微鏡之構造及成像原理。EDS 及 WDS 之 X 光光譜測量。
description.en: The course introduces the structure of a electron microscope, the theories of image forming and diffraction, the applications of materials science. The course contents include structure of the transmission electron microscope, the electromagnetic lens and theory of image formation, theory of electronic diffraction, analysis of diffraction pattern, and the preparation of test sample. The structure and principle of forming image for a scanning electron microscope, the X-ray spectrography of EDS and WDS are also included in this course.

notes: 製科◎；限 32 人

name.zh: 人工智慧的基礎與創新 (一)
name.en: Foundations and Advances in Artificial Intelligence I

description.zh: 本課程深入探討人工智慧領域的基礎知識和最新技術，包括機器學習、深度學習、自然語言處理、生成對抗網絡等領域。學員將從人工智慧的概述和歷史開始，逐步深入了解機器學習和深度學習的基礎概念和演算法，並探討其在不同領域的應用。課程還介紹了最新的 AI 技術趨勢，包括注意力機制、自監督學習、大型 AI 通用模型和元學習等。課程運作模式：每週講授一個主題，包括理論授課和實習操作。學員將參與課堂討論和小組活動，以促進想法交流和知識分享。
description.en: This course delves into the fundamentals and latest advancements in the field of artificial intelligence, covering topics such as machine learning, deep learning, natural language processing, and generative adversarial networks. Participants will begin with an overview of artificial intelligence and its historical development, progressively delving into the foundational concepts and algorithms of machine learning and deep learning, along with their applications across various domains. The course also introduces the latest trends in AI technology, including attention mechanisms, self-supervised learning, large-scale AI models, and meta-learning.Course Execution: Each week covers a specific topic, including theoretical lectures and practical exercises. Participants will engage in classroom discussions and group activities to facilitate idea exchange and knowledge sharing.

description.zh: 主要內容包含：企業研究的本質、研究流程、研究問題與假設、文獻評論、資料收集、操作性定義、測量、理論架構模型化、研究設計、量化與質化研究、個案研究法、資料分析與解釋、研究報告撰寫。
description.en: The course mainly discusses concepts of business research methods. The contents will include following topics：（1）the nature of business research, （2）elements of research and research process, （3）research problem and hypothesis,（4）literature review, （5）research design, （6）research proposal, （7）case study, （8）analysis and the interpretation of data, （9）quantitative and qualitative research,(10) research report.

notes: 哈佛

description.zh: 論文寫作
description.en: Thesis writing.

description.zh: 本課程可使學生瞭解：貨幣與資金市場、投資問題、如何取得資金與運用資金、使公司價值最大、使股東權益最大化、瞭解代理制度、瞭解公司股票、債務之利用，股利政策等事項・
description.en: This course has provided: money and capital market、Investments 、How to obtaining and using funds、Maximize the value o their firms、How to maximize stockholders' stock、To know agency problem 、To know the price of the firm's stock, use of debt and dividend policy.

notes: 哈佛 / IMBA

description.zh: 策略管理主要是幫助高階管理階層作決策。一般而言，這門課為商學課程中的課程主要協助學員們具有整合能力。學員不只是在策略管理中應活學活用，也融合所學應用於管理決策中。此門課將幫助您學習、研讀個案和討論，這是此門課的目標。 1. 瞭解組織所處環境 2. 分析外部環境之時機和危機 3. 剖析內部組織之優劣勢 4. 探討企業不同層次之應對策略。
description.en: Strategic management deals with the decision making at the top management level. Traditionally, this course has been the capstone course in the business program and is taught at the last year of study so that students can integrate functional area knowledge into a coherent one. Students are expected not only to learn a body of knowledge on strategic management, but also to synthesize economics, accounting, and marketing as an aid top management level decisions. We will use a combination of readings, case studies, and lectures to achieve the goals of the course.

notes: 經管所和 IMBA 合開

description.zh: 資訊科技是整合策略，使用者和組織系統，幫助高階主管達成組織目標，以及了解資訊科技。本課程學習主題：透過資訊系統獲取策略優勢，透過資訊系統應用，支援管理和執行資訊科技應用，獲得競爭優勢。全課程以哈佛個案研討方式進行。
description.en: The need for information-based support for managers is increasing as the modern management imperatives of reach and to meet their organization's goals. Information management function provides information to support operations, management analysis, and decision- making functions in an organization. We will also look at the role in formation play in helping managers meet goals by examining the characteristics of information systems that make managers' job easier. Topic of learning: Acquiring strategic advantage through information systems. Supporting managers and executives through IS applications. Managing the risk inherent in developing and using IS applications. Attaining and practicing technological leadership. This course is taught by HBS cases.

description.zh: 面對各種數位化革新技術浪潮的衝擊，零售業者必須置入各項智能科技進行數位行銷與商業模式的開發，例如零售業者使用無人商店、智能支付系統、擴增 / 虛擬實境、元宇宙、物聯網 (IoT)、消費數據分析、人工智慧 (AI)、機器學習等先進技術，將傳統零售環境轉變為更智慧、更便捷、更個性化的消費體驗。甚至利用這些新興數位科技與和數據資源實踐零售業態的升級和轉型，進而不斷涌現出新型業態和新型商業模式的品牌體驗與管理。據此，本課程將以介紹當代智慧零售個案為主軸，介紹智慧零售實務的同時，也帶出其背後運作的主要理論基礎，藉此以促進實務與理論並重的學習效益。
description.en: Faced with the impact of various digital innovation waves, retailers must integrate various smart technologies to develop digital marketing and business models. For example, retailers use advanced technologies such as unmanned retail stores, smart payment systems, augmented/virtual reality, the metaverse, the Internet of Things (IoT), consumption data analysis, artificial intelligence (AI), and machine learning to transform the traditional retail environment into more intelligent, more convenient and more personalized consumption experience. Retailers use these emerging digital technologies and data resources to implement retail upgrading and transformation and then emerge with new business models for brand experience and management. Accordingly, this course will focus on introducing contemporary smart retail cases. Introducing smart retail cases will also bring out the main theoretical foundations, resulting in learning benefits that emphasize practice and theory.

notes: 先鋒 PBL

description.zh: 公司治理在商業的過程中扮演核心角色，提供公司目標及策略上的協助並助其達成期望。也提供讓員工共事的價值觀即確保企業永續經營的收支平衡。在現階段競爭時代當中，本課程除提供同事專業知識外，並以此讓學生瞭解企業運作之道。 ◆公司治理定義與演進 ◆公司治理關鍵議題 ◆公司治理演進 ◆公司治理模式 ◆公司治理架構 ◆公司治理應用 ◆公司治理維持與發展。
description.en: Corporate governance is the combination of legal and political governance mechanisms external to the firm, along with monitoring and incentive governance mechanisms internal to the firm, linked and driven by the forces of investment markets, to produce value-increasing outcomes for firms' owners and, ultimately, society at large. In this course, we will survey corporate governance, taking the investor's point of view. By the end of the course, you should have a well-informed understanding of the basic corporate governance problem and the major issues in corporate governance, prominent proposed solutions to the corporate governance problem, the way the problem is actually addressed in a variety of companies and countries, and evidence on the prospects for and drawbacks of the various solutions. This course is therefore comprised of distinct intellectual components-the practice and the science-which are intertwined throughout the semester's activities.

name.zh: 企業經營效率分析實作
name.en: Implementation of Business Operation Efficiency Analysis

description.zh: 本課程的目的在於讓同學們瞭解經營績效評估的方法，強調理論與實作並重。首先會介紹資料包絡分析法 (DEA) 的基本概念，讓同學們對於 DEA 理論有基本的瞭解，接下來再讓同學們學習如何使用電腦套裝軟體進行實際運算，並探討各種企業經營效率分析上的應用。
description.en: The purpose of this course is to let students understand the methods of business performance evaluation, emphasizing both theory and practice. Firstly, this course will introduce the basic concept of Data Envelopment Analysis (DEA) so that students can understand DEA theory. Then students will learn how to use computer-packaged software for actual calculations and discuss the application of various business efficiency analyses.

notes: 連續六週上課

description.zh: 本課程藉由探討組織理論之內容，分析組織設計之相關因素，並討論當代組織最新的設計與發展趨勢，俾使同學結合組織設計之傳統及現代理論，利用個案討論增強理論之理解與活用，進而培養學生管理組織之能力。本課程包含下列四大要綱：第一部份：組織與組織理論基礎 ；第二部分：組織結構與設計；第三部分：網際網路環境下，當代與未來的組織設計趨勢；第四部份：組織理論個案探討。本課程藉由探討組織理論之內容，分析組織設計之相關因素，並討論當代組織最新的設計與發展趨勢，俾使同學結合組織設計之傳統及現代理論，利用個案討論增強理論之理解與活用，進而培養學生管理組織之能力。本課程包含下列四大要綱：第一部份：組織與組織理論基礎 ；第二部分：組織結構與設計；第三部分：網際網路環境下，當代與未來的組織設計趨勢；第四部份：組織理論個案探討。
description.en: The purpose of this course is to integrate the most resent thinking about organization design with classic and traditional ideas and theories. This course covers the following three major parts: Part 1: organization and organization theories Part 2: organization structure and design Part 3: new thinking of organization design in the Internet era, Part IV case study.

description.zh: 本課程介紹許多有關於組織中的個人、團隊與組織交互作用的研究。明確地說，本課程內容主要在探討如何改善員工績效與利社會行為，降低缺勤與離職率，以及提高工作滿足與組織承諾等員工態度。
description.en: This course introduces a variety of researches that investigates the interactions between individuals, groups, and organization. Specifically, it focuses on how to improve employee performance and prosocial behaviors, reduce absenteeism and turnover, and enhance job attitudes such as job satisfaction and organizational commitment.

description.zh: 建立學生對各類資料探勘技術與理論的基礎觀念及架構，以奠定學生日後從事資料探勘分析與研究工作時之需。相關的分析技術將包括應用在分類 (classification)、推估 (estimation)、預測 (prediction)、關聯式分組 (affinity grouping)、同質分組 (clustering) 等功能中的決策樹、(decision tree) 多變量分析 (multivariate analysis) 及類神經網路 (neural network) 等方法。此外為了讓學生對相關技術有更深的瞭解，課程中將以個案實例為主，並配合各種資料探勘套裝軟體，以應用的觀點使學生更容易接受了解在商業智慧分析上資料探勘分析的功用。
description.en: Several fundamental theories of data mining techniques are included in this course. For examples, decision tree, multivariate analysis and neural network. All these techniques will be applied in different areas, such as classification, association rule, forecasting, and pattern recognition. And various applications in different enterprises are also included.

description.zh: 本課程教導及訓練研究生有關英文在管理領域內特定專題的溝通運用，學生將在本課程中以英文學習: (1) 管理常見之專有名詞，(2) 英語備忘錄的草擬與撰寫，(3) 會議資料如：議程、動議、記錄等的準備與撰寫，(4) 企業計劃書的編寫，及 (5) 現代化全球管理相關專題英文資料的閱讀與溝通討論。學生必須在課堂上就選定的管理題材以英文做報告與其它同學討論。
description.en: This course teaches students the communication in English on the special topics within the context of management. Students are expected to learn the followings in English: (1) Terminologies commonly used in management; (2) Draft and write-up of English memorandum; (3) Development of meeting materials such as agenda, motions, minutes, etc.; (4) Business proposals and plans; and (6) Contemporary topics and trend in global management issues. Students will be required to make group presentations and discussions on the selected management topics in English.

description.zh: 本課程之目的在探討如何運用量化的管理決策模型來解析管理上的各種問題，主要決策模型求解方法有：線性規劃、整數規劃、非線性規劃、層級分析法與網路分析法等。課程內容主要以案例說明為主，讓同學瞭解理論如何與實際問題結合，故課程中會用工程與管理上之各種實際應用問題做說明，最佳化求解軟體與決策工具軟體會用來進行問題求解與輔助說明所得數據之管理意涵，並進行模型成本效益分析。
description.en: The purpose of this course is to discuss how to use quantitative management decision-making models to analyze various management problems. The methods for solving the decision-making models include: linear programming, integer programming, nonlinear programming, hierarchical analysis process and network process etc. The course content is mainly based on case illustrations such that students can understand how the theory is combined with practical problems. Therefore, various practical application problems in engineering and management will be used to explain the models. Optimization software and decision-making tools will be used to solve the problems and assist in explaining the management implications of the obtained data, and perform model cost-benefit analysis.

description.zh: 本課程旨在介紹有效研發 / 創新管理的概念、原則、與標準，這些概念、原則與標準將成為知識密集型的組織與企業的關鍵競爭優勢。本課程將介紹一些相關企業個案和練習活動，用以連結國家、產業和企業的研發或創新活動，並選定方法和工具進行有效的整合功能、企業業務、研發和創新活動。
description.en: This course is intended to introduce the concepts, principles, and standards for effective R&D/innovation management that is becoming the critical competitive advantages for the knowledge-intensive organizations and firms. The course will introduce a number of related cases and exercises with a view to bridge the national, industrial and corporate R&D/innovation activities, along with the presentation of selected approaches, methods and tools to effectively integrate functional, business and corporate R&D and innovation activities as a whole.

description.zh: 設計相關專題，以文獻研讀，邀請專家專題演講，及論文討論為重點，參與者透過密集討論、書面報告、或舉行設計發表等方式，可以有效率地交換意見，獲得更深入而廣泛的體驗。
description.en: Topical studies in history, theory, and criticism of design. Under the above goals, inviting addresses for special topics will be arranged though the courses. The Participants are encouraged to have intensive discussion, written reports, or further design presentation. Efficient experience exchange would be also expected to derive more extensive interest.

notes: 碩一必修

description.zh: 本課程旨在教導學生一個簡潔、廣泛又清楚的工業設計研究方法的知識及技能架構，課程包括二大部份；第一部份探討工業設計研究計畫的準備及撰擬，第二部份除比較分析主要的工業設計研究方法外，也同時探討其中一種研究方法在工業設計專業領域的應用實例。
description.en: This course is a survey of research methodology that is relevant to the Industrial Design field. It focuses on conducting an industrial design research, collect, and report the data. This course also highlights the difference among that mainstream research methodology in Industrial Design field.

description.zh: 本課程為沿續統計學課程，探討論文寫作所需統計分析理論與方法。課程內容含：一因子與二因子變異數分析、實驗設計、多元迴歸分析、因素分析、集群分析、區別分析與結構方程式等。 1. Introduction to SPSS 2. Analysis of Variance (ANOVA) 3. Experimental Design 4. Nonparametric Test 5. Multiple Regression 6. Factor Analysis 7. Cluster Analysis 8. Discriminant Analysis 9. Structural Equation Model (SEM)
description.en: This course focuses on application of statistical principles and methods. Course including ANOVA, Experimental Design, Nonparametric Test, Multiple Regression, Factor Analysis, Cluster Analysis, Discriminant Analysis and Structural Equation Model (SEM).

description.zh: 設計是造就其所處時代和文化下的產物。它是社會共有的價值觀體現，但設計的思考過程也用於代表特定的概念，鼓勵某些活動，從而影響社會和文化。本課程介紹現代和後現代設計的時代精神，涉及的重要發展包括建築、平面設計、產品設計、家具設計、室內設計、數字設計，甚至商業設計。本課程提供理解設計史上的精彩作品，透過政治、宗教、技術、文化、氣候和地理因素影響下的背景梳理。
description.en: Design is a product of the period and culture in which it is created. It is a representation of values shared by society but also used to represent specific ideals, encourage certain activities, and thus influence society and culture. This course provides an introduction to the zeitgeist of Modern and Postmodern Design. It deals with the most important developments including architecture, graphic design, product design, furniture design, interior design, digital design, and even business design. This course provides the background needed for understanding the rich heritage of historical design in the arts, as influenced by political, religious, technological, cultural, climatic and geographic factors.

notes: 創新所和設計博所合開 配合 USR 計畫

description.zh: 碩士學位論文寫作
description.en: A student must write a thesis to fulfill the partial requirements for the Master degree.

notes: 碩士班

description.zh: 專題報告 專題演講 研究小組討論
description.en: Case Study, Seminars, Group meeting

notes: 碩士班，第一週科技大樓會議廳

description.zh: 本課程將涵蓋電腦科學的理論基礎。其內容包含自動機理論，電腦語言學，以及計算形式等。電腦相關的基本數學也將涵蓋在課程範圍之中。包括集合論，基本關係及及操作，以及理論證明工具與技術。課程大綱：基礎理論介紹，有限狀態自動機 / 一般敘述語法，Regular 集合的基本性質，前後文無相關文法， Pushdown 自動機，杜林機（turning machines），Chomsky 層次結構，基本關係及操作，理論證明技術及工具。
description.en: This course will look the theoretical foundation in computer science. Automata theory, languages, and computation formalism will be examined in details. Various fundamental computer-related mathematics will also be covered. They include, sets/subsets, basic relations and operations and tools/techniques for proving theorems. Course Outline: Introduction to Theoretical Foundations, Finite Automata / Regular Expression, Properties of Regular Sets, Context-Free Grammars, Pushdown Automata, Turing Machines, The Chomsky Hierarchy (tentative), Basic Relations and Operations, Tools/Techniques for Proving Theorems.

notes: 創新資安、資工所和電資國際班合開

description.zh: 本課程介紹密碼學的理論與實際，其主要內容如下：簡介；背景知識；DES 保密系統；RSA 保密系統；其他公開金匙系統；數位簽章；網路安全
description.en: Principles and practice of cryptography are covered in this course. It contains the following material: Introduction；Background Theory；Data Encryption Standard (DES)；RSA Cryptosystem；Other Public-key Cryptosystems；Digital Signatures；Internet Security

notes: 資工系和創新資安合開，先大樓

description.zh: 本課程探討處理空間資料的模式與演算法則，主題包含: (1) 空間資料庫介紹與應用，(2) 空間概念與資料模式，(3) 空間搜尋語言，(4) 空間資料儲存與索引，(5) 搜尋處理與最佳化，(6) 空間網路，(7) 空間資料庫的研究趨勢。
description.en: This course studies the models and algorithms for the efficient handling of data related to space. The topics include: (1) Introduction to Spatial Databases, (2) Spatial Concepts and Data Models, (3) Spatial Query Languages, (4) Spatial Storage and Indexing, (5) Query Processing and Optimization, (6) Spatial Networks, and (7) Trends on Spatial Databases.

name.zh: 嵌入式智慧影像分析與實境界面
name.en: Embedded Computing Systems for Intelligent Image Analytics and Interactive Systems

description.zh: 本課程主要內容為：1. 嵌入式智慧計算系統、2. 嵌入式影像處理技術、3. 影像辨識技術、4. 人工智慧辨識技術、5. 實境互動界面技術，並整合實務議題之專案開發。
description.en: The course contents include: 1. Embedded Computing Systems; 2. Embedded image processing techniques; 3. Image recognition techniques; 4. Artificial intelligence techniques for image analytics; 5. AR-based interactive systems; 6. Practical Projects

notes: 資工系和創新 AI 合開

description.zh: 課程中主要的訓練可分為三個方向：一、人為環境管理；二、自然環境管理；三、環境系統分析。在此規劃方向的考慮下，將會邀請專家學者進行相關主題的演講。參與者透過密集討論、書面報告、或舉行口頭發表等方式，可以有效率地交換意見，獲得更深入而廣泛的認識。
description.en: Three categories are stressed in these basic training courses: the management of human environment, the management of natural environment, and the system analysis towards environment. Under the above goals, inviting addresses for special topics will be arranged though the courses. The Participants are encouraged to have intensive discussion, written reports, or further oral presentation. Efficient opinion exchange would be also expected to derive more extensive interest.

description.zh: 課程中主要的訓練可分為三個方向：一、人為環境管理；二、自然環境管理；三、環境系統分析。在此規劃方向的考慮下，將會邀請專家學者進行相關主題的演講。參與者透過密集討論、書面報告、或舉行口頭發表等方式，可以有效率地交換意見，獲得更深入而廣泛的認識。
description.en: Three categories are stressed in these basic training courses: the management of human environment, the management of natural environment, and the system analysis towards environment. Under the above goals, inviting addresses for special topics will be arranged though the courses. The Participants are encouraged to have intensive discussion, written reports, or further oral presentation. Efficient opinion exchange would be also expected to derive more extensive interest.

notes: 綜三上課

description.zh: 在各指導教授的指導下，從事環境規劃與管理等相關領域的論文寫作，其宜包括研究方法或實驗方法、理論分析及研究結果﹙含結論與建議﹚。
description.en: A thesis of Ms. Degree should be proposed by all students associated with the agreement of their instructor professor. The thesis focuses on the fields in "Environmental Planning and Management", and includes research methodology, theory background and conclusive result or findings.

description.zh: 永續發展是妥善規劃與管理自然資源之最高指導原則，因此本課程﹙一﹚依此宗旨討論水資源保育、固廢管理與空氣污染控制；更將以實際例將面向擴及科技與社經整合層次，以期落實理論於實際應用之中。
description.en: This is intented as a brief introduction to the subject of the substainable development of natural resource. Main subject are water conservation, solid waste management and air pollution control. Many overall regional case studies will be discussed. It must be technologic, economic and social environmental change or a new factural data are developed

name.en: Planning and Management for Air Quality

description.zh: 以都會區空氣品質為範圍，配合污染源類別﹙粒狀物，SOx， NOx， VOC， THC 及 O3﹚，本課程從逸散性、固定污染性、移動污染性等不同方向，以講述空品之規劃與管理等問題。此包括 PSI 指標與空品特性分析，及減目標與管制策略之研訂等。
description.en: The course gives a brief introduction to planning and management for air quality. The main contents are focused on fugitive pollution, stationary, and movable sources. Index of pollution standard will be also discussed in the course.

name.en: Environmental Economics and Environmental Policies Analysis

description.zh: 政策研究能檢視理論和實務的切合程度。本課程將帶領大家認識環境政策的經濟分析方法，學習經濟的思維觀點，以及如何運用經濟方法瞭解解決環境問題。除此之外上課內容並與法律結合，探討環境法的經濟分析觀點和傳統思維有何不同，尤其是對環境行為上之改變效果。希望學生能夠具體瞭解經濟分析方法幫助政府解決環境問題及規劃環境政策時所扮演的角色。
description.en: There is a significant trade-off between economic growth and environmental quality. From this course, students will learn fundamental concepts in Environmental Economics and how to analyze environmental policy issues by using economic tools. In additions, this course combines economic analysis to law, especially shows students how regulations affect people's behavior. After this class, students not only know how economic approaches help the government deal with environmental issues and the differences between theory and practices.

description.zh: 氣膠為懸浮在空氣中的微小固體或液體粒子。本課程深入探討氣膠科學（微塵學）及其工程上之應用。．氣膠理化特性，粒徑分布．氣膠運動學：擴散和布朗運動，過濾機制，荷電性質，熱泳等．光學特性及其應用．氣膠的測量原理與方法．大氣氣膠及生物氣膠
description.en: ．Indroduction:characterization of aerosols,shape and size distributions．Particle transport:Brownian motion and diffusion, centrifugation, intertia and filtration, convective diffusion,extermal forcr fields, thermal force．Optical properties:visibility, light scattering．Aerosol dynamics:coagulation, formation and growth．Atmospheric Aerosois and Bioaerosols．Measurement of aerosol

description.zh: 本課程目的為使學生認識資源處理之各種物理選別及濕式冶金技術，包括破碎、粉碎、篩分、比重選別、浮游選別、磁力選別等物理選別技術，以及吸附、離子交換、溶媒萃取、晶析、沉澱分離等濕式冶金技術，並熟悉其理論基礎與使用時機，進而活用各種技術於實際之資源回收再生工作上。
description.en: This course will introduce the theory and application of various resources processing technologies, including the physical separation technologies such as crushing, grinding, sieving, gravitation separation, flotation, magnetic separation, etc., as well as the hydrometallurgy technologies such as adsorption, ion exchange, solvent extraction, crystallization, precipitation, etc.

name.zh: 防減災與氣候變遷調適
name.en: Disaster Prevention and Reduction, Climate Change Adaptation

description.zh: 全球暖化與氣候變遷已對人類社會造成面臨前所未有的挑戰。不論是哪個國家，都遭受其帶來的影響。並且在 IPCC 發布的報告中，諸多科學證據證實氣候變遷已是不可改變的事實，因此為了謀求世界各地環境的永續發展，「減緩」與「調適」是現階段全球順應氣候變遷積極採取的方式。在聯合國報告中曾經指出我國臺灣舉凡環境及氣候條件隸屬於氣候變遷高危險群，極端氣候事件，例如熱浪、颱風、洪水… 等皆逐漸嚴重影響我們的家園，因此，防減災與氣候變遷調適相對更加重要。其中氣候變遷調適更是能夠面對未來氣候可能產生的衝擊，透過周延的規畫以適應充滿挑戰與變化的新環境。因此本課程針對國際與我國減少災害風險與氣候變遷調適介紹，並探討其各中因應方式與困境等課題，期藉培養與提高對氣候變遷防減災與氣候變遷調適的認識。
description.en: Global warming and climate change are the biggest challenges to human society. With current warming trend proceeds at an unprecedented rate, climate change poses a threat to all countries. In the IPCC assessment reports, much of scientific evidence indicates climate change an unalterable fact, so in order to meet the needs of present generations without jeopardizing the ability of futures generations to meet their own need, approaches on "mitigation" and "adaptation" needed to be adopted in response to climate change. Taiwan is vulnerable and at high risk to climate change because of geographic exposure and climatic conditions. Extreme weather events, such as heat wave, typhoon, and flood, bring catastrophic damages in Taiwan. Hence, proper climate change adaptation and disaster risk reduction measures needed to be taken proactively to reduce many of the adverse impacts and to enhance beneficial impacts. Through this course, students will increase their awareness and understanding to

description.zh: 碩士學位論文寫作。
description.en: Master thesis studying and writing .

description.zh: 專題報告，專題演講，研究小組討論。
description.en: Seminar report ， seminar speech ， seminar discussion。

notes: 新生碩一下使得選修

description.zh: 自動化機械簡介，規劃及設計，驅動器，感測器可程式控制，氣液壓迴路控制，電腦介面控制，自動化系統實例介紹及應用。
description.en: Introduction ， design and planning for Automatic machine ， Actuators sensors ， PLC ， pneumatic control ， PC - based control ， Examples for Automatic system and its application .

notes: 自動化所。創新半導體和鐵道碩士學程合開，計中電腦教室

description.zh: 本課程主要探討多輸入多輸出系統 (MIMO) 其系統行為之描述，內容包括 MIMO 系統之穩定性分析、觀察性分析及其控制器設計，並探討 MIMO 系統的物理觀念及其數學描述的各種方法，是線性系統之進階課程，適合碩士班以上之學生學習。
description.en: The main objective of this course is to explore the behaviors of multivariable systems. The contents includes: stability analysis, observability analysis, and controller designs for MIMO linear systems. Besides, we will introduce the physical concept of MMIO linear systems and various methods of describing MIMO linear systems via mathematical model. This is an advanced course to linear system theory, and is especially for graduate students.

notes: 自動化所和機電博班合開

description.zh: 本課程主要探討非線性系統與線性系統之間的不同，並介紹 Lyapunov stability 及其相關觀念。除此之外，將介紹如何利用各種穩定性分析的觀念及各種方法探討非線性系統的穩定性，最後並介紹如何設計控制器使非線性系統穩定。
description.en: This course mainly explores the different between the nonlinear system and linear system, and introduces the concept Lyapunov stability. Besides, one wants to introduce how to utilize the concept and method of stability analysis to explore the stability of nonlinear system. Finally, the designs of nonlinear controllers are introduced to stabilize the nonlinear systems.

name.en: Research Topics in Smart Living Technologies

description.zh: 本課程主要探討本課程主要探討智慧生活科技相關議題。這是一門整合不同領域的新興課程，透過最新論文的閱讀與研討，學習智慧生活科技。
description.en: The goal of the course is to provide students with topics related to smart living technologies. In this course, we will take an interdisciplinary look at smart living topics and ubiquitous computing by reading and discussing recent literature.

description.zh: 專題報告、專題演講、研究小組討論
description.en: Case Study. Seminar. Group meeting.

description.zh: 先修課程：負責教授同意。 真空工程，直流電源，射頻電源，微波，熱燈絲等各種能量方式之 CVD 化學氣相沉積法，PVD 物理氣相沉積法，電鍍技術，以及膜的特性觀察與實驗，包括 SEM，EDX，XRD 與金相顯微觀察，附著力測試等。1. 光電半導體 V-I 特性分析試驗 2. 接面型光電元件 C-V 量測實驗 3. 光導電及少數載體存活時間量測實驗 4. 邁克蓀干涉儀實驗 (3) 5. 雷射繞射實驗 (3) 6. 偏振實驗 (3) 7. 分光儀實驗 (3)
description.en: The practices in vacuum engineering, variety deposition methods such as CVD, PVD and electroplating, that include DC, RF, microwave hot filament etc are be performed. Tests of film properties and its characterizations such as SEM, EDX, XRD, and metallurgical microscope are also be examined.1.Experiment on V-I characteristics of photonic devices.2.C-V measurements of optoelectronic devices.3.Measurements of photoconductivity and minority-carrier lifetime of photonic materials.4.Lab on Michelson interferometer5.Lab Experiment on diffraction 6.Lab on polarization7.Lab on spectrometer

description.zh: 修先課程：光學。 本課程利用傅氏轉換理論解釋繞射理論及光影像處理與光資訊處理技術，它包含：1. 簡介 2. 二維線性系統分析 3. 繞射理論 4. 近場及遠場繞射 5. 透鏡之傅氏轉換與影像品質分析 6. 影像系統之頻域分析 7. 空間濾波與光資訊處理 8. 全像
description.en: This course illustrates the diffraction theory and techniques of image processing and optical information processing by using the methods of Fourier transform. It involves：1. Introduction2.Analysis of 2-D linear systems3.Diffraction theory 4.Fresnel and Fraunhofer diffraction5.Fourier transforming6.Frequency analysis of optical imaging properties of lenses 7.Spatial filtering and optical information processing8.Holography

description.zh: 先修課程：近代光學。 1. 基本分析工具介紹 (6) 2. 基本光學系統 --- 近軸光學 (6) 3. 光學系統元件介紹 (6) 4. 像差理論 (6) 5. 像質評估 (6) 6. 光學系統設計 (6) 7. 光學套裝軟體使用 (6) 8. 光電設計專題 (9)
description.en: 1.The tools 2.The basic optical systems 3.Basic optical devices 4.Seidel aberrations 5.Image evaluation 6.The design of optical systems 7.The use of Zemax 8.Project on optical design

notes: 光電系和電資外生所合開，計中電腦教室

name.en: Fabrication of Potoelectronic Materials and Device

description.zh: 先修課程：負責教授同意。 1. 單晶的生長 2. 磊晶技術 3. 擴散與離子植入 4. 乾式及溫式蝕刻 5. 化學蒸氣沈積法 6. 金屬薄膜技術 7. 光電元件製程 8. 元件特性量測與分析
description.en: 1.Single crystal growth 2.Engitaxial technique 3.Diffusion and implantation 4.Dry and wet etching 5.Chemical vapor deposition 6.Metal film coating 7.Manufacturing process of photo electronic element 8.Characterization measurement and analysis of element

name.en: Design and application of optical coating

description.zh: (1) 基本理論 (2) 光學薄膜設計之圖示法 (3) 分光鏡 (4) 高反射鏡 (5) 截止濾光片 (6) 帶通濾光片 (7) 斜向入射薄膜
description.en: (1)Basic theory (2)Admittance diagrams for optical coating design(3)Beam splitter(4)High reflection coating(5)Edge filter(6)Band-pass filter(7)Tilted coatings

description.zh: (1) 晶格結構 (2) 液相磊晶技術 (3) 氣相磊晶技術 (4) 有機金屬氣相沉積技術 (5) 分子束磊晶技術 (6) 磊晶層量測技術
description.en: (1) Lattice structure (2) Liquid phase epitaxy(3) Vapor phase epitaxy (4) Matel-organic chemical vapor deposition (5) Molecular beam epitaxy (6) measuring technology of epilayer

description.zh: 先修課程：負責教授同意。(1) 雷射器件簡介 (2) 雷射與物質交互作用 (3) 脈衝雷射鍍膜及加工 (4) 雷射光譜學及其應用 (光激螢光譜、拉曼光譜、非線性光譜、時間解析光譜等)。
description.en: Introduction to selected areas of laser applications, including the following topics. (1) Laser principles and instrumentation (2) Interactions between laser light and materials(3) Pulsed laser ablation, deposition, and material processing (4) Laser spectroscopy and the applications (including photoluminescence spectroscopy, Raman spectroscopy, nonlinear spectroscopy, and time-resolved spectroscopy, etc).

name.zh: 液晶顯示器驅動電子學

description.zh: 1. 液晶材料的種類 2. 液晶物理特性 3. 液晶顯示模式 4. 薄膜電晶體元件物理 4. 薄膜電晶體操作特性 5. 像素的結構及佈局 7. 顯示器的等效電路模型 8. 顯示器驅動原理 9. 響應時間的驅動補償
description.en: 1. Types of liquid crystals 2. Physics of liquid crystals 3. Display modes and electro-optical properties 4. Properties of a-Si Thin film transistors 5. Operation of TFTs 6. Layouts of pixels with TFT switches 7. Circuit model of LCDs 8. Addressing of LCDs 9. Driving compensation for response time

description.zh: 本課程介紹固體，尤其是半導體的光學性質，目的在了解光學檢測及光電元件的基礎原理。 藉由學習電磁波與半導體的交互作用，一方面可了解光在半導體中的產生、傳播、吸收、散射、及在界面的透射與反射等現象的規律，另一方面亦可認識光學特性與能帶結構、聲子結構、束縛與自由電子、及各種激發態之間的關係。課程內容包含固態物理複習、光學特性簡介、古典模型、帶間躍遷、激子、螢光現象、半導體低維系統的光學性質、自由載子及缺陷的光學性質、聲子相關特性、非線性光學性質等。
description.en: This course introduces the optical properties of solids, mainly semiconductors. The fundamental principles of absorption, reflection, luminescence and light scattering will be illustrated in terms of classical and quantum theories as appropriate. It mainly includes (1) Introduction (2) Classical propagation (3) Interband absorption (4) Excitons (5) Luminescence (6) Low-dimensional systems of semiconductors (7) Free electrons (8) Luminescence centers (9) Phonons (10)Nonlinear properties.

name.en: Application of Fiber Optical Broadband Network

description.zh: 以光纖取代傳統銅纜，可避免干擾，傳輸品質佳。且傳輸服務不中斷，網路架構簡單。此外高速 FTTB 線路具有客戶頻寬管理功能，可依客戶需求提供更彈性、更高頻寬 (至 1Gbps)。FTTB 提供高速上網外，可提供企業 VPN、都會網路、校園專案及互動式多媒體 (MOD) 等多樣寬頻服務。
description.en: Using fiber optics to replace coaxial cable, the method could avoid interference and achieve high-quality of transmission as well as no interrupting transmission services and simple network architectures. Besides, high-speed FTTB have management functionality of customer broadband, which can provide requirements of more flexibility and high bandwidth to customers. FTTB could offer Business VPN, Metropolitan Area Network, school project, MOD, and various broadband services...etc.

name.en: The Principle and Practice of Display Technologies

description.zh: 1. FPD 技術背景簡介 2.FPD 製程原理 3. 偏極化: Jones 矩陣 4. 液晶顯示器的 Jones 矩陣模型 5. 主動式液晶顯示面板設計初步
description.en: 1. FPD General 2. Vacuum and Vacuum System 3. Kinetic Theory of Gas4. Physical Vapor Deposition 5. Light-Solid Interaction6. AMLCD: Polarization 7. AMLCD: Panel Design

notes: 光電系和電資外生所合開，先鋒 201

name.zh: 深度學習與物聯網應用
name.en: Deep Learning and Internet of Things

description.zh: 1. 深度學習介紹，2. 監督式學習，3. 無監督式學習，4. 物聯網，5. 感知層，6. 網路層，7. 應用層，8. 深度學習與物聯網應用實例。
description.en: 1. Introduction to Deep Learning, 2. Supervised Learning, 3. Unsupervised Learning, 4. Internet of Things, 5. Perception Layer, 6. Network Layer, 7. Application Layer, 8. Deep Learning and Internet of Things

notes: 光電系和電資外生所合開

description.zh: 邀請校內外學者專家至校針對某一專長領域進行專題演講，讓學生藉由聽講及心得報告之寫作，開展視野，並與時代之脈動相契合。
description.en: Invited speakers from different disciplines give speech in their specialized area. Thus students can broaden their eyesight and also keep updating the technology and its applications of the generation.

notes: 限生化碩選課；和博班生化組合開

description.zh: 本課程將有系統的介紹專業英文論文的寫作格式，以及文件編修的技巧，且用深入淺出的例子作為示範，並輔以實際寫作練習與錯誤訂正。學員學習研究論文組織寫作﹐包含修改本身論文結構之基本技巧﹐正確組織文章的各個片段﹐避免口語用字寫字的陋習﹐使所作之文章能掌握其涵意﹐亦即能更有效率的利用英文寫出科技論文之佳作。
description.en: The goal of English Thesis Writing is to help students developing the writing skills through the manipulation of scientific and technical data. Students will learn a variety of rhetorical principles that guide the writing process, apply these principles to scientific and technical writing, and write papers in their own academic fields. Lectures on the writing principle, students' presentations on the reading sections and follow-up activities, pair and individual work on writing practice will be the major activities in the class.

notes: 生化碩士班修習

description.zh: 本課程將涵蓋以下幾項範圍：染色体結構，DNA 複製與轉錄，蛋白質結構、功能、輸送、合成與分解、真核與原核細胞基因調控、分子發育學、跳躍基因、癌症與免疫生物學等。並引導學生探討幾個相關分子生物化學較深入的知識。包括：蛋白質接受器、生物膜、生物代謝和基因調控、人類疾病的生物化學及分子生物和生物技術。
description.en: Lectures are concerned with number of selected topics in molecular biochemistry.: structure and coding capacity of DNA chromosomes; DNA replication; transcription, protein synthesis; protein structure and function; protein transport; protein degradation; receptors; biological membranes; prokaryotic and eukaryotic regulation; metabolic and genetic regulation; transposable elements and genetic engineering; cancer and immunobiology, biochemistry of human diseases and the techniques that underpin the developments of molecular biology and biotechnology.

description.zh: 此課程包含幾大方向： 1. 醫工簡介 2. 常用之醫學材料 甲、 金屬 乙、 高分子 丙、 陶瓷 3. 奈米技術 4. 材料測試 甲、 物理 / 機械測試 乙、 細胞測試
description.en: The content of the lecture includes:1.Introduction to biomedical engineering2.commonly used medical materials: metals, polymers, ceramic3.nano-technology4.materials testing: physical/mechanical tests,iocompatibility tests

description.zh: 本課程是介紹基因工程學之基礎知識。內容包括寄主細胞的選擇：細菌、酵母菌、真菌等微生物或昆蟲細胞、哺乳類動物細胞等動物細胞或者是植物細胞。聚合連鎖反應、基因轉殖、質體轉型、病毒轉換、基因槍等常用的基因工程學之方法。
description.en: This course is to introduce basic knowledge of genetic engineering, including the selection of host cells, bacterial, yeast, fungi, insect cell, mammalian cell, or plant cell. The powerful methods of genetic engineering, including polymerase chain reaction (PCR), gene clone, plasmid transformation, virus transduction, and biolistics are also introduced in this course.

description.zh: 邀請校內外學者專家至校針對某一專長領域進行專題演講，讓學生藉由聽講及心得報告之寫作，開展視野，並與時代之脈動相契合。(在職專班)
description.en: Invited speakers from different disciplines give speech in their specialized area. Thus students can broaden their eyesight and also keep updating the technology and its applications of the generation.

notes: 限化工碩選課；和博班化工組合開

name.en: Special Topics on Characteristics of Polymers

description.zh: 介紹高分子分子結構、型態學、流變學、化學性質、熱性質、機械、電學及光學等特性之分析方法及實例。
description.en: This course will cover the examples of analysis of the mechanical, thermal, electrical, optical and chemical properties, and the structure, morphology, and rheology of polymers.

notes: 網路預選限 15 人

description.zh: 生物電化學可以獲得更多先進的訊息，其中包括生化反應、形態學，以及物理、化學和電學等相關性質。運用相關的技術方法，例如電化學工具，可用以研究異相與均相反應，亦可獲得諸多界面間的化學活性和圖譜以利用於微裝置的發展。對生物分析而言，生物電化學感測器具有最大的再現性，並能夠成功的引用於電活性生化物種、母體材料，以及其規格上。生物電分析方法包括最先進和有用的方法，其中大部分皆建立在此領域的的基礎上。
description.en: Bioelectrochemistry can be investigated to get more and more advanced information about biochemical reaction, morphology, and physical, chemical, and electric properties. The techniques have been used in a variety of ways, for example, as an electrochemical tool to study heterogeneous and homogeneous reactions, for high-resolution imaging of the chemical reactivity and topography of various interfaces, and for microfabrication. For bioanalysis, bioelectrochemistry sensors have maximum reliability and can be successfully employed in electroactive biomaterials, matrix materials, and their size. Bioelectroanalysis include descriptions of the most advanced and successful methods, which in large part build on the fundamentals will be described.

description.zh: 本課程將簡介醫學基礎與臨床知識，並對目前臨床使用之生醫材料作廣泛的介紹，與現今生物科技相結合，激發學生對於基礎研究及臨床科學的創意與思考。涵蓋科別將以牙科、骨科及整型外科為主。
description.en: This course will introduce basic medical and clinical knowledge. Those biomaterials that have been clinically applied will be focused. The aim is to inspire students' innovation and thinking about clinical science, through combining concepts of biotechnology with biomedical knowledge. Dentistry and orthopedics will be the major departments summarized.

notes: 網路預選限 50 人 (研究所); 大四化工所合開

description.zh: 奈米科技在近年來有極快的進展，因此在本課程將介紹最新的奈米材料，包含有量子點、奈米碳材 (富勒烯、奈米碳管、石墨烯)、二維奈米材料 (二硫化鉬與金屬化) 等，對於這些奈米材料的物理、化學與光電特性以及製程方法做進一步的介紹，以期許可以帶給同學當今最新的奈米化技術與科技知識。
description.en: Nanotechnology has a great progress in recent years. This class will introduce the latest information about nanomaterials and their applications. The nanomaterials include quantum dots, fullerene, carbon nanotube, graphene and molybdenum disulfide (MoS2). Their physical, chemical and optoelectronic properties will be comprehensively introduced. We expect to bring the knowledge of newest nanomaterials and technologies to students.

notes: 網路預選限 25 人 (研究所); 大四化工所合開

description.zh: 專題報告、專題演講、研究小組討論。
description.en: Case Study. Seminar. Group meeting.

notes: 限碩一 材資館 5 樓演講廳

description.zh: 1.X 光之本質 2. 晶体幾何及倒置晶格 3. 晶體立體投影 4.X 光繞射原理 5.X 光繞射實驗方法 (繞射儀，Laue 照相法，粉末法) 6.X 光繞射之應用 (包括晶體結構之鑑定，晶格常數之量測，相圖測定，序化一非序化轉換及化學成分分析等)
description.en: 1.Properties of X-Ray 2.Crystallography and Reciprocal Lattice 3.Projections of Crystals 4.Principles of X-Ray Diffraction 5.Experimental Methods (Diffractometer Methods, Powder Photographs and Laue Pholtographs)6.Applications of X-ray Diffraction (Orientation and Quality of Single Crystal, Structure of Polycrystalline Aggregates, Determine of Crystal Structure and Precise Parameter Measurements, Chemical Analysis, Phase Transformations etc.)

description.zh: 1. 電子光學簡介 2. 穿透式電子顯微鏡之結構與成像原理 3. 電子繞射理論 4. 電子繞射圖型及缺陷分析方法 5. 掃瞄式電子顯微鏡之結構與成像原理 6. EDS 及 WDS 之 X 光光譜分析
description.en: 1.Introduction to electron optics2. Electron Beam and Their Interaction with Specimen3. Electron Diffraction4. The Transmission Electron Microscopy (TEM)5. The Scanning Electron Microscope (SEM) 6. Chemical Analysis in the Electron Microscope

notes: 材料所和創新半導體合開

description.zh: 內容包括材料彈塑性變形，差排，高溫變形，低溫拉伸破壞，高溫破壞及疲勞。
description.en: The contents include elastic and plastic deformation in materials，dislocations，high temperature deformation，tensile fracture at low temperature，high temperature fracture and fatigue。

description.zh: 1. 陶瓷絕緣體之性質 2. 陶瓷電容材料 3. 壓電及光電陶瓷 4. 磁性陶瓷 5. 陶瓷感應器：理論及實務 6. ZnO 變阻器之應用及特性 7. 多層陶瓷技術 8. 高電導陶瓷
description.en: This course is a special topics of Dielectrical Materials.

description.zh: 1. 合金製程簡介 2. 成份改變製程 a. 合金熔煉 - 感應電爐、真空感應電爐 b. 合金精煉 - 電弧爐、 c. 電渣重熔精煉、真空電弧精煉、電子束精煉、電漿精煉 3. 合金結構改變製程 a. 凝固控製與快速凝固 b. 方向性凝固 c. 熱處理控制 - 均質化、強化處理 d. 鍛造、晶粒控制 4. 合金形狀改重製程鍛造、軋壓、擠形、粉末冶金 5. 未來合金製程之發展及電腦之應用
description.en: This course is a special topics of Processes of Structural Alloys.

name.en: Special Topics of Materials Science and Engineering

description.zh: 本課程主要針對非材料系背景之研究生開設， 對各種材料（金屬、陶瓷、高分子、複合材料）之基本原理，性質及應用，做概要性的介紹。內容包括材料之晶體結構與晶體缺陷，固體材料之原子擴散，相圖與相變化，材料製程及應用，材料之物理性質（光性質、電性質、磁性質及熱性質）.
description.en: Special topics in 1.The structure of crystalline solids. 2.Imperfections in solids. 3.Phase transformation and phase equilibrium. 4.Strengthening mechanism of materials. 5.Metal alloys 6.Ceramics 7.Polymers

class_names: 能源光電外國學生專班
notes: 材料所和 EOMP 合開

description.zh: 本課程內容含有: (1) 簡介。(2) 貯氫合金種類 (3) 貯氫合金結構與性質 (4) 貯氫合金製程 --- 機械冶金 (5) 貯氫合金製程 --- 真空感應熔煉 (6) 貯氫材料之吸放氫測量方法 (7) 貯氫合金應用 (8) 鎳氫電池材料 (9) 奈米碳材之結構與性質 (10) 奈米碳材之製程 (11) 奈米碳材之應用 (12) 氫燃料電池 --- 質子交換膜材料 (13) 氫燃料電池 --- 膜電極組材料
description.en: The class includes :1.Course Introduction, 2.Classes of Hydrogen Storage Alloys (HSAs),3. Structure and Properties of HSAs,4. Production of HSAs ---Mechanical Alloying Process,5.,roduction of HSAs ---Vacuum Induction Melting (VIM) Process,6.. Method of Measuring Storage Capacity for Hydrogen Storage Materials,7. Application of HSAs,8. Materials of Nickel Hydride Battery Electrode,9. Structure and Properties of Carbon Nano Tubes (CNTs), 10. Production of CNTs, 11. Application of CNTs,12. Hydrogen Fuel Cell ---Proton Exchange Membrane, 13 Hydrogen Fuel Cell ---Membrane Electrode Assembly (MEA)

description.zh: 電化學工程特論的領域眾多，舉凡腐蝕現象與電泳作用的探討，電分析感測器或電池元件的製作，以及電鍍、拋光或鋁和氯氣的生產技術等均為電化學工程的範疇。本課程除了介紹基本的電化學原理外，另將著重於電化學分析方法在能源與生醫系統研究上的應用。
description.en: Special topics in the field of electrochemistry include many different phenomena (e.g., corrosion and electrophoresis, electro analytical sensors and batteries devices, and the electroplating of metals and the large-scale production of aluminum and chlorine technologies……). In addition to an overview of the basic principles of electrochemistry, the main emphasis here is on the application of electro-analytical methods to the study of energy and biomedical systems.

description.zh: 專題報告、專題演講、研究小組討論。
description.en: Case Study. Seminar. Group meeting.

notes: 碩士班修習

description.zh: 1.X 光之本質 2. 晶体幾何及倒置晶格 3. 晶體立體投影 4.X 光繞射原理 5.X 光繞射實驗方法 (繞射儀，Laue 照相法，粉末法) 6.X 光繞射之應用 (包括晶體結構之鑑定，晶格常數之量測，相圖測定，序化一非序化轉換及化學成分分析等)
description.en: 1.Properties of X-Ray 2.Crystallography and Reciprocal Lattice 3.Projections of Crystals 4.Principles of X-Ray Diffraction 5.Experimental Methods (Diffractometer Methods, Powder Photographs and Laue Pholtographs)6.Applications of X-ray Diffraction (Orientation and Quality of Single Crystal, Structure of Polycrystalline Aggregates, Determine of Crystal Structure and Precise Parameter Measurements, Chemical Analysis, Phase Transformations etc.)

description.zh: 資源工程導論為資源工程的入門學科，其範圍包括天然的金屬、非金屬、礦物與石油、天然氣、建築用砂石、石材與水等原生資源，以及工商業及一般生活的廢棄物或其附帶產生的可再生資源。期對初學者有一整體的基本概念。
description.en: This is a general introduction class to provide student basic knowledge about resources engineering which include metal, nonmetal, minerals, petroleum, natural gas, aggregates, dimension stone and water resources.

description.zh: 本課程之目的在探討如何運用科學與系統化的方式解決管理上的問題。整個過程包括：資料蒐集與問題分析、數量模式的建構、問題求解、成本效益分析、系統規劃設計與執行等步驟。課程內容主要以應用案例說明為主，讓同學瞭解理論如何與實際問題結合，也會介紹最佳化計算軟體來求解數學模式並輔助說明所得數據之意涵。
description.en: The purpose of this course is talking about how to utilize scientific and systematical approaches to solve management problems. The solution process includes data collection and problem investigation, model formulation, optimal solution derivation, cost and efficiency analysis, system implementation and execution etc. This course mainly contains various application cases. Accordingly, participant can understand how to apply theoretical methods on solving real problems. Computational software is also utilized to solve the formulated models and analyze and interpret the obtained solutions.

notes: 經管所和 IMBA 合開

description.zh: 本課程探討資訊系統在現代組織中所扮演的角色，課程重點將放在企業電子化和電子商務，同學在修課過後將具備相關知識。課堂中的資訊實務技術演練，將有助於同學有效率地解決相關問題。
description.en: This course provides the knowledge you need to understand the role of information systems in modern organizations, with particular focus on E-commerce and E-business. Along with skills learned in your functional area, knowledge from this course will help you effectively use information technology for solving business problems.

notes: 經管所和 IMBA 合開

description.zh: 本課程旨在介紹供應鏈管理中之相關問題及議題 。其中包含產業分析、e 化概念、需求及供應管理、長鞭效應、存貨管理、延遲理論、及供應鏈管理實務。
description.en: The purpose of the course is to offer student a sound introduction of supply chain management relative issues. It includes industry analysis, E-business concept, demand and supply management, bullwhip effect, inventory management, postponement, and supply chain management practice.

description.zh: 介紹 VBA 語言基本資料處理的概念，包含基本輸入與輸出、程式的流程控制、函數的應用等指令之撰寫、程式之編輯、編譯、聯絡與程式之執行，並發展一套應用程式。
description.en: This course introduces the basic data processes of EXCEL VBA language. They include input/output, program process control, application of functions, program editing and execution, and so on.

description.zh: 「企業領導力」是企業經營管理中非常重要元素和指標。我們將由學術理論和商業實務案例中，共同分析和探討企業領導力的管理策略；並著重於企業價值創新，以培育高教學生具有全球商業開發和經營管理的領導技能。
description.en: The course, Corporate leadership, is offered from a practitioner’s viewpoints on how to deploy the concepts, knowledge, theories and experiences for the development of business leadership practice and to achieve the corporate value creation. In the current market-lead and ubiquitous technology driven world, the Corporate Leadership role is not just the corporate internal management concerning but also needs a broad range of issues, such as cross-cultural knowledge and strategic thinking on business development, communication skills with innovative ideas, and management techniques for the long-term business goals. We will expand the scope and scale of the research related, review articles, complete class projects, and discuss real business cases.

notes: 經管所和 IMBA 合開

description.zh: 教學目標課程目標：執行計劃的現金流量計劃，並通過提供的財務指標進行分析，從而可以就是否方便執行項目做出全面的決策。在本主題中，模型和項目評估標準為決策提供了必要的要素，尤其是在是否實施投資項目方面。學會識別和定義投資項目的主要成本效益參數”
description.en: Course Objectives：Execute a projected Cash flow planning, analyzing it by the Provided financial indicators that allow comprehensive decisions to be made on whether or not the execution of projects is convenient.In this subject the models and Project evaluation criteria that provide the necessary elements for decision-making, particularly on whether or not to implement investment projects. Learn to identify and define the main cost-benefit parameters of an investment project "

notes: 經管所和 IMBA 合開

description.zh: 專題報告 專題演講 研究小組討論
description.en: Case Study, Seminars, Group meeting

description.zh: 1. 程序同步 2. 同作機制 3. 虛擬記憶體 4. 分散式系統 5. 分散式同作控制 6. 電腦安全 7. 排程模式
description.en: 1. Process synchronization 2. Concurrency Mechanisms 3. Virtual memory 4. Distributed Systems 5. Distributed Concurrency Control 6. Queuing Models

notes: 資工所、電資外生所和創新資安合開

description.zh: 本課程包含機率與隨機程序的基礎原理，如機率量測，隨機變數，大數法則，隨機程序，穩態隨機程序及其特性。本門課程為研究所在通訊及控制組之基本課程。
description.en: This course contains the basic theories in probability and random processes. It includes probability measures, random variables, the law of large numberrandom processes and stationary processes. The course is a basic course in field of communications and controls in graduate school.

notes: 資工四、資工所、電資外生所合開

description.zh: 嵌入式系統目前愈來愈普遍。它將會大大地影響我們的生活方式。可攜式裝置如智慧型手機、掌上型電腦、以及所謂的 IA 裝置如家用網路閘道器、數位視訊錄影機、和常見的遊戲機都是屬於嵌入式系統的範疇。在本課程中，我們將會討論何謂嵌入式系統、嵌入式系統的形式、以及如何建構一個嵌入式系統。由於嵌入式系統包含硬體及軟體的議題，我們也會探討相關的主題。 本課程的先修課程包含計算機組織與結構、C 程式語言、資料結構、系統程式、以及作業系統。課程主要內容如下：嵌入式系統簡介與概論、嵌入式精簡指令集結構、ARM 指令集、嵌入式計算平台、嵌入式程式設計與分析、嵌入式作業系統、系統設計技術、裝置操作、網路。本課程亦包含實習與學期專題作業。
description.en: Embedded systems are more and more popular today. It will affect the human life greatly. Portable devices like smart phone, PDA, and MP3 player, and so-called IA devices such as home gateway, DVR, and game machine are all categorized as embedded systems. In this course, we will discuss what an embedded system is, what it looks like, and how to build an embedded device. Since an embedded system involves hardware and software issues, we will discuss the related subjects. The prerequisite courses for this class include computer organization and architecture, the C programming language, data structure, system programming, and operating system. The major topics of this course are listed as follows: Introduction and Basic Concepts, The RISC Embedded Architectures, The ARM instruction Set, The Embedded Computing Platforms, Program Design and Analysis, The Embedded Operating Systems, System Design Techniques, Device Manipulation, Networks.

notes: 資工四、資工所、電資外生所合開

description.zh: 本課程是研究所程度進階的巨量資料探勘與應用課程，主要介紹巨量資料探勘概念和原理、分散式計算基本架構、及各種應用包括: Link Analysis、Social Network Graph Mining、推薦系統等，並且將介紹在處理巨量資料時常用的機器學習方法，如：類神經網路、SVM 等，除了觀念的介紹外，透過平行化程式設計的練習以及期末專題，能讓學生認識實際巨量資料探勘的程式設計以及機器學習等工具的應用方式。
description.en: This course introduces the concepts in big data mining and advanced applications in machine learning. Topics include big data concepts, distributed computing infrastructure, and machine learning methods commonly used in processing big data, such as neural networks, support vector machines. In addition to concept introduction, parallel programming exercises and term projects are included to help students understand the processing steps and practical tools in big data anlaytics.

notes: 資工四、資工所、電資外生所和創新 AI、資安合開

description.zh: 本課程除了介紹軟體開發架構及安全保護的原理之外，更著重在軟體開發平台的實際操作使用，例如:iOS 或 Android 的開發平台等，並以國網中心所建置的 CDX 雲端資安攻防平台進行實作分析與演練，讓學生能更了解技術原理的實際應用情境。課程內容包含：軟體開發流程 ●軟體潛在威脅 ●惡意軟體偵測 (malware detection)●網頁程式安全 (Web application security)●行動應用軟體安全 (Mobile App security): iOS, Android●App 漏洞與弱點 (Vulnerabilities in Apps)●App 安全檢測 (Security testing of Apps): static, dynamic●逆向工程 (reverse engineering)
description.en: 英文概述English Description The course aims to introduce principles of software development architecture and associated security technologies. The course also focuses on discussing security issues of actual operations on software development platforms, such as iOS or Android platforms, etc. Students will use CDX cloud platform to exercise practical analysis regarding security attack and defense events, and students are expected to possess better understand of practical applications of security issues for software development.
