description.en: A student must write a thesis to fulfill the partial requirements for the Master degree.

description.zh: 在各指導教授的指導下，從事鐵道產業技術相關領域的論文寫作，論文內容須包含研究方法或實驗方法、理論分析、研究結果和結論。
description.en: A thesis of Ms. Degree should be proposed by all students associated with the agreement of their advising professor. The thesis should focus on the fields in "Railway Industry Technology", and include research methodology, theory background and conclusive result or findings..

description.zh: 研究生在教授之個別指導下，針對特定研究主題進行研究 ，並將研究成果寫成論文。
description.en: Graduate students are required to complete a specific research topic under the instruction of their advisor(s). The results should be written as a thesis.

description.zh: 研究生在教授之個別指導下，針對特定研究主題進行研究 ，並將研究成果寫成論文。
description.en: Graduate students are required to complete a specific research topic under the instruction of their advisor(s). The results should be written as a thesis.

description.zh: 研究生在教授之個別指導下，針對特定研究主題進行研究 ，並將研究成果寫成論文。
description.en: Graduate students are required to complete a specific research topic under the instruction of their advisor(s). The results should be written as a thesis.

notes: 半導體碩二必修課

name.zh: 單元操作與輸送現象 (四)

description.zh: 本課程內容包括質傳應用、粉粒體操作單元。
description.en: This course contents mass transfer application and operations involving particulate solids.

notes: 化工四合開；核心 4 選 1

description.zh: 本課程之目的在於介紹互動媒體設計所需之故事腳本設計相關知識與其應用。在以使用者情境設計導向的基礎架構下，本課程的內如包含敘事性方法、創意思考方法、互動腳本企劃以及互動腳本撰寫等。修習此課程之學生可學習互動情境劇本設計之原理與實作模擬，並具備業界所需之互動媒體設計實務之企劃與分析能力。在以實務操作、課堂腦力激盪與討論的方式下，學生的評量採報告與作業的繳交以及課堂討論成績為主。
description.en: The course aims to introduce knowledge and application relevant to storytelling and script planning. Under the structure of user oriented scenario design, this course includes narrative methods, creative thinking methods, interactive script planning and writing. Students will be capable of interactive scenario script design, planning and analyzing for interactive media practice. By means of practical work, in-course brainstorming and discussion, students are evaluated by reports, assignment and course discusstion.

notes: 排一般教室，互動二與外生二合開，限本系生 30 人

description.zh: 本課程主要的概念於利用設計思考以使用者導向之設計方法，將使用者需求作為設計提案及解決方案的啟始點，並整合分析設計對象、使用者所遭遇的問題、如何提高性能及實現可擴展性等問題。透過資料科學與工具的整合應用，導引資料分析人員與設計專業人員進行跨領域的整合，以建構未來設計創新的機會與願景。課程的主要目標是：1. 建構以用戶為導向之人本設計重要設計流程。2. 使用高品質的數據，可以創建設計工件，滿足真實使用者的需求。3. 鼓勵學生在互動設計領域中，整合兩者的優勢，建構未來的設計優勢和機會。4. 最重要的目標是確保使用者體驗人本設計的品質。
description.en: "The IxD uses their sensibility and methods to match users' need in a way that is technologically feasible and viable enough to generate user value and tap market opportunity. The idea is, design thinking puts user and their needs as the starting point of developing new product and solution and ask questions like for whom are we designing, what is the problem user is experiencing, how to improve the performance and achieve scalability, among others.The main objectives of this course provide:1. Creating a vital user-centered design process.2. Work with the high-quality data, design artifacts can be created, addressing the needs of the real user.3. Encourage student to mix these two together in IxD to reap design benefits and opportunities.4. The most important objective is to ensure the quality of user-centricity of user experience.

notes: 日，外互動所 / 創新所 / 設計博合開，排 PBL 教室，限 40 人

description.zh: 以圖像語言的架構教授分析性繪圖 (Analytical Drawing Process) 的概念與操作，以及分析性繪圖在設計速寫上的應用。課程以課堂講解與實地速寫來進行，主題包括感知與理解層面的三維觀察與紀錄、圖解、與圖像筆記。教學目標為：1. 介紹分析性繪圖與徒手草寫。2. 訓練以徒手草寫的過程來觀察、分析、與記錄結構、空間、與建成環境的三維特性。3. 熟悉感知與理解的圖學系統與速寫表現手法，能以圖像筆記來記錄設計主題。
description.en: This course introduces the concept of analytical drawing process, and how to utilize it in design sketching.The objectives are:1.Introduce the concept of analytical drawing process and techniques of freehand sketch. 2.Develop the ability to see and analyze the three-dimensional characteristics of an observed object and encountered environment through analytical drawing process. 3.Familiar with both conceptual and perceptual form of representation, and be able to take a visual note to document an investigated subject.

notes: 光華 409, 日碩 / 設計博合開，限合開班級修，預選 13 人

description.zh: 本課程內容包括：Android 作業系統概觀、Java 程式設計簡介、Android SDK 應用程式開發環境與模擬器建置、Android 專案建立與結構、Activity 元件、使用者介面設計與使用 XML 的方式、View 與 Layout、Widget 與使用者事件處理方法、Dialogs、Adapter 與 AdapterView、WebView、儲存媒介元件、多媒體撥放器元件、定位系統元件、Google Maps、加速感測器元件等等。
description.en: The topics included in this course will include: Android operating system overview, A brief introduction of Java, Android SDK development environment setup and the emulator, Android project creation, Activity, User interface design and XML, View and layout, Widget and event handling, Dialogs, Adapter and AdapterView, Webview, Storage, Mediaplayer, GPS, Google Maps, G-sensor, etc.

description.zh: 本課程旨在利用電腦模擬與計算工具，深入探討化學工程領域的核心知識，涵蓋化工熱力學與化學反應工程兩大主題。 在熱力學部分，課程將介紹如何透過化工模擬軟體 Aspen Plus 及其連結的資料庫，進行物性、化性及物質間相互作用力的分析。並藉由不同熱力學模型，計算混合物的相圖。課程也將運用生成式 AI 輔助，指導學生撰寫狀態方程式與活性係數模型的電腦程式，以強化理論與實務的結合。在化學反應工程部分，將透過 Aspen Plus 的反應式建構功能，介紹動力學模型在實務上的應用。課堂將包含使用 Aspen Plus 進行不同類型反應器的模擬，並分析與解讀熱力學與動力學數據。此課程對於化工系學生，將深化熱力學與反應工程基礎，強化單元設計與模擬能力，為頂石課程中的化工程序設計打下堅實基礎。對於非化工專業學生，則能透過電腦模擬與計算，理解化學工程教育的核心概念，為跨領域學習提供起點。
description.en: This course aims to utilize computer simulation and computational tools to explore fundamental knowledge in the field of chemical engineering, covering two major topics: chemical engineering thermodynamics and chemical reaction engineering.In the thermodynamics section, the course will introduce how to analyze physical properties, chemical properties, and intermolecular interactions using Aspen Plus, a chemical process simulation software, along with its integrated databases. The course will also explore the calculation of phase diagrams for mixtures using various thermodynamic models. Additionally, generative AI tools will be employed to guide students in writing computer programs for equations of state and activity coefficient models, bridging theory with practical application.In the chemical reaction engineering section, Aspen Plus will be used to demonstrate the construction of reaction models and their practical applications in different kinetic models. The course will inc

notes: 化工三合開

description.zh: 1. 醫用電子學之基礎。2. 生醫電物理化學之基礎。3. 人體生理系統與經絡系統介紹。4. 生醫系統電物理化學模型分析。5. 醫用電探針、感測器元件與生物晶片的應用。6. 量測理論與生醫電訊號量測技術。7. 生醫電訊號處理技術。8. 超音波、紅外線、X 光、CT、磁振醫學造影原理與影像處理。9. 醫用電子安全規格製訂。10. 醫用醫療儀器與生化分析儀設計。11.DICOM、HL7 醫療網路資訊系統介紹。12. 中西醫工應用系列介紹。
description.en: 1.Fundamental of medical electronics。2.Fundamental of electro-physiology。3.Introduction to human body system and Meridian system。4.Electronic physics-chemical modeling analysis of biomedical system。5.Applications of medical electrode、biosensor and biochip。 6.Medical measurement theory and technology。7.Processing technology of biomedical signals。8.Constructing and processing of ultrasound、infrared、X-ray 、CT and MRI Imaging。9.Safety specifications of medical electronic devices。10.Designs of biomed

notes: 丙組選修

name.zh: 積體電路製程先進技術與設備
name.en: Processing technology and equipment for advanced semiconductor manufacturing

description.zh: 本課程涵蓋半導體產業趨勢發展、超大型 (Giga) 半導體工廠廠務系統與先進自動化工廠運作、以及先進半導體製程技術和設備等三大部分。
description.en: This course mainly consists of development trend, Giga FAB, FAB automation, and processing technology and equipment for advanced semiconductor manufacturing.

notes: 機電所甲組◎, 和創新半導體合開；限 40 人

description.zh: 機械手臂基礎理論，內容包含座標轉換、機械臂運動學、反運動學、動力學、軌跡規畫、機械臂設計、機械臂控制、機械臂的程式語言等。
description.en: It is a fundamental course concerning the theories of robotic manipulators. Topics contain frame transformations, manipulator kinematics, inverse kinematics, dynamics, trajectory planning, manipulator design, control of manipulators, robot programming languages.

notes: 甲組◎；甲、乙組選修；機電、製科合開；限 20 人

description.zh: 奈微米工程於生物醫學之應用日趨重要，量測與操作工具的開發與實際的生醫應用對象的大小尺寸具有密切的相關性，對於生物系統的充份瞭解是工程表現的重要過程之一。在此課程中將配合本校實驗室目前之相關研究設備進行原理講解與應用討論，包括之項目將由分子、細胞到組織之感測、分析與操縱。選修學生須依下列重點：奈微米生醫感測系統、奈米生醫材料、奈米生醫光電以及實驗室晶片等領域選擇期中期末報告之題目與計畫內容，主要要求在尋求創新思考方向，以求在原理或應用上的突破，積極推動跨領域與技術先進之整合性研究。
description.en: Nano/micro engineering in bio-medicine applications has become increasingly important. The development and operation of measurement tool for biomedical applications has a close correlation to the actual size of the object. In this course we will explain the principles of devices and discuss the applications based on the school's research laboratories, including sensing, analysis and manipulation of molecules, cells, and tissues. Students will be required to do a project about Nano-micron biomedical sensor systems, nano-biomaterials and nano-biomedical areas such as optical and lab-chip. The interim and final report should devote to the topic and plans in the search for the direction of Creative Thinking with a view to the breakthrough of theory or application, and actively promote the integration of advanced interdisciplinary research and technology.

notes: 甲組◎；甲、丙組選修，限 25 人

description.zh: 微加工程序含 MUMPS，打樣、沉積、蝕刻；設計工具含 MEMCAD, Matlab, EM software, and Ansys 等；應用例含壓力感測器、加速度計、探針卡、微波元件、生物晶片等；最後介紹封裝與測試技術。
description.en: 1. Introductions of Microsystem 2. Micromachining Processes include MUMPS, Pattern, Deposition, Etching 3. Design Tool include MEMCAD, Matlab, EM software, and Ansys 4.Applications include Pressure sensor, Accelerometer, …,etc, -probe card and other, RFMEMS, BioMEMS 5.Packaging and testing.

notes: 甲、乙、丙組選修；限 50 人

description.zh: 現代控制理論簡介、線性空間分析、狀態方程式及響應、可控制性及可觀測性、穩定性分析、狀態回授及估測、控制器設計及應用、觀測。
description.en: Introduction of Modern Control Theory﹒Linear space Analysis, State equation and Response, Controllability and Observability, Stability Analysis, State Feedback and Estimation, Controller Design and Applications, Observer Design and Applications, Nonlinear systems, Time varying Systems, Applications of Modern Control theory.

notes: 甲組選修；限 40 人

description.zh: 機械動態系統及表示法、變分原理 (Variational Principles)、Lagrange 方程式、Hamilton 原理、系統分析、迴歸性判別法、判別法則及選定、控制應用。
description.en: Dynamical system representation and Modeling of Mechanical systems, Variational Principles Lagrange equation, Hamiltion Principles, System Analysis, System Identification and Application.

notes: 乙組◎；限 40 人

name.zh: 數位化設計與開發特論
name.en: Special Topics on e-Design and e-Development

description.zh: 如何藉由商務模型的分析，建置數位化協同產品設計與開發環境，並說明資料管理、構型管隨著網路時代的來臨，不但造成數位化協同產品設計與開發觀念的興起，也造成數位化協同平台技術逐漸成熟，並且將同步工程觀念的實現更往前邁進一大步。本課程是從數位化協同產品設計與開發概念之介紹開始，使學生明白數位化協同產品設計與開發在現代製造業中的重要性，接著介紹理與工作流程管理等相關實務應用觀念。
description.en: Information and network technologies have promoted the traditional concurrent engineering to the next generation. The collaborative e-design and e-development concept has been more popular in industries. This course is introduced from the concept of collaborative product design and development to help students understanding the importance of collaborative e-design and e-development in modern industries. Furthermore, the business model analysis method is provided to construct the collaborative environment of e-design and e-development. In addition, some real cases of data management, configuration management, and workflow management are mentioned.

notes: 乙組選修

name.en: Principle and application of fuel cell

description.zh: 本課程由機械工程的角度出發，結合基礎電化學原理，介紹燃料電池的基本原理及種類，由最新市場發展現況導入，介紹燃料電池的發展歷史及最新現況，同時說明提升燃料電池效率及壽命的關鍵影響因素，結合實作方式深入了解燃料電池特性。
description.en: This course is based on the principle of mechanical engineering and electrochemical theory to introduce the basic principles and types of fuel cells. From the latest development in the global market, the course will introduce the fuel cell history and the latest products of fuel cells. The improvement of fuel cell efficiency and lifetime will be explained through fundamental theory and experiments.

notes: 甲、乙組選修；限 15 人

description.zh: 本課程主要在介紹綠色科技及其在二十一世紀對人類生活的影響，內容包括現今幾個最重要的「潔能」與「節能」科技，以及一些「環保」相關科技。「潔能科技」包括風力能、太陽能、水力能、地球內部能源、生質能、路面能、聲音能、燃料電池、電動車等；「節能科技」包括節能住宅、變頻空調等；「環保科技」則包括碳回收主題。介紹內容包括各項技術原理介紹及其發展概況。
description.en: This course aims to introduce green technologies and their influences on human life in the 21st century. The contents consist of the most important topics about the clean energy and energy conservation technologies. The clean energy technology consists of wind energy, solar energy, hydraulic energy, earth interior energy, bioenergy, roadway energy, sound energy, fuel cell, electric vehicles, and so on. The energy conservation technology consists energy save buildings, variable frequency air-condition, etc.. The environmental protesting technology includes carbon recapture etc.. This course will talk the technical principles and their general developing situations.

notes: 甲、乙組選修；限 25 人

name.zh: 光電半導體元件技術及應用
name.en: Optoelectronic semiconductor device technology and application

description.zh: 本課程介紹光電半導體的基本原理與應用，幫助同學們了解光電元件如發光二極體的製程、封裝、及測試技術的發展，由市場應用概況導入，含蓋設計研發、製造生產、與特性量測等範疇，說明光電元件的光熱電特性對元件效率的影響，並搭配實驗方式深入了解。
description.en: This course introduces the basic principles and applications of optoelectronic semiconductors such as light emitting diodes to help students understand the fabrication process, packaging, and test technologies This course includes application, design and manufacturing. In addition, the influences of optical, thermal, and electrical properties on the device efficiency will be explained through fundamental theory and experiments.

notes: 機電所甲組◎; 甲、乙組選修，限 20 人

description.zh: 本課程提供理工學者撰寫科技論文之英文寫作技巧與指導，內容包括：扼要複習英文文法，詳細說明撰寫英文研究報告或論文時常犯的錯誤，深入討論標準英文寫作風格與修辭原則，提供簡易而有效的實作原則以提昇科技論文的可讀性。
description.en: This course develops a curriculum providing students with an English writing skill and direction focused on technical essays, including the followings : 1. Concise review of English grammars2. Frequent writing mistakes of essays or reports3. Deep discussion concerning standard English writing style and rhetoric principles4. Offering simple and practical writing principles to increase the readability of technology essays.

notes: 甲、乙組選修；機電、製科合開；限 21 人

description.zh: 本課程主要在於介紹產品環保化設計的概念與實務做法，將會詳細介紹生命週期評估的內涵與原理做法，並將透過軟體的實際作來學期如何從事產品的生命週期評估。簡化式的生命週期評估之作法也會在課堂中被介紹。
description.en: This course focuses on introducing the meaning and principles of designing environmentally sound products. The theories and principles of Life Cycle Assessment (LCA) will be introduced extensively. Several sets of LCA computer software will be utilized in the classes for students to practice. Besides, the streamlined LCA (SLCA) will also be taught in the class.

name.en: Special Topics on Nano- Technology and Environment

description.zh: 這門課著重在探討奈米科技之基本原理與應用範疇，以及環境應用與安全相關主題，內容包含奈米之基本特性、各種量測方法、結構控制、以及 "納米" 對環境應用與安全問題。此外並包含奈米微粒之產生、收集、測量以及微粒動力學等主題。
description.en: This course will investigate the definition and theories of nanotechnology. Including basic properties, measuring methods, structural control, environmental, and safety issues of "Nano-". Topics about generation, collection, measurement and dynamics of nano-particle will also be covered.

description.zh: 這門課除了複習企業環境管理與企業永續的策略做法外，主要在於深入探究金字塔底層 (BOP) 與創造共享價值 (Creating Shared Value, CSV) 之理論及實務做法，以及成為一個真正永續企業的策略。
description.en: In addition to the strategies of corporate environmental management and corporate sustainability, this course will be focusing on the theories and practices of Bottom of the Pyramid (BOP) and Creating Shared Value (CSV), as well as the strategies of being a true sustainable enterprise.

notes: 億光 1207 室

description.zh: 本課程主要介紹自動化光學精密檢測相關技術，內容包括如下：前言，精密量測概論，機器視覺原理，二維光學檢測技術及實習，三維光學檢測技術及實習，影像處理與人工智慧技術運用，智慧型量測系統及應用，系統整合之相關技術，產業相關技術應用，及結論。
description.en: This subject is arranged to introduce the principles and techniques required in Automatic Optical Inspection (AOI). The subject includes the following subtopics: introduction to precision metrology and machine vision, the measurement principles and methods used in the 2D AOI, the measurement principles and techniques used in the 3D AOI, image processing and artificial intelligence methods used in automatic inspection, intelligent measurement systems, AOI system integration and conclusion.

notes: 製科◎

description.zh: 先修課程：負責教授同意本課程介紹有限元素分析法基本原理及其在各種工程問題上之應用。1. 有限元素分析法之基本觀念 2. 利用變分原理建立有限元素模式 3. 形狀函數及等參數元素 4. 一維問題：桿、桁架、樑及骨架等 5. 二維問題：平面應力應變及板殼問題。6. 三維問題：一般實體 7. 有限元素分析之計算機程式處理 8. 有限元素分析於動態問題之應用 9. 相關有限元素分析套裝軟體簡介
description.en: To introduce the basic principle of the finite element analysis and its application in solving various types of engineering problems.1. Introduction to the basic concepts of the finite element analysis2. Formulation of the finite models through the use of variational principles3. Shape functions and isoparametric elements4. One dimensional problems: rod, truss, beam, frame, etc.5. Two dimensional problems: plane stress, plane strain and plate, etc.6. Three dimensional problems: typical solids7. Implementation of the FEM computation by computer8. Finite element applications in dynamic problems9. Survey of some finite-element software systems

notes: 製科◎

description.zh: 先修課程：負責教授同意。1. 超音波技術簡介 2. 基礎彈性力學 3. 彈性動力學 4. 平面波 5. 平面波的反射 6. 平面波的折射 7. 表面波 8. 藍姆波 (平板波) 9. 超音波於非破壞檢測之應用 10. 超音波於材料性質量測之應用 11. 超音波於醫學診斷與治療之應用 12. 超音波於感測器及通訊應用之應用 13. 超音波於加工應用之應用
description.en: 1.Introduction to ultrasonics 2.Basic elasticity for ultrasonics 3.Elastodynamics 4.Plane waves 5.Reflection of plane waves 6.Refraction of plane waves 7.Surface waves 8.Lamb waves 9.Ultrasonics in nondestructive testing 10.Application of ultrasonics to material characterizations 11.Application of ultrasonics in medical diagnostics and treatments 12.Application of ultrasonics to sensors and telecommunications 13.Application of ultrasonics to machining

notes: 製科◎；限 25 人

description.zh: 本課程介紹超文本標記語言 (HTML) 語法與層疊樣式表 (CSS) 之應用。課程內容包括：1. 超文本標記語言 2. 層疊樣式表 3. JavaScript 直譯式腳本語言 4. HTML5 APIs 語法 5. CSS3 特徵 6. DOM 文件物件模型 7. JQuery 函式庫 8. JSON 資訊交換語言 9. AJAX 非同步傳輸 10. SVG 可縮放向量圖形 11. HTML5 Canvas 應用程式介面 12. WebGL 三維繪圖 13. 自調式網頁設計 14. Bootstrap 15. 網頁文字編排學 16. 網頁字型。
description.en: This course introduces HyperText Markup Language (HTML) and Cascading Style Sheets (CSS). The course topics include: 1. HTML syntax, 2. CSS syntax, 3. JavaScript, 4. HTML5 APIs syntactic features, 5. CSS3 features, 6. Document Object Model (DOM), 7. jQuery library, 8. JavaScript Object Notation (JSON), 9. Asynchronous JavaScript and XML (AJAX), 10. Scalable Vector Graphics (SVG), 11. HTML5 Canvas API 12. WebGL, 13. Responsive Web Design (RWD), 14. Bootstrap, 15. Web Typography, 16 Web Fonts.

notes: 科研 335

description.zh: 本課程主要在研討傳統的結構化語言的編譯技術。課程所所涵蓋的內容包括有： - 語句上的分析、語句分析器的製作 - 由上而下的組譯器製作 - 由下而上的組譯器製作 - 語意分析 - 機器碼之產生與暫存器之配置 - 資料流分析的理論與應用 - 程式碼最佳化處理。課程的實施，將以基本編譯技術為主，作深入的介紹。學習所得的觀念與技術，將利用一個實驗性語言編譯器的實作來貫穿。因此，程式規畫實作，將在這個課程中，佔有相當大的比重。
description.en: This course discusses issues in the compilation of conventional block-structured languages, as listed below. - lexical analysis, scanner generators; - top-down parsing, LL(1) parsers; - bottom-up parsing SLR, LALR, LR(1) parsers, parser generators; - semantic analysis; - code generation and register allocation, code generator generators; - dataflow analysis: theory and practice; - code optimization. There will be a significant programming component to the course

description.zh: 本課程旨在教授學生如何運用創意編程和視覺化電腦圖形技術，將資料及音訊數據轉換為可視化之 2D 或 3D 視覺內容，藉以增進資料及音訊之閱聽體驗。課程進行中，學生將習得多種基於演算法之視覺表現方式，以滿足設計層面中富含躍動感、平衡感以及美感之體驗需求，活用創意編程與新媒體技術來創建更生動、更具有影響力的動靜態視聽影像。
description.en: This course aims to teach students how to utilize the knowledge from data science and computer graphics technology to represent data and audio into visualized 2D/3D representations, which gives rise to enhanced experiences of reading and listening. Students will learn a variety of programming skills to design visual representation based on algorithms to deliver dynamic, balanced and aesthetic experiences. With the help of creative coding and new media technology, more vivid and influential static and dynamic visual and audio experiences will be generated.

notes: 核心課程，計中電腦教室

name.zh: AI 機器視覺結合深度學習實作
name.en: AI, machine vision and Deep learning

description.zh: 使用 Python 3 帶同學理解以下主題，已調整過難易度，適合零基礎或非資訊相關科系同學學習：資料處理 / 深度學習 / 機器視覺。
description.en: Use Python 3 to lead students to understand the following topics, the difficulty has been adjusted, and it is suitable for students with zero foundation or non-information related subjects to learn:Data Processing / Deep Learning / Machine Vision.

notes: 具備 Python3 基礎程式語言能力，需自備筆電，計中電腦

description.zh: 本課程從電化學概念，電極電位，及腐蝕原理中建立學生腐蝕技術，包括 DC 極化法，AC 阻抗法，諧波法，ER 測試，ERR 敏化測試高溫水溶液，應力腐蝕測試等，另外腐蝕壽命評估，材料腐蝕管理系統，核能電廠材料，地下緊密電位量測，水溶液腐蝕抑制效果，鋼筋混泥土結構防蝕效果評估均在本課程中一一介紹。
description.en: 1.Electrochemical mechanisms 2.Corrosion tendency and Electrode Potentials 3.Polarization and Corrosion Rates 4.Theories of Passivity 5.Corrosion Prevention 6.Eight forms of Corrosion 7.High Temprature Corrosion

description.zh: 課程綱要：1. 半導體元件簡介 2. 物理氣相沉積 3. 化學氣相沉積 4. 微影─光阻覆蓋，曝光，顯影 5. 蝕刻─濕式蝕刻，乾式蝕刻 6. 攙雜─擴散法，離子植入法 7. 氧化和熱處理製程
description.en: Course Outline：1.Introduction to Semiconductor Device2.Physical Vapor Deposition3.Chemical Vapor Deposition4.Photolithography─photoresist coating, exposure, development5.Etching─wet etching, dry etching6.Doping─diffusion, ion implantation7.Oxidation and Thermal Treatment Process

description.zh: 講述鑄造學之基本原理，概念，以及實際應用技巧，基本原理上，以材料的凝固解析學為主。包括：熱傳導及流動性等基本原理。應用上包含金屬、非金屬、高分子等其他原材料之鑄造方法、技巧之介紹。
description.en: It lectures the fundamental principles, concept and practical applied technique,basically speaking, it is mainly based on solidification and analytic process, which includes the fundamental principles of heat transfer and flowability. In practice, it covers the introduction of casting method of metal, non-metal, polymer and othermaterials.

notes: 週三 ABC

description.zh: 介紹含碳化合物的命名、結構與性質的基本概念。課程重點在反應機構、合成、立體化學、化學分析及儀器分析方法。
description.en: Fundamentals of structure and properties of carbon compounds. Emphasis on reaction mechanisms, synthesis, stereochemistry, as well as chemical and spectroscopic methods of analysis.

notes: 三選一項目

description.zh: 學習典範產業的實務經驗，帶給學生產業的思維。以真實具體的研究開發與產業經驗為教材，激發學生追求科技創新成就的渴望，強化青年學子對產業職涯的規劃。
description.en: Through the experience of industrial managers and engineers, we hope students to learn about the practical problems in the industry. By offering different topics and current trends emphasizing on the research and development of various industries, this course wishes to inspire students to pursue their careers in future time.

description.zh: 本課程介紹在數位影像處理領域中會使用到的基本觀念與技術。數位影像處理有非常多重要的應用，如：影像內容改善，工業檢測，機器知覺等。課程內容包括: 1. 數位影像處理的基礎 2. 影像的轉換 3. 影像的加強 4. 影像的復原 5. 彩色影像的處理 6. 影像的壓縮 7. 影像的分割與特徵抽取 8. 影像的表達及描述 9. 影像的辨認與解釋
description.en: The goal of this course is to introduce the basic concepts and techniques used in the field of digital image processing (IP). Digital Image Processing has many important applications, for example, image contents improvement, industrial inspection, machine perception. The outline of this course is: 1.Digital image fundamentals 2.Image transforms 3.Image enhancement 4. Image restoration 5. Color image processing 6. Image compression 7. Image segmentation and feature detection 8. Representation and description 9. Recognition and interpretation.

notes: 資工四、資工所合開

description.zh: 本課程以深入淺出之方式，介紹與機器學習之相關技術及演算法，目標是修習本課程之學生具有閱讀機器學習相關文獻之基本知識，並能從事相關之實務或電腦模擬實驗之工作，因此本課程著重在廣泛介紹各類之演算法之應用，而非深究少數演算法之深奧數學原理．本課程涵蓋之演算法，包含：最佳化基本知識，隨機最佳化演算法，隨機搜尋，決策樹，隨機森林，類神經網路及深度學習相關演算法，基因演算法，貝氏定理及應用，高斯混合模型，隱藏式馬可夫鍊 (及訓練演算法，支援向量機，線性及邏輯回歸，分群方法，降維方法，提升方法，決策融合技巧，及增強式學習等．
description.en: This introductory course covers most of the techniques and algorithms related to the current trend in the machine learning field. The goal of this course is that students complete this course can read and understand the literature in the machine learning field, and can conduct computer simulations for experiments or apply the techniques to practical problems. Therefore, this course intends to cover a broad range of algorithms with emphasis on applications, rather than to cover only a few algorithms with extensive mathematical treatments. The algorithms covered in this course include: foundations of optiminizations, random search, decision tree, random decision forests, neural networks and deep learning, genetic algorithm, Bayes' theorem and its applications, Gauss mixture model, hidden Markov model (with its training algorithm), support vector machine, linear and logistic regressions, clustering algorithms, dimension reduction techniques (LDA, PCA, ICA, FA), boosting methods, decision

notes: 資工四、資工所合開

description.zh: 學習敏捷與精實軟體開發方法與敏捷實務作法。本課程將涵蓋下列主題：一、Scrum 方法二、終極編程方法三、看板方法四、終極編程核心與配套實務作法五、精實軟體開發實務做法
description.en: Students will learn Agile and Lean software development methods and agile practices. This course will cover the following topics:一、Scrum method二、XP method三、Kanban method四、XP primary and corollary practices五、Lean software development practices

description.zh: 本課程以深入淺出之方式，介紹與機器學習之相關技術及演算法，目標是修習本課程之學生具有閱讀機器學習相關文獻之基本知識，並能從事相關之實務或電腦模擬實驗之工作，因此本課程著重在廣泛介紹各類之演算法之應用，而非深究少數演算法之深奧數學原理．本課程涵蓋之演算法，包含：最佳化基本知識，隨機最佳化演算法，隨機搜尋，決策樹，隨機森林，類神經網路及深度學習相關演算法，基因演算法，貝氏定理及應用，高斯混合模型，隱藏式馬可夫鍊 (及訓練演算法)，支援向量機，線性及邏輯回歸，分群方法，降維方法，提升方法，決策融合技巧，及增強式學習等。
description.en: This course covers most of the techniques and algorithms related to the current trend in the machine learning field. The goal of the course is that students complete this course can read and understand the literature in the machine learning field, and can conduct computer simulations for experiments or apply the techniques to practical problems. Therefore, the course intends to cover a broad range of algorithms with emphasis on applications, rather than to cover only a few algorithms with extensive mathematical treatments. The algorithms covered in this course include: foundations of optimizations, random search, decision tree, random decision forests, neural networks and deep learning, genetic algorithm, Bayes' theorem and its applications, Gauss mixture model, hidden Markov model, support vector machine, linear and logistic regressions, clustering algorithms, dimension reduction techniques, boosting methods, decision level fusion techniques, and reinforcement learning.

notes: 資工四、資工所合開

description.zh: 1. 數位影像處理的基礎 2. 影像的轉換 3. 影像的加強 4. 影像的復原 5. 彩色影像的處理 6. 影像的壓縮 7. 影像的分割與特徵抽取 8. 影像的表達及描述 9. 影像的辨認與解釋 10. 導航與醫學影像
description.en: 1.Digital image fundamentals 2.Image transforms. 3.Image enhancement 4. Image restoration 5. Color image processing. 6. Image compression. 7. Image segmentation and feature detection 8. Representation and desciption 9. Recogmition and interpretation 10. Applications: ALV navigation and medical image.

notes: 資工四、資工所合開

description.zh: 一、簡介 (Outline) 二、導電材料 (Conductors) 三、電阻材料 (Resistors) 四、絕緣材料 (Insulators) 五、半導體材料 (Semiconductors) 六、介電材料 (Dielectrics) 七、磁性材料 (Magnetics) 八、壓電材料 (Piezoelectrics) 九、超導材料 (Superconductors) 十、感測材料 (Sensors)
description.en: This course is a special topics of Electronic Materials.

notes: 三選二項目

description.zh: 國際合作專題特論乃透過國際大師的講課，讓學生學習材料科學或資源工程相關領域的重要知識及了解最先進之研究成果或最新開發成品。
description.en: This course will provide important information regarding to the latest development or application in the materials science and mineral engineering. Speakers being invited are well-known international scholars in the related area.

description.zh: 專題報告、專題演講、研究小組討論。
description.en: Case Study. Seminar. Group meeting.

notes: 限碩二，修課人數為 35 名 材資館 5 樓演講廳

description.zh: 本課程主要是開設給已經修過 "粉末冶金學" 的學生，對粉末冶金製程與粉末冶金技術的應用有更進一步的認識。課程的安排在製程方面，強調粉末特性對粉末冶金製程的影響，成形模具的設計，燒結理論與現象，燒結体的後處理等。應用方面以本國現有的粉末冶金工廠與其製品為主，例如：機械零件、超硬工具材料、磁性材料、電接點材料、摩擦材料等製程的講述。
description.en: This course is a special topics of Topic of powder metallurgy.

description.zh: 介紹電機、電子以及電機機械的基礎概念。內容包括 (1) 電機工程介紹，(2) 電子電路基本原則：電荷、電流、電壓、功率、科希荷夫定律、歐姆定律，(3) 電阻性網路分析：節點電壓和網目電流、重疊定理、戴維寧和諾頓等效電路，(4) 交流網路分析：介紹儲能元件並分析由正弦電壓及電流所驅動的電路，(5) 暫態分析：探討在不同穩態條件下，電壓及電流的行為，(6) 交流電源：簡單交流電源的計算，以及電力的產生及分配。
description.en: Introduce to the principles of electrical, electronic, and electromechanical engineering. The context contains: (1) Introduction to electrical engineering, (2) Fundamentals of electric circuits: electric, current, voltage, power, and Kirchhoff's current and voltage laws, (3)Resistive network analysis: node analysis, mesh analysis, the principle of superposition, Thevenie and Norton equivalent circuits, (4)AC network analysis: energy storage circuit elements and the analysis of AC circuits excited by sinusoidal voltages and currents, (5)Transient analysis: describe the behavior of a voltage or a current between two distinct steady-state conditions, (6)AC power: simple AC power calculations and the generation and distribution of electric power.

description.zh: 泰勒多項式，求根法，數值微分與積分，差分式，誤差分析，矩陣分解，微分方程數值解，數值解軟體應用
description.en: Taylor series, equation solving, numerical differentiation and integration, difference equations, error analysis, matrix equation solving, solving differential equations, numerical code application

description.zh: 各種冷凍空調用熱交換器之介紹，熱交換器應用分析，熱交換增強簡介，鰭電分析，熱交換效率分析及熱交換器結垢問題分析。
description.en: Introduction to the heat exchangers used in HVAC & R, application of heat exchangers, heat exchange enhancement analysis, fin analysis, heat exchange efficiency analysis, and discussion on fouling of heat exchangers.

name.zh: 人機互動設計與技術實作
name.en: Human-Computer Interaction Design and Technical Practice

description.zh: 本課程旨在培養學生在人機互動設計中的運算思維與解決問題的能力。課程將針對設計背景學生在學習程式設計時的挑戰，藉由多階段的教學設計與工具輔助，降低程式學習門檻，促進學生跨領域整合能力，並提升其在設計與技術跨領域的創新實作能力。課程具體涵蓋以下教學目標：1. 促進運算思維能力與邏輯推理能力的發展 2. 提升學生學習程式設計之動機與自信心 3. 促進跨領域知識整合與應用能力 4. 提升學習動機與創新實作能力
description.en: This course aims to cultivate students' computational thinking and problem-solving skills in human-computer interaction design. It primarily targets students without an information technology background and addresses the challenges faced by design-background students in learning programming. Through multi-stage teaching design and tool assistance, the course reduces the barriers to programming learning, promotes cross-disciplinary integration, and enhances students' innovative implementation abilities in the intersection of design and technology. The course specifically covers the following objectives:1. Promote the development of computational thinking and logical reasoning abilities 2. Enhance students' motivation and confidence in learning programming 3. Facilitate cross-disciplinary knowledge integration and application 4. Boost learning motivation and innovative implementation abilities

notes: 排 PBL 教室，限 30 人修

description.zh: 本課程之目的為訓練學生有關電子設備散熱設計之相關原理與技術。介紹各項電子元件之發熱量、溫度與元件穩定性之關係，熱對流、熱輻射等熱傳原理在電子設備散熱之的應用法則；解說電子設備散熱器之演進與設計原理，如：熱管之原理與演進、小型風散之特性與設計原則等。探討電子設備的熱阻抗分析、溫度計算、熱應力分析，並介紹相關電腦輔助分析軟體。
description.en: This course introduces principles and techniques of thermal management and cooling design of electronic equipments. Subjects of this course include: thermal and physical properties of electronic components, thermo-fluid phenomena and principles of thermal management for electronic devices, and the evolution of cooling devices such as heat pipes and micro fans, discussion of analysis methodologies and computer software of thermal management problems including thermal resistances, temperature gradient, and thermal stress.

notes: 能源系和機電博合開

description.zh: 介紹電子、半導體、績體電路及數位技術的基本原理、及其應用。期使工業設計學生能具備 21 世紀微電子 e 世代產品新科技之基本知識。
description.en: A general introduce to the principle of Electronic technology, Semi-conductor, Integrated circuits, Digital technology, and their industrial applications. In order to equip design students with the basic knowledge of Micro-electronic with in the new Era.

description.zh: 設計領導係指領導設計與透過設計領導事業，環視益形挑戰與機會的設計創新環境，深具前瞻洞察力的願景與策略是贏得設計領導地位之關鍵因素。本課程含蓋相關文獻理論與實務案例，透過個案研討深入探究如何贏得企業設計領導競爭優勢與永續繁榮成功之道。
description.en: Design leadership means to design and to lead-to lead design and to lead business by design. Today, those responsible for design creation face leadership challenges and opportunities greater than ever before. Who should lead design? Who leads by design? How and why does a company "lead with design?" Design leadership has many interpretations, ranging from inspiration to collaboration and from culture to globalization. Design leadership is a commercial imperative. It creates differentiation, sustains competitive advantage, and enables world-class performance that is sustainable into the future.This course will provide the insight and interaction essential to utilizing design leadership for business success. Vision and strategy are the critical elements of leadership. It covers the strategy and the effects of inspiring design leadership and the personal characteristics and attributes of great design leaders.

notes: 設計博核心選修 (701-1 室)

name.en: Special Integration Topics on Technology in Cultural and Creative Industry

description.zh: 本課程旨在探討如何整合科技於文化創意產業，透過案例教學，幫助學生結合有效率的資訊科技工具於人文藝術，以發展文化創意產業，並創造高附加價值的效益。當今產、官、學、研都強調跨域整合的重要性，文創與互動科技的結合，能為文化創意作加值，並注入新生命、新體驗，因此，文創遇到科技後，所激盪出的火花與創意，已逐漸受到產、學界的青睞。本課程將探討文化創意的發展脈絡、文創的底蘊與其應用面、互動科技的應用，透過文獻研讀、案例分析等方式，瞭解國外最新研究與趨勢，討論文創與科技的創新應用可行性，引領文化創意產業轉型，規劃未來文創與科技整合的新契機。
description.en: The course intends to explore about how to integrate the technology into the cultural and creative Industries. Through case study, it will help students to combine efficient information technology tools in the field of arts and humanities, and also facilitate the development of cultural and creative industries, and create high value-added benefits for these industries. Today's industry, government, academia, research has emphasized the importance of cross-discipline consolidation. It means that cultural creation and interactive technology combined with value-added as a bonus for the cultural creation, and implant new life, new experiences. Therefore, when the cultural creation encounter technology, which bring out the spark and creativity, has gradually been favored both with industry and academia. This course will explore the cultural creative context, cultural inside information and its application, the interactive technology application by using the method of literature review, cas

notes: 設計博核心選修

description.zh: 本課程將討論材料凝固熱力學、材料凝固動力學、平衡及非平衡狀態下材料的凝固現象與凝固界面之溶質濃度分佈情形。課程最後會介紹凝固學在工業界的應用實例：單晶成長與鑄造工程。
description.en: This lecture will first discuss the Thermodynamics and Dynamics for Solidification in Materials under equilibrium and non-equilibrium states. Second, we will discuss the Solidification behavior and solutes distribution at the interface between solid and liquid. Finally, we will briefly introduce the applications of Solidification in industry cases: Single Crystal Growth and Casting engineering.

notes: 1 週【停開】

description.zh: 本課程以講授廢棄物之中間處理與最終處置之方法與技術為主，使學生瞭 解廢棄物妥善清除處理之原理，此包括: 1. 廢棄物種類與含義 2. 廢棄物分類 收集與清運 3. 焚化處理 4. 固化處理 5. 掩埋處置 6. 特殊處理方法 7. 廢棄物處理 廠之規劃.
description.en: To promote the knowledge of principle for students,the course ,Waste Treatment and Disposal,focuses on middle treatment and final disposal of waste. Contents of the course include:Definition and classification of waste.Storage and transportation,Incineration,Fixation,Landfill and Overall planning of treatmrnt plant.

description.zh: 寶石業為台灣新興的工業之一，集地質學、礦物學、結晶學、切割技術、商業行為及藝術美感於此門學問，寶石礦物的物理及化學性質和鑑定，寶石礦物的生成和產狀及其地理公布，如何加工，銷售行為如何進行，珠寶的設計方式及製造。寶石礦物之顏色分類，內含物之特色，光學現象之表現。人造寶石之製造與辨認，均讓學習者有能力鑑定其真偽，價值與市場行為。
description.en: Introduction the physics and chemistry properties of gemstones.

notes: 材資館 5F 演講廳

description.zh: 本課程之目的為增進學生之實務能力，學生必須利用暑假至機械、車輛、冷凍空調相關機構實習，參與校外合作企業或研發機構所提供之訓練，學習專業技術之運作。實習期滿後須由實習機構出具實習證明及成績考核。學生必須撰寫實習心得報告，再由指導教師依據學生之心得報告及現場訪評，撰寫實習成果報告交給系上保存，並給予評分。
description.en: The purpose of this course is to improve students' practical ability. Students must use summer vacation to practice in machinery, vehicles, refrigeration and air conditioning related institutions, participate in training provided by off-campus cooperative enterprises or R&D institutions, and learn the operation of professional technology. After the internship period expires, the internship institution must issue an internship certificate and performance assessment. Students must write an internship experience report, and then the instructor will write the internship achievement report to the department for preservation and score based on the student's experience report and on-site interview and evaluation.

notes: 限本專班學生參加，於 113-2 學期完成實習前置程序。

description.zh: 專題演講或書報討論
description.en: In this course, we will invite speakers from the academia, industry and government to lectures on topics in computer science and information engineering.

notes: 碩博合開，博士班

description.zh: 研究生在教授之個別指導下，針對特定研究主題進行研究 ，並將研究成果寫成論文。
description.en: Graduate students are required to complete a specific research topic under the instruction of their advisor(s). The results should be written as a thesis.

description.zh: 研究生在教授之個別指導下，針對特定研究主題進行研究 ，並將研究成果寫成論文。
description.en: Graduate students are required to complete a specific research topic under the instruction of their advisor(s). The results should be written as a thesis.

description.zh: 本課程內容包括通風系統基礎，工業通風，排煙設計，空氣過濾、送風系統設計及安裝與測試，以系統設計為重點。
description.en: The contents of this course include the fundamentals of ventilation system, industrial ventilation, exhaust design, air filtration, air moving system design, construction and testing, the focus of this course is on the system design.

description.zh: 本校體育課程目標為鍛鍊健全身心、促進身心健全發展、培養運動道德、發揚團隊精神及養成終身運動習慣。四技一、二年級實施專項分組教學，由具有專長之教師授課。開課項目：籃球、排球、桌球、羽球、保齡球、射箭、高爾夫球、網球、體操遊戲、慢速壘球、太極拳、國際標準舞、體適能、國術。學生得按自己興趣選擇修習。
description.en: All students are required to attend two hours per week of Physical Education class. This requirement applies to Freshman and Sophomore students, classes are interest-oriented, thus giving students the opportunity to select specific activities they are interested in. Choices include Basketball, Volleyball, Table Tennis, Badminton, Bowling, Archery, Golf, Tennis, Gymnastics, Slow pitch, Tai Chi Chuan, Ballroom Dancing, Physical Fitness and martial arts, to mention a few.

notes: 志願選填，請選：體育室 \ 體育專項

name.en: The Social and Cutural Characters in Taiwan

description.zh: 本課程的主要內容是涵括台灣社會與台灣文化兩大部份，台灣社會部份可分為早期台灣原住民社會，十七世紀以後漢人社會的建立，十九世紀從移民社會到定居社會，近代工商業社會的建立等幾部份；文化方面則以原住民文化，漢人文化及近代文化為教授重點，希望在一學期的課程中使學生對台灣的社會與文化有一概括性的了解。
description.en: This course primarily includes two major sections: Taiwan's society and Taiwan's culture. Taiwan's society is made up of early aboriginal society, Han immigrant society after 17th century, the society of settlement in 19th century and the establishment of industrial/commercial society after 1930. Taiwan's culture focuses on aboriginal culture, Han culture, and contemporary culture. This one-semester course provides students with the basic knowledge about the Taiwan's society and culture in the hope that the students would have a comprehensive understanding of the culture and society in Taiwan.

notes: 限本班生修讀

description.zh: 本課程希望在一學年中，能使學生對微分及積分有充分的瞭解、培養邏輯推理、啟發思考創造、強化計算演繹並注重應用與作圖，以建立同學未來學習工程數學及相關專業課程之數學基礎，充分達到學以致用的目的。課程內容包括：1. 極限與連續，2. 導數及其應用，3. 不定積分與定積分，4. 超越函數及其反函數，5. 積分法則，6. 不定型與瑕積分，7. 定積分的應用，8. 空間幾何與向量微積分，9. 偏導數，10. 重積分。
description.en: This course aims at developing comprehension of Derivation and Integral、activating capabilities of Logic Inference and Induction、enlightening confidence and independence、strengthening calculating abilities with an emphasis on its application and diagram、furnishing a sound basis for future specialty. The content includes: 1.Limits and Continuity, 2.Derivative and Application, 3.Indefinite and Definite Integral, 4.Transcendental Functions and their Inverses, 5.Techniques of Integration, 6.Indeterminate Forms and Improper Integral, 7.Application of Integration, 8.Basic Vector Analysis, 9.Partial Derivative, 10.Multiple Integration.

description.zh: 本校之普通物理課程專為工程科系背景之同學設計，主要的目的是鼓勵同學參與大自然運行奧秘、法則之探索，並供給爾後修習專業課程之堅實基礎。本課程之內容包含力學、熱力學、聲學、電磁學、光學及近代物理。教授者可按每週三小時、二個學期的時間設計、再參酌各系不同之需求、加強或節略某些章節。
description.en: The course is designed for the students with engineering background. The theme of this course is to encourage students to participate in the discovery of laws and wonder of nature, and to solidate the foundation for the particular courses of study for different departments. The contents of this course include mechanics, dynamics, thermodynamics, electromagnetics, optics, and foundation of modern physics, etc.. The lecturers will emphasize or abridge certain contents based on the individual needs of departments. For this course, there will be 3 credits for each of two semesters, and 3 lecture hours per week.

description.zh: 本課程的目的是為了：1. 驗證物理理論之真實性，2. 培養同學認真的科學態度與方法，3. 培養同學數據處理的能力，4. 啟發同學自行設計解決量度問題的方法。課程之施行分為上下兩學期，每一學期為一學分三小時。上學期的內容偏重力學、波動、熱力、流力之實驗，下學期的內容則偏重電磁、光學、近物之實驗。
description.en: In this course there will be 1 credit for each of two semesters, and 3 laboraborial hours per week. The first semester experiments involve mechanics, dynamics, thermodynamics, and waves, etc.. The second semester experiments contains electromagnetics, optics, and modern physics, etc.. The purposes of this course are 1: to identify the physical laws, 2:to cultivate the ability of data reduction of students, 4: to instruct the students solving the problems of measurements of measurements by self-designments.

name.en: Introduction to Railroad Vehicle and Electrical System

description.zh: 電氣化軌道系統簡介，捷運系統演進，捷運系統概論，機電介面，電聯車，列車機械動態與界限，列車運動性能與電力負載，列車供電方式，牽引供電系統設計簡介，號誌系統，通訊系統簡介，機廠簡介。
description.en: Electrified Railway system introduction, Evolution of transit railway systems, Transit railway system structure, Vehicle electrical interfaces, Train-track dynamics, Train dynamic envelop, Vehicle power feeds, Traction power supply, Signaling Systems, Communication systems, Depot and maintenance shop introduction.

notes: 三合，預選限 30 人。(一) 34 思源講堂、(二) 6 在綜科 216A

name.en: Introduction to Artificial Intelligence and Internet of Things Applications

description.zh: 本課程聚焦於人工智慧（AI）與物聯網（IoT）的整合應用，並以 Arduino 作為核心開發平台，培養學生在智慧物聯網（AIoT）領域的基礎應用觀念，重點包括嵌入式系統、AIoT 架構、即時數據處理、物聯網及資訊安全性。課程從 Arduino 硬體架構與感測器技術出發，介紹各類通訊介面（如 Wi-Fi、Bluetooth、LoRa），學習如何進行資料收集、分析與遠端控制。同時，課程將涵蓋人工智慧基礎，並探討如何透過 AI 技術提升 IoT 設備的智能決策能力。學生將透過觀念理解、案例介紹與理論基礎，了解完整的 AIoT 開發流程。
description.en: This course focuses on the integration of Artificial Intelligence (AI) and the Internet of Things (IoT), with Arduino as the core development platform. It aims to equip students with fundamental knowledge in the field of Artificial Intelligence of Things (AIoT), covering key topics such as embedded systems, AIoT architecture, real-time data processing, IoT communication, and cybersecurity. The course begins with an introduction to Arduino hardware architecture and sensor technologies, followed by an exploration of various communication interfaces, including Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, and LoRa. Students will learn how to collect, analyze, and remotely manage data. Additionally, the course covers the fundamentals of AI and examines how AI technologies can enhance the intelligent decision-making capabilities of IoT devices. Through conceptual understanding, case studies, and theoretical foundations, students will gain a comprehensive understanding of the AIoT development process.

notes: 電機三合開，預選限 40 人。

description.zh: 影像處理、光學檢測、移動式機器人聲納避障、移動式機器人視覺控制、移動式機器人建圖、移動式機器人導航、機器臂自動物件抓取與放置、期末專題提案簡報、期末專題實驗展示、期末專題報告。
description.en: Image processing, Optical inspection, Obstacle avoidance of mobile robots with sonar, Vision-based control of mobile robots, Mobile robotic mapping, Mobile robotic navigation, Automated bin picking and placing with manipulators, Final project proposals and presentations, Final project implementation and demonstration, Final project reports.

notes: 電機四合開，預選限 36 人。

description.zh: 本課程主要敘述數位語音訊號的處理技術及語音相關應用。討論的課題主要包括語音分析的基本聲學原理如發音模型與語音特徵分析，以及語音編碼、語音合成、語音辨認等重要應用。
description.en: This course is intended to introduce the fundamentals of speech signal processing and related applications. The topics it will address include speech production model, extraction and evaluation of speech features, basic principles of speech analysis and synthesis, speech coding, and speech recognition, etc.

name.zh: 高等類比積體電路設計

description.zh: 電容切換式電路、振盪器、濾波器、鎖相迴路、非線性與匹配效應、短通道效應與元件模型、類比電路佈局與包裝
description.en: Switched-capacitor circuits, Oscillators, Continuous-time filters, Phase-locked loop, Nonlinearity and mismatch, Short-channel effects and device models, Layout and packaging for analog IC.

notes: 電機碩班、半導體學位學程合開

description.zh: 此課程主要是含蓋無線通訊基頻訊號處理的理論基礎與系統架構，探討無線通道所能提供的通道容量以及可靠通訊。而大部分的課程內容會以目前熱門的多輸入多輸出 (MIMO) 傳輸為背景而進行探討。課程綱要如下：1. 無線通道模型 2. 多樣性 3. 通道容量 4.MIMO I: 空間多工 5.MIMO II: 通道容量與多工架構 6.MIMO III: 多樣性與多工間取捨 7.MIMO IV: 多使用者通訊
description.en: This course provides thefundamental theories and architectures for baseband wireless communications. It is concerned that how reliable communication can be achieved and what is the capacity a channel can provide. Much attention will be focused on the newly developed technology, referred to as multiple-inputmultiple-output (MIMO) transmission.Course outline:1.The Wireless Channel 2.Diversity3.Capacity of Wireless Channels4.MIMO I: Spatial Multiplexing 5.MIMO II: Capacity and Multiplexing Architectures6.MIMO III: Diversity-Multiplexing Tradeoff7.MIMO IV: Multiuser Communication

description.zh: 1. 簡介 2. 線性區段碼 3. 循環碼 4. 迴旋碼 5. 編碼調變
description.en: 1.Introduction2.Linear Block Codes3.Cyclic Codes4.Convolutional Codes5.Coded Modulation

description.zh: 本課程介紹電腦科學中圖形識別的基本原理與相關技術，使學生了解各種圖形識別的分類方法，經由對分類問題的分析，瞭解如何將輸入樣本依不同特性加以分類，並熟悉圖形識別系統之相關議題如：分割、特徵擷取、分類、後處理、訓練、監督 / 非監督式學習、機器學習，進而了解分類問題，增進其解決實際圖形識別分類問題的能力。課程內容包括下列課題：圖形識別概論，Bayesian Decision Theory, Maximum-Likelihood, 非參數法學習，K-Nearest Neighbor Estimation, The Nearest-Neighbor Rule, Positive Boolean Function 多分類器，Linear Discriminant Functions，高維資料分類，分類正確率評估 (Accuracy Assessments) 及其他重要的應用，例如：文件分析、生物辨識、影像監控、遙測影像分類、醫療診斷、資料探勘等概念，最後並透過相關論文的研讀及討論，了解近代圖形識別的最新發展趨勢。
description.en: The course includes: Introduction to Pattern Recognition, Bayesian Decision Theory, Maximum-Likelihood & Bayesian Parameter Estimation, Non-Parametric Classification - Density Estimation, K-Nearest Neighbor Estimation, The Nearest-Neighbor Rule, Multi-Classifier - Positive Boolean Function, Linear Discriminant Functions, Pattern Recognition of High Dimensional Data Sets, Pattern Recognition for Remote Sensing Images, Biometric Certification, Video Surveillance, Accuracy Assessments and Other Related Topics.

notes: 電機所、電資學生班和創新 AI 合開

description.zh: 讓學生對於模糊邏輯、模糊推論有一整體性了解，並對於將模糊邏輯在控制工程之應用具有理論與軟體撰寫之能力。
description.en: 1. To familiarize students with fuzzy logic and fuzzy inference. 2. To familiarize students with designing controllers based on fuzzy inference. 3. To familiarize students with system modeling through fuzzy rules.

notes: 電機、自動化所合開

description.zh: 1. 簡介 2. 類神經網路（ANN）應用 2-1 ANN 基礎 2-2 類神經網路 3. 模糊邏輯基礎 3-1 模糊邏輯基礎 3-2 模糊控制應用 4. 基因演算法 4-1 概述 4-2 基因演算法在控制器調制之應用
description.en: 1 Introduction2 Application of artificial neural networks (ANN)2-1 ANN fundamentals2-2 Neur-control3 Fuzzy logic control3-1 Fuzzy logic basics3-2 Application of Fuzzy Control4 Genetic algorithms4-1 Preliminarg 4-2 Tuning of Controllers using genetic algorithms

notes: 預選限 15 人。

description.zh: 先修課程：負責教授同意。工程最佳化方法導論、線性規劃法、非線性規劃法、多目標函數最佳化、近代數學規劃法介紹、精密機電元件與系統之最佳設計。
description.en: Engineering Optimization Concepts, Linear Programming Methods, Nonlinear Programming Methods, Multi-objective Optimization, Introduction to Modern Mathematical Programming Techniques, and Optimum Design of Precision Machine Components and Systems.

notes: 自動化所和機電博班合開

name.zh: 進階 C 語言實務

description.zh: C 語言為開發作業系統、嵌入式系統、通訊協定等程式最常使用的程式語言，本課程主要教導 C 程式語言於實務上之應用，課程內容主要包括：進階指標使用、指標與陣列、指標與資料結構、Pointer-to-pointer、指標函式、Callback function、Bitwise operation 應用等，除了於 PC 上撰寫程式練習之外，亦會有 case study 來輔助教學以及了解 C 語言的使用技巧，期末亦會要求學生利用所學習到之技巧來模擬 CPU 排程與記憶體管理等相關作業系統底層程式。
description.en: The C programming language is commonly used to implement operation systems, embedded systems, and communication protocols. The object of this course is to teach how to apply the C programming language to develop real application systems. The contents of this course include advanced pointer usage, pointer and array, pointer and data structure, pointer-to-pointer, function pointer, callback functions, bitwise operations, and so on. In addition to practice on PC, this course also offers case studies for better understanding. Students will also be required to implement emulators to simulate OS lower level operations, e.g., CPU scheduling and memory management.

description.zh: 一、應力及應變分析。 二、線彈性破壞理論。 三、黏彈性破壞理論。 四、岩石動態行為。 五、岩石材料性質。六、岩體特性。七、大地應力應變現地量測。八、岩石模型。九、岩石爆破與開挖。十、地下工程設計及施工。十一、監測系統。
description.en: 一、Stress and strain analysis二、Linear elastical failure theory三、Visco-elastic failure theory四、Dynamics behavior of rocks五、Rock properties六、Rock behavior七、In-situ stress and strain measurement八、Rock model九、Rock blasting and excavation十、Underground engineering operation十一、Monitoring system

description.zh: 探討物質表面之化學結構及性質，相關的理論基礎及技術。
description.en: This course will discuss the basic theories and techniques about the chemical structure and properties of material's surface.

description.zh: 本課程著重在奈米材料的合成以及鑑定，包含氣相反應以及溶液相反應。課程核心內容為：(1) 各式溶液相合成奈米粉末、中空奈米球以及奈米線 (2) 氣相反應合成奈米管、奈米線 (3) 分子轉印技術 (4) 奈米材料檢測技術
description.en: This course will cover the syntheses and characterization of various nanomaterials. The core lectures include:1. syntheses of nanoparticles, hollow nanospheres and nanowires from solutions2. syntheses of nanowires and nanotubes from the gas phase3. molecular imprinting4. characterization and properties of nanomaterials

description.zh: 本課程以講授工業用計算機網路中實體層、媒體存取控制與邏輯連結層為主。在實體層中，將討論到目前廣泛於工業上使用的實體媒介。在媒體存取控制上，則討論乙太網路，記號匯流排與記號環網路為主。媒體存取控制也包含目前廣泛於各類控制器上使用的控制區域網路 (CAN Bus)。在邏輯連結層上，主要討論路由器使用的路由協定與路由演算法。
description.en: The main subjects of this course include physical layer, media access control and logic link layer. Popular physical layer medium are discussed first. Media access control sub-layer that includes Ether-Net, Token Bus and Token Ring are the main subjects in the second portion. The contents of the media access control also include CAN bus which is widely used in various controllers. Routing protocol used by routers are discussed in third portion of this course.

description.zh: 奈米科技在近年來有極快的進展，因此在本課程將介紹最新的奈米材料，包含有量子點、奈米碳材 (富勒烯、奈米碳管、石墨烯)、二維奈米材料 (二硫化鉬與金屬化) 等，對於這些奈米材料的物理、化學與光電特性以及製程方法做進一步的介紹，以期許可以帶給同學當今最新的奈米化技術與科技知識。
description.en: Nanotechnology has a great progress in recent years. This class will introduce the latest information about nanomaterials and their applications. The nanomaterials include quantum dots, fullerene, carbon nanotube, graphene and molybdenum disulfide (MoS2). Their physical, chemical and optoelectronic properties will be comprehensively introduced. We expect to bring the knowledge of newest nanomaterials and technologies to students.

notes: 先教室；網路預選限 25 人 (大學部); 化工四、所合開

description.zh: 簡介，感測器，基本驅動器，順序及計時控制，PLC，伺服驅動器及放大器，基本伺服控制系統。
description.en: Course Title:Mechatronics PracticeDescription:To familiarize students with the usage of mechatronictechniques and corresponding parts/components

notes: 電機三合開，預選限 50 人。

description.zh: 講授工程圖之基本原理及規則，並佐以必要之工程設計知識與 AutoCAD 繪圖技巧，培養學生具備熟練與有效率地將設計構想以工程圖方式正確表達的能力。
description.en: An introductory course providing the student with fundamental information, understanding and skills mainly in orthographic projection. Theories and principles of engineering drawing will be specifically introduced and concurrent with the practice of drafting for industrial design.

notes: 家室組，請勿選錯組

description.zh: 掌握形式從屬機能旨意，熟悉施作技術限制與創意可行性，學習從設計到實作的落實，透過各種機械設備操作、加工技術學習，實際接觸及操作真實材料，了解材料種類、性質、加工過程、組裝知識、技術與美學等，以呈現設計作品之原型與成品。
description.en: Based on “Form follows Function”, student will learn interacts and limitations among technology feasibility and creative application, in order to master sequential implementations form design ideas to real works. Students are required to operate various mechanical equipment and processing technologies, thus to realize the types and nature of the materials, processing procedure, as well as the assembly of knowledge, technologies and aesthetics to format intended design prototypes and establishments.

notes: 家室組 (木工廠)，請勿選錯組

name.zh: 計算生物學及醫學資訊

description.zh: 本課程主要教授與計算生物學及醫學資訊學相關之重要主題。 學生能夠了解如何正確分析生物和醫學數據所衍伸的問題及應用。 希望透過課程協助同學了解和學習如何組裝基因體資料和醫學數據分析中經常使用的演算法技術內容，閱讀最新相關生醫技術論文及使用開放工具，增進實際操作之經驗或自行建構分析生醫相關資料之應用系統。
description.en: This course is designed to provide important topics in computational biology and medical informatics. Students are able to learn about problems involved in the generation and analysis of biological and medical data. The course intends to provide good understanding of the commonly used algorithms and public tools in the analysis of genomic and medical data, to read updated scientific reports, and to increase hands-on experiences with accessing and using relevant databases.

notes: 計中電腦教室

name.zh: 創新思維執行力實務應用
name.en: Practices and applications of TRIZ innovative thinking

description.zh: 在現今產業激烈競爭與利潤微薄之階段，落實執行 "突破創新" 以增加競爭力之唯一生存之道，但鮮少有企業真正瞭解與實際地徹底執行它。不僅工程或服務技術要創新，管理思維更要突破創新，以有效迅速解？錯綜複雜的研發、工程與管理之諸多矛盾問題。本課程以創新構思問題解？法 (TRIZ) 為基礎，詳細介紹工程技術如何落實創新與管理實務創新如何執行。本課程適用於自有品牌業者、ODM 或 OEM 製造業者、服務業者與學術單位教學研究，特點如下：完整詳實闡述 TRIZ 理論並輔以大量簡單案例說明 TRIZ 概念、工程 TRIZ 實務案例 10 餘個與 TRIZ 工程與管理之參數與創新原則說明簡例約 800 餘個，管理實務案例 20 餘個，包含研發管理、服務業管理、專案管理與生產管理等。案例與簡例最多，創新執行力可快速上手與實施應用。本課程 TRIZ 研發、工程與管理兼顧，製造業與服務業高層、中層與基層員工皆符合讀者條件，使 "突破創新" 輕易實務執行並成為企業文化，亦適用於大學與研究所之工管、企管 (經營管理)、工商管與工程相關科系，可自行按需求選擇性深入教授講解某些章節，也替產業界事先磨練一群創新思維之活力新血，可長久伴隨您在職場 (或未來進入職場) 解決研發、工程與管理之困難矛盾問題。
description.en: The aim of this course is to show how to implement TRIZ to resolve conflicts in Product R&D, engineering, and management tactic in a innovative thinking manner. TRIZ has been well-known as a creative and innovative thinking theory in solving engineering and technology contradictions in the last two decades. However, few studies and practical usage were proposed in Product R&D, management area. Nearly 30 real cases are discussed to demonstrate the ideas guided by TRIZ in product R&D management, engineering technology, Project management, Service industry management, and Production management. This course is able to pre-train a lot of students creative way and solve contradiction for further applications in real career.

notes: 工管三甲乙合開，計中電腦教室

description.zh: 本課程將以近期著作權法著名案例的評析，培養學生關鍵的基礎能力，再導入若該著作為人工智慧自行創作或人類以人工智慧為輔具所創作之法律爭議，鼓勵學生從比較法考察及跨域科法整合之觀點，剖析立法、司法或行政所面臨的問題，並探求可能解決問題的具體措施或建議方案。
description.en: This course will analyze recent well-known copyright cases, expecting that relevant fundamental capability of students can be built. Further, legal issues will be introduced in dealing with the copyright work created by AI itself, or created by human beings who are aided by AI. Besides, efforts will be made to encourage students to analyze the problems encountered in legislative, judiciary, and administrative sectors, with considerations on comparative law and with viewpoints from integration of law and technology, and to propose concrete measures and suggestions that may help to solve the problems.

name.en: Economic Analyses of Intellectual Property Rights

description.zh: 本課程將介紹經濟分析之研究方法，不僅探討為何經濟分析之研究方法受到重視外，還會討論以經濟分析之研究方法，來具體檢視著作權、專利權、商標權、營業秘密等相關之智慧財產權，以達成理論與實際並重之教學目的。
description.en: This course will be introductions regarding research methods of economic analyses. This course not only why this research methods of economic analyses are important, but also discusses copyright, patent, trademark, and trade secrets, etc. Purpose of this course is both to put emphasis on theories and practices for teaching.

name.zh: 國際貿易與智財專題研究

description.zh: 智慧財產是國際貿易中的重要一環，近 20 年來，由於知識經濟的發展與國際多邊條約的興起，國際架構下的智財法制愈形重要。各國無不苦思如何在保護主義與自由貿易之間取得平衡，此時研究國際貿易角力下的智財發展，具有相當意義。本課程即在提供學生對重要國際組織與條約下所形成的智財法制的基本了解，並由實務案例的討論中，帶領同學分析國際智財法制對國家經濟、法規面的影響。
description.en: Intellectual Property has played an important role as an integral part of the international trade, and its significance has been increasing over the past two decades contributed by the burgeoning international treaties and knowledge-driven economic models. While individual nations struggle to achieve national prosperity by striking a balance between protectionism and free trade, the changes in intellectual property law and policy under the tussle of international trade are worth of our close attention. This course intends to provide students with a general understanding on both the theories and practice of intellectual property legal regimes within the context of international trade. Students will learn how the frameworks of intellectual property law and policy affect the societies and economies of individual member states of international treaties. By drawing selected cases for discussion, students will further be equipped with abilities to analyze the impact of international treati

name.zh: 文化產業與智慧財產權
name.en: Cultural Industry and Intellectual Property Rights

description.zh: 本課程所定義的文化產業包括音樂產業、電視產業、電影產業、劇場產業和其他表演藝術有關的產業。這些產業區塊都存在相關的智慧財產權議題，例如所有權、權利轉讓、合理使用、侵權行為、契約爭議等等。本課程將透過法院判決的選讀與產業案例研究來讓學生認識文化產業的智慧財產權議題。學生將被要求參與討論。評分方式包括課堂參與和報告。
description.en: The scope of the cultural industry covered by this course includes the music industry, film industry, television industry, theatre industry, and other industries related to performing arts. Intellectual property issues do exist in these industrial sectors. The issues include ownership, title transfer, fair use, infringement, contract dispute, and so on. This course is intended to expose students to various IP issues in the cultural industry through studying court decisions and discussing industrial case studies. Students are required to participate in discussion. The grading policy is based on class participation and essay paper.

description.zh: 本課程主要包括下列主題：1. 全球企業發展的外在環境、2. 全球技術突破與創新產業、3. 各國研發創新及品牌智財策略、4.IP 產業建置、5. 全球品牌智財市場、6. 全球企業及其智財管理的規劃與移轉、7. 創新研發的保護方式、8. 協同合作與獨立作業的比較、9. 兼顧節稅的智慧財產權開發模式、10. 跨國視野下的法律議題、11. 企業智財部門規劃、12. 併購與智財授權管理、13. 品牌智財的財務價值、14. 著名全球企業智財管理模式。
description.en: This course will focus on the following topics: 1.external environments for corporate developments, 2.new technologies and innovative enterprises, 3. R&D and branding polices of major countries, 4. the establishment of IP industries, 5. global branding markets, 6. the plan and transfer of global enterprises & IP location, 7. the protection of R&D, 8.the choice between joint and individual R&D, 9. tax plan for IP development, 10.IP plan for international industries, 11, the establishment of IP department, 12.M&A and IP, 13.the evaluation of brands & IP, 14.the IP management of well-known global enterprises,

name.zh: 深度學習與太空科技應用

description.zh: 太空科技應用課程旨在介紹太空技術在各種應用領域的應用，並探討太空科技如何影響人類生活和科學研究。課程涵蓋的主題包括：太空探索，地球觀測，通訊和衛星導航，太空工程和材料科學，太空生物學和醫學，太空經濟和商業。通過這些主題的介紹，學生將了解太空科技在各個領域的應用和未來發展方向，並能夠掌握相關技術和知識。
description.en: The Space Technology Application Course aims to introduce the application of space technology in various fields, and explore how space technology impacts human life and scientific research. The course covers topics including space exploration, Earth observation, communication and satellite navigation, space engineering and materials science, space biology and medicine, and space economy and business. Through the introduction of these topics, students will understand the application of space technology in various fields and future development directions, and be able to master relevant technologies and knowledge.

description.zh: 「太空軟體系統設計」課程旨在培養學生在太空任務中設計、開發和操作軟體系統的專業能力。學生將深入了解太空環境對軟體系統的特殊要求，包括真空、輻射、溫度等因素對系統性能的影響。課程將探討飛行軟體的設計和架構，學生將學習如何設計出能夠在極端條件下穩定運行的飛行軟體系統，確保太空任務的順利執行。此外，課程將涵蓋軟體驗證和確認技術，學生將學習如何確保軟體系統的功能性和安全性，並掌握各種測試方法和工具的應用。課程還將關注容錯和自我修復能力的設計，學生將學習如何設計具有容錯和自我修復功能的軟體系統，以應對可能的故障情況。最後，課程將介紹太空軟體系統的專案管理和實施，學生將學習如何有效地管理軟體開發專案，確保項目按時交付並符合品質標準。此外，課程還將包括深度學習在太空軟體系統中的應用，學生將探索如何利用深度學習技術來改進太空任務中的軟體系統設計和性能，以及酬載資料處理軟體的設計和開發，以支援太空任務中的資料收集和分析。通過本課程的學習，學生將具備設計和開發太空軟體系統所需的技能和知識，為未來在太空工程或相關領域的工作做好準備。
description.en: The course "Space Software System Design" aims to cultivate students' professional abilities in designing, developing, and operating software systems for space missions. Students will gain in-depth understanding of the special requirements that the space environment imposes on software systems, including the impact of factors such as vacuum, radiation, and temperature on system performance. The course will explore the design and architecture of flight software, teaching students how to design flight software systems that can operate stably under extreme conditions, ensuring the smooth execution of space missions. Additionally, the course will cover software verification and validation techniques, enabling students to ensure the functionality and safety of software systems and master various testing methods and tools.

description.zh: 材料科學為工程教育的重要科技，材料的性質與特性，為現代工程設計中佔有相當重要的地位，金屬材料的各種性質，都基於其內部構造的變化，其內部原子聚集成規則的結晶構造，亦或聚集成非結晶構造，其所形成的各種物理特性，由最基本的結晶構造開始了解。電子顯微鏡，破壞力學，超導性，電傳導，超塑性，動態回復，動態時效應變。差排理論、結晶核的形成與成長，合金相理論，晶界自由度，鑄造物的成核與均質化，硬化現象，固體擴散現象，破壞現象及理論，潛變的形成與原因等，充分了解金屬材料特性上的理論基礎與變化軌跡。
description.en: Properties and characteristics of materials play important role in modern engineering design.Each property of materials is based on its transformation at inner structure, its atoms inside converge either a regulated crystal structure or a noncrystal structure, their physical property should be understood from the most fundamental crystalline structure, such as electronic microscope, destructive dynamics, super-conductivity, electronic conductivity, super-plasticity, dynamic recovery, dynamic aging strain , dislocation theory, the formation and growth of nucleus, alloy phase theory, degree of freedom of crystal boundary , nucleation and homogenization of casting product, hardening phenomenon, solid diffusion phenomenon, destructive phenomenon and theory, creep formation and its reason, all of these make student fully understand the theory basis and change record of the metallic material characteristics.

notes: 請排四教教室

description.zh: 導論及 AI 之工業應用、類神經網路及專家系統搜尋法則、敘述邏輯、驗證、機器學習。
description.en: Introduction of AI in industrial applications, Neural Networks, Searching algorithm of expert systems, Statement logic, Testing, Machine learning.

notes: 機械三合開；限 60 人

description.zh: 本課程提供大一學生必備之英語文語言技巧，強調專業領域之英文溝通能力之訓練。課程內容依學院專業內容區分，並整合英語文之聽、說、讀、寫之能力，提升英語文在專業領域的應用。
description.en: This course equips first-year students with essential English language skills, focusing on developing their communication abilities in specific professional fields. The content is customized to each college's discipline and integrates the four language skills (listening, speaking, reading, and writing), thereby enhancing the application of English in professional contexts.

notes: 請選校院級課程 \ 大一學院專業英文 (一)

description.zh: 本校體育課程目標為鍛鍊健全身心、促進身心健全發展、培養運動道德、發揚團隊精神及養成終身運動習慣。四技一、二年級實施專項分組教學，由具有專長之教師授課。開課項目：籃球、排球、桌球、羽球、保齡球、射箭、高爾夫球、網球、體操遊戲、慢速壘球、太極拳、國際標準舞、體適能、國術。學生得按自己興趣選擇修習。
description.en: All students are required to attend two hours per week of Physical Education class. This requirement applies to Freshman and Sophomore students, classes are interest-oriented, thus giving students the opportunity to select specific activities they are interested in. Choices include Basketball, Volleyball, Table Tennis, Badminton, Bowling, Archery, Golf, Tennis, Gymnastics, Slow pitch, Tai Chi Chuan, Ballroom Dancing, Physical Fitness and martial arts, to mention a few.

notes: 請選：體育室 \ 體育專項

name.zh: 學院指定向度 - 人文與藝術
name.en: College designated dimension curriculum：Humanities and Art

description.zh: 各學院指定向度學分規定如下：機電學院：人文與藝術向度課程 4 學分、社會與法治向度課程 4 學分、創新與創業向度課程 4 學分。電資學院：人文與藝術向度課程 4 學分、自然與科學向度課程 4 學分、創新與創業向度課程 4 學分。工程學院：人文與藝術向度課程 4 學分、社會與法治向度課程 4 學分、創新與創業向度課程 4 學分。管理學院：人文與藝術向度課程 4 學分、社會與法治向度課程 4 學分、自然與科學向度課程 4 學分。設計學院：人文與藝術向度課程 4 學分、社會與法治向度課程 4 學分、創新與創業向度課程 4 學分。
description.en: The dimension credits stipulated by each college are as follows：CMEE：4 credits for the humanities and art curriculum, 4 credits for the Social and Rules of Law curriculum, and 4 credits for the innovation and entrepreneurship curriculum.EECS：4 credits for the humanities and art curriculum, 4 credits for the nature and science curriculum, and 4 credits for the innovation and entrepreneurship curriculum.College of Engineering：4 credits for the humanities and art curriculum, 4 credits for the Social and Rules of Law curriculum, and 4 credits for the innovation and entrepreneurship curriculum.College of Management：4 credits for the humanities and art curriculum, 4 credits for the Social and Rules of Law curriculum, and 4 credits for the nature and science curriculum.College of Design： 4 credits for the humanities and art curriculum, 4 credits for the Social and Rules of Law curriculum, and 4 credits for the innovation and entrepreneurship curriculum.CHASS：4 credits for t

notes: 請選：通識中心 / 博雅課程

name.zh: 學院指定向度 - 創新與創業
name.en: College designated dimension curriculum：Innovation and Entrepreneurship

description.zh: 學院指定向度 - 創新與創業
description.en: 各學院指定向度學分規定如下：機電學院：人文與藝術向度課程4學分、社會與法治向度課程4學分、創新與創業向度課程4學分。電資學院：人文與藝術向度課程4學分、自然與科學向度課程4學分、創新與創業向度課程4學分。工程學院：人文與藝術向度課程4學分、社會與法治向度課程4學分、創新與創業向度課程4學分。管理學院：人文與藝術向度課程4學分、社會與法治向度課程4學分、自然與科學向度課程4學分。設計學院：人文與藝術向度課程4學分、社會與法治向度課程4學分、創新與創業向度課程4學分。人社學院：社會與法治向度課程4學分、自然與科學向度課程4學分、創新與創業向度課程4學分。修完學院指定向度課程12學分，剩餘6學分可在人文與藝術向度、社會與法治向度、自然與科學向度及創新與創業向度自由修滿，達到通識畢業18學分。

notes: 請選：通識中心 / 博雅課程

description.zh: 以英語語言、教學法、及學生在專業領域的英語需求為主軸，專業英文 ESP 系列課程涵蓋以下關鍵面向：學術英文、專業實踐 / 應用英文、內容和語言整合英文教學，議題與趨勢，以及語言技巧能力。 此系列課程專為本校大二修習校訂共同英文的學生設計，強化英語能力，並應用英文於專業領域之發展。
description.en: Drawing upon the English language, pedagogy, students’ needs for English in specialized domains, the ESP series encompass the following key dimensions: English for general academic purposes, English for professional practice / application, content and language integrated learning, issues and trends, and integrative language skills for testing and communication. The courses are designed for the second year (sophomore), non-native English speaking students to strengthen their English competence and become more proficient in their fields of study.

notes: 請選校院級課程 \ 大二專業英文 (一)
