The content is customized to each college's discipline and integrates the four language skills (listening, speaking, reading, and writing), thereby enhancing the application of English in professional contexts.

notes: 請選校院級課程 \ 大一學院專業英文 (一)

description.zh: 1. 授課目的： 現代都市計劃及都市設計作業內容中，必須考量都市永續環境生態之議題。本課程之目的即在於傳述都市之生態概念在規劃實務上之應用，並探討其作業技術內容及其行政程序，以培養學生永續都市及敷地計畫規劃能力。2. 授課內容： 由基本永續都市中，思考生態環境、人類生活環境及建築之間的相互關係。綠建築、永續都市之內容。引介各項生態技術原理及其指標講授，進而指導實證操作技術實驗並撰寫論文，再而論證其都計管制規範。3. 作業練習： 本學期藉由實驗操作、論文報告撰寫，特別著重研討式論辯，訓練學術思辯及技術應用規劃能力，以利學生認識都市生態技術及都計行政作業之整體關聯性，進而建立其全方位規劃思辯能力。
description.en: This course focuses on the issues of the environmental planning, green buildings and sustainable urban design. Its major content includes: 1. Study of relation between Ecosystem, human environment and architecture, 2. essay of Green Building and Sustainable Cities, 3. The case study of Green Building design and Sustainable City Planning.

description.zh: 聯合國教科文組織於 1972 年通過了《世界遺產公約》，旨在保護世界文化和自然遺產，並將保護和保存文化財產的概念連結起來。五十年來，世界遺產經歷多次變革，觀念與行動與時俱進，1992 年，文化景觀概念正式確立，承認人與環境的相互作用和共生關係，縫合了長街以來自然和文化的割裂。2001 年，全球文化多樣性宣言的通過，文化在不同時代和不同地方具有各種不同的表現形式，這種多樣性的具體表現，構成人類各群體和各社會具有的獨特性和多樣化。受此影響，文化景觀、無形遺產、水下遺產、產業遺產、文化路徑、聖山遺產、天文遺產紛紛出現。本課程屬建築保存應用課程，將介紹不同主題的世界遺產案例，其目的除了引領同學認識世界遺產觀念及思潮變遷外，亦對國內文化資產保存的學習有所啟發與反省。
description.en: UNESCO adopted the World Heritage Convention in 1972 to protect world cultural and natural heritage and link the concepts of protection and preservation of cultural property. Over the past fifty years, World Heritage has undergone many changes, and concepts and actions have kept pace with the times. In 1992, the concept of cultural landscape was formally established, recognizing the interaction and symbiotic relationship between people and the environment, and sewing up the separation between nature and culture since the Long Street. In 2001, the Global Declaration on Cultural Diversity was adopted. Culture has different forms of expression in different times and places. The specific manifestations of this diversity constitute the uniqueness and diversity of various human groups and societies. Affected by this, cultural landscapes, intangible heritage, underwater heritage, industrial heritage, cultural routes, sacred mountain heritage, and astronomical heritage have emerged one after a

description.zh: 本課程介紹自二十世紀開始重要建築事件與作品的演變。從現代主義、粗獷主義、後現代建築到各種回應時代性的的建築思潮的發展，每週選定一個主題說明之。
description.en: The course introduces critical architectural agendas, events, and projects after 1900, from modernism, brutalism, and postmodern architecture to the development of various architectural trends that respond to the times. Each week, the course will select one topic to explain and discuss.

description.zh: 了解國內外淨零碳排路徑策略、具備建築物生命週期的整體流程概念、具備建築碳足跡計算操作能力。課程講述建築生命週期碳足跡的評估法，藉由標準化、透明化的建築資訊剖析建築生命週期各階段對環境的影響，具備評估整棟建築生命週期的碳足跡，並提出減碳熱點，了解建築物的節碳潛力所在。
description.en: This course evaluates the carbon footprint of a building's lifecycle. Through standardized and transparent buildinginformation, the impact of various stages of the building lifecycle on the environment is analyzed step by step. Thiscourse not only evaluates the carbon footprint of the entirebuilding life cycle but also further identifies carbon hotspotsand provides carbon reduction strategies, hence understanding carbon savings potential of buildings.

notes: 1 週【停開】

name.zh: 生成式 AI 設計實務應用
name.en: Practical Applications of Generative AI in Design

description.zh: 本課程旨在培養學生成為能夠熟練運用生成式 AI 技術的新時代設計師。通過深入學習生成式 AI 的基本原理與應用，學生將掌握各種 AI 輔助設計工具，如 ChatGPT、Midjourney 等。課程重點培養學生的提示工程技能，使其能夠有效引導 AI 工具產生所需的設計成果。課程致力於幫助學生將 AI 技術整合到傳統設計流程中，同時 AI 輔助程式設計和網頁開發等實踐培養跨領域能力。課程鼓勵創新思維，激發學生探索 AI 技術在設計領域的創新應用。通過小組專案，學生將培養團隊合作精神和專案管理能力。另一方面，注重培養學生對 AI 技術應用的倫理意識，以及持續學習的能力，使其能夠在快速發展的 AI 技術領域中保持競爭力。總體而言，本課程旨在全面提升學生在 AI 時代的設計能力，為他們在數位化轉型的職場中做好充分準備。學生將學習：1. AI 素養 2. 運用生成式 AI 工具進行設計創作 3. 編寫有效的提示以引導 AI 生成所需內容 4. 利用 AI 技術進行圖像和 3D 生成 5. 將 AI 工具整合到現有設計工作流程中 6. 使用 AI 輔助程式設計並完成小專案 7. 評估和應對 AI 應用中的道德和法律問題
description.en: This course trains new-generation designers to proficiently use generative AI technologies. Students will explore the fundamentals and applications of tools like ChatGPT and Midjourney while developing strong prompt engineering skills to guide AI in producing desired design outcomes. The course emphasizes integrating AI into traditional design workflows and building cross-disciplinary abilities through practices like AI-assisted programming and web development. It also fosters innovative thinking, teamwork, project management, and ethical awareness in applying AI within the design field.

notes: 計中電腦教室

description.zh: 本課程探討體驗設計的基本概念與理論基礎，涵蓋感知與情感設計 (Perception & Emotion Design)、使用者行為 (User Behavior)、身體經驗 (Embodied Experience)、文化脈絡 (Cultural Context) 等主題。學生將學習如何分析人類的感官、情緒與互動方式，理解不同文化、環境與社會因素對體驗的影響，並透過案例研究與實地觀察，探索如何透過設計創造有意義且具影響力的體驗。
description.en: This course explores the fundamental concepts and theories of experience design, covering topics such as perception and emotion design, user behavior, embodied experience, and cultural context. Students will learn to analyze human sensory perception, emotions, and interaction patterns while understanding how cultural, environmental, and social factors influence experiences. Through case studies and field observations, students will investigate how design can create meaningful and impactful experiences.

notes: 配合 USR 計畫

name.zh: 設計學研究方法與實踐策略
name.en: Design Science Research Methods & Practical Strategies

description.zh: 設計科學研究重視創造與解決現實世界問題相關且實用的成品或服務。目標是開發具有實用價值並可在實務中實施的解決方案或進一步進行設計驗證。課堂進行方式，除了方法講解，將於課堂採用方法卡與結構化的課堂互動模式，深化學生對設計學在學術研究方法的認識與應用。學生將學會：1. 理解設計學的範疇與趨勢 2. 理解如何擬定研究命題與設計研究方法 3. 理解量化與質性研究方法 4. 理解研究結果的詮釋與視覺化 5. 擬定研究命題、研究框架、研究流程與方法
description.en: Design science research values the creation of finished products or service that are relevant and useful in solving real-world problems. The goal is to develop solutions that have practical value and can be implemented in practice or for further design verification. In addition to method explanations, method cards and a structured classroom interaction mode will be used in class to deepen students' understanding and application of design methods in academic research. Students will learn:1.Understand the scope and trends of design2.Understand how to formulate research propositions and design research methods3.Understand quantitative and qualitative research methods4.Understand the interpretation and visualization of research results5.Formulate research propositions, research framework, research processes and methods

notes: 上限 15 人

description.zh: 產品系統研發的過程漫長，為確保其設計產出貼近市場脈動，具有創新性及競爭力，必須透過大量閱讀、即時掌握新興科技發展趨勢、蒐集分析國際知名實際案例。本課程旨在培養學生對國際趨勢的敏銳度，整合跨領域專業的洞察力，了解不同世代的獨特需求脈絡，如何延伸到產品設計應用與跨國團隊合作，進而發掘有影響力的設計研究議題。
description.en: The ever-changing design trends are influenced by many factors that lead to increasingly complex challenges for people, society and the environment. To keep up with the state-of-the-art research and emerging technologies, designers need to acquire a rich body of knowledge and transfer integrated insights from various disciplines to the new product development. This course focuses on the cultivation of students’ critical thinking ability through analyzing the global design case studies and literature. Students will be asked to take a very active role to contribute to discussions and presentations.

notes: 設計 701-1 室，上限 7 人

description.zh: 本課程提供大一學生必備之英語文語言技巧，強調專業領域之英文溝通能力之訓練。課程內容依學院專業內容區分，並整合英語文之聽、說、讀、寫之能力，提升英語文在專業領域的應用。
description.en: This course equips first-year students with essential English language skills, focusing on developing their communication abilities in specific professional fields. The content is customized to each college's discipline and integrates the four language skills (listening, speaking, reading, and writing), thereby enhancing the application of English in professional contexts.

notes: 請選校院級課程 \ 大一學院專業英文 (一)

name.en: Introduction to Thin Film Science and Engineering

description.zh: 薄膜材料科學，真空科學與技術，薄膜蒸鍍製程，放電、電漿、離子與表面作用，物理氣相沈積，化學氣相沈積，基材表面與薄膜成核，薄膜結構，薄膜性質測試，薄膜之相互擴散、反應與轉換，薄膜之機械性質。
description.en: 1. Thin film materials science2. Vacuum science and technology 3. Thin film evaporation processes4. Discharge, plasma, and ion-surface interaction5. Plasma and ion beam processing of thin films6. Chemical vapor deposition7. Substrate surfaces and thin film nucleation8. Film structure9. Characterization of thin films and surface10. Interdiffusion, reactions, and transformations in thin films11. Mechanical properties of thin films

notes: 機械四合開；限 40 人

name.en: The theory and practice of 3D Printing

description.zh: 3D 列印（英語：3D printing），又稱加法製造、積層製造（Additive Manufacturing，AM），可指任何列印三維物體的過程。3D 列印主要是一個不斷添加的過程，在電腦控制下層疊原材料。3D 列印的內容可以來源於三維模型或其他電子資料，其列印出的三維物體可以擁有任何形狀和幾何特徵。本課程將介紹其原理及配合實機操作，使學生能對 3D 列印技術有正確的認識。(本課程鼓勵學生參加經濟部 iPas 的 3D 列印工程師考試)
description.en: 3D printing, also known as additive manufacturing (AM), refers to processes used to create a three-dimensional object in which successive layers of material are formed under computer control to create an object. Objects can be of almost any shape or geometry and are produced using digital model data from a 3D model or another electronic data. This course will introduce the principle knowledge of 3D printing and giving the opportunity to practice the use of 3D Printing.

notes: 機械三合開；億光 4F 的 IPAS 考場上課；限 30 人

description.zh: 機器人學概述、機器人運動學、路徑規劃、機器人避障、機器人視覺、任務規劃、機器人動力學與控制系統
description.en: English Description General Induction, Manipulator Kinematics, Trajectory Planning, Collision Avoidance, Robot Vision, Task Planning,Manipulator Dynamics and Control

notes: 電機、自動化所、電資外生和機械外生合開

description.zh: 原子結構、排列與運動、材料之顯微結構與相結構、材料之機械性質 - 疲勞、破裂、潛變、材料之電性 - 電傳導性與半導體性、材料之光性與介電性、材料之磁性、材料之熱學性質、材料在微電元件之應用、複合材料。9. 複合材料。
description.en: Contents:1.Fundamentals: Atomic scale structure, Crystal structure. 2.Microstructural development: Phase equilibriums and phase diagram. 3.Properties: Mechanical properties, Electrical properties, Dielectric properties, Magnetic properties, Thermal properties. 4.Composite materials.5.Applications on the Electrical-mechanical devices. Objectives: To improve the related knowledge of materials on the electrical-mechanical devices.

notes: 機電、製科、外生專班和機電博合開；限 30 人

description.zh: 於 2009 年，ASTM 定義了積層製造，並將此積層製造分成七大類型，本課程將對它進行光機電原理說明，並以積層製造系統的應用及系統的研發為主要授課方向。
description.en: ASTM Committee F42 on Additive Manufacturing Technologies was formed in 2009. The myriad process names into seven standardized terms. In this course, the principle of the additive manufacturing technology in terms of its opto-electro-mechanical-system will be discussed. The application and the system development of additive manufacturing are the major topics of this course.

notes: 機電、外生專班和機電博合開；限 40 人

description.zh: 先修課程：負責教授同意本課程將深入的討論製程中材料之性質。尤其是在材料行為的理論推導方面。所涵蓋的主題包括有：塑性加工、顯微結構、強化機構、破壞力學、潛變與疲勞、材料之熱膨脹、熱傳導、電化學性質、擴散理論、相變化動力學、化學性質、以及材料之熱力學性質。
description.en: The properties of materials in service will be discussed in detail. Special focus will be on the theoretically discussion of the behavior of materials. Topics covered include plastic deformation、strengthening mechanisms、fracture、creep and fatigue、heat capacity、thermal expansion、thermal conductivity、the law of electrolysis、electrolytic conductance and transport, and ionic activity、reversible electrode potentials、Irreversible electrode processes、electrochemical measurements、kinetics of phase transformation、diffusion、kirkendall effect、thermodynamic properties of alloy systems、thermodynamics of surfaces and interfaces

notes: 製科、外生專班合開；限 20 人

description.zh: 先修課程：負責教授同意材料機械性質是強調材料巨觀性質與材料微觀結構，鍵結及晶體結構之間的關係，是一門實務性，基本且重要的課程。它包括彈性，塑性行為，差排理論，單晶與聚晶材料之塑性變形，複合材料，高溫聚晶材料之變形，非晶質材料之永久變形，材料強化機構，材料破壞，潛變與氫脆性等問題之討論。
description.en: This course deals with the mechanical behavior of materials. It emphasizes the relationship among macroscopic properties, material microstructure, and fundamental concepts of bonding and crystal structure. Contents of this course include the elastic and elastic behavior , dislocation , plastic deformation in single and polycrystalline materials ,strengthening mechanism of crystalline materials, composite materials, high temperature of crystalline materials ,fracture , fatigue and embrittlement.

notes: 製科、外生專班合開；限 20 人

description.zh: 先修課程：負責教授同意。1. 線性彈性力學 2. 變分法 3. 變分法應用到彈性力學 4. 結構力學 5. 扭力 6. 能量法 7. 彈性穩定 8. 材料選擇.
description.en: 1.Linear Elasticity 2.Variational Method 3.Variational Principles of Elasticity 4. Structural Mechanics 5.Torsion 6.Energy Method 7.Elastic Stability 8.Materials Selection

notes: 製科。機械外。機電博和鐵道合開；限 20 人

name.zh: 雷射醫學的基礎與臨床應用

description.zh: 雷射乃 20 世紀三大發明之一，醫用雷射更已廣泛地應用在各個醫學領域。本課程將涵蓋的範圍包括：1. 雷射基本原理；2. 雷射安全標準；3. 雷射與組織的作用關係；4. 雷射在醫學的各種應用；5. 雷射於牙周病的應用；6. 雷射於口腔外科的應用；7. 雷射應用於牙齒美白；8. 低能量雷射的各種應用；9. 雷射實機操作與臨床示範。
description.en: The laser is one of the three major items invented in 20th century. Medical laser applications have been widely used in many fields. This lecture will cover: 1. Laser Physics; 2. Safety Standards; 3. Laser-Tissue-Interaction; 4. Laser in Medical Applications; 5. Laser in Periodontology; 6. Laser in Oral Surgery; 7. Laser Assisted Bleaching; 8. Low Level Laser Therapy; 9. Practical Hands-on and Live Patient Demonstration.

notes: 機電、外生專班合開；排三 ABC；綜科 110-2

description.zh: 工業 4.0 智能工廠因為大量使用電腦資訊流進行智慧控制達到產線無人化境地，雲端資料庫技術是智能工廠的核心技術，從智慧排單到網頁控制，達到智能聯網與控制。
description.en: The industry 4.0 intelligent factory uses large amount of information to reach intelligent control without people. Cloud database technology is the core of an intelligent factory, which can reach the intelligent network and control from intelligent production order to website control.

notes: 機電、製科合開；限 10 人

description.zh: 專題報告、專題演講、研究小組討論
description.en: Case Study, Seminars, Group meeting

notes: 碩博合開，博士班 (上課地點：科技大樓國際會議廳)

description.zh: 由於近年來電腦科技發展迅速，在透過地理資訊系統的幫助下，圖文整合的資料庫型態，已有相當完整成熟的作業方式。本課程將針對地理資訊系統的應用功能方向，分別剖析其主要架構與理論。同時配合相關地理資訊系統軟體，建立學員實作能力。
description.en: Operational and management issues in planning management analysis,locational decision making,and design implementation of GIS.Lab project emphasizes student'sspecialization.

notes: 三甲乙合開 / 上限 40 人 / 土木 106

description.zh: 隨著台灣農工型態的轉變以及越來越高的生活品質要求，地下水所扮演的角將日益重要，地下水的領域涵蓋水量，水質及防災三方面，修習此一學科，可以了解地下水水文及水力學之基本原理，進而掌握地下水水理與污染傳輸之特性，以作為規劃與管理地下水資源之依據.
description.en: The objective of this course is to introduce the theory and application of groundwater flow modeling, focusing on MODFLOW. The topic is including numerical methods, discreteness and boundaries, parameterization and calibration, problems and case-histories.

notes: 上限 40 人 / 三甲乙合開 / 適合三大四修讀

description.zh: 本課程授課內容涵蓋廣泛共計有：(1) 工程估價之基本認識、(2) 工程估價之內涵、(3) 各種工程之估價：1. 假設工程 2. 基礎工程 3. 土石方工程 4. 純混凝土工程 5. 鋼筋混凝土工程 6. 預力混凝土工程 7. 鋼結構工程 8. 建築工程 9. 機電及附屬設備工程 。
description.en: The course contents are including: (1)Basic concepts of the Construction Cost Estimation; (2)The Contents of the Construction Cost Estimation (3)The Cost Estimation of varies construction: 1. Temporary Work 2. Fundamental Work 3. Earthwork 4. Concrete Work 5.Reinforcement Work 6.Prestressed Concrete Work 7. Steel Structure Work 8. Construction Work 9.MEP

notes: 土木四合開

name.en: Introduction to Satellite Technology and Engineering

description.zh: 衛星科技與工程導論的課程將介紹衛星系統及次系統基礎知識，以培養具有從事衛星任務設計之基礎能力。課程內容包括：衛星基本原理，衛星設計與製造，衛星運行與維護，衛星通訊與遙測應用，衛星發展趨勢。
description.en: The course "Introduction to Satellite Technology and Engineering" will introduce the basic knowledge of satellite systems and subsystems to cultivate the fundamental abilities needed for designing satellite missions. The course content includes: the basic principles of satellites, satellite design and manufacturing, satellite operation and maintenance, satellite communication and remote sensing applications, and satellite development trends.

description.zh: 科學視算指的是將大量的運算資料、監測結果或實驗數據，結合電腦繪圖以視覺化的方式呈現出來，幫助研究者進一步瞭解大量數據背後所代表的工程意義，在本課程中將介紹科學視算的原理，教導所使用的軟體工具和繪圖函式庫，讓學生有機會瞭解科學視算在土木工程上的應用，並以案例介紹科學視算的用途，如結構物的地震振動反應、震波在地層中的傳遞狀況、地形特徵和 GPS 資料的視覺化模擬、以及板塊運動的模擬情形等。本課程先修課程為程式設計，並且最好具備有限元素法的概念，建議研究所同學選修。
description.en: Scientific visualization is the use of computer graphics to visually represent the composite meaning of the large amount of data obtained by scientific computation, extensive monitoring, or engineering experiments. It could help researchers quickly grasp the engineering implications in their field of interest. This course will introduce the basic theory of scientific visualization, teach the relevant programming skills, and demonstrate how to apply the principles of scientific visualization to civil engineering problems. Examples include the seismic response of engineering structures, the propagation of seismic waves in the ground, and the movement of tectonic plates. The prerequisite of this course is computer programming. It is suitable for graduate students to choose as an elective.

notes: 土木 208

name.en: Special Topics on Geographical Information System

description.zh: 政府近年積極推動行政資訊化，應用資訊技術提昇行政的效率與品質，以達到便民及創新的效益。地理資訊系統 (Geographical Information System，簡稱 GIs) 之開發與應用，即是提供各使用單位在處理大量圖籍與相關文字資料之管理與查詢的最佳解決方案；配合完整中文介面與印表技術，更可提高效率資訊服務。國內各重大工程在規劃設計時，正逐漸引用地理資訊系統。以其強大之資訊處理、整合、分析、及展示等功能輔助，如圖籍疊合與環框分析等，使工程規劃設計更為準確客觀，發揮工程最大效益。
description.en: To provide public service with better quality, the administration of government with information-based is widely established by adopting newly developed information technology. Geographic Information System is one of the technology especially applicable when massive maps and attribute data are involved in management affairs. It offers users a solution for information management and data query under a graphic environment with Chinese interface as well as output printing specification. The planning and design of major construction projects in Taiwan were increasingly referred to GIS for the reason that efficiency can be maximized by the powerful data organization, integration, and display capability along with GIS.

notes: 土木 106

description.zh: 本課程旨在介紹地工合成材料之種類、功能及其於工程領域之應用，並以土壤加勁為核心主題，培養學生具備設計、分析與評估加勁構造物 (含擋土牆與邊坡) 之理論與實務能力。課程內容亦涵蓋相關之施工技術、監測與維護方法、國內外實務案例，並進一步探討加勁構造物於天然災害防治上之應用與最新發展趨勢。
description.en: The overall objective of this course is to introduce the types, and functions, of geosynthetics and their engineering applications. Specifically, this course focuses on the soil reinforcement and provide students the fundamentals and tools needed for design, analysis, and performance evaluation of geosynthetic-reinforced soil (GRS) structures including both walls and slopes. Class also discusses construction, monitoring, maintenance, case histories as well as current state-of-art applications of GRS structures against various natural disasters.

name.zh: 電腦在營建管理之應用
name.en: The Application of Computer in Construction Management

description.zh: 本課程主要自營建工程專案之觀點，介紹一些常用營建專案管理方法之基本原理及其在電腦上之應用實例。課程內容將包含營建專案之進度、成本、品質等基本管理概念與營建管理理論於專案管理之初步應用，使學生能實際地學習如何將電腦應用在營建工程專案管理 (內容包括：工程排程、成本估算與控制、電腦模擬、與工程風險管理分析等方法)。
description.en: The application of computer in construction managementThe basic knowledge in computer, the basic design thought and current system practical training in Chinese-English word process system , the functional explain and application in EXCEL, the basic concept in information management system , the basic concept in engineer information management system , the design of database and database software system's practice, simple application in statistics drafting software and other current computer's technology development and other application in construction management.

notes: 土木 106

name.zh: 計算智慧於營建管理之應用
name.en: Application of Computational Intelligence in Construction Management

description.zh: 在當代營建產業中，項目日益複雜且數據量龐大，傳統管理方法已難以應對高效率、低成本和永續發展的需求。計算智慧作為人工智慧的重要分支，能有效處理不確定性、非線性和高維度問題，為營建管理帶來突破性變革。本課程系統性介紹計算智慧技術（涵蓋機器學習、深度學習、模糊系統、進化計算等）如何應用於營建管理各環節。本課程旨在培養同學理解各類演算法的基本原理與適用場景，並透過專案練習及軟體操作讓同學具備計算智慧技術的應用能力。
description.en: In today's construction industry, projects are becoming increasingly complex with massive volumes of data, making traditional management approaches inadequate to meet the demands for high efficiency, cost-effectiveness, and sustainable development. Computational intelligence, as a crucial branch of artificial intelligence, can effectively address uncertainties, nonlinearities, and high-dimensional problems, bringing transformative changes to construction management. This course systematically introduces how computational intelligence technologies—including machine learning, deep learning, fuzzy systems, evolutionary computation, and more—can be applied across various aspects of construction management. The course aims to equip students with an understanding of the fundamental principles and practical applications of multiple algorithms while also developing their skills in applying computational intelligence techniques through hands-on projects and software implementation.

notes: 土木 208

description.zh: 環境生態學主要講述基本生態學之原理原則，進而應用於土木建設工程的方式主要內容包含：(1) 環境生態系統、(2) 生態學之基本法則、(3) 質與能傳遞、(4) 汙染物對生態之影響、(5) 台灣地區之生態保育、(6) 工程開發生態系統造成之影響、(7) 環境影響評估、(8) 交通及營建工程之環境問題、(9) 全球環境變遷、(10) 環境品質與法規。
description.en: How to use the national sources in a way to have sustainable development is the main purpose of this study. Improper usage of resources will bring a serious disaster from the natural feed back. Construction should take care of the ecology system and the methods of carefulness would be studied in this course.

description.zh: 環境生態學主要講述基本生態學之原理原則，進而應用於土木建設工程的方式主要內容包含：(1) 環境生態系統、(2) 生態學之基本法則、(3) 質與能傳遞、(4) 汙染物對生態之影響、(5) 台灣地區之生態保育、(6) 工程開發生態系統造成之影響、(7) 環境影響評估、(8) 交通及營建工程之環境問題、(9) 全球環境變遷、(10) 環境品質與法規。
description.en: How to use the national sources in a way to have sustainable development is the main purpose of this study. Improper usage of resources will bring a serious disaster from the natural feed back. Construction should take care of the ecology system and the methods of carefulness would be studied in this course.

notes: 上限 40 人

description.zh: 隨著生成式 AI 與大型語言模型迅速融入設計流程與數位產品開發，互動設計者需具備整合 AI 技術與人機介面設計的跨域素養。本課程旨在探討人工智慧技術於人機互動設計中的應用，培養學生設計與開發智慧互動系統的核心能力。課程內容涵蓋人機互動及互動設計之基本概念、語意理解與回應機制、以及 AI 驅動之使用者體驗創新。教學上將透過講述法和工作坊建立基礎觀念，搭配上機實作強化技術操作能力，並以專題導向學習形式，引導學生完成從構思到原型開發之完整設計流程。
description.en: As generative AI and large language models (LLMs) reshape design processes, interaction designers must integrate AI technologies with human-computer interface design to enhance the user experience. This course explores the application of AI in human-computer interaction (HCI), focusing on essential skills for developing intelligent interactive systems. Topics include HCI fundamentals, semantic understanding and response mechanisms, and AI-driven innovations in user experience. Lectures build theoretical foundations, hands-on practice strengthens technical skills, and project-based learning guides students from ideation to prototyping.

notes: 排先鋒 PBL 教室，日碩 / 互動三合開，限 30 人修，需自備筆電

description.zh: 隨著生成式 AI 與大型語言模型迅速融入設計流程與數位產品開發，互動設計者需具備整合 AI 技術與人機介面設計的跨域素養。本課程旨在探討人工智慧技術於人機互動設計中的應用，培養學生設計與開發智慧互動系統的核心能力。課程內容涵蓋人機互動及互動設計之基本概念、語意理解與回應機制、以及 AI 驅動之使用者體驗創新。教學上將透過講述法和工作坊建立基礎觀念，搭配上機實作強化技術操作能力，並以專題導向學習形式，引導學生完成從構思到原型開發之完整設計流程。

This course explores the application of AI in human-computer interaction (HCI), focusing on essential skills for developing intelligent interactive systems. Topics include HCI fundamentals, semantic understanding and response mechanisms, and AI-driven innovations in user experience. Lectures build theoretical foundations, hands-on practice strengthens technical skills, and project-based learning guides students from ideation to prototyping.

notes: 排先鋒 PBL 教室，日碩 / 互動三合開，限 30 人修，需自備筆電

name.en: Course in English language Proficiency Tests

description.zh: 本課主旨在設計課程，提供練習，俾使學生嫻熟各式的英語測驗，如全民英檢、托福測驗、TOEIC 測驗或類似性質的測驗，希冀能夠藉由本課程的修習，提升學生不斷的學習外國語的興致，並且，藉由通過考試取得證照，增加未來職場的競爭力。
description.en: This course is designed to familiarize the students with various kinds of language proficiency tests such as GEPT, TOEFL, TOEIC and many others to the same end. It is our hope that the students who finish taking the course will go on with their enthusiasm on studying foreign languages; besides, through the acquisition of the certificate when the students pass the tests, they are sure to enhance their capability in the increasingly competitive job markets.

class_names: 專業職場英文銜接計畫
notes: 以 CEFR B1 為目標，新制多益

description.zh: 為增進本校工程相關科系學生之基礎數學能力，本課程希望在 18 小時中，能使學生對基礎數學有充分的瞭解、培養邏輯推理、啟發思考創造、強化計算演繹並注重應用與作圖，以建立同學未來學習微積分之數學基礎。課程內容包括：1. 數與式、2. 不等式、3. 直角坐標系、4. 直線、5. 圓錐曲線、6. 指數與對數、7. 三角函數、8. 向量。
description.en: With the purpose for improving the comprehension in fundamental mathematics for students who major in Engineering, and for building up solid background of Calculus for students' future training, it is planned to have this course. This 18 hours course aims at developing comprehension of basic mathematics、activating capabilities of Logic、strengthening the abilities of computing with an emphasis on its application and diagram、furnishing a basis for future specialty. The content includes: 1. Numbers、Functions and Equations, 2. Inequalities, 3. Rectangular Coordinates, 4. Lines, 5. Quadratic Equations, 6. Exponents and Logarithms, 7. Trigonometric Functions , 8. Vectors.

notes: *A 班，每週一、二 18:30~21:10 (開學第二週開始上課)

description.zh: 本校科技大學的國文課程，以能力及素養之培植為導向，並以精深致用為授課標的，方能不負大學國文課程之名，並符合本校重視實務應用的優良傳統。依授課教師之取擇，課程可概分為兩大類。一、文學類：著重在文學品味力、語文敏感力、文學創意力與實作創造力等能力的深化。二、思想類：著重在批判思辨力、邏輯推演力、決斷力、組織整合力、論述力與品格實踐力等能力的提升。期盼藉由這兩大方面的磨礪，為學「生」未來的「生」存、「生」活與「生」命，開展出璀璨的「三生」有幸。
description.en: The Chinese language curriculum of the University of Science and Technology of this university is oriented to the cultivation of ability and literacy, and is taught with intensive application. Only then can it live up to the name of the university's Chinese language curriculum and conform to the school's fine tradition of emphasizing practical application.Depending on the choice of the instructor, the courses can be divided into two categories.1. Literature: Focus on the deepening of literary taste, language sensitivity, literary creativity and practical creativity.2. Thinking category: Focus on the improvement of critical thinking ability, logical deduction ability, decision ability, organizational integration ability, discussion ability and character practice ability.It is hoped that through the cultivation and training of these two aspects, we will develop a brilliant three lives for the future survival, life and life of students.

notes: 限外籍生修讀，初級班（A0）

description.zh: 本校科技大學的國文課程，以能力及素養之培植為導向，並以精深致用為授課標的，方能不負大學國文課程之名，並符合本校重視實務應用的優良傳統。依授課教師之取擇，課程可概分為兩大類。一、文學類：著重在文學品味力、語文敏感力、文學創意力與實作創造力等能力的深化。二、思想類：著重在批判思辨力、邏輯推演力、決斷力、組織整合力、論述力與品格實踐力等能力的提升。期盼藉由這兩大方面的磨礪，為學「生」未來的「生」存、「生」活與「生」命，開展出璀璨的「三生」有幸。
description.en: The Chinese language curriculum of the University of Science and Technology of this university is oriented to the cultivation of ability and literacy, and is taught with intensive application. Only then can it live up to the name of the university's Chinese language curriculum and conform to the school's fine tradition of emphasizing practical application.Depending on the choice of the instructor, the courses can be divided into two categories.1. Literature: Focus on the deepening of literary taste, language sensitivity, literary creativity and practical creativity.2. Thinking category: Focus on the improvement of critical thinking ability, logical deduction ability, decision ability, organizational integration ability, discussion ability and character practice ability.It is hoped that through the cultivation and training of these two aspects, we will develop a brilliant three lives for the future survival, life and life of students.

notes: 限外籍生修讀，入門班（A1-A2）

Thinking category: Focus on the improvement of critical thinking ability, logical deduction ability, decision ability, organizational integration ability, discussion ability and character practice ability.It is hoped that through the cultivation and training of these two aspects, we will develop a brilliant three lives for the future survival, life and life of students.

notes: 限外籍生修讀，進階班（B1-B2）

description.zh: 本課程希望在一學年中，能使學生對微分及積分有充分的瞭解、培養邏輯推理、啟發思考創造、強化計算演繹並注重應用與作圖，以建立同學未來學習工程數學及相關專業課程之數學基礎，充分達到學以致用的目的。課程內容包括：1. 極限與連續，2. 導數及其應用，3. 不定積分與定積分，4. 超越函數及其反函數，5. 積分法則，6. 不定型與瑕積分，7. 定積分的應用，8. 空間幾何與向量微積分，9. 偏導數，10. 重積分，11. 級數。
description.en: This course aims at developing comprehension of Derivation and Integral、activating capabilities of Logic Inference and Induction、enlightening confidence and independence、strengthening calculating abilities with an emphasis on its application and diagram、furnishing a sound basis for future specialty. The content includes: 1.Limits and Continuity, 2.Derivative and Application, 3.Indefinite and Definite Integral, 4.Transcendental Functions and their Inverses, 5.Techniques of Integration, 6.Indeterminate Forms and Improper Integral, 7.Application of Integration, 8.Basic Vector Analysis, 9.Partial Derivative, 10.Multiple Integration, 11.Infinite Series.

notes: 限境外生修讀

description.zh: 認識心理與教育測驗的起源、發展、運用與測驗實施及倫理議題，同時探討常模與標準化、信度、效度、測驗研發編製 (含項目分析) 的理論基礎。
description.en: To realize origin, development, application, test implementation and ethical issues of psychological and educational test and explore theories of norms, standardization, reliability, validity and test development (including item analysis)

notes: 計中電腦教室

description.zh: 1. 人工智慧簡介及基本概念 2. 各種人工智慧技術介紹 3. 人工智慧工具和框架 4. 人工智慧在光電領域的應用
description.en: 1. Introduction and basic concepts of artificial intelligence2. Introduction to various artificial intelligence technologies3. Artificial intelligence tools and frameworks4. Application of artificial intelligence in the field of optoelectronics

notes: 計中電腦教室

description.zh: 本課程將介紹工程上、物理上系統解析的相關數學工具，內容包括：1. 常微分方程式：一階，二階，及高階常微分方程，2. 拉譜拉斯轉換，3. 特殊函數。
description.en: This course intends to introduce the mathematical principles and practices that today's engineers need to know. The course contents are 1.Ordinary Differential Eqs: 1st order, 2nd order and higher order ODEs. 2. Laplace transform, 3. Special function.

notes: 機二乙和能源二合開

description.zh: 母體分配圖形之間的關係：皮爾生偏態係數，動差態係數，謝比雪夫不等式，經驗法則，線性轉換與子分數 3. 機率論：事件，機率函數，條件機率，獨立事件 4. 隨機變數與機率分配：離散分配，連續分配，結合分配，邊際分配，5. 特殊機率分配，二項分配，卜瓦松分配，超幾何分配，常態分配，6. 抽樣分配：卡方分配，t 分配，F 分配
description.en: 1.Introduction 2.Etatics quantities (a)Mean,median,mode (b)Varianl,mean absolute deriation (c)Pearson's coef of skewness,chebyshev's Inequality,Empirical rule,zscore 3.Probability:Events probability Function,Conditional probability,Independent Event 4.Random Variable and probability pistribution:Discrete Distribution,Continuons Distribution Marginal Distribution 5.Binomial pistribution,Bernoulli Distribution,Poission Distribution,Hypergeometric Distribution,Normal Distribution 6.Gama Distribution,T Distribution,F Distribution.

notes: 土木二甲乙合開

description.zh: 本課程希望在一學年中，能使學生對微分及積分有充分的瞭解、培養邏輯推理、啟發思考創造、強化計算演繹並注重應用與作圖，以建立同學未來學習工程數學及相關專業課程之數學基礎，充分達到學以致用的目的。課程內容包括：1. 極限與連續，2. 導數及其應用，3. 不定積分與定積分，4. 超越函數及其反函數，5. 積分法則，6. 不定型與瑕積分，7. 定積分的應用，8. 空間幾何與向量微積分，9. 偏導數，10. 重積分，11. 級數。
description.en: This course aims at developing comprehension of Derivation and Integral、activating capabilities of Logic Inference and Induction、enlightening confidence and independence、strengthening calculating abilities with an emphasis on its application and diagram、furnishing a sound basis for future specialty. The content includes: 1.Limits and Continuity, 2.Derivative and Application, 3.Indefinite and Definite Integral, 4.Transcendental Functions and their Inverses, 5.Techniques of Integration, 6.Indeterminate Forms and Improper Integral, 7.Application of Integration, 8.Basic Vector Analysis, 9.Partial Derivative, 10.Multiple Integration, 11.Infinite Series.

notes: ◎限技優學生修習

description.zh: 本課程將介紹國內外的房屋生產系統和裝修技術案例。該課程將在以下主題中進行。A. 規劃審查施工生產的總體方向，包括施工合同，項目預算，生命週期， 風險管理和資金分配方法。B. 設計物流和裝貨的程度，施工方法。 設計系統，建築設計智能，建築材 料和性能。 建築生產對社會的影響。C. 施工現場調查，施工計劃，施工前時間表，施工管理，方法及其演變。D. 裝修建築拆除或裝修的評估標準，裝修計劃，設計，項目，法令和系統。E. 拆除：建築拆除的機械和方法，以及建築廢料的再利用。
description.en: This course will introduce the domestic and foreign housing production system and renovation technology cases.The course will be conducted in the following topics.A. Planning A review of the overall direction of construction production, including construction contract, project budget,life cycle, risk management and method of fund dispatch.B. Design The degree of logistics and loading, construction method. Design system, building design intelligence,building materials and performance. The influence of construction production to society.C. Construction The site investigation, construction plan, time schedule before construction, construction management,methods and their evolutions.D. Renovation The assessment criteria of building demolition or renovation, the renovation plan, design, project, decree and system.E. Demolition：The building demolition machinery and methods, and the reuse of building waste materials.

description.zh: 修完「學院指定向度課程」12 學分後，剩餘 6 學分可在人文與藝術向度、社會與法治向度、自然與科學向度及創新與創業向度自由修滿，達到通識畢業 18 學分。
description.en: After completing 12 credits “designated by the college”, the remaining 6 credits are open for selection form these curriculums: humanities and art, social and legal, nature and science and innovation and entrepreneurship, until a total of 18 credits of the general curriculum are completed for graduation.

description.zh: 中文概述：專題報告、專題演講、研究小組討論。
description.en: Case study. Seminar. Group meeting.

notes: 碩一

description.zh: 專題報告、專題演講、研究小組討論
description.en: Paper Presentation of special topics on education, giving lectures, and group meeting.

notes: 博二

description.zh: 本華語課程規劃為三年制教學，共分三個階段。第一年以基礎華語教學為主，重點包括：發音訓練、基礎字彙、句型與語法，以及日常生活會話。第二年在延續第一年內容的基礎上，強化段落閱讀與書寫能力，並擴展識字量。第三年則著重提升學生的聽力理解、口語表達與語境掌握能力，並融入華人社會與文化的相關內容。
description.en: This Chinese language courde is designed as a three-year curriculum, structured into three progressive stages. In the first year, the focus is on foundational Chinese instruction, including pronunciation training, basic vocabulary, sentence patterns and grammar, as well as daily conversational skills. The second year builds upon the first by strengthening paragraph reading and writing skills, and expanding character recognition. In the third year, the emphasis shifts to enhancing students’ listening comprehension, oral communication, and contextual understanding, while integrating topics related to Chinese society and culture.

notes: 限本班生修讀

description.zh: 配合化學課程之進展，教導學生學習各項基本實驗操作及儀器設備之技巧，進行各項實驗課程，如 COD 的測定，氮莫耳體積之測定，錯合物之生成，氧化還原滴定，以訓練學生養成手腦並用的務實科學素養。
description.en: Following the progress of the course of chemistry, introduce students to learn basically operations and techniques for several kinds of devices in a semester. The variety of scheduling laboratory experiments can be exercised for students. Including the determination of COD, the determination of molar nitrogen volume, the synthesis of complex, the determination of redox titration. This course is designed to train students how to use their brain and hands simultaneously.

description.zh: 本課程將從基礎深度學習理論、邊緣智慧硬體應用、資料集建置、客製化模型訓練到推論環境佈署，讓學員透過 Google Colab, Intel OpenVINO, OpenCV 等開源工具，學習如何規畫及實踐不同類型的低功耗、低延時、低成本及高隱私的邊緣智慧應用專案。
description.en: This course will cover basic deep learning theory, edge smart hardware application, data set construction, customized model training, and inference environment deployment. Allowing students to learn how to plan and practice types of edge smart application with low power consumption, low latency, low cost, and high privacy features.

notes: 電子大四合開

description.zh: 1. 電腦網路概述 2. 階層結構 3. 路由與交換 4. 流量與擁塞控制 5. 媒體存取控制 6. 區域網路協定與標準７．網路互連８．效能評估
description.en: 1.Introduction to Computer Network2.Layered Structure3.Routing and Switching 4.Flow and Congestion Control5.Medium Access Control 6.Local Area Network Protocols and Standards7.Network Interconnection8.Performance Analysis

notes: 電子大四合開

name.en: Analysis and Simulation of Integrated Circuits

description.zh: 本課程在訓練學生如何使用電腦輔助設計軟体來分析與模擬類比及數位積体電路，進而能培養學生具有設計積体電路的能力，課程內容包念：1. 電腦輔助設計積体電路介紹 2. 類比積体電路設計軟体之介紹及使用 (SPICE Design center) 3. 數位積体電路設計軟体之介紹及使用 ( Viewlogic ) 4. PLD 的認識與介紹 5. FPGA ( Xilinx ) 的設計 6. 專題設計
description.en: This course is trained the student to use computer-aided design tools for the analysis and simulation of integrated circuits(digital & analysis) .Therefore,the student have the design capability of integrated.The contents of this course :1.introduction to the Computer-aided IC design 2.Introduction to the computer-aided deaign of analysis integrated circuits(SPICE ,Deaign Center)and computer- exercise3.Introduction to the computer-aided design of digital integrated circuits(Viewlogic)and computer-exercise4.Introduction to the PLD5.FPGA(XILINX)design and computer-exercise6.Project.

notes: 電子大四合開

description.zh: 1. 簡介 2. 機率統計交通 3. 媒體存取控制協定 4. 通道配置 5. 衛星系統 6. 三代細胞式行動通訊標準 7. 網路協定 8. 各式無線網路
description.en: 1.Introduction 2.Probability, statistics, and traffic theories 3.MAC protocols 4.Channel allocation 5.Satellite systems 6.3G cellular standards 7.Network protocols 8.WLAN, WMAX, UWB, Bluetooth, etc.

notes: 電子大三合開

description.zh: 1.MOS 元件工作模式及 MOSFET 原理 2. 微小 MOSFET 的額外考慮 3. 矽晶圓的生長 4. 擴 散 5. 離子植入 6. 氧化處理 7.CVD 技術 8. 微影術 9. 蒸鍍與濺鍍 10. 光罩製作 11.CMOS IC 製程
description.en: 1. Operating modes and theory of MOS devices. 2. Small-geometry effects. 3. Wafer growth. 4. Diffusion. 5. Ion implantation. 6. Oxidation. 7. CVD techniques. 8. Lithography. 9. Sputtering and evaporation. 10. Photo masking. 11. CMOS IC fabrication processing.

name.zh: 混合訊號積體電路設計

description.zh: 本課程在研習混合訊號積體電路設計，其課程目的在給予學習者了解目前混合訊號 CMOS 積體電路分析與設計，並強調基礎與應用知識以符合工業界的需求，課程內容可包括下列主題。1. 混合訊號設計概述 2. 連續時間濾波器 3. 交換電容濾波器 4. 交換電流濾波器 5. 數位類比轉換器 6. 類比數位轉換器 7. 超取樣積分三角類比數位轉換器 8. 管線式類比數位轉換器 9. 混合訊號積體電路佈局
description.en: This course is concerned with the mixed-signal integrated circuit design. Its purpose is to deal with the analysis and design of mixed-signal CMOS integrated circuits, emphasizing fundamentals as well as new paradigms that students need to master in today's industry. The course covers the following topics. 1.Introduction to mixed-signal design 2.Continuous-time filters 3.Switched-capacitor filters 4.witched-current filters 5.D/A converters 6.A/D conerters 7.Oversampled Sigma-Delta A/D coverters 8.Pipelined A/D converter 9.Layout for mixed-signal integrated circuit

name.zh: 地面站網路切片與服務品質保證
name.en: Network Slicing and Quality of Service Technology for Ground Stations

description.zh: 本課程探討地面站網路切片技術及其在實際應用中的服務品質保證方法。課程將涵蓋地面站網路的基本概念，包括結構、架構，以及與通訊系統相關的各種技術。學生將透過深入理論學習和實務案例，瞭解地面站網路切片的原理及其在提供不同服務的情境中的優勢。在課程中，學生將學習如何實施地面站網路切片，包括網路資源分配、優先權設定，以及切片之間的隔離。透過實作專案，學生將有機會實際設計、配置和管理地面站網路切片，以應對不同應用場景下的需求。此外，課程將探討服務品質保證技術，包括流量管理、延遲優化、及網路監控等方面。學生將學習如何測量、分析和改進地面站網路切片的服務品質，以確保滿足各種應用的需求。最後，課程也將討論地面站網路切片的未來趨勢，包括與新興技術的整合、標準化發展，以及面臨的挑戰。透過該課程，學生將具備地面站網路切片及服務品質保證的專業知識和實作技能。
description.en: This course introduces ground station network slicing, focusing on practical use and service quality. Students learn slicing concepts, resource allocation, and isolation through case studies and hands-on projects. The course also covers QoS techniques like traffic control and latency management, along with future trends and emerging technology integration.

notes: 與電子大四合開

description.zh: 本課程在訓練學生如何使用電腦輔助設計軟体來設計類比濾波器，進而能培養學生具有設計類比濾波器的能力，課程內容包念： 1. 簡介 2. 低雜訊放大器 3. 混波器 4. 振盪器 5. 頻率合成器 6. 功率放大器 7. 類比基頻訊號處理
description.en: This course is trained the student to use computer-aided design tools for the design of analog filter. Therefore, the student has the design capability of analog filter integrated circuit. The contents of this course: 1. Introduction 2.LNA 3.Mixer 4.Oscillators 5.Frequency Synthesizers 6.Power Amplifier 7.Analog Baseband Signal Processing

notes: 希望不排六教，限 25 人，小教室

name.zh: 深度學習應用開發實務

description.zh: 課程主要為介紹學術界最新的深度學習研究成果，教導學員使用 Python 深度學習套件，讓學員能將深度學習技術應用於各個不同的領域。課程內容包括：? 車牌與門牌數字辨識？人臉辨識？1000 種影像分類？辨識 9000 種物件？自動駕駛模擬？嵌入式深度學習演算法？空虛，寂寞，覺得冷？讓深度學習來幫助你:? 遞迴式神經網路 (RNN)：找不到人聊天？訓練自己的聊天機器人？對抗生成網路 (GAN)：用 GAN 產生自己的夢中情人？深度強化學習 (DRL)：訓練 AI 跟你一起玩遊戲
description.en: The goal of this course is to introduce latest deep learning researches and allow students to develop deep learning applications using Python library (TensorFlow & Keras). The content includes:?Number recognition of License plate and Doorplate?Face Recognition?1000 Image Classification?9000 Object Detection?Autopilot simulation?Embedded Deep Learning Algorithms?Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN)?Recurrent Neural Networks (RNN)?Long-Short Term Memory (LSTM)?Generative Adversarial Networks (GAN)?Deep Reinforcement Learning

notes: 電子系、電資外生所和創新 AI 合開

name.en: Multimedia Service in Heterogeneous Network Environment

description.zh: 本課程介紹異質多網多媒體的特性與架構，包含：有線及無線網路的內容介紹，以及整合有線及無線網路成為異質網路的概念，其中將針對 IEEE 802.21 Media Independent Handover (MIH) 教導學生針對異質網路垂直切換的原理及技術。最後，對於多媒體服務技術及原理做介紹，包含：VoIP 服務以及視訊串流服務的介紹，以及如何針對 多種異質網路整合多媒體服務的介紹，藉此提升學生對於新世代異質多網多媒體服務之認識。
description.en: This course introduces the characteristics and architecture of multimedia service in heterogeneous network environment. First, wired and wireless networks, e.g., 3G/3.5G/4G, Wi-Fi, Bluetooth and other popular wireless access techniques, would be introduced one by one. Then, by describing the theory and technology of IEEE 802.21 Media Independent Handover (MIH), this course would show how to integrate multiple different networks into heterogeneous network environments and how to handoff among them. Finally, regarding multimedia service, VoIP and video streaming services would be taken into consideration. This course would introduce how to provide multimedia services over heterogeneous network environment. Therefore, students can learn the next-generation techniques about multimedia services in heterogeneous network environment from this course.

description.zh: 1. 嵌入式計算系統簡介 2. 即時系統核心之介紹與設計 3. 中央處理器 4. 嵌入式平台簡介 5. 硬體加速器 6. 驅動器的設計 7. 網路與分散式嵌入式系統 8. 嵌入式網路基礎架構系統設計與實作。
description.en: 1.An Introduction to Embedded Computing System 2.Introduction and Implementation to the Kernel of Real-time System 3.CPUs 4.Introducion to the Embedded Computing Platform 5.Hardware Acce;eratprs 6.Design of the Drivers 9.Networks and Distributed Embedded Systems 10.Embeddeed Web-based Design and Implementation.

description.zh: (1) 資料庫系統簡介，(2) 關聯式與實體關係資料模型，(3) 資料表正規化，(4) 結構化查詢語言，(5) 交易管理與並時控制 (6) 分散式資料庫管理系統 (7) 物件導向式資料庫 (8) 電子商務中之資料庫 (9) 資料庫管理 (10) 網路式資料庫專題－規劃與實作。
description.en: (1)Introduction to database systems,(2)Relational and E-R database models,(3)Normalization of database tables,(4)SQL (Structure Query Language),(5)Transaction management and concurrence control,(6)Distributed database management systems,(7)Object oriented databases,(8)Databases in electronic commerce,(9)Database Administration,(10)Web-based database project-design and implementation.

description.zh: 生物工程和醫療技術的研究和發展，在最近幾十年中，促成明確的臨床醫學和衛生保健的進步。這些領域的發展，開啟了生物工程、臨床技術和醫學信息領域課程的蓬勃發展；目前，各大學及研究所多有提供這些領域的課程。然而，大多數參與者多來自工程背景，因此學習生物科學和醫學應用於工程思維及模式，方能使得工程師和醫生之間的科學能無礙地交流。這項課程主要是為了使主修工程及材料的學生提供具有實用性的人體結構和組織的原則及相互依存的細胞和組織器官的生理系統進行有用的學習。雖然課程可能無法全然覆蓋所有生物醫學工程領域的基礎，但在這個學習過程中，我們將專注於大多數生物醫學工程以及生技和組織工程從事的主要研發領域作出努力。這門課程是醫學和工程及材料之間的橋樑。這將是促進各類工程及設計師和醫事人員之間文化和科學的交通和相互研習課程，促進生物醫學工程的創新發現和發展。在這個過程中，我們將提供一系列的生物學和醫學知識和方法，應用在工程、材料和電子領域，旨在幫助他們能將其整和連接，可以開始從工程進入生物醫學工程的專業，或者提供工程師期許能 “簡單” 理解特定臨床醫療科學和技術。經由醫學背景引導進入此領域，將結合工程及材料師長的經
description.en: Research and development in bioengineering and medical technology, conducted during recent decades, have led to spectacular progress in clinical medicine and healthcare. These achievements have triggered an enormous increase in the number courses offered in the areas of bioengineering, clinical technology and medical informatics; nowadays, most major universities offer curricula oriented towards these fields. The majority of participants however come from engineering background and so modules dealing with basic biological and medical sciences have been included, to the detriments of scientific exchanges between engineers and medical doctors. This study is primarily to give those majoring in the electronic and engineering students a useful glimpse of the principles of human structure and organization and of the interdependence of cellular and organ physiological systems. Although it is no possible to cover all of the biomedical engineering domains in this course, we will have made an e

notes: 電子大四與電子所合開

description.zh: 1. 微波傳輸線 2. 微波元件 3. 微波材料 4. 微波量測 5. 微波傳輸轉換 6. 微波耦合 7. 微波濾波器 8. 微波天線
description.en: 1.Microware Transmission Lines2.Microware Elements3.Microware Matericals4.Microware Measurements5.Microware Transitions6.Microware Couplers7.Microware Filters8.Microware Antennas

name.zh: 地面站網路切片與服務品質保證
name.en: Network Slicing and Quality of Service Technology for Ground Stations

description.zh: 本課程探討地面站網路切片技術及其在實際應用中的服務品質保證方法。課程將涵蓋地面站網路的基本概念，包括結構、架構，以及與通訊系統相關的各種技術。學生將透過深入理論學習和實務案例，瞭解地面站網路切片的原理及其在提供不同服務的情境中的優勢。在課程中，學生將學習如何實施地面站網路切片，包括網路資源分配、優先權設定，以及切片之間的隔離。透過實作專案，學生將有機會實際設計、配置和管理地面站網路切片，以應對不同應用場景下的需求。此外，課程將探討服務品質保證技術，包括流量管理、延遲優化、及網路監控等方面。學生將學習如何測量、分析和改進地面站網路切片的服務品質，以確保滿足各種應用的需求。最後，課程也將討論地面站網路切片的未來趨勢，包括與新興技術的整合、標準化發展，以及面臨的挑戰。透過該課程，學生將具備地面站網路切片及服務品質保證的專業知識和實作技能。
description.en: This course introduces ground station network slicing, focusing on practical use and service quality. Students learn slicing concepts, resource allocation, and isolation through case studies and hands-on projects. The course also covers QoS techniques like traffic control and latency management, along with future trends and emerging technology integration.

notes: 電子大四與電子所合開

description.zh: 以美學入門為基礎，觀察日常生活美學的可能，進而達到提升美學的培養。重點以各產業領域的美學應用和創新設計的案例研究，並以大眾美學為觀察目標，進而達到在各專業裡推廣” 美學 “的最終目的。
description.en: Base on introduction to aesthetics. By daily observation of our surroundings and environment, students are asked to take a closer look to our living world. Class will focus on case studies of aesthetic application and renovation on various design fields. The goal of the class is to develop the daily behavior to living environment attention and eventually promoting aesthetic standards in every profession.

notes: 創意一、互動外生一、工設二合開，請排 50 人以上教室

description.zh: 本課程為「電磁波」課程之延伸，以電磁波輻射特性之探討為主，可作為研究所「電波傳播」、「無線通訊系統」與「智慧型天線」等課程基礎。預修科目：電磁波、電波工程導論中文概述 1. 行動通訊系統中之天線基本觀念 2. 天線重要基本參數 3. 電磁波輻射特性 4. 線型天線 5. 微帶天線 6. 天線陣列設計 7. 天線量測
description.en: 1.General view of Antenna in Mobile System2.Fundamental Parameters of Antenna3.Radiation Characteristics of Electromagnetic Wave4.Linear Wire Antenna5.Microstrip Antenna6.Antenna Array Design7.Antenna Measurement

notes: 電子大三合開

description.zh: 電腦數值控制技術的主要目標是實現機械系統的精密運動控制。本課程因此教授實現機械系統高精度運動所需的關鍵方法。涵蓋的主題包括：位置與軌跡控制的插補方法；應用於系統運動學與動力學的數值分析技術；以及精密運動控制系統的分析與設計。本課程結合實際應用案例以闡明這些方法。藉由本課程，學生將瞭解精密運動控制的設計與分析方法，並且能夠利用現有的軟體與硬體技術對機械系統進行精密控制。
description.en: The primary objective of computer numerical control technology is to enable precise motion control within mechanical systems. Accordingly, this course teaches key methodologies essential for achieving the high-precision motions of mechanical systems. Topics covered include: interpolation methods for position and trajectory control; numerical analysis techniques applied to system kinematics and dynamics; and the analysis and design of precision motion control systems. The course incorporates practical application cases to illustrate these methodologies. Through this course, students can understand the design and analysis methods of precision motion control, and be able to use existing software and hardware technologies to precisely control mechanical systems.

notes: 機電、製科合開；限 20 人

description.zh: 介紹單位換算與有效數位，元素的原子結構、化學方程式平衡與計算，反應熱，氣體與氣體定律，大氣層與環境污染，週期表，化學鍵，化合物的分子結構，熱力學，動力學，反應機構，平衡常數，氧化與還原，酸鹼反應，電化學，混合物的分離及現代科技材料，奠定良好化學基礎。
description.en: The course is designed for chemical engineering major. The topics explore chemistry at a greater depth and with more emphasis on concepts, problems, and calculations. Topics include significant figures, thermochemistry, gases, quantum theory and the electronic structure of atoms, periodic relationships, chemical bonding, chemical reaction, oxidation-reduction reaction, chemical kinetics, chemical equilibrium, acids and bases, changes of states, synthetic polymer materials, electrochemistry.

description.zh: 以國內外設計競賽為主軸，輔導與協助學生積極的參與國內外設計競賽，訓練學生獨立思考與問題解決能力。
description.en: This course aims to focus on domestic and international design competitions, guide and help students' active, and let students have independent thinking and problem-solving skills.

notes: 上限 30 人

description.zh: 引導學生透過課堂上的遊戲、討論、體驗、演練等創意活動，從實作中學習設計思考的原理、過程與應用，進而反思自己所建構的設計思考方法。課程內容包含：設計主題、設計概念、靈感來源、空間功能、風格與材質、情感與氛圍等。
description.en: This course is to lead students a learning-by-doing fashion to help them understand the theories, processes, and application of design thinking by means of playing games, discussion, experience, and doing exercises at classroom, and accordingly, reflect their own approach to design thinking. The content of this course includes:1.Design Theme (Theme)2.Design Concept (Concept / Philosophy)3.Inspiration (Inspiration)4.Space Function (Functionality)5.Style and Materials (Style & Materials)6.Emotion and Atmosphere (Emotion & Atmosphere)

notes: 工設二和建築二合開，上限 15 人

description.zh: 以國內外設計競賽為主軸，輔導與協助學生積極的參與國內外設計競賽，訓練學生獨立思考與問題解決能力。
description.en: This course aims to focus on domestic and international design competitions, guide and help students' active, and let students have independent thinking and problem-solving skills.

notes: 上限 20 人

description.zh: 本課程主要在教導學生探討基本室內環境品質與人體健康間的關係，使學生具備創造健康室內環境的相關知識及操作能力，主要授課要點如下：1. 以各種類型的建築室內環境為主題；2. 探討人為環境與人體健康之關係；3. 探討建築材料、構造與設備對室內環境各項因子之影響；4. 學習室內環境品質量測儀器之操作與判讀能力；5. 具備診斷與改善一般室內環境議題之相關專業知識及操作能力。
description.en: The purpose of this course is to discuss the relationship between Indoor Environment Quality and human healthy, and make sure our students can realize the knowledge of healthy environment and manage it.Contents：1. The indoor environment of different types of building.2. The relationship between the artificial environment and human health.3. Discuss the influence of the building material, construction and equipment on indoor environment.4. Learn to use the instrument to measure indoor environment quality.5. Learn to diagnose and improve indoor environment quality.

notes: 建都所和設計博合開

description.zh: 資訊都市主義（informatical urbanism 或 informational urbanism）為一跨領域學科，旨在透過資訊環境與流程之輔助，推動政策、規劃、發展、策略行動、設計之都市與社區進程。本課程主要在協助學生，以都市與社區問題為基本導向，建立資訊環境與流程之規劃能力。授課主要涵蓋面向：1. 資訊與知識基礎設施 2. 經濟面向 3. 都市治理與公共行政 4. 都市空間之資訊化 5. 地點因子 6. 使用者行為 7. 特殊議題。
description.en: Informatical urbanism (or informational urbanism) is an interdisciplinary area of knowledge, and it mainly utilize the facilitation of informatical environments and procedures for the progression of policy, planning, development, strategic initiative, and design within cities and communities.During this course, student will acquire the planning capability of establish such applicable informatical environments and procedures, based upon explorations of urban and community issues.Main contents of this course: 1. Information and knowledge infrastructures, 2. Economic aspects, 3. Urban governance and administration, 4. Informaticalization of urban space, 5. Location factors, 6. User behavior, 7. Focus area of problem.

notes: 建都所和設計博合開

description.zh: 本課程為財務會計領域之進階課程，針對已具初級會計學之學生深入講授財務會計之理論、觀念、方法及程序。本課程全面納入國際財務報導準則 (IFRS)，內容包括：介紹財務報導觀念架構、主要財務報表編製、講解資產負債表中有關資產、負債、股東權益以及現金流量表與租賃會計等，修習本課程可使學生對 IFRS 有全面整體了解及運用之能力。亦有助於將來參加會計乙級、記帳士及公務人員高考等證照考試。
description.en: This course is an advanced course for financial accounting. It is to teach the financial accounting theory, concept, method and procedure for students with some basic accounting knowledge. The course covers all the materials to understand financial accounting based on IFRS. The course will help students for preparing advanced license examinations for accounting.

description.zh: 本課程中包含下列主題：1. 簡介；2. 電子商店的行銷策略；3. 電子商店的建 置；4. 電子商店的經營與管理；5. 電子商店的法律問題；6. 案例介紹；7. 結論。
description.en: In the course, the following topics will be discussed：1.Overview of EC；2.The marketing strategies of EC；3.How to install an EC；4.The management of EC；5.The current problems of EC；6.Cases study；7.Conclusion.

name.zh: 金融數據分析邏輯思維
name.en: Financial Data Analytics and Logical Thinking

description.zh: 本課程在使學生了解各種不同的資訊科技 (Information Technology) 與管理資訊系統間的關連性，並結合金融企業導入產業議題，實際應用所教授的 IT 技術進行學術研究。藉由 IT 技術的應用演練，讓學生將實際進行問題分析、模型發展、系統開發、模擬實驗及最後的研究結論與模型驗證。提升學生獨立思考與解決問題之能力，培養科學的態度與學術研究的知識。
description.en: This course is to enable students to understand the relationship between various Information Technology and management information systems, and cooperate with financial companies to introduce industrial topics, and actually apply the IT technology taught for academic research. Through the application and exercise of IT technology, students will actually carry out problem analysis, model development, system development, and simulation experiments. At last, students can summarize research conclusions and model validation. Thus, students can improve their independent thinking and problem-solving ability, and further cultivate their scientific attitude and academic research knowledge.

description.zh: 「金融科技個案與實務」課程旨在透過實務導向的個案分析，結合來自銀行、證券、保險及金融科技產業第一線專家的深度交流，協助學生即時掌握產業脈動與政策變化，並全面理解金融科技於現代金融體系中的應用場景與策略挑戰。課程內容將聚焦於國內外金融科技新創企業的創新商業模式、產品設計及市場推進策略，搭配數位支付平台、虛擬銀行、區塊鏈金融應用等實際案例，深入剖析其營運機制與關鍵成功因素。透過系統化的個案研討與產業互動，學生將培養批判性思維、問題解決與策略分析能力，並深化對金融科技創新與傳統金融機構間合作與競爭關係的理解。課程最終目標為強化學生對金融科技產業之實務掌握與就業競爭力，為其未來投入金融科技或相關領域奠定堅實基礎。
description.en: This course aims to provide students with a practice-driven understanding of FinTech through case-based learning. By integrating industry insights and practitioner experiences from the banking, securities, insurance, and FinTech sectors, students will stay informed about fast-changing market trends and regulatory developments and gain a deeper understanding of the challenges of implementing FinTech in today’s financial systems. The course focuses on the innovative business models, product architectures, and market entry strategies of leading FinTech ventures across both domestic and global markets. Selected topics include digital payment ecosystems, virtual banking, blockchain-enabled financial applications, and other emerging technological innovations. Through case analysis, students will critically evaluate the operational structures and key success drivers of these technologies, preparing them to address complex issues at the intersection of finance, technology, and regulation.

description.zh: 本課程主要是在於介紹一些駭客常用的攻擊方法和可能使用工具，並藉由這些技術的解說讓學生瞭解實際駭客的攻擊行為與思維模式，進而習得如何保護所管理的網路或資訊系統免於被攻擊成功。課程中將輔以實機操作，教導您如何利用現有電腦資源掃描及測試系統的安全問題，藉以保護系統安全，課程中將加強實際的上機操作，藉由上課所模擬的網路環境中，讓同學能夠實際感受攻擊的可能實況
description.en: This course is mainly to introduce network and system attack methods and security assessment tools used by hackers, and to explain the attack behavior and thinking strategy of hackers through the explanation of these technologies. In addition, this course teaches students learn how to protect the managed network or information system to against from being compromised successfully. The course will be supplemented by practices, and teaching students how to use the existing tools to scan and test the security of the system. In order to protect the security of the system, the course will focus on the system and network practices, which can let the students feel the possible network and system attacks.

notes: 資財四甲、資財所合開

description.zh: 本課程旨在讓學生深入理解並掌握生成式人工智慧（Generative AI）的基本概念與實務應用。內容涵蓋 GenAI 介紹、提示工程（Prompt Engineering）、大規模語言模型（LLM）技術原理，以及設計思考專案，應用於金融或管理相關議題，並探討相關道德議題。課程強調實務應用，結合行銷理論和金融數據分析，邀請業界專家分享最新行業動態和實務經驗。
description.en: This course aims to provide students with a comprehensive understanding and mastery of the fundamental concepts and practical applications of Generative AI. The content covers an introduction to GenAI, Prompt Engineering, the technical principles of Large Language Models (LLM), and a design thinking project applied to finance or management-related issues, as well as discussions on relevant ethical topics. Emphasizing practical application, the course integrates marketing theories and financial data analysis, inviting industry experts to share the latest industry trends and practical insights.

notes: 資財四甲、資財所合開

name.zh: 人工智慧物聯網與應用
name.en: Artificial Intelligence of Things and Applications

description.zh: 人工智慧物聯網課程將物聯網的感測器與感測網路、邊緣閘道、雲端服務與存取裝置，結合機器學習、深度學習及智慧分析技術，協同建構從端到端的智慧應用，涵蓋無人商店與智慧支付、遠距醫療與照護、智慧製造與智慧家庭等多元場景。本課程著重於人工智慧在裝置與服務設計中的關鍵角色，並透過實務案例與專題討論，培養學生規劃並開發創新智慧物聯網解決方案的能力。
description.en: The AIoT course integrates sensors and sensor networks, edge gateways, cloud services, and user access devices with machine learning, deep learning, and intelligent analytics to jointly build end-to-end smart applications. These applications cover a variety of domains such as Unmanned stores and smart payment, remote healthcare and telemedicine, smart manufacturing, and smart home systems. This course emphasizes the pivotal role of AI in device and service design, and through practical case studies and project discussions, aims to equip students with the ability to plan and develop innovative intelligent IoT solutions.

notes: 資財四甲、資財所合開

name.zh: 網路系統程式開發與安全

description.zh: 隨著金融交易、機器人應用等網路應用快速成長，系統需同時具備高擴展性、可靠性與安全性。為因應此趨勢，本課程培養學生具備從應用層到作業系統核心的程式開發實力，並強調 TCP/IP 通訊與系統架構整合。
description.en: With the rapid growth of internet services—such as financial transactions and robotic applications—modern systems must be scalable, reliable, and secure. This course addresses these needs by training students in programming skills from the application layer to the OS kernel, emphasizing TCP/IP networking and system architecture.

notes: 資財四甲、資財所合開

description.zh: 本課程銜接上學期資金管理內容，將資金管理理論運用於實務金融市場、Blackjack 21 點。包括最佳化比例、賽馬賭局、損益量化、最大回檔風險、槓桿空間模型、固定分數與固定比例的運用。建議具有基礎程式撰寫能力、先修習過演算法交易、資金管理.. 等課程。
description.en: This course connects the money management content of the previous semester, and applies the theory to the practical financial market and Blackjack 21 points. The course includes optimal bidding fraction, horse racing, profit quantification maximum draw-down risk, leverage space models, and the use of fixed fractions and fixed ratios. It is recommended to have the ability to write basic programs, and have taken courses such as algorithmic trading and money management in advance.

notes: 科研 825

description.zh: 本課程銜接上學期程式交易課程內容 (限定修過上學期的同學才能選修)，我們將使用 R 語言進行更為精實的交易策略建構，包刮 K 棒分析、指標建構、訊號探勘、資金管理… 等。此外，我們下半學期將邀請業師教授 XQ 程式交易軟體，撰寫 XS 程式語法進行回測以及模擬下單
description.en: This course connects with the last semester courses “program trading” (limited to last semester students to join). We will use the R language for more sophisticated trading strategy construction, including K-bar analysis, index construction, trading signal exploration, money management, and so on. In addition, we will invite the instructor to teach XQ program trading software in the last half-semester, usingXS program grammar to back-testing trading strategies.

notes: 科研 823

name.zh: 人工智慧物聯網與應用
name.en: Artificial Intelligence of Things and Applications

description.zh: 人工智慧物聯網課程將物聯網的感測器與感測網路、邊緣閘道、雲端服務與存取裝置，結合機器學習、深度學習及智慧分析技術，協同建構從端到端的智慧應用，涵蓋無人商店與智慧支付、遠距醫療與照護、智慧製造與智慧家庭等多元場景。本課程著重於人工智慧在裝置與服務設計中的關鍵角色，並透過實務案例與專題討論，培養學生規劃並開發創新智慧物聯網解決方案的能力。
description.en: The AIoT course integrates sensors and sensor networks, edge gateways, cloud services, and user access devices with machine learning, deep learning, and intelligent analytics to jointly build end-to-end smart applications. These applications cover a variety of domains such as Unmanned stores and smart payment, remote healthcare and telemedicine, smart manufacturing, and smart home systems. This course emphasizes the pivotal role of AI in device and service design, and through practical case studies and project discussions, aims to equip students with the ability to plan and develop innovative intelligent IoT solutions.

notes: 資財四甲、資財所合開

description.zh: 本課程旨在讓學生深入理解並掌握生成式人工智慧（Generative AI）的基本概念與實務應用。內容涵蓋 GenAI 介紹、提示工程（Prompt Engineering）、大規模語言模型（LLM）技術原理，以及設計思考專案，應用於金融或管理相關議題，並探討相關道德議題。課程強調實務應用，結合行銷理論和金融數據分析，邀請業界專家分享最新行業動態和實務經驗。
description.en: This course aims to provide students with a comprehensive understanding and mastery of the fundamental concepts and practical applications of Generative AI. The content covers an introduction to GenAI, Prompt Engineering, the technical principles of Large Language Models (LLM), and a design thinking project applied to finance or management-related issues, as well as discussions on relevant ethical topics. Emphasizing practical application, the course integrates marketing theories and financial data analysis, inviting industry experts to share the latest industry trends and practical insights.

notes: 資財四甲、資財所、IMBA 和創新資安合開

name.zh: 網路系統程式開發與安全

description.zh: 隨著金融交易、機器人應用等網路應用快速成長，系統需同時具備高擴展性、可靠性與安全性。為因應此趨勢，本課程培養學生具備從應用層到作業系統核心的程式開發實力，並強調 TCP/IP 通訊與系統架構整合。
description.en: With the rapid growth of internet services—such as financial transactions and robotic applications—modern systems must be scalable, reliable, and secure. This course addresses these needs by training students in programming skills from the application layer to the OS kernel, emphasizing TCP/IP networking and system architecture.

notes: 資財四甲、資財所和創新資安合開

description.zh: 臺灣對於「文化資產」的認定，主要來自於〈文化資產保存法〉的確立，本課程介紹臺灣文化資產保存法的發展脈絡，以及各項有形與無形文化資產的類別和價值，使學生對於文化資產有概略性的了解，並能對於臺灣當代文化資產相關議題有所涉略，並進行案例觀察與分析。
description.en: This course aims to introduce the concept of hertiage in Taiwan, both the tangible and intangible hertiage. The development of Cultural Heritage Preservation Act in Taiwan is taught in this class, and further, different case studies of heritage preservation, conservation and restoration are also examined. By taking this class, students will be able to observe and analyse hertiage issues from cultral, social, economical and aesthetics perspectives.

notes: 上限 30 人

description.zh: 課程著重於彩瓷陶瓷專業人才的系統化培力，探討彩繪陶瓷的多元工藝表現，並深入其歷史脈絡與發展體系中加以分析，研究其繪製技法、工序流程、內容形態及美學樣貌的演變。透過理論探討與實作並重的教學模式，培育新世代工藝人才，致力於傳統技藝的保存與創新。
description.en: This course focuses on the structured training of skilled professionals in colored porcelain craftsmanship. It examines diverse artistic expressions of painted ceramics within their historical and developmental contexts, analyzing the evolution of painting techniques, processes, content forms, and aesthetic paradigms. By integrating theoretical discourse with hands-on practice, the course aims to cultivate a new generation of artisans committed to the preservation and innovation of this traditional craft.

notes: 鶯歌場域進行集中授課教學 配合 USR 計畫

description.zh: 本課程旨在訓練學生開拓新的視野，蒐集、分析口述歷史資料並進行一份口述作品。課程將採實作練習與理論兼顧，全面分析整理台灣學界與非學界口述訪談之成果，檢視口述歷史訪談方法、口述紀錄出版品與各種延伸加值運用：紀錄片、電影、漫畫、文史書籍以及其他形式的智慧財產（IP）。
description.en: This course aims to broaden students' perspectives and equip them with the skills to collect and analyze oral history recordings, and produce an oral history project. It will combine practical exercises with theoretical learning and provide a comprehensive analysis of oral interviews conducted by both academic and non-academic institutions in Taiwan. The course will examine oral history interview methods, oral record transcriptions/recordings, and various extended applications of oral history materials, including documentaries, films, comics, literary and historical books, and other intellectual property (IP) projects.

description.zh: 本課程藉由不同情境之英語錄影帶，以及專題的語彙題目來提供一個英語談話的情境使學生能學習合宜的詞句。小組討論、角色演練、口頭報告皆為主要教學技巧，俾能增強學生之聽說能力。
description.en: This course aims at providing an English-speaking environment to allow students learn about the speaking strategies and common expressions used in different situations through viewing video films and oral practice. Small-group/pair discussion and role-playing are also parts of the methodologies.

notes: B 組 - 學號尾號數偶數，僅限英文系學生修讀

description.zh: 本課程分為兩部分：（1）英文文法觀念的溫故知新，並引導學生將正確的文法觀念運用在閱讀與寫作上，學生可加強基本句型練習、句子改正及句型修正。相關討論包括直述句、引述句、句型變化與修飾；（2）英語修辭法：聽講溝通的有效原理原則。課堂討論主題包括：指稱、一致、倒裝等修辭觀念。修習本課後，學生對出現在相同邏輯意義語境中， 利用不同表達方式以凸顯各種語意的方式與內涵，當有更進一步的體認。
description.en: This course is divided into two parts: (a) The first part is designed for the students to familiarize themselves with English grammatical framework in relation to reading and writing. A review of grammatical ideas at high level is reinforced by correcting sentence errors, and revising awkward usage of words or sentence structures. The main subjects include English sentence structures, verbal usages, conjunctions, and sequences. Related topics for class discussion cover direct and indirect speech, sentence transformation and modification of sentences; (b) The second half of the course focuses on English rhetoric--principles of effective written and spoken communication. Topics for class discussion include reference, coherence, reverse structures and some related rhetorical concepts. It is hoped that the students will know better the significance brought about by the variations of different expressions that occur in the similar linguistic contexts.

notes: B 組 - 學號尾號數偶數，僅限英文系學生修讀

name.zh: 新聞英語及聽力訓練（一）

description.zh: 本課程利用新聞教材加強英語字彙能力及聽力技巧， 內容採用電台、報紙、電視的時事、深度報導和全球議題以增強學生英語知識。同時，學生亦可獲得各種有用的聽力技巧以加強英語聽力。
description.en: This course is designed to increase vocabulary power and develop listening skills in English through up-to-date news. Current events, in-depth reports as well as global issues from radio, newspapers and T.V are provided to enrich the student's English knowledge. Effective listening skills are reinforced to enhance the student's listening comprehension.

notes: B 組 - 學號尾號數偶數，僅限英文系學生修讀

name.zh: 兒童文學與青少年文學
name.en: Literature for Children and Young Adults

description.zh: 本課程的主旨在針對兒童文學與青少年文學的經典之作，給予學生閱讀與分析上的訓練，並培養學生對不同文學主題和寫作風格的鑑賞能力。
description.en: Focusing on some of the masterpieces in children's literature and young adults' literature, this course aims at sharpening up the students' reading and analyzing skills and to cultivate their appreciation for different literary themes and writing styles.

description.zh: 本課程主要探討當前重要教育議題，如：藝術與美感教育、性別教育、人權教育、勞動教育、法治教育、生命教育、品德教育、多元文化教育、新移民教育、原住民教育、媒體素養教育、生涯發展教育、環境教育、藥物教育、性教育、國際教育等各類教育議題。教育專業課程與教師專業素養指標，請參閱連結:https://tec.ntut.edu.tw/p/412-1022-10857.php?Lang=zh-tw
description.en: The course is aimed to provide current issues in education, such as: artistic and aesthetic education, gender education, human rights education, labor education, legal education, life education, moral education, multicultural education, new immigrants education, aboriginal education, media literacy education, career development education, environmental education, drug education , sex education , international education and other education issues.Indicators of Teacher’s professional competencies in professional education, please visit the link:https://tec.ntut.edu.tw/p/412-1022-10857.php?Lang=zh-tw

notes: 限師資生修習 (需額外繳交學分費)

description.zh: 本課程強調全方位的國際商用英語溝通。現今各領域上之商業活動多以英語進行，因此本課程注重發展學生以英語文進行流暢之溝通的關鍵能力，特別強調商業組織內外部常見的正式溝通之形式，包括商用英語寫作、簡報與會議技巧。課時也納入非正式溝通技巧，指導學生學習應對職場情境，因應相關之溝通需求。
description.en: This current course emphasizes a holistic view of business communication in a global context. Given that business communication across from fields of business activities is now made possible by the English language, the course thus aims to develop the ability to use critical skills essential to successful communication in English, with particular emphases on forms of formal communications that are highly visible within and outside business organizations, including writing of business correspondence and reports, presentations and meetings. Informal communication skills are also incorporated to address workplace situations to identify the relevant communication needs.

name.en: Studies in English and American Fiction

description.zh: 本課程旨在引導學生如何以批評的角度閱讀小說。課程討論有兩個重點：（一）小說的技巧：如情節、結構、人物塑造、敘事者與敘事策略、背景鋪陳、象徵與意象等。（二）小說與文學理論的關係：如何將文學理論運用到小說的閱讀與分析。
description.en: This course will introduce students to critical approaches and principles in the study of fiction. We will discuss such features as plot, structure, characterization, narrator, narrative strategy, setting, symbol, image, etc.. We will also examine various theoretical approaches that can be brought to bear on the study of fiction. There will be a particular emphasis on the application of theories to hone students' critical reading skills.

description.zh: 本課程旨在進一步加強學生的口語表達溝通之能力。經由合宜的活動設計，如小組討論，與英語談話情境的塑造，如面談，學生將獲得充分機會以演練聽講的技巧。
description.en: This course is designed to develop oral communication skills at a higher level. Stimulated theme-based scenarios and authentic content will be used to engage students with the purpose of generating lively conversation, and video films. Activities include task-based pair and small-group discussion for maximum practice and personalization.

notes: B 組 - 學號尾號數偶數，僅限英文系學生修讀

description.zh: 本課程旨在讓學生具備國際新聞編譯之相關知識，並透過實務演練培養新聞編譯之能力。課程內容主要含括 (一) 國際新聞編譯之介紹（如新聞編譯現況、製作流程、專業條件與譯者相關知能）；（二）新聞編譯之策略與技巧（如刪除、重組、整合新聞訊息）；（三）新聞編譯之模擬與實務練習。
description.en: This course aims to help students build up the basic knowledge of news trans-editing and develop students’ trans-editing skills through practical training. The course covers the following areas: (1) an introduction to news trans-editing (e.g. the current state of the news trans-editing field, the production workflow, professional qualifications and personal traits of news translators); (2) strategies and skills of news trans-editing (e.g. the strategies of deletion, restructuring, abridgement and synthesis); (3) practical training of news trans-editing in a simulated or real environment.

description.zh: 本課程以當代文學批評和文化理論為基礎，探討小說與戲劇改編成電影的過程中，文字轉化成視覺意象之間的差異，期能提升多元化的思辯及表達能力。
description.en: Drawing upon modern literary criticism and cultural theory, this course aims to examine the difference between works of literature and the distinctive medium of the cinema. Students will be offered a variety of discussion which stimulates the kinds of critical thinking that lead to a better understanding of the process of transposition from literature to film.

description.zh: 本課程旨在訓練學生公開表達之能力，內容包括語言表達基本原則與技巧、肢體語言與演講要領，備題演講及即席演講演練。
description.en: This course is designed to enable students to develop the principles and skills necessary for public speaking. Included will be guidelines for giving a speech and displaying body language, and practices for prepared speech and impromptu speech.

notes: B 組 - 學號尾號數偶數，僅限英文系學生修讀

description.zh: 本課程介紹研究方法和論文寫作知識，期能培養學生獨立研究和撰寫學術報告、論文的基本能力。主要分為三部份：（一）研究內涵與步驟，（二）主要的研究方法，（三）如何撰寫英文論文及報告。涵蓋主題包括：運用圖書館資源選擇研究主題、研究計劃的撰寫、問卷調查法、訪問法、觀察法、田野工作研究方法、文獻資料分析法（內容分析法）、個案研究法、相關研究法、實驗法、文學研究法，研究報告論文格式與寫作要領，如何撰寫文獻探討，參考書目寫法等。
description.en: This course aims at providing students with the fundamental knowledge and competence that they will need in doing research and writing research papers. Its main purpose is to familiarize students with methods, procedures, and techniques that are applicable to quantitative and qualitative research as well as to improve their ability to write research papers. The main topics for instruction include: the research process; major research methods; and the structure of a research paper. The research methods primarily studied include the experimental method, descriptive research, ethnography, case study, observation, survey research (questionnaire and interviews), content analysis/documentary analysis, and critical approaches to literature.

description.zh: 本課程使學生具有進階西班牙語能力，並加強會話及閱讀能力訓練。
description.en: The focus of this course is enable students to enhance their Spanish abilities and to strengthen the training or drilling of conversation and reading comprehension of the Spanish language.

description.zh: 本課程在研討課程設計之理論與應用。
description.en: This course is designed to develop theory and applications in English curriculum.

name.zh: AI 輔助翻譯與人機協作

description.zh: 此進階翻譯課程旨在培養學生整合 AI 工具至翻譯流程的能力。透過結合線上翻譯計畫與先進 AI 科技，學生將於實際翻譯計畫中，學習如何運用科技來提升翻譯能力與效率。本課程著重三大主軸：（1）發展後設認知技能；（2）增強工具使用能力；（3）提升機器翻譯譯後編輯技巧。學生將參與翻譯計畫（包括維基百科、全球之聲、TED），並運用 ChatGPT 和 Claude 等 AI 工具進行批判性思考，以分析並解決翻譯過程所遇到之問題。本課程還將運用 AI 驅動工具（例如柏拉圖譜系統），來增強學生搜尋和整合翻譯資源的能力，並訓練學生如何對 AI 生成之譯文進行人工譯後編輯，以提高翻譯質量。
description.en: This advanced translation course aims to equip students with the skills necessary to integrate AI tools into their translation workflows. Through merging online translation projects with cutting-edge AI technologies, students will gain hands-on experience in using technology to improve their translation proficiency and efficiency. The course focuses on three main areas: (1) developing metacognitive skills, (2) enhancing instrumental competence, and (3) refining machine translation post-editing techniques. By engaging in online translation projects, including Wikipedia, Global Voices Lingua, and TED, students will employ AI tools, such as ChatGPT and Claude, to critically evaluate and enhance their problem-solving and decision-making capabilities. Additionally, this course will bolster students’ resource-searching abilities through AI-driven tools (e.g., Platograph) and train them in manually editing AI-generated translations to enhance quality.

description.zh: 世界經濟論壇 2025 年《就業未來報告》指出，AI 的趨勢正改變就業市場並加速轉型。人工智慧 (AI) 作為一種能表現智慧的技術，已深刻改變了人類與科技產品的互動方式。隨著科技的日新月異，AI 從基本的數據運算逐步發展為具備創造力的工具，其中「生成式人工智慧」(Generative AI) 尤為矚目。 本課程旨在培養學生對圖像生成式 AI 的素養與實務應用。透過多種 AI 繪圖工具的學習與應用，引導學生創作出具視覺吸引力的作品，並幫助設計流程的發展。同時，課程將提供最新的趨勢資訊與實作教學，讓學生能完成具體的創意項目與設計專案。
description.en: The World Economic Forum's 2025 "Future of Jobs Report" indicates that the trend of AI is transforming the job market and accelerating its evolution. Artificial Intelligence (AI), as a technology capable of exhibiting intelligence, has profoundly changed the way humans interact with technological products. With the rapid advancement of technology, AI has evolved from basic data computation to a tool with creative capabilities, with "Generative AI" being particularly noteworthy. This course aims to cultivate students' literacy and practical application of image-generative AI. Through the learning and application of various AI drawing tools, students will be guided to create visually appealing works and assist in the development of design processes. Additionally, the course will provide the latest trend information and practical teaching, enabling students to complete specific creative projects and design assignments.

notes: 需自備筆電

name.zh: 職業教育與訓練暨生涯規劃
name.en: Vocational Education and Training and Career Planning

description.zh: 本課程包含「職業教育與訓練」及「生涯規劃」兩大主題。在「職業教育與訓練」部份，針對職業教育與訓練做整體性介紹，促使學生瞭解我國技職教育重要政策與特色、認識我國技職教育之設置群科、建立學生從事技職教育教學之基礎。在「生涯規劃」部份，針對除了加強學生自我覺察與職涯規劃，也增進學生未來任教時，協助自己的學生進行職涯探索與規劃的能力。教育專業課程與教師專業素養指標，請參閱連結: https://tec.ntut.edu.tw/p/412-1022-10857.php?Lang=zh-tw
description.en: This course involves "Vocational Education and Training" and "Career Planning" two main topics. The "Vocational Education and Training" topic offers an introduction about vocational education and training, such as (a) flexible adjustment the system of vocational education and training in Taiwan; (b) emphasizing vocation education and training system; (c) establish solid theoretical foundation of the vocational education and training. The "Career Planning" topic offers an introduction to the concept of career to not only enhance students' self-awareness and the skills of career planning, but also use those skills to assist their future students to prepare their career planning.Indicators of Teacher’s professional competencies in professional education, please visit the link: https://tec.ntut.edu.tw/p/412-1022-10857.php?Lang=zh-tw

notes: 限 113 年教育專業課程版本師資生修 (需額外繳交學分費)

description.zh: 本課程的目標在提供有志從事教育工作的學生有關教育心理學的系統知識使其在未來從事教職時，具最有效的方法瞭解，敘述，預測及其學生的行為並從而採用最佳的教學方式，以達成教育目標。教育專業課程與教師專業素養指標，請參閱連結:https://tec.ntut.edu.tw/p/412-1022-10857.php?Lang=zh-tw
description.en: The object of this course is to introduce the educational psychology to the students who are receiving teacher education. It presents the students with the basic psychology theories of instructional process; mental-physical development; the principles of learning and instruction; cultivating of thinking and creative; motivation and interest in instructing process; the measurement of individual difference; proper instructions against differently mental students; teacher-student relationship and students behaviors; instruction evaluation. After finishing this course, students will have better understanding regarding the factors shaping the students’ behaviors, as well as can choose the best instructional ways for the teaching.Indicators of Teacher’s professional competencies in professional education, please visit the link: https://tec.ntut.edu.tw/p/412-1022-10857.php?Lang=zh-tw

notes: 第一階段，可預修 (需額外繳交學分費)

description.zh: 「輔導工作是所有教育工作者的責任」。任何人都會遭遇問題，成長中的學生尤其有各式各樣的問題。身為人師，在教學過程中應輔導學生解決問題，以培養健康進取，有能力解決問題，適應環境的學生為己任。在本課程的目標即在透過對青春期挫折徵候的了瞭以及學者心理分析輔導法、個體心理輔導法、存在主義輔導法、理情輔導法、認知輔導法、溝通分析輔導法、行為輔導法等輔導理論，並配合實例分析使未來之教育工作人員獲得工作時的輔導知能以及培養輔導工作的志趣。 教育專業課程與教師專業素養指標，請參閱連結:https://tec.ntut.edu.tw/p/412-1022-10857.php?Lang=zh-tw
description.en: The teachers should keep in mind the duty to guide students to overcome the frustration or to solve difficult problems as to nurture students to be healthy, positive, with their own abilities to overcome difficulties and to be apt to the environment. The object of this subject is to help students with the willingness to be teachers get the knowledge and abilities of guidance on their teaching in the future, and develop willingness and interests of guidance. This course presents students with the units including understanding the symptom of adolescent frustration, the method of person-center approach, the method of rational-emotive therapy, the method of cognitive therapy, the method of behavior therapy. In addition, this course also introduces many practical cases so that students can effectively study the relevant theories. Indicators of Teacher’s professional competencies in professional education, please visit the link: https://tec.ntut.edu.tw/p/412-1022-10857.php?Lang=zh-tw

notes: 第一階段，可預修 (需額外繳交學分費)

description.zh: 本課程在培養師培生之課程與教學設計相關知能，具體目標：(一) 瞭解課程相關學理概念，具備課程設計之思辨力；(二) 善用課程設計原理，設計符合課綱、學生需求之課程教材；(三) 瞭解並善用教學原理，進行有效的教學設計。教育專業課程與教師專業素養指標，請參閱連結:https://tec.ntut.edu.tw/p/412-1022-10857.php?Lang=zh-tw
description.en: The purpose of this course is to make students understand how to design different curriculum for every different course. The designer have to totally understand the needs of this course and know the detail of every technique. A good designer is the basis of successful teacher.Indicators of Teacher’s professional competencies in professional education, please visit the link:https://tec.ntut.edu.tw/p/412-1022-10857.php?Lang=zh-tw

notes: 第一階段，可預修 (需額外繳交學分費)
