name.zh: 自然科學領域教材教法
name.en: Teaching Materials and Methods for the Area of Natural Science

description.zh: 透過本課程，使學生：1. 能瞭解自然科學領域核心能力及專業知能。 2. 能編製教材與教案。 3. 能依據教材與教案執行教學。 4. 能建置個人學習檔案與教學心得報告。 5. 能熟知相關領域最新發展趨勢，並收集資訊以輔助教學及進行教材編修。教育專業課程與教師專業素養指標，請參閱連結:https://tec.ntut.edu.tw/p/412-1022-10857.php?Lang=zh-tw
description.en: The object of this course are to ： 1.Understand the core abilities for Natural Science. 2.Construct and compile teaching materials and teaching plans. 3.Conduct teaching according to teaching plans and materials. 4.Construct and compile the learning portfolio and teaching reflection report for the subject matter. 5.Collect and deep understand related information and development for the subject matter to facilitate teaching and materials compilation.Indicators of Teacher’s professional competencies in professional education, please visit the link:https://tec.ntut.edu.tw/p/412-1022-10857.php?Lang=zh-tw

notes: ◎限完成第一階段者修習 (合班)(需額外繳交學分費)

name.zh: 外語群 / 英語文專長教材教法
name.en: Teaching Materials and Methods for the Area of English

description.zh: 透過本課程，使學生：1. 能瞭解外語群 / 語文領域英語文專長核心能力及專業知能。 2. 能編製教材與教案。 3. 能依據教材與教案執行教學。 4. 能建置個人學習檔案與教學心得報告。 5. 能熟知相關領域最新發展趨勢，並收集資訊以輔助教學及進行教材編修。教育專業課程與教師專業素養指標，請參閱連結:https://tec.ntut.edu.tw/p/412-1022-10857.php?Lang=zh-tw
description.en: The object of this course are to ： 1.Understand the core abilities for English. 2.Construct and compile teaching materials and teaching plans. 3.Conduct teaching according to teaching plans and materials. 4.Construct and compile the learning portfolio and teaching reflection report for the subject matter. 5.Collect and deep understand related information and development for the subject matter to facilitate teaching and materials compilation.Indicators of Teacher’s professional competencies in professional education, please visit the link:https://tec.ntut.edu.tw/p/412-1022-10857.php?Lang=zh-tw

notes: ◎限完成第一階段者修習 (合班)(需額外繳交學分費)

name.zh: 藝術群 / 藝術領域教材教法
name.en: Teaching Materials and Methods for the Area of Art

description.zh: 透過本課程，使學生：1. 能瞭解藝術群 / 藝術領域核心能力及專業知能。 2. 能編製教材與教案。 3. 能依據教材與教案執行教學。 4. 能建置個人學習檔案與教學心得報告。 5. 能熟知相關領域最新發展趨勢，並收集資訊以輔助教學及進行教材編修。
description.en: The object of this course are to ： 1.Understand the core abilities for Art. 2.Construct and compile teaching materials and teaching plans. 3.Conduct teaching according to teaching plans and materials. 4.Construct and compile the learning portfolio and teaching reflection report for the subject matter. 5.Collect and deep understand related information and development for the subject matter to facilitate teaching and materials compilation.

notes: 本學年停開【停開】

description.zh: 本課程旨在教導學生： 1. 了解服務學習的意義與理念。 2. 具備規劃服務學習活動或方案的能力 3. 執行教育專業相關的服務活動與方案 4. 具備團隊合作與問題解決能力 5. 遵守教育專業人員的倫理規範 6. 反思服務的成果，增進專業成長 7. 運用個人教育專業知能服務人群 8. 透過教育服務中反省自己的教學專業知能 9. 透過教育專業服務，習得教育專業人員的服務倫理。 教育專業課程與教師專業素養指標，請參閱連結:https://tec.ntut.edu.tw/p/412-1022-10857.php?Lang=zh-tw
description.en: The course is aimed to provide practicing administrative, teaching and classroom management affairs at internship schools. In addition, the course is aimed to cultivate students to have educational professional ethics among the interactions with teachers and students of internship schools.Indicators of Teacher’s professional competencies in professional education, please visit the link:https://tec.ntut.edu.tw/p/412-1022-10857.php?Lang=zh-tw

notes: 限師資生修習 (需額外繳交學分費)

description.zh: 本課程目標旨在提供學習者具有特殊教育概念，使能激起原有動機，願意獻身予特殊教育學生。教育專業課程與教師專業素養指標，請參閱連結:https://tec.ntut.edu.tw/p/412-1022-10857.php?Lang=zh-tw
description.en: Introduction to the field of special education, and arouse learners' original motivation devoted to special needs students.Indicators of Teacher’s professional competencies in professional education, please visit the link:https://tec.ntut.edu.tw/p/412-1022-10857.php?Lang=zh-tw

notes: 可預修 (需額外繳交學分費)

description.zh: 本課程的目標在培養學生瞭解教育與社會關係，從而能自教育的社會基礎理論觀點來從事教育決策，分析教育制度，探求教學原則，解決教育問題。 教育專業課程與教師專業素養指標，請參閱連結:https://tec.ntut.edu.tw/p/412-1022-10857.php?Lang=zh-tw
description.en: The object of this course is to introduce the students the understanding of the relationship between education and society. It presents the students with the relation between education and the main sociological theories, such as socialization, social structure, social change. It also offers students with the social condition of schools, the teacher's role, the teacher groups and the teacher's social status. After finishing this course, the students can use the knowledge learned from this course to make educational decision, analyze educational systems, study the instructional principles and solve educational problems in view of the basic theories of sociology of education, and thus lead to achieve the educational goal.Indicators of Teacher’s professional competencies in professional education, please visit the link:https://tec.ntut.edu.tw/p/412-1022-10857.php?Lang=zh-tw

notes: 可預修 (需額外繳交學分費)

name.zh: 物件導向程式設計與應用

description.zh: 1. 物件導向程式設計特性介紹 2. 視窗圖形界面設計 3. SQL 語言的使用與資料庫連結 4. 智慧型演算法 5. 工程實例應用
description.en: 1.An introduction to object-oriented design 2.Windows GUI design 3.SQL and Database connection programming 4.Intelligent Algorithms 5. Applications of engineering problems

description.zh: 本課程之設計，在介紹學生資訊安全的概念，並瞭解相關的技術與應用。本課程包括下列主題：資訊安全簡介、傳統加密法、私鑰加密技術、公鑰加密技術與雜湊函數、訊息認證編碼與協定、認證系統、電子郵件安全技術、網際網路協定安全技術、全球資訊網安全技術、系統安全技術、防火牆系統等。
description.en: This course is designed to provide students with the knowledge and techniques essential in information security. The topics to be covered include: introductions to information security, conventional encryption, private key technologies, public key technologies and hash functions, message authentication code and protocols, authentication systems, Kerberos, X.509 7, E-Mail security, PGP, S/MIME, IP security, Web security, SHTTP, SSL (Secure Session Layer), system security, and firewall systems.

description.zh: 先修課程：無。本實習內容為汽車引擎實習，包含汽油及柴油引擎拆裝，引擎實驗，引擎量測與調整，點火、燃油、冷卻及潤滑系統之檢測及故障排除，定期調諧保養及引擎排氣檢測。
description.en: Automobile Engine Service Shop Practice ,Gasoline & Diesel Engine Assembly, Engine Test, Engine Tune-up and Repair, Trouble-shooting and Instrument Adjustment on: Ignition System, Fuel System, Cooling System, Lubrication System, and Starting System, Routine Engine Tune-Up and Engine Exhaust Emission Check .

description.zh: 本課程所為研究所課程，內容包括主動煞車控制系統介紹，將針對 ABS, TCS, ESP 及 SBC 煞車系統原理介紹，煞車系統及控制器之數學模式及設計等，應用實例介紹。
description.en: This course is designed mainly for senior/graduate students. The objective of this course is to introduce active braking control system, such as ABS, TCS, ESP and SBC background. The mathematical model of the system and its applications for the controller design of braking system are also included.

description.zh: 本課程介紹有限元素分析法基本原理及其在各種工程問題上之應用。包含有限元素分析法之基本觀念，利用變分原理建立有限元素模式，形狀函數及等參數元素，一維問題：桿、桁架、樑及骨架等，二維問題：平面應力應變及板殼問題。三維問題：一般實體，有限元素分析之計算機程式處理，有限元素分析於動態問題之應用，相關有限元素分析套裝軟體簡介
description.en: Introduction to the finite element method and its application to engineering problems. Topics include Variational Formulation and Finite Element Formulations, 1-D, 2-D and 3-D Element Shapes, Numerical Integration, Applications to dynamic problem and Introduction to Commercial Finite Element Programs.

notes: 綜科館 610，日車碩、智慧鐵道碩士學程和機電博合開

name.zh: 永磁同步電動機之理論與控制
name.en: Theory and Control of Permanent-Magnet Synchronous Motor

description.zh: 1. 永磁電機理論 2. 控制法則分析與模擬 3. 動態特性分析 4. 近代應用介紹
description.en: 1.Basic theory of operation 2. Control strategies analysis and simulation 3. Dynamic performance analysis 4. Introduction to recent applications of the PMSM.

notes: 預選限 36 人。

description.zh: 1. 人工智慧簡介 2. 陳述式邏輯 3. 確定模型之學習 4. 非確定型知識之表示 5. 貝式網路 6. 機率式模型之參數學習 7. 機率式模型之結構學習 8. 非監督式學習 9. 基因法則 10. 基因規劃法 11. 粒子群最佳化演算法
description.en: 1. Introduction to Artificial Intelligence2. Propositional Logic3. Learning of Deterministic Models4. Representation of Uncertain Knowledge5. Bayesian Networks6. Parameter Learning of Probabilistic Models7. Structure Learning of Probabilistic Models8. Unsupervised Learning 9. Genetic Algorithm10. Genetic Programming11. Particle Swarm Optimization

notes: 電機所、電資外生和創新 AI 合開

description.zh: 本課程以 R 語言介紹資料科學和數據可視化。本課程注重於資料科學的實際應用，學生將學習到如何整理、探索、轉換和數據可視化。 學生以作業練習和獨立項目來獲得實數據科學的基本技能。
description.en: This course introduces data science and data visualization through the R language. Focusing on applied data science skills, students will be introduced to the methods to tidy, explore, transform, and visualize data. Students will practice them with real data in exercises and projects.

description.zh: 此課涵蓋計算機處理器之基本結構原理及設計，包括：指令集、組合語言、算術單元、暫存器、中央處理器、記憶體管理、匯流排、輸入及輸出、速度與效能、多核心處理器等。透過此課程，學生可學習到計算機處理器原理、設計與基本架構。
description.en: This course covers the fundamental principles and design of computer processors, including instruction sets, assembly language, arithmetic units, registers, central processing units, memory management, buses, input and output, speed and performance, and multi-core processors. Through this course, students will learn the principles, design, and basic architecture of computer processors.

name.zh: 教育訓練實施與績效評鑑

description.zh: 為了使訓練資源的更有效運用，本課程希望讓學生了解，企業內部在實施訓練之前，應客觀、嚴謹的加以評估，並追蹤其實施後的成效，以正確評估訓練的效益。
description.en: To make better use of the training resources, the curriculum expects to make students understand that any enterprise should objectively and carefully evaluate the training program before its employment, and keep track of its effect after its employment to make sure the effectiveness of the training program.

description.zh: 操作化學相關的實驗
description.en: It covers the fundamental experiments in chemistry.

notes: 高職生

description.zh: 本課程將透過每週專題演講方式，讓學生了解有機材料之最新開發成品或最先進之研究成果。演講者之安排將以校外知名專家學者及校內各計畫執行者為主。
description.en: This course will provide important information regarding to the latest development or application on the organic materials. Speakers being invited are well-known scholars in organic area. Graduate students or thesis advisors will also be invited to report any in interesting result from their graduate studies.

notes: 碩一雙號選修

description.zh: 本課程將透過每週專題演講方式，讓學生了解有機材料之最新開發成品或最先進之研究成果。演講者之安排將以校外知名專家學者及校內各計畫執行者為主。
description.en: This course will provide important information regarding to the latest development or application on the organic materials. Speakers being invited are well-known scholars in organic area. Graduate students or thesis advisors will also be invited to report any in interesting result from their graduate studies.

notes: 碩二甲（學號：1-40）

description.zh: 本課程將透過每週專題演講方式，讓學生了解有機材料之最新開發成品或最先進之研究成果。演講者之安排將以校外知名專家學者及校內各計畫執行者為主。
description.en: This course will provide important information regarding to the latest development or application on the organic materials. Speakers being invited are well-known scholars in organic area. Graduate students or thesis advisors will also be invited to report any in interesting result from their graduate studies.

description.zh: 本課程將透過每週專題演講方式，讓學生了解有機材料之最新開發成品或最先進之研究成果。演講者之安排將以校外知名專家學者及校內各計畫執行者為主。
description.en: This course will provide important information regarding to the latest development or application on the organic materials. Speakers being invited are well-known scholars in organic area. Graduate students or thesis advisors will also be invited to report any in interesting result from their graduate studies.

notes: 碩二丙（學號：71 以後）

description.zh: 本課程旨在對非工程類科出身之研究生，做有系統基礎材料科學之建立。課程包括 (1) 原子鍵結與配位 (2) 晶體 [原子規律性](3) 固相中之不規律性 (4) 相平衡 (5) 材料微結構 (6) 反應速率 (7) 材料破壞學 (8) 導電材與半導材料 (9) 陶瓷材料 (10) 聚合物及複合材料
description.en: This course is aimed at systematically introducing some important concepts of material engineering for students who were not an engineer training in their BS. The course covers (1)Atomic Bonding and Coordination (2)Crystal Structure (3)Disorder in Solid Phase (4)Phase Equilibria (5)Microstructures (6)Reaction Rate (7)Deformation and Fracture (8)Conducting and Semi-conducting Materials (9)Ceramic Materials (10)Polymer and Composites.

name.en: Special Topics on Surface Analysis for Materials

description.zh: 本課程介紹各種分析材料表面性質的方法。藉著利用光子、電子、原子、或離子與材料表面的物理或化學作用，來獲得有關材料表面的組成、結構、化學鍵結、電子組態於表面形貌等訊息。所要介紹的表面分析儀器包括；X 光電子光譜儀 (XPS)、歐傑電子光譜儀（AES）、低能電子繞射儀 (LEED)、電子穿隧掃描儀 (STM)、表面振動光譜儀 (surface vibrational spectroscopy)、程式控溫脫附法 (TPD) 及真空技術。
description.en: The course introduces various surface analysis methods, including XPS, AES, LEED, STM, surface vibrational spectroscopy, and TPD. From the physical and chemical interaction between photons、electrons、atoms and ions with surfaces, the surface properties, including surface composition, surface structure, surface topography, electronic structure, and chemical bonding will be probed.

description.zh: 本課程主要著重於讓學生瞭解在日常生活中，食衣住行育樂等活動與化學之相互關係。尤其對在生活中所接觸之食品、衣著、環境與用品應有所認識，並以化學觀點了解其與人體之關係。此課程主要內容包括 (1) 食品化學 (Food Chemistry)，(2) 衣著化學 (Cloth Chemistry)，(3) 環境化學 (Environmental Chemistry)，(4) 核化學 (Nuclear Chemistry)，(5) 水化學 (Hydrochemistry)，(6) 界面化學 (Interface Chemistry)，(7) 家庭用化學品 (Household Chemicals)，(8) 化粧品學 (Cosmetic Chemistry)，(9) 電化學 (Electrochemistry)
description.en: This course focuses on chemistry related to People`s Livelihood, including: Food Chemistry, Cloth Chemistry, Environmental Chemistry, Nuclear Chemistry, Hydrochemistry, Interface Chemistry, Household Chemicals, Cosmetic Chemistry, and Electrochemistry. Topics concerning about the manufacturing processes, application principles and recent developments of People`s Livelihood chemicals are also discussed in this course.

name.en: Practice on Fabric Coating and Finishing

description.zh: 了解及熟悉各種布膜塗佈之技術，每周實習以製作各種功能性布料為主。布膜塗佈之技術包含 (1) 刮刀塗佈，(2) 輪式塗佈，及 (3) 熔融輪壓塗佈 (順塗，逆塗) 等。功能性布料種類則包含吸汗，透氣，撥水，保溫，抗起球等各種性質。
description.en: To introduce various coating techniques which include (1) knife coating (2) gravure coating (3) hot melt coating (co-rotating and counter rotation). The functions built in the fabric includes (1) water absorption (2) water repellence (3) cooling (4) warm protection (5) anti peeling… etc..

description.zh: 介紹各類紡織纖維之染色理論與基本染色方法；包括染料應用上之分類與紡織物纖維的類別，一般染色之理論，染色機械之類別，纖維素纖維、蛋白質纖維、聚酯纖維、聚醯胺纖維、聚丙烯睛纖維及其混紡織物的染色原理及應用以及各種纖維染色缺點以及防止與修正缺點之方法。
description.en: Introducing the dyeing theory and dyeing method of various textile fibers; which include the classification of dyestuffs and textile fibers, the dyeing machine, the dyeing theory and dyeing methods of cellulosic fibers, protein fibers, synthetic fibers and their blends, also the cause and correction of dyeing defects.

description.zh: 本課程係探討纖維製品在非衣著終端領域之應用，例如電子電機，土木，材料，生醫，航空與車輛工程等之應用。其內容包括功能性與機能性纖維、複合紗、複合織物、編帶、非織物、纖維系複合材料與電線電纜、光纖電纜等之製造方法、原理與其終端應用領域。最後將討論微細加工技術與微細粉末在纖維與高科技工業上之應用。
description.en: The course is to interpret the application of the non-apparel textiles at the different end uses, such as application in electrical and electronic, civil, material, biomedical, aerospace, and vehicle engineering etc. It includes fabrication methods, principles, and end application fields of the performance and functional fibers, composite yarns, composite fabrics, braid, nonwoven, textile composites, and cables and optical cables etc. Finally, the micro processing technology and powder in textile and high-tech industries will be discussed.

description.zh: 本課程探討人工智慧（AI）如何整合並提升語言學習與教學。學生將學習第二語言習得理論，如互動理論與社會文化理論，並連結這些理論與 AI 輔助語言學習工具。透過實作與專題討論，學生將實際操作 AI 工具，並從學習者與教師的角度設計有效且具倫理意識的 AI 語言學習任務。課程旨在培養學生的 AI 素養，使其能夠批判性地評估與應用 AI 技術，以因應課堂內外多元的語言學習與教學需求。
description.en: This course explores how artificial intelligence (AI) can be integrated and enhance language learning and teaching. Students will examine key SLA theories—such as interactionist and sociocultural approaches—and connect them to AI-supported learning tools. Through hands-on practice and discussion, students will explore AI tools and have opportunities to design effective, ethical AI-integrated language tasks from both learner and teacher perspectives. The course aims to build students’ AI literacy, enabling them to critically evaluate and apply AI technologies to support diverse language learning needs in both classroom and self-directed contexts.

description.zh: 本課程之目的在於介紹互動媒體設計所需之故事腳本設計相關知識與其應用。在以使用者情境設計導向的基礎架構下，本課程的內如包含敘事性方法、創意思考方法、互動腳本企劃以及互動腳本撰寫等。修習此課程之學生可學習互動情境劇本設計之原理與實作模擬，並具備業界所需之互動媒體設計實務之企劃與分析能力。在以實務操作、課堂腦力激盪與討論的方式下，學生的評量採報告與作業的繳交以及課堂討論成績為主。
description.en: The course aims to introduce knowledge and application relevant to storytelling and script planning. Under the structure of user oriented scenario design, this course includes narrative methods, creative thinking methods, interactive script planning and writing. Students will be capable of interactive scenario script design, planning and analyzing for interactive media practice. By means of practical work, in-course brainstorming and discussion, students are evaluated by reports, assignment and course discusstion.

notes: 排一般教室，互動二與外生二合開，限本系生 15 人

description.zh: 隨著網際網路的盛行，電子商務迅速地蓬勃發展，使得傳統的商店與行銷環境受到衝擊。資訊科技改變了消費習慣與行銷通路，電子商務的效應已經開始影響商業活動的每個層面，從新產品的開發、銷售、到售後服務均受影響，為企業帶來了無限商機。根據資策會的報告顯示，網際購物市場目前正進入高成長期。網際網路的消費觀念逐漸普及，消費者端的網路交易市集，亦成為未來重要的網路商機。不僅 B2C 市場（企業對消費者）極具潛力，網友個體戶的開店創業風潮（C2C）更是在蓬勃發中。面對網路商業的來臨，有著大量的網路商業的人才需求。只要有正確的網路商業經營獲利模式，網路是一個可以賺到大錢的管道，尤其低門檻、低成本的網路拍賣場更是最佳踏板。本課程講授網路創業及網路商業的必要實務經營能力，讓同學在本課程裡學得如何快速的以最少成本來 DIY 速成個人事業及就業的能力。
description.en: Following the prevailing of the internet, the vigorous development e-commerce has given great impacts on traditional tangible stores and the whole marketing environments. Information Technology has not only changed our lives, but also changed consumers' behavior and marketing channels; and the e-commerce effect has already started to permeate into every stratum of business activities, including the exploitation, marketing, and after-sales service of new products, brings the industries infinite business chances. According to the reports of Institute for Information Industry, the market of internet shopping is going into its high development period, and there are a lot of chances to establish a new enterprise on the internet. So this course will teach about the internet entrepreneurial management.

notes: 工管三甲乙合開

description.zh: 「鐵道車輛設計分析」課程，乃為培養具有鐵路車輛分析設計能力之人員，本課程初期將從規範面瞭解車輛設計要求，進而從結構面進行車輛設計與分析，過程中將引導學生採用主流分析軟體進行車輛穩定性與行車舒適度探討。最後將探討與台灣既有鐵道系統的相容性，進行駕駛室與機電設備配置等設計。期望透過本課程，能培植鐵道車輛設計分析人才，厚植本土鐵道車輛設計能力。
description.en: This aim of the course of "Railway Vehicle Design and Analysis" is to cultivate personnel on railway vehicle field. At the beginning of this course, the design requirement and criteria will be given as basic knowledge. Then students will be ask to perform structural design and analysis for railway vehicles. Passenger comfortable index and vehicle dynamic response will be taken into consideration during the process of design and analysis. Finally, the compatibility of the new design with the existing railway system will be discussed.

notes: 車輛所、職車輛所和鐵道碩士學程合開

name.en: Special Topics on Regional Geology of Taiwan

description.zh: 臺灣島位於西太平洋，就板塊構造運動而言，臺灣上新－更新世的造山運動代表歐亞大陸板塊的前緣和其東側以西北方向前進的菲律賓海洋板塊間的衝撞聚合運動。東臺灣花蓮和臺東間的縱谷，已被認為是兩個板塊間的縫合帶和板塊聚合的邊緣。在臺灣的北部，大陸和島弧的碰撞型式可能是菲律賓海板塊向北傾沒到位於歐亞大陸板塊上的琉球島弧系統之下。但是向南沿東臺灣縱谷，在北緯二十四度以南，板塊隱沒方向發生改變，歐亞大陸板塊於此向東隱沒進入菲律賓海板塊之下。此一特殊的板塊背景造就了臺灣多樣的地質現象・本課程之內容主要探討台灣地區 (包括海域) 自中生代至現代的大地構造演變及其地體構造運動、盆地演化、岩石圈的結構及性質、造山運動機制等各種地質現象。希望能藉由瞭解臺灣區域地質，從而作為探討臺灣地質工程與環境領域之基礎・
description.en: Taiwan island is located on the weastern Pacific Ocean. The plate tectonic setting of Taiwan is the convergence and collision between the western Eurasian plate and the easterly impinging Philippine Sea plate on the Pli-Pleistocene. The Longitudinal Valley between Hualien and Taitung in eastern Taiwan has been recognized as the suture zone between these two plates. In northeastern Taiwan, convergence is marked by northward subduction of the Philippine Sea plate beneath the Ryukyu Arc System on the Eurasian plate along the Ryukyu Trench. The subduction polarity changes at 24°N near Hualien in eastern Taiwan. There plate convergence is marked by eastward subduction of the Eurasian plate underneath the Luzon Arc System on the Philippine Sea plate along the Eastern Longitudinal Valley. This distinctive tectonic setting bas brought up various special geologic phenomena on Taiwan The course is aimed at graduate students in the geological engineering, who wish to gain an insight into the s

name.zh: 正念與藝術體驗教案設計
name.en: Mindfulness-Based Art Experience and Lesson Plan Design

description.zh: 本課程旨在引導學生透過正念實踐與藝術創作的結合，提升自我覺察與情緒調節能力，促進身心的平衡。課程會先帶領學生認識正念的理論與方法，內容涵蓋正念呼吸、正念行走、正念飲食、感恩練習與身體掃描冥想，幫助學生建立穩定的內在覺察能力。隨後進入藝術體驗單元，學生將透過繪畫、小書製作、黏土操作等多元媒材，進行自由創作與情感表達，學習如何以藝術作為自我探索與溝通的工具。課程後半段著重於實作與應用，學生將整合所學，設計出融合正念與藝術的體驗活動，並實際應用於兒童醫院等教育或關懷場域。藉由實地帶領活動，學生不僅能強化設計與引導能力，也能培養同理心與創意表達的素養。整體課程將理論學習、藝術實作與教育應用相結合，為學生未來進行教學設計與社會參與奠定基礎。
description.en: This course is designed to guide students in integrating mindfulness practice with artistic creation to enhance self-awareness and emotional regulation, promoting a balanced body and mind state. The course begins with an introduction to the theories and methods of mindfulness, covering practices such as mindful breathing, walking, eating, gratitude exercises, and body scan meditation. These practices aim to help students build a stable foundation of inner awareness.The latter part of the course emphasizes practical application. Students will synthesize their learning by designing experiential activities that combine mindfulness and art, and they will implement these activities in educational or caregiving settings such as children’s hospitals. Through facilitating these activities in real-world contexts, students will not only strengthen their skills in activity design and guidance but also develop empathy and creative expression. Overall, the course integrates theoretical learning,

notes: 上限 18 人 配合 USR 計畫

name.zh: 文化轉譯策略與跨域創新
name.en: Strategic Cultural Transcreation and cross-disciplinary Innovation

description.zh: 本課程聚焦文化轉譯在當代文化事業中的策略應用，探討如何將文化內容轉化為可被理解、感知，並具再創造潛力的創意資源，透過將文化、知識、符號轉化為新載體，作為推動跨域創新的基礎。課程強調文化轉譯作為連結文化價值與創意應用的重要機制，並引導學生理解其在不同產業語境中的實作可能。本課程同時關注跨域創新的行動實踐，透過多元個案的探討，讓學生學習如何在文化內容、產業需求與社會語境之間展開對話，設計具策略性與文化敏感度的創新提案。學生將從實務導向的練習中，發展將文化內容轉譯為創意與應用性高的專案能力。課程內容涵蓋文化轉譯的理論基礎、語境共融策略、跨文化再現倫理，並延伸至創意商品開發、展覽設計、跨界合作模式與公共參與實踐等領域。
description.en: This course focuses on the strategic application of cultural transcreation within the contemporary creative industries. It explores how cultural content can be transformed into creative resources that are understandable, perceptible, and capable of inspiring new forms of creation. Through the transformation of culture, knowledge, and symbols into new carriers, cultural transcreation is positioned as a foundational mechanism for driving cross-disciplinary innovation.Emphasizing the role of cultural translation as a bridge between cultural values and creative applications, the course guides students to understand how such processes can be practiced across diverse industry contexts. In addition to theoretical exploration, the course highlights the practical dimension of cross-disciplinary innovation. Through a range of case studies, students will examine how to navigate between cultural content, industry demands, and social contexts to develop culturally sensitive and strategically soun

name.en: Behavioral decision in games & cultural strategy

description.zh: 「賽局行為與文化策略」旨在針對賽局中的行為決策與其文化策略進行探討，並以課程講授與實際操作交替進行。學習者將了解賽局的構成要素、它的性質、各種模型，和人際互動時的應對之方。除了傳統議題如「納許均衡」、「囚徒困境」、「優勢策略」之外，我們還會探討「文化策略」、「無限賽局」、「企業策略」，與「分餅」等時興議題。
description.en: The course investigates behavioral decision making in terms of the perspective of game theory and cultural strategies, and is conducted by discussion and practice activities. The participants shall understand the constituent elements, essence, models of games, along with a variety of strategies adopted between individuals in real life. In addition to traditional issues such as “Nash equilibrium,” “prisoner’s dilemma,” “dominant strategy,” etc., the course will also deal with trendy topics and ideas such as “cultural strategy,” “split the pie,” “the infinite game,” “business strategy” and the like.

description.zh: 本課程著重於中英文口頭報告能力之培養，在模擬發表過程中，培養學生使用正確的表達用法，並建立適當之應對方式。
description.en: This course offers opportunities for students to develop their oral presentation skills in both Chinese and English languages via simulated presentations in class. Students will learn how to present their papers precisely and how to engage a conversation properly.

notes: 車輛四、車輛所合開

description.zh: 本課程介紹各種分析材料表面性質的方法。藉著利用光子、電子、原子、或離子與材料表面的物理或化學作用，來獲得有關材料表面的組成、結構、化學鍵結、電子組態於表面形貌等訊息。所要介紹的表面分析儀器包括；X 光電子光譜儀 (XPS)、歐傑電子光譜儀（AES）、低能電子繞射儀 (LEED)、電子穿隧掃描儀 (STM)、表面振動光譜儀 (surface vibrational spectroscopy)、程式控溫脫附法 (TPD) 及真空技術。
description.en: The course introduces various surface analysis methods, including XPS, AES, LEED, STM, surface vibrational spectroscopy, and TPD. From the physical and chemical interaction between photons、electrons、atoms and ions with surfaces, the surface properties, including surface composition, surface structure, surface topography, electronic structure, and chemical bonding will be probed.

description.zh: 使學生瞭解國際金融之理論與國際金融市場之概況：1. 國際金融市場形成之基礎和背景 2. 介紹中央銀行及國際公營金融中介機構 3. 外匯市場、國際債券市場、國際股票市場、衍生性金融商品市場 4. 國際利率套利與利率均衡論 5. 國際金融市場與金融創新
description.en: To understand theory of international finance and the international financial markets. 1.Introduction to the international financial markets 2.Central banks and international public financial intermediaries, such as BIS and World Bank. 3.Foreign Exchange Market, Int'l Bond Market, Int'l Stock Market, Derivative Market, etc. 4.Interest Rate Parity Theory. 5.Financial Revolution

description.zh: 1. 光感測技術概論、2. 光感測元件、3. 光源與光偵測元件、4. 光感測系統設計與架構、5. 光感測訊號處理技術、6. 光感測訊號分類與辨識、7. 光感測系統校正與穩定性提升、8. 光感測應用案例分析。
description.en: 1. Introduction to Optical Sensing Technologies2. Optical Sensing Devices3. Light Sources and Photodetectors4. Design and Architecture of Optical Sensing Systems5. Signal Processing Techniques for Optical Sensing6. Classification and Recognition of Optical Sensing Signals7. Calibration and Stability Enhancement of Optical Sensing Systems 8. Case Studies in Optical Sensing Applications

notes: 光電四和光電所合開

description.zh: 本課程提供學生學習下列技術：低成本自動化，應用於自動化之元件與設備的認識，氣壓控制技術，可程式控制器，生產線機器連線整合控制實務，自動化生產技術。
description.en: This course provides students with the following technologies: low cost automation components, pneumatic control, programmable logic controller, the practical control of integrated production line, and automation production technology.

notes: 工管三甲乙合開

description.zh: 邀請校內外學者專家至校針對某一專長領域進行專題演講，讓學生藉由聽講及心得報告之寫作，開展視野，並與時代之脈動相契合。
description.en: Invited speakers from different disciplines give speech in their specialized area. Thus students can broaden their eyesight and also keep updating the technology and its applications of the generation.

class_names: 能源光電外國學生專班
notes: Second grade

description.zh: 此課程旨在以使用者為中心的觀點，說明產品與服務之開發與設計相關概念，並以實作方式應用使用者研究的方法，收集、分析與呈現研究資料與成果，使學生具備使用者研究的執行與發表能力。
description.en: From the human-centered perspective, this course explains concepts about the development and design of products and services. By practicing user research methods, students will learn how to collect and analyze the data, and present the findings of user research.

notes: 工管二甲乙合開 配合 USR 計畫

description.zh: 本課程之授課目標乃教導學生如何利用各種光譜分析方法以鑑定有機化合物之結構，包含紅外光譜、紫外線光譜、質譜儀、核磁共振光譜、X - 射線光譜等。
description.en: The aim of the course is to introduce various spectroscopic methods to identify structure of organic compounds. It includes：UV spectroscopy, IR spectroscopy, NMR spectroscopy, Raman spectroscopy, Atomic spectroscopy, Mass spectroscopy, X-ray methods, Potentiometric methods, and Thermal methods.

description.zh: 本課程希望讓學生了解如何正確選擇與使用多變項統計方法，並能閱讀、呈現與解釋多變項統計報告或結果。課程包括因子設計、實驗設計、共變數分析、複迴歸等主題，以探討教育研究中多重且同時的影響因素。
description.en: This curriculum lets students understand how to choose and use multi-variance statistics methods exactly. It also includes that reading, presenting and explaining the report or result of multi-variance statistics analysis exactly. The topics of the curriculum include that factor design, experimental design, covariance analysis, and multi-regression, al etc. to explore the influence of multi and simultaneous factors in the educational research.

description.zh: 公共藝術涉題人文、藝術、空間、社會、設計等領域，本課程藉由介紹台灣及世界各地之公共藝術發展，推廣公共藝術的整體概念，使學子了解公共藝術的重要性，也藉此培養學生的專業知能、人文素養及藝術鑑賞能力。
description.en: The public art involves the humanities, arts, spatial, social, and design fields, this course introduces the development of the public art in Taiwan and the world to promote the whole concept of public art, so that students can understand the importance of the public art, but also to take this training the student's professional knowledge, humanities, and arts appreciation.

description.zh: 本課程涵蓋以下主題： 1. 數字的進制轉換以及二進制表示方式 2. 布林代數式與函數 3. 數位電路化簡技巧，如卡諾圖與製表法 4. 組合邏輯電路，如：加法器 / 減法器、比較器、多工器、邊 / 解碼器 5. 可編程邏輯電路，如：唯讀記憶體 / 可編程唯讀記憶體（ROM / PROM）、可編程邏輯電路（PLD）、可編程邏輯陣列（PLA） 6. 順序邏輯電路，如：狀態機
description.en: This course covers the following topics: 1. Number representation, number bases and base conversions, and binary codes 2. Boolean algebra and functions, canonical forms 3. Combinational design techniques: K-maps, tabulation method 4. Combinational logic circuits: adders/subtractors, comparators, multiplexors/demultiplexors, and decoders/encoders 5. Programmable logic circuits: read-only memory/programmable read-only memory (ROM/PROM), programmable logic devices (PLD), and programmable logic arrays (PLA) 6. Sequential logic circuits: state machine

description.zh: 先修課程：負責教授同意。力系的平衡、摩擦、面積與質量慣性矩、結構分析、虛功法。
description.en: Equivalent Systems of Forces, Static Equilibrium ,Area And Mass Moments of Inertia, Analysis of Structures, Methods of Virtual Work.

name.zh: 基礎程式設計與人工智慧

description.zh: 程式設計已成為各領域基礎且關鍵的能力之一，具備基本的程式能力，不僅能提升問題解決的邏輯思維能力，更是理解現代科技的入門門檻。本課程以 Python 為主要教學語言，從零開始，帶領學生學習變數、條件判斷、迴圈、函式、資料結構等基礎概念，並透過實作練習，加強學生對程式邏輯與結構的理解。此外，課程將安排簡介 AI 應用 的單元，讓學生了解如何運用基礎程式技巧操作簡單的人工智慧工具，啟發其對未來應用的興趣與想像。無論未來是否從事程式相關工作，本課程都將奠定學生跨領域運用數位能力的基礎。
description.en: Programming has become one of the most fundamental and essential skills across all fields. Having basic programming knowledge not only enhances logical thinking and problem-solving abilities, but also serves as an entry point to understanding modern technology. This course uses Python as the primary teaching language and starts from the ground up, guiding students through core concepts such as variables, conditional statements, loops, functions, and data structures. Through hands-on exercises, students will strengthen their understanding of programming logic and structure. In addition, the course includes an introductory module on AI applications, allowing students to explore how basic programming skills can be used to operate simple artificial intelligence tools, sparking their interest and imagination for future applications. Regardless of whether students pursue a programming-related career, this course provides a solid foundation for applying digital skills across disciplines.

description.zh: 這門課程涵蓋三個部分：(I) 解一階、二階以及高階線性微分方程，並理解如何以常微分方程（ODEs）建構物理問題的數學模型；(II) 使用拉普拉斯轉換解常微分方程；(III) 矩陣代數、行列式、特徵值與特徵向量的相關理論與應用。
description.en: This course covers three sections: (I) solving first-order, second-order and higher-order linear differential equations, and understanding modeling physics problems with ODSs; (II) solving ODEs using Laplace transforms; (III) matrix algebra, determinants, eigenvalues and eigenvectors.

description.zh: 1. 瞭解電路元件之基本特性及其組合電路之分析方法，內容包含：(1) 電路元件：電壓及電流源，主動元件 (2) 電路特性：歐姆定律，柯希荷夫電壓與電流定律等 (3) 一階及二階電路：電路之微分方程描述及各種輸入信號之響應 (4) 穩態分析與頻率響應：分析電路之頻域 (5) 電腦輔助電路分析：如使用 SPICE 工具。2. 瞭解線性與非線性電路的組成與分析法，內容包含： (1) 交流激勵電路：交流穩態分析，功率計算及相電路 (2) 三相電路：Ｙ與△型轉換及功率分析 (3) 變壓器電路：互感應及電壓電流的變換 (4) 頻率響應分析：極點與零點，轉移函數 (5) Fourier 級數，轉換及應用 (6) Laplace 轉換及應用。
description.en: The course covers the synthesis and analysis of bath linear and nonlinear circuits.Contents include: 1.Introduction to linear circuit analysis, 2. Resistive circuit, 3. Kirchhoff laws, 4. Thevenin and Norton theorem, 5. First and second order circuit, 6. Node and loop analysis, 7. Steady state response and analysis, 8. SPICE tool, 9.AC circuit :AC steady-state analysis, phasor analysis, 10. Three phase circuits, 11. Transformer circuits, 12. Frequency response, 13. Fourier series, Fourier transformation and application, 14. Laplace transformation and application.

notes: 半導體二和電子二甲合開

description.zh: 先修課程：負責教授同意。物質熱力學特性、改變能量形式之基本原理、熱力學第一及第二定律、可逆性與可用性、動力循環、冷凍循環、混合氣、化學反應。
description.en: Prerequisite: Consent of Instructor Thermodynamic Properties of Substance, Energy Forms, The First Law Thermodynamics, The Second Law of Thermodynamics, Irreversibility & Availability, Power Cycle, Refrigeration Systems, Mixtures, and Chemical Reactions.

notes: 半導體二與機電二合開

description.zh: 本課程主要針對各種材料（金屬、陶瓷、高分子、複合材料）之基本原理，性質及應用，做概要性的介紹。內容包括材料之晶體結構與晶體缺陷，固體材料之原子擴散，相圖與相變化，材料製程及應用，材料之物理性質（光性質、電性質、磁性質及熱性質），材料之機械性質（強度、延展性、硬度、韌性、疲勞、潛變），材料之強化機構與方法。
description.en: This course provides an overview of the fundamental principles, properties, and applications of various materials, including metals, ceramics, polymers, and composites. Topics covered encompass crystal structures and defects, atomic diffusion in solids, phase diagrams and transformations, materials processing and applications, physical properties (optical, electrical, magnetic, and thermal), mechanical properties (strength, ductility, hardness, toughness, fatigue, and creep), as well as mechanisms and methods for material strengthening.

notes: EMI

description.zh: 本課程主要內容將會介紹: 1 何謂半導體。 2 半導體的特性。 3 半導體的取得來源與方法介紹。 4 半導體材料的不同應用。 5 半導體的相關產業鏈介紹。 6 與半導體相關產業的工作介紹。
description.en: The main contents of this course will introduce: 1 What is named semiconductor. 2. Characteristics of semiconductors. 3. Introduction of methods to access semiconductors materials. 4. Different applications of semiconductor materials. 5. Introduction to the semiconductor industry and its supply chain. 6. Introduction to work content in semiconductor industry.

notes: 新進教師鍾朝安

name.zh: 半導體薄膜特性與製程
name.en: Properties and Fabrication Techniques of Semiconductor Thin

description.zh: 本課程主要是聚焦於：1. 半導體產業概述介紹 2. 半導體元件物理基礎 3. 前段製程技術 4. 後段製程技術 5. 矽晶圓成長與基本特性 6. 黃光，蝕刻，鍍膜，清洗，化學機械研磨製程與設備介紹 7. 元件電性分析與量測 8. 半導體封裝。
description.en: This course mainly introduce on semiconductor materials and fabrication technology:1. Overview of semiconductor industry and circuit component introduction2. Semiconductor fundamental (materials, device physics and application) 3. Front End of Line (FEOL) Technology4. Backend of Line (BEOL) Technology5. Crystal growth , basic properties of Silicon Wafer6. Introduce 7 principle fabrication modules: Photo lithography, film deposition, etch, clean, CMP, Diffusion and process integration7. Introduce device electrical test8. Semiconductor packaging

name.zh: 文化觸媒介入都市設計
name.en: Cultural Medium Intervening into Urban Design

description.zh: 「媒介與環境」作為近年逐漸開始發展的學術領域，其論述原點通常可追溯自 1960 年代，藉由 Marshall McLuhan 對於媒體（Media）與媒介（Medium）的哲學性討論與實驗性創作，首先打開後世電影與媒體學者對於相關學術主題的探討。但這個概念卻要一直到近年，伴隨著科技的進步與媒體研究的發展，例如 Anne Friedberg 針對當代可以出現在各種人造與非人造環境中的螢幕（Screen）的分析，才被廣泛地作為媒介（Medium）與環境（environment）研究仰賴的分析架構，並奠定後續此學術領域的發展方向。此課程將於都市文化研究的固有知識基礎上，引入媒介與環境領域的新興論述，探究各類「觸媒」對於當代文化發展與都市設計的影響。探討子題包含有數位全球化、文創嘉年華、智慧城市、網飛經濟等當前重要都市發展議題，並透過課堂討論、方法學作業，與期末短論培養學生連結理論與實務、深度反思、和獨立探索新興學術領域的能力。
description.en: The scholarship of “Medium and Environment” was first explored by Marshall McLuhan in the 1960s with a series of academic and practical works. However, this field was not gaining much attention until the past decade when technology has brought novel challenges and scholars in film and media have been shifting their focuses to this aspect. Because of these, the studies of medium and environment has recently been an emerging field that intends to examine the phenomena intertwining the two aspects through interdisciplinary approach. Based on this background, this course will introduce cutting-edge scholarships of medium and environment studies to the traditional field of urban cultural studies, pursuing effective perspectives to unfold today’s critical urban issues, for instance globalization in digital era, carnival and creative industry, smart city, Netflix economy (Harvey, 2020), and so forth. Student will be expected to learn how to bridge theories and practices, to develop critica

notes: 建都所和設計博合開

name.zh: 現代 X 光技術與材料分析
name.en: Modern X-Ray Techniques and Materials Analysis

description.zh: 課程旨在讓學生了解 X 射線繞射 (XRD) 與 X 射線吸收光譜 (XAS) 的基本理論與實際應用。這兩項 X 光技術已經成為近代材料結構鑑定的重要方法。在 XRD 部分，學生將學到分析粉末繞射圖數據，並計算晶體結構參數，如晶面間距 (d-spacing) 與結構因子 (Structure factor)，以及結構精算 (refinement)。X 光近吸收邊緣光譜 (XANES) 與延伸 X 光吸收精細結構 (EXAFS) 將會在 X 射線吸收光譜中介紹。此外課程中，將教導學生使用 Matlab 與相關費軟體進行數據處理與結構解析，藉此提升學生理論與實驗數據分析能力。
description.en: This course is to teach students the fundamental theory and applications of x-ray diffraction (XRD) and x-ray absorption spectroscopy (XAS). These two x-ray techniques have become very important methods for structural characterizations on modern science. In the XRD part, students will learn how to analyze the powder XRD pattern from d-spacing, structure factor and Rietveld refinement. The illustration of XAS will include x-ray absorption near edge spectroscopy (XANES) and extended x-ray absorption fine structure (EXAFS). Meanwhile, the Matlab and relative free softwares will be used to do data analysis. Hope such combinations will enhance the capability of data analysis on students.

description.zh: 探、取樣及地球物理方法，十字片剪力儀、孔內側壓力儀、平鈹膨脹 儀、階段平鈑膨脹儀、孔內直接剪力儀、平鈑載重試驗、基椿載重試驗 、地錯抗拔試驗、現場透水試驗探討，岩石直剪、平鈑、岩石裂縫、孔 內應力、岩栓抗拔、隧道浮空等量測探討，鋼筋計、水壓計、土壓計、 沈陷計等監測儀器之運用說明。
description.en: advanced engineering geology , sampling and physical method, application of instrument and test like pressurement , vane shear instrument , dilationter . in-situ permeability test, direct shear instrument, foundation loads test, rock direct shear test, rock cleft, pressure meter, steel bar instrument , piezometer, soil pressurement

name.zh: 人工智慧跨域商情預測之應用
name.en: The Application of Artificial Intelligence on Business Forecasting

description.zh: 本課程將介紹人工智慧在各種商情預測的技應用，做好商情預測有利於確保企業發展方向的正確性，也能讓企業更能抓住市場脈動而滿足消費者的需求不會造成太多的庫存堆積，保持市場供需的動態平衡。本課程規劃所欲培育人才所需之教學目標包括：（1）學生有能力使用 python 寫各種商業智能程式，包括使用 pandas 模組裡進行商業數據分析與視覺化。使用 numpy，sklearn 機器學習模組來處理迴歸分析問題。使用 keras 模組來進行深度學習的商業預測應用。（2）實作多種商情預測專題。
description.en: This course will introduce the technological application of artificial intelligence in various business forecasts to help students understand the current status of various applications of AI in business forecasts.The teaching objectives required for cultivating talents in this course planning include:(1) Students are able to use python to write various business intelligence programs, including using pandas modules for business data analysis and visualization. Use numpy, sklearn machine learning module to handle regression analysis problems. Use keras modules for business forecasting applications of deep learning.(2) Implement a variety of business forecast topics.

description.zh: 使學生瞭解品質管理的觀念、原理、領域。品管部門的組織、功能，如何管理產品或服務的品質，品管的工具、方法，如何持續改善品質的方法，品質表示法，如何評估品質管理成效，相關法令，品質管理未來趨勢。
description.en: This course lets the students understand the concepts, theories, and areas of qualify control, organization and functions of quality department. Besides, the way to manage the products or the service quality, tools and methods of quality control, the way to improve the quality, quality representation method, evaluation of quality control, related regulations and future trends are also included

notes: IMBA、工管博和管理博，823

name.en: Ergonomics evaluation and redesign in products

description.zh: 本課程期望學生能夠能有獨立思考的能力，對產品建構出合理的實驗設計架構，透過採集人的生理與心理數據對產品進行人因工程評估，最後將實驗發現應用於產品的重新設計上，讓產品能夠更符合使用者的需求與認知。
description.en: In this course, students are expected to demonstrate independent thinking, develop a reasonable experimental design, conduct ergonomics evaluations on products by collecting both physiological and psychological data, and ultimately apply the findings to redesign products. This ensures that the products align more effectively with the needs and perceptions of users.

name.en: The introduction and practical works of cultural and creative industry.

description.zh: 本課程希望透過媒體與文創相關產業主管之帶領，訓練修課學生投入文創工作時所具備之眼界與執行力，並利用上學期所學，鼓勵學生試圖設計屬於自己的文創產品概念。除了產業之介紹與培訓課程，我們也注重同學對於新媒體與移動裝置之掌握與運用，建立在數位時代踏入文創產業之不可或缺之素養。
description.en: The students in the class will be conducted and taught by the managers of media, cultural and creative industry to learn the insight and execution in the relative works. We will ask the students to design their own prototypes of cultural and creative product based on the concept and vision they’ve learned last semester. Except the introduction and lecture of the industry, we will also focus on students’ ability of coordination with new media or mobile devices, which are the important accomplishments for cultural and creative industries in digital era.

notes: 上限 24 人

description.zh: 本課程在培養同學創業的知識與思維，以及了解營運模式如何應用在商業活動裡。本課程包含：創業精神的想法和行動、從失敗中學習、設計思考、市場測試、機會衡量、營運模式建立、價值主張、永續經營、企業倫理等議題。
description.en: The course is to encourage students to have the ideas of entrepreneurship and to establish the abilities of running a business. This course is focused on: entrepreneurial thought and action, learning from failure、design thinking、opportunity evaluation、market tests、the development of business model、value propositions、network、sustainable and business ethics.

notes: 經管所和 IMBA 合開

description.zh: 本課程目標為提升社會關懷及批判思考能力，以「 PSRC 模式」為課程主軸，包含：（一）P（Preparation－準備階段）：以自發、互動及共好為理念，透過公共議題研討，認識多元群體的現況及困境，培養自主行動、溝通互動、社會參與等核心素養。（二）Ｓ（Service－服務階段）：與弱勢社福單位或組織連結，藉由有意義的活動，體驗服務的意義。（三）R（Reflection－反思階段）：分享服務、學習與成長經驗，深化學習的領域、擴大自己的生活範疇與生命歷練。（四）C（Celebration－慶賀階段）：肯定參與貢獻，並發揮自身影響力，以追求社會的公平、合理、合法與正義，建立關懷文化。
description.en: The goal of this course is to enhance social care and critical thinking skills. It takes the "PSRC model" as the main axis of the course and includes: (1) P (Preparation): Based on the concepts of spontaneity, interaction and common good, through discussions on public issues, we understand the current situation and dilemma of diverse groups, and cultivate core competencies such as independent action, communication and interaction, and social participation. (2) S (Service): Connect with disadvantaged social welfare units or organizations and experience the meaning of service through meaningful activities. (3) R (Reflection-Reflection stage): Share service, learning and growth experiences, deepen the field of learning, expand your life scope and life experience. (4) C (Celebration stage): Affirm participation and contribution, and exert their own influence to pursue social fairness, reasonableness, legality and justice, and establish a caring culture.

notes: 需修習本課程始可畢業

description.zh: 本課程目標是協助學生透過校園環境整理及打掃體驗活動，認識勞作教育之理念，從勞作課程中養成同學不怕苦、不怕難與不怕髒的企業家精神，使學生透過實際的勞作課程，培養學生手腦並用，勤勞愛物的觀念，培養學生健全的人格、良好品德、正確的價值觀及刻苦耐勞的工作態度。課程內容包含（一）勞作教育理念介紹。（二）勞作教育實作。（三）課堂討論與反思。（四）期末成果分享。
description.en: The purpose of this course is to introduce the idea of labor service to students. Students who take this course have to participate in the campus cleaning activities. This is to help students building up: (i) the team-work abilities; (ii) the concepts of ethics; (iii) the abilities of concerning the society. In addition, the course would help students to develop the accurate attitudes in the daily life and the healthy personalities. Furthermore, this course would also help students to enrich the sense of humanities. Four stages are included in this course: (i) the introduction of the labor service, (ii) the field work studies, (iii) the class discussions, and (iv) sharing of the experiences of the labor service.

notes: 需修習本課程始可畢業

Four stages are included in this course: (i) the introduction of the labor service, (ii) the field work studies, (iii) the class discussions, and (iv) sharing of the experiences of the labor service.

description.zh: 本課程目標為提升社會關懷及批判思考能力，以「 PSRC 模式」為課程主軸，包含：（一）P（Preparation－準備階段）：以自發、互動及共好為理念，透過公共議題研討，認識多元群體的現況及困境，培養自主行動、溝通互動、社會參與等核心素養。（二）Ｓ（Service－服務階段）：與弱勢社福單位或組織連結，藉由有意義的活動，體驗服務的意義。（三）R（Reflection－反思階段）：分享服務、學習與成長經驗，深化學習的領域、擴大自己的生活範疇與生命歷練。（四）C（Celebration－慶賀階段）：肯定參與貢獻，並發揮自身影響力，以追求社會的公平、合理、合法與正義，建立關懷文化。
description.en: The goal of this course is to enhance social care and critical thinking skills. It takes the "PSRC model" as the main axis of the course and includes: (1) P (Preparation): Based on the concepts of spontaneity, interaction and common good, through discussions on public issues, we understand the current situation and dilemma of diverse groups, and cultivate core competencies such as independent action, communication and interaction, and social participation. (2) S (Service): Connect with disadvantaged social welfare units or organizations and experience the meaning of service through meaningful activities. (3) R (Reflection-Reflection stage): Share service, learning and growth experiences, deepen the field of learning, expand your life scope and life experience. (4) C (Celebration stage): Affirm participation and contribution, and exert their own influence to pursue social fairness, reasonableness, legality and justice, and establish a caring culture.

description.zh: 本課程目標為提升社會關懷及批判思考能力，以「 PSRC 模式」為課程主軸，包含：（一）P（Preparation－準備階段）：以自發、互動及共好為理念，透過公共議題研討，認識多元群體的現況及困境，培養自主行動、溝通互動、社會參與等核心素養。（二）Ｓ（Service－服務階段）：與弱勢社福單位或組織連結，藉由有意義的活動，體驗服務的意義。（三）R（Reflection－反思階段）：分享服務、學習與成長經驗，深化學習的領域、擴大自己的生活範疇與生命歷練。（四）C（Celebration－慶賀階段）：肯定參與貢獻，並發揮自身影響力，以追求社會的公平、合理、合法與正義，建立關懷文化。
description.en: The goal of this course is to enhance social care and critical thinking skills. It takes the "PSRC model" as the main axis of the course and includes: (1) P (Preparation): Based on the concepts of spontaneity, interaction and common good, through discussions on public issues, we understand the current situation and dilemma of diverse groups, and cultivate core competencies such as independent action, communication and interaction, and social participation. (2) S (Service): Connect with disadvantaged social welfare units or organizations and experience the meaning of service through meaningful activities. (3) R (Reflection-Reflection stage): Share service, learning and growth experiences, deepen the field of learning, expand your life scope and life experience. (4) C (Celebration stage): Affirm participation and contribution, and exert their own influence to pursue social fairness, reasonableness, legality and justice, and establish a caring culture.

notes: 需修習本課程始可畢業

description.zh: 本課程目標是協助學生透過校園環境整理及打掃體驗活動，認識勞作教育之理念，從勞作課程中養成同學不怕苦、不怕難與不怕髒的企業家精神，使學生透過實際的勞作課程，培養學生手腦並用，勤勞愛物的觀念，培養學生健全的人格、良好品德、正確的價值觀及刻苦耐勞的工作態度。課程內容包含（一）勞作教育理念介紹。（二）勞作教育實作。（三）課堂討論與反思。（四）期末成果分享。
description.en: The purpose of this course is to introduce the idea of labor service to students. Students who take this course have to participate in the campus cleaning activities. This is to help students building up: (i) the team-work abilities; (ii) the concepts of ethics; (iii) the abilities of concerning the society. In addition, the course would help students to develop the accurate attitudes in the daily life and the healthy personalities. Furthermore, this course would also help students to enrich the sense of humanities. Four stages are included in this course: (i) the introduction of the labor service, (ii) the field work studies, (iii) the class discussions, and (iv) sharing of the experiences of the labor service.

notes: 需修習本課程始可畢業

name.zh: 液晶顯示器驅動電子學

description.zh: 1. 液晶材料的種類 2. 液晶物理特性 3. 液晶顯示模式 4. 薄膜電晶體元件物理 4. 薄膜電晶體操作特性 5. 像素的結構及佈局 7. 顯示器的等效電路模型 8. 顯示器驅動原理 9. 響應時間的驅動補償
description.en: 1. Types of liquid crystals 2. Physics of liquid crystals 3. Display modes and electro-optical properties 4. Properties of a-Si Thin film transistors 5. Operation of TFTs 6. Layouts of pixels with TFT switches 7. Circuit model of LCDs 8. Addressing of LCDs 9. Driving compensation for response time

notes: 光電四和光電所合開

name.en: The Principle and Practice of Display Technologies

description.zh: 1. FPD 技術背景簡介 2.FPD 製程原理 3. 偏極化: Jones 矩陣 4. 液晶顯示器的 Jones 矩陣模型 5. 主動式液晶顯示面板設計初步
description.en: 1. FPD General 2. Vacuum and Vacuum System 3. Kinetic Theory of Gas4. Physical Vapor Deposition 5. Light-Solid Interaction6. AMLCD: Polarization 7. AMLCD: Panel Design

notes: 光電系、所和電資外生所合開，先鋒 201

description.zh: 電動汽車的歷史、目前現況及未來發展、電池介紹以及電池管理系統、電動車車載充電器、直流轉換器與馬達驅動控制。
description.en: History of electric vehicles, current status and future development of electric vehicles, introduction to batteries and battery management systems, on-board chargers for electric vehicles, DC-DC converters, motor drive control.

description.zh: 1. 光感測技術概論、2. 光感測元件、3. 光源與光偵測元件、4. 光感測系統設計與架構、5. 光感測訊號處理技術、6. 光感測訊號分類與辨識、7. 光感測系統校正與穩定性提升、8. 光感測應用案例分析。
description.en: 1. Introduction to Optical Sensing Technologies2. Optical Sensing Devices3. Light Sources and Photodetectors4. Design and Architecture of Optical Sensing Systems5. Signal Processing Techniques for Optical Sensing6. Classification and Recognition of Optical Sensing Signals7. Calibration and Stability Enhancement of Optical Sensing Systems 8. Case Studies in Optical Sensing Applications

notes: 光電四和光電所合開

description.zh: 本課程以論文研討方式學習 "機器學習" 理論之基本概念與應用及各種演算法。課程內容包含概念式學習、決策樹、圖型理論、神經網路、貝氏網路、案例式學習及支持向量機等方法。經由這門課，學生能對現代機器學習技術及其應用有基本的了解。
description.en: This is a graduate seminar-based course that provides an overview of many algorithms in machine learning and its applications. In this course, we will take an interdisciplinary look at current research topics in machine learning covering Concept Learning, Decision Tree, Graphical Model, Neural Network, Bayesian Network, Instance-based Learning, and Support Vector Machine. Through the course, students can have the basic ideas and intuition behind modern machine learning methods.

notes: 限 15 人

description.zh: 本課程將深入探討比特幣作為一種加密貨幣的獨特經濟特性。我們將從貨幣的基礎概念開始，接著介紹比特幣，探討其背後的區塊鏈技術以及去中心化的運作方式。然後，我們將探討比特幣的價值形成機制、供需動態、市場波動等相關議題，並探討其對傳統金融體系的影響，以及可能的未來發展趨勢。此外，再針對比特幣逐漸成為全球大南方新興市場國家的普惠金融方案之一的現象探討其原因與未來發展。
description.en: This course delves into the unique economic characteristics of Bitcoin as a cryptocurrency. We Start from the fundamental concepts of money, fiat currency, and then discuss the Bitcoin. We explore the underlying blockchain technology and decentralized operations. We then examine Bitcoin's value proposition, supply-demand dynamics, market volatility, and its impact on traditional financial systems, along with potential future trends. On top of that, Bitcoin is also gaining traction to become one of the financial inclusion solution in global south emerging countries, we also examine the reasoning and future development of this phenomena.

notes: 資財四甲、資財所合開 / 哈佛講堂

name.zh: 前瞻材料光學量測與應用
name.en: Optical Measurement and Applications of Emerging Materials

description.zh: 本課程聚焦於具應用潛力之前瞻光電材料之性質、製程技術，以及其於光學檢測與雷射應用中的角色。涵蓋之材料類型包括光電半導體材料（如 III-V 族、鈣鈦礦）、液晶、有機高分子材料、奈米材料（如金屬奈米粒子）與二維材料（如石墨烯、MXene 等）。學生將深入了解這些材料的光電特性，並探討其在雷射、感測器、顯示器、可撓式電子與生醫檢測元件等領域的實際應用。課程內容亦介紹多種光學與雷射相關的量測技術，包括光學吸收、螢光、光致發光（PL）、拉曼光譜、表面增強拉曼散射（SERS），以及雷射激發之光學檢測方法。透過應用導向的案例分析與實作設計，強化學生於材料、雷射與光學系統整合方面的跨領域實務能力。
description.en: This course focuses on the properties and fabrication techniques of advanced optoelectronic materials, as well as their roles in optical detection and laser-related applications.Covered material categories include optoelectronic semiconductors,liquid crystals, organic polymers and biocompatible materials.Students will gain in-depth understanding of the optoelectronic properties of these materials and explore their practical applications in laser systems,sensors,displays,flexible electronics,and biomedical diagnostic devices.The course also introduces a variety of optical and laser-based characterization techniques,including optical absorption,fluorescence,photoluminescence,Raman spectroscopy,surface-enhanced Raman scattering,and laser-excited optical detection methods.Through application-oriented case studies and hands-on project design, students will develop interdisciplinary practical skills in integrating materials, lasers, and optical systems.

name.zh: 有機半導體材料與元件導論
name.en: Introduction to Organic Semiconductor Materials and Devices

description.zh: 1. 有機電子元件導論。2. 材料導論與晶體結構。3. 有機半導體光學特性。4. 有機半導體電學特性。5. 有機發光二極體。6. 有機太陽能電池與光偵測器。7. 有機場效電晶體。8. 有機半導體製程
description.en: 1. Introduction to Organic Electronic Devices2. Introduction to Materials and Crystal Structures3. Optical Properties of Organic Semiconductors4. Electrical Properties of Organic Semiconductors5. Organic Light-Emitting Diodes (OLEDs)6. Organic Solar Cells and Photodetectors7. Organic Field-Effect Transistors (OFETs)8. Organic Semiconductor Fabrication Processes

description.zh: 本課程涵蓋太空系統工程的進階課題，包括當前研究和新興技術。本課程將深入理解太空系統的設計、開發、測試和實施，著重於子系統的整合和系統性能的最佳化。主題將包括先進的材料和結構、推進系統、航電系統、控制系統、人因因素等。學生將通過案例研究、設計專案和模擬實例進行學習。
description.en: This course covers advanced topics in space systems engineering, including current research and emerging technologies. The course will provide an in-depth understanding of the design, development, testing, and implementation of space systems, with a focus on the integration of subsystems and the optimization of system performance. Topics will include advanced materials and structures, propulsion systems, avionics, control systems, human factors, and more. Students will gain hands-on experience through case studies, design projects, and simulation exercises.

notes: 光電系、電子系和太空所合開

description.zh: 1. 基本分析工具介紹 (6) 2. 基本光學系統 -- 近軸光學 (6) 3. 光學系統元件介紹 (6) 4. 像差理論 (6) 5. 像質評估 (6) 6. 光學系統設計 (6) 7. 光學套裝軟體使用 (6) 8. 光電設計專題 (9)
description.en: 1.The tools 2.The basic optical systems 3.Basic optical devices 4.Seidel aberrations 5.Image evaluation 6.The design of optical systems 7.The use of Zemax 8.Project on optical design

notes: 光電系、所和電資外生所合開，計中電腦教室

name.zh: 基礎英文閱讀與字彙 (一)
name.en: Basic English Reading and Vocabulary I

description.zh: 本課程著重教導學生閱讀文章，並藉由文章訓練學生字彙建構、語言解析及聽力會話、思維啟發能力。課中延展活動將閱讀內容與聽力、會話、寫作做進一步的連結，並引導學生將所學做有效的應用。
description.en: The course provides students with explicit skills-based instruction in learning how to process, and decipher the readings that serve as springboards for reading skills development, vocabulary building, language analysis, and thought-provoking discussions. The readings include a variety of viewpoints on global topics centered around social issues, the environment, psychology, business, and technology. Extension activities are designed to encourage students to go beyond the reading text, and to put what they acquire from the readings into listening, speaking and writing practices.

notes: 初級

description.zh: 本課程提供學生及職前專業人士必備之英語文語言技巧，強調機電專業領域之英文溝通能力之訓練。課程內容依學院專業內容區分並整合英語文之聽說讀寫之能力為未來全球化移動及以英語專業溝通人才培育為目標。
description.en: This course aims to provide pre-service Mechanical & Electrical Engineering students/professionals with the adequate skills of the English language and communicative competence to facilitate their current academic and future career pursuits. Students are encouraged to utilize their domain expertise to participate in professional communication in English. Centered on the training of professional use of the English language, the ESP curriculum as the crux of a highly-integrated work of domain knowledge and the English learning development embodies the indispensable credentials required for a global profession.

notes: 中級

description.zh: 本課程旨在提升學生資訊領域的英語文能力，加強學生於該領域課堂學習與未來職業所需的閱讀與口說技巧。本課程中，學生將經由研讀資訊領域相關文章以及針對相關主題的討論，增加資訊領域的字彙，並加強英語能力與溝通技巧。
description.en: This course is designed for students who are interested in improving English skills in the field of information technology. It aims to increase students’ reading fluency and improve their speaking skills needed to function and succeed in classroom settings and in future career. In this course, authentic reading texts related to information technology will be used. Students will discuss topics, such as artificial intelligence and the World Wide Web, in order to expand vocabulary and language skills.

notes: 中級

description.zh: 本課程旨在帶領學生讀、理解並分析國際時事，提高學生之英文能力，透過對多元主體之解析，讓學生了解單字用法，句型結構，特殊術語和慣用俚語等，提升閱讀能力，另外配合聽力技巧學習，提升理解能力。本課程著重英文閱讀，聽力與口說能力，鼓勵學生以英文討論國際時事，發表見解，拓展對世界的認識。
description.en: This course intends to enhance students’ reading, speaking and listening abilities by using quality newspapers, journals, interviews and podcast. It will help students enrich their vocabulary and acquire key English expressions and sentence patterns used in different realms like politics, arts, entertainment, science & technology, sports, business and health. Students learn to read, discuss and debate global issues through diverse forms of activities. This course familiarizes students with world affairs and broadens their perspective of the world.

notes: 中級

name.zh: 進階專業英文 - 機電 (一)

description.zh: 本課程提供學生及職前專業人士必備之英語文語言技巧，強調機電專業領域之英文溝通能力之訓練。課程內容依學院專業內容區分並整合英語文之聽說讀寫之能力為未來全球化移動及以英語專業溝通人才培育為目標。
description.en: This course aims to provide pre-service Mechanical & Electrical Engineering students/professionals with the adequate skills of the English language and communicative competence to facilitate their current academic and future career pursuits. Students are encouraged to utilize their domain expertise to participate in professional communication in English. Centered on the training of professional use of the English language, the ESP curriculum as the crux of a highly-integrated work of domain knowledge and the English learning development embodies the indispensable credentials required for a global profession.

notes: 高級 A

name.zh: 進階科技與工程英文 (一)
name.en: Advanced English for Science, Technology, and Engineering I

description.zh: 本課程著重教導學生閱讀文章，並藉由文章訓練學生閱讀理解、字彙建構、以及語言解析能力。教材著重於科學、科技以及工程方面的文章，並藉由課堂延展活動增進學生於科學、科技以及工程領域的英語能力。
description.en: The course provides students with explicit, skill-based instruction in learning how to process and decipher the readings that serve as springboards for reading skill development, vocabulary building, and language analysis. Selected readings will be centered around science, technology, and engineering. Extension activities are designed to improve students’ technical English skills to be used in the fields of science, technology, and engineering.

notes: 高級

name.zh: 進階專業英文 - 機電 (一)

description.zh: 本課程提供學生及職前專業人士必備之英語文語言技巧，強調機電專業領域之英文溝通能力之訓練。課程內容依學院專業內容區分並整合英語文之聽說讀寫之能力為未來全球化移動及以英語專業溝通人才培育為目標。
description.en: This course aims to provide pre-service Mechanical & Electrical Engineering students/professionals with the adequate skills of the English language and communicative competence to facilitate their current academic and future career pursuits. Students are encouraged to utilize their domain expertise to participate in professional communication in English. Centered on the training of professional use of the English language, the ESP curriculum as the crux of a highly-integrated work of domain knowledge and the English learning development embodies the indispensable credentials required for a global profession.

notes: 高級 B

description.zh: 刑法是規定犯罪與刑罰之法律，例如「殺人」是犯罪，「處死刑、無期徒刑或 10 年以上有期徒刑」是刑罰。刑法總則是規定各種犯罪與刑罰之共通原理，例如故意或過失。刑法分則是規定各種不同的犯罪與刑罰，例如（故意）殺人或過失致死。透過刑法分則課程之修習，希望使同學能夠認識刑法常見而重要的犯罪類型之規定。
description.en: Criminal law is a law that stipulates crime and punishment. For example, "homicide" is a crime, and "punishment for death, life imprisonment or more than 10 years in prison" is a punishment. The general rule of criminal law is to stipulate the common principles of various crimes and penalties, such as intentional or negligent. The criminal law is to stipulate various crimes and penalties, such as (intentional) murder or negligence. Through the training of the Criminal Law Sub-Course, I hope that students can understand the provisions of the common and important types of crimes in criminal law.

description.zh: 本課程旨在向修課同學作刑法之概括介紹，包括刑法總則及刑法分則。再者，此一介紹包含下列四個重點：一、刑法之背景及理論；二、刑法之解釋；三、刑法於案例事實之適用；四、刑法與刑事訴訟法之結合。參與本課程乃理解刑法之關鍵一步，修課同學將受益匪淺。
description.en: This course aims to give participants a general introduction to "Criminal Law", including "General Provisions" and "Specific Offenses". Furthermore, the introduction contains the following four points: 1. Background and theories of Criminal Law. 2. Interpretation of Criminal Law. 3. Application of Criminal Law to the facts. 4. Combination of Criminal Law and Criminal Procedure Law. Attending this course is the critical step to understanding Criminal Law, and it benefits participants a lot.

description.zh: 本課程將介紹我國民事法律制度，包括民法總則、債之關係、物權、親屬、繼承各篇，以主題解說搭配案例分析之模式進行，除培養學生具有基礎法律思維外，並加強學生問題解析之能力。
description.en: This course is to introduce the system of our country's Civil Law , including the gereral principles of the Civil Law , obligations , rights In Rem , family and succession. Running the course via topic explanations as well case analysis not only educates students to possess basic thoughts in law , but also enhances the ability in analyzing problems for students.

description.zh: 本課主要講授公司法的規定。相關的法律理論都會被介紹。學生將被指定閱讀教科書和法院判決。課堂參與是必要的。
description.en: This course teaches Company Act. Company Act covers procedural rules of incorporation, duties of a president, board members, or shareholders. Students will be assigned to read a textbook and several court decisions. Class participation is required.

description.zh: 民法總則介紹民法中的共通概念與基本原則，為整部民法以及所有法律的學習基礎。透過民法總則之學習，同學可以熟悉法律的思考模式及規範架構。本課程將以理論與實務並重方式協助同學學習。
description.en: The General Principle of the Civil Law serves to introduce the common concept and fundamental principle of the Civil Law. In short, the General Principle of the Civil Law predominates as a learning basis for the whole Civil Law and all legal study. Through learning on the General Principle of the Civil Law, students can be familiar with the model of legal thought and the framework of norm. This course aims to assist students learning from both theory and practice.

description.zh: 本課程將深入我國專利法，同時簡介美國及大陸專利法。本課程內容主要涵蓋：專利申請、可專利標的、專利要件及要求、專利審查流程、專利權之實施、專利侵害判斷、專利檢索及專利說明書之撰寫。其他內容尚包括簡介專利訴訟流程、專利行政救濟流程、法院及智慧財產局之角色以及專利法與其他智慧財產權法之關係。
description.en: This course will go through R.O.C. (Taiwan) patent law in detail, and introduce to the U.S. and China patent laws. Topics will mainly include patent filing, patentable subject matter, patent conditions and requirements, patent examination procedure, patent enforcement, patent infringement assessment, patent search, and patent drafting. Other topics include introduce to patent litigation procedure, patent administrative suit procedure, the roles of the court and the Intellectual Property Office and the relationship between patent law and other Intellectual Property laws.

description.zh: 著作權法係為保障著作人著作權益，調和社會公共利益，促進國家文化發展，所特別制定之法律。該法所稱著作包括：語文著作、音樂著作、戲劇、舞蹈著作、美術著作、攝影著作、圖形著作、視聽著作、錄音著作、建築著作、電腦程式著作等。著作權的保障內涵則包含因著作完成所生之著作人格權及著作財產權。本課程將兼顧實例與理論進行探討，來深化同學對於著作權的瞭解。
description.en: Copyright Act is specifically enacted for the purposes of protecting the rights and interests of authors with respect to their works, balancing different interests for the common good of society, and promoting the development of national culture. "Works" of this act, include the following:1.Oral and literary works.2.Musical works.3.Dramatic and choreographic works.4.Artistic works.5.Photographic works.6.Pictorial and graphical works.7.Audiovisual works.8.Sound recordings.9.Architectural works.10.Computer programs. "Copyright" means the moral rights and economic rights subsisting in a completed work. The discussion in the course covers theory and examples, to enhance a deeper understanding of Copyright for the students.

description.zh: 先修課程：負責教授同意。材料性質、製程與結構之關係、機械基礎 - 彈性行為、塑性基本理論。冶金基礎 - 單晶的塑性變形、差排理論、強化機構、材料的破壞。
description.en: Mechanical Fundamentals: Introduction, stress and strain relationships for Elastic Behavior, Elements of the theory of Plasticity, etc.. Metallurgical Fundamentals: Plastic Deformation of Single Crystal, Dislocation Theory, Strengthening Mechanism, Fracture, etc..

notes: 機械四合開

description.zh: 本課程主要概括性介紹分為三部分：第一、奈米基本理論－介觀物理奈米微粒、奈米碳管與奈米線、奈米薄膜的結構特性、奈米塊體材料的性能等；第二、奈米加工與檢測；第三、奈米材料之應用。
description.en: This course is divided into three parts. Part 1: the fundamental of nanostructure materials. The topics include: nanoparticles, carbon nanotube, nanowire, nanostructure coating, bulk materials, etc. Part 2: fabrication of nanomaterials. The topics include: self-assembled, scanning probe microscope. The measurement of nanomaterials include scanning probe microscope, scanning tunneling microscope, Raman spectroscopy, etc. Part 3: the state-of-the art review the application of nanomateria.

notes: 機械四合開

description.zh: 先修課程：負責教授同意。封裝技術論及相關技術方法，如施力、軟焊、或熔接等用來將兩個或多個微電子、微機械、微光學或其他相關元件結合的技術原理及製程。內容也涉及被封裝的元件的材料及封裝可靠度有關的特性如力學、熱傳、電磁干擾等。案例包括黏晶、打線、覆晶、黏著技術及軟焊技術等。
description.en: The lecture describes packaging technology as a summary of those technological methods, which use joining of two or more electronic, micro-mechanic micro-optic or other components like this by force, soldering or welding processes. Besides the presentation of these processes, the parts, i.e. thin film circuit elements, thick film components, including their material and technology relevant properties such as mechanical, heat transfer, electromagnetic interference, which influence the packaging reliability are described. Examples such as die bonding, wire bonding, flip-chip bonding adhesive technology and soldering technology are chosen to show joining technology for semiconductor, MEM components, hybrid CKTs, packages and modules.

description.zh: 先修課程：負責教授同意熱傳基本方程式，熱對流之解法，亂流熱對流，流場預測，熱傳預測．
description.en: Basic Equations of Heat Transfer , Laminar Convective Heat Transfer ( Internal and External ) , Solutions , Turbulent Convective Heat Transfer , Flow Prediction , Heat Transfer Prediction .

name.zh: 研究方法 - 語言實務應用
name.en: Research Methods in Applied Language Studies

description.zh: 本門課之目的是讓學生熟悉質與量研究方法的設計。主題涵蓋研究計劃之準備及撰擬；主要研究方法，如調查研究法、相關研究法、實驗研究法、行動研究法；質性和量化資料之搜集與分析；敘述統計和推論統計。
description.en: This course familiarizes students with qualitative and quantitative research procedures and the statistical design involved in education and applied linguistics research. Topics will include the nature and process of research; survey research; experimental research; correlational research; action research; data collection and data analysis; descriptive statistics; and sampling and inferential statistics.

description.zh: 介紹及討論創造性藝術之特性、藝術與工程間的關連、美學在工程上之重要性以及美的形式原理。
description.en: This course is an introduction to the study and practice of fundamental principles of design in terms of creative arts, relationship between art and engineering, and the importance of aesthetics applying to design.

notes: 創意一、互動外生一、工設二合開，請排 50 人以上教室

name.zh: 兒童文學融入英語教學
name.en: Children's Literature and English Language Teaching

description.zh: 本課程針對幼稚園、國小、與國中階段的英語師資而設計，在教材與教法的搭配上提供學理的引介與實務上的訓練。本課程設計考量這些階段學生之身心發展程度與興趣，將屬於兒童與青少年文學範疇的文本（例如：希臘神話、哈利波特系列、波西傑克森系列等等）作創意運用，幫助老師們擷取並改編合宜的教材，經由活潑的教學活動（包括：改編戲劇演出、繪本製作、歌唱舞蹈等等），提高學生的英語能力，也在培養他們體察文化差異的深層素養。
description.en: Designed for kindergarten, elementary school, and junior high school English teacher, this course aims to provide practical training and theories in teaching materials and pedagogy. Students of this course will also learn to adapt children and teenager literary works such as Greek mythology, the Harry Potter series, and the Posey Jackson series into materials suitable for students at the above-specified age groups. Possible learning activities such as role-play, picture books, dancing/singing will also be explored as methods to both develop students' English proficiency and cultural awareness.

description.zh: 本課程培養學生提供在科技領域中使用英語的能力。 學生將獲得基本的英語語言技能、詞彙、結構和科技英語的風格。 此外，該課程還強調技術和工程領域的職場溝通能力。
description.en: The first part of the one-year / two-semester course aims to develop students’ basic English competence in the context of technology. Students are expected to acquire basic English language skills, vocabulary, structures and styles of technology English. In addition, the course also emphasizes workplace communication in the field of technology and engineering.

notes: 初級

description.zh: 本課程旨在提升學生資訊領域的英語文能力，加強學生於該領域課堂學習與未來職業所需的閱讀與口說技巧。本課程中，學生將經由研讀資訊領域相關文章以及針對相關主題的討論，增加資訊領域的字彙，並加強英語能力與溝通技巧。
description.en: This course is designed for students who are interested in improving English skills in the field of information technology. It aims to increase students’ reading fluency and improve their speaking skills needed to function and succeed in classroom settings and in future career. In this course, authentic reading texts related to information technology will be used. Students will discuss topics, such as artificial intelligence and the World Wide Web, in order to expand vocabulary and language skills.

notes: 中級 A

name.en: English for Innovation and Entrepreneurship I

description.zh: 本課程目的在提升學生溝通表達能力，並著重於創業思維與專業英文。從專業英語文學習及創業的角度，讓學生了解流程與架構並實際演練，藉此提升學生學習及未來工作所需要之英文能力。
description.en: This course aims to enhance communicative competence with special emphasis on entrepreneurial thinking and professional English skills. From the perspectives of learning English for specific purposes (ESP) and entrepreneurship, students will learn how to create, rehearse and effectively participate in a range of different scenarios for current academic and future career pursuits.

notes: 中級

name.en: English for Science, Technology, and Engineering I

description.zh: 本課程著重教導學生閱讀文章，並藉由文章訓練學生閱讀理解、字彙建構、以及語言解析能力。教材著重於科學、科技以及工程方面的文章，並藉由課堂延展活動增進學生於科學、科技以及工程領域的英語能力。
description.en: The course provides students with explicit, skill-based instruction in learning how to process and decipher the readings that serve as springboards for reading skill development, vocabulary building, and language analysis. Selected readings will be centered around science, technology, and engineering. Extension activities are designed to improve students’ technical English skills to be used in the fields of science, technology, and engineering.

notes: 中級

name.en: ESP(Electrical Engineering and Computer Science) I

description.zh: 本課程提供學生及職前專業人士必備之英語文語言技巧，強調電資專業領域之英文溝通能力之訓練。課程內容依學院專業內容區分並整合英語文之聽說讀寫之能力為未來全球化移動及以英語專業溝通人才培育為目標。
description.en: This course aims to provide pre-service Electrical Engineering and Computer Science students/professionals with the adequate skills of the English language and communicative competence to facilitate their current academic and future career pursuits. Students are encouraged to utilize their domain expertise to participate in professional communication in English. Centered on the training of professional use of the English language, the ESP curriculum as the crux of a highly-integrated work of domain knowledge and the English learning development embodies the indispensable credentials required for a global profession.

notes: 中級

description.zh: 本課程旨在帶領學生讀、理解並分析國際時事，提高學生之英文能力，透過對多元主體之解析，讓學生了解單字用法，句型結構，特殊術語和慣用俚語等，提升閱讀能力，另外配合聽力技巧學習，提升理解能力。本課程著重英文閱讀，聽力與口說能力，鼓勵學生以英文討論國際時事，發表見解，拓展對世界的認識。
description.en: This course intends to enhance students’ reading, speaking and listening abilities by using quality newspapers, journals, interviews and podcast. It will help students enrich their vocabulary and acquire key English expressions and sentence patterns used in different realms like politics, arts, entertainment, science & technology, sports, business and health. Students learn to read, discuss and debate global issues through diverse forms of activities. This course familiarizes students with world affairs and broadens their perspective of the world.

notes: 中級

description.zh: 本課程旨在透過各種英語新聞媒體如電視新聞（如 CNN, BBC, NBC）、英文雜誌（如 The Economist, Scientific American ）、英文報紙（New York Times, Washington Post, the Guardian 等）等，來培養學生的批判性閱讀能力．並同時提升其宏觀視野與多元知識。課堂中將藉由分析英語新聞的用字遣詞、報導角度的取捨、標題與議題的呈現方式等，使學生學習如何思考報導背後之立場，從而進行批判性閱讀。此外，亦將剖析英語新聞中所含括之英美文學典故與文化傳統，帶領學生瞭解新聞英文的豐富意涵。
description.en: This course aims to (1) develop students’ critical reading abilities, (2) expand their global horizons and (3) broaden their knowledge by using diverse English news reports provided by news channels (e.g. CNN, BBC and NBC), news magazines (e.g. The Economist and Scientific American) and newspapers (e.g. New York Times, Washington Post and The Guardian). Students will learn how to read critically by analyzing word choice, reporting angles and the selection and presentation of headlines or quotations. This course will also explore literary allusions and cultural references contained in English news in order to further enhance students’ English language competence.

notes: 高級

description.zh: 每天許多人規律運動、觀賞及討論賽事，若具備暢談體育以及運動相關俚語的英文能力，將十分有益於與英語人士交流。本課程將介紹學生適用於體育以及其他社交場合的英語單字（包含許多用於職場專業場合、不同於字面意思的運動俚語）。本課程能幫助學生更清楚地理解英語體育新聞、更周全地與英語人士談論體育、用更加批判性的思維來思考運動在英語世界的文化、語言、日常生活中扮演著怎樣重要的角色。
description.en: Because many people play, watch, and discuss sports every day, being able to talk about sports and to understand sports idioms is very helpful when interacting with English speakers. This course introduces students to English vocabulary that is useful for talking about sports, but also useful in other social situations. (For example, many sports idioms -- such as “to play hardball” and “to strike out” -- are used by businessmen in professional situations not directly related to sports). The class helps students to understand more clearly English news about sports, to talk more thoughtfully with English speakers about sports, and to think more critically about the important role that sports play in the culture, language, and everyday life of people in the English-speaking world.

notes: 高級

name.zh: 進階專業英文 - 電資 (一)
name.en: Advanced ESP (Electrical Engineering and Computer Science) I

description.zh: 本課程提供學生及職前專業人士必備之英語文語言技巧，強調電資專業領域之英文溝通能力之訓練。課程內容依學院專業內容區分並整合英語文之聽說讀寫之能力為未來全球化移動及以英語專業溝通人才培育為目標。
description.en: This course aims to provide pre-service Electrical Engineering and Computer Science students/professionals with the adequate skills of the English language and communicative competence to facilitate their current academic and future career pursuits. Students are encouraged to utilize their domain expertise to participate in professional communication in English. Centered on the training of professional use of the English language, the ESP curriculum as the crux of a highly-integrated work of domain knowledge and the English learning development embodies the indispensable credentials required for a global profession.

notes: 高級 A

description.zh: 本課程旨在提升學生資訊領域的英語文能力，加強學生於該領域課堂學習與未來職業所需的閱讀與口說技巧。本課程中，學生將經由研讀資訊領域相關文章以及針對相關主題的討論，增加資訊領域的字彙，並加強英語能力與溝通技巧。
description.en: This course is designed for students who are interested in improving English skills in the field of information technology. It aims to increase students’ reading fluency and improve their speaking skills needed to function and succeed in classroom settings and in future career. In this course, authentic reading texts related to information technology will be used. Students will discuss topics, such as artificial intelligence and the World Wide Web, in order to expand vocabulary and language skills.

notes: 中級 B

description.zh: 本課程著重教導學生閱讀文章，並藉由文章訓練學生字彙建構、語言解析及聽力會話、思維啟發能力。課中延展活動將閱讀內容與聽力、會話、寫作做進一步的連結，並引導學生將所學做有效的應用。
description.en: The course provides students with explicit skills-based instruction in learning how to process, and decipher the readings that serve as springboards for reading skills development, vocabulary building, language analysis, and thought-provoking discussions. The readings include a variety of viewpoints on global topics centered around social issues, the environment, psychology, business, and technology. Extension activities are designed to encourage students to go beyond the reading text, and to put what they acquire from the readings into listening, speaking and writing practices.

description.en: The course provides students with explicit, skill-based instruction in learning how to process and decipher the readings that serve as springboards for reading skill development, vocabulary building, and language analysis. Selected readings will be centered around science, technology, and engineering. Extension activities are designed to improve students’ technical English skills to be used in the fields of science, technology, and engineering.

description.zh: 本課程教授商業領域知識以及實務應用。修習本課程之學生，將習得中高階英語素養以及商務溝通基本知識。課程內容包含：基礎商業概念、重點時事商業議題、基本商業字彙，和廣泛商業實務用語。
description.en: The course is designed for students who wish to strengthen English competence as well as increase their knowledge in business-related issues and expertise in future business practice. All students enrolled in this course are expected to be equipped with high-intermediate level of English proficiency as well as basic knowledge of effective business communication. This course covers rudimentary business concepts, important current business events, essential business terms, and English use in business practice.

notes: 中級，Abbie

description.zh: 本課程旨在提升學生學術英文能力，課堂將引導學生透過不同的學術聽力訓練、閱讀學術文章、學術寫作練習、與學術口語訓練等，來增進學生於大學英語授課課堂中的課堂參與，以及整體學術能力的展現，並為未來專業職場上語言能力奠定良好基底。
description.en: This course is designed for undergraduate students to develop their academic English language skills for success in English-medium university coursework. This course will engage students with active participation in a variety of academic listening, reading, writing, and speaking activities that they would encounter in real-life academic university lectures and professional workplace environments.

description.zh: 透過不同主題的多媒體素材，素材包含電影片段 / 歌曲 / 影集片段 / 線上互動遊戲 / 演講 / 線上協作軟體等，藉由不同的活動設計（聽力練習、會話練習、議題討論、口頭報告等）增進學生聽說讀寫的能力。比起純粹只有紙本素材的練習，讓學生可以透過相當於實境互動的情境，而更有學習動機、了解語言運用的情況，以及有較具體的實例以英語討論問題。
description.en: In order to cultivate the students’ comprehensive capabilities to use English, especially the listening comprehension and oral expression ability, different multimedia materials, including movies, songs, TV series, online interactional games, online aiding software, etc., are used to help students understand when and how to use language appropriately in various situations. Different activities (listening practice, role-play, group discussion, and oral presentation) are designed to facilitate students’ English learning.

description.en: This course aims to enable students to use English confidently and effectively as professionals in tourism and hospitality industry. In this course, students will also learn about trends and development in the industry at the local and global level, and strengthen their English communicative competence.
