台大張智星 https://ppt.cc/fCH4qx
清大高宏宇 https://ppt.cc/fCH4qx

name.zh: 生成式 AI 文字與圖像生成原理實務

notes: 政大蔡炎龍 https://ppt.cc/fCH4qx

name.zh: 電腦視覺實務與深度學習

notes: 台大鄭文皇 https://ppt.cc/fCH4qx

name.zh: 人工智慧於通訊網路優化
name.en: Artificial Intelligence in Communication Network Optimization

description.zh: 本課程旨在培養學生掌握人工智慧技術在通訊網路中的應用，特別是在衛星通訊系統和無線網路中的實踐。學生將學習通訊網路的基礎概念、衛星次系統、軌道力學與資料解析，並瞭解無線網路架構、資源分配及網路切片技術。此外，學生將掌握如何利用人工智慧和深度強化學習技術進行資源優化、訊號處理與異常檢測，並應用實驗平台進行模擬和實驗，最終具備設計、實施並優化通訊網路的能力。
description.en: This course aims to equip students with the skills to apply artificial intelligence techniques in communication networks, particularly in satellite communication systems and wireless networks. Students will learn the fundamental concepts of communication networks, satellite subsystems, orbital mechanics, and data analysis, as well as the architecture of wireless networks, resource allocation, and network slicing technologies. Additionally, students will master how to use artificial intelligence and deep reinforcement learning techniques for resource optimization, signal processing, and anomaly detection. They will also apply experimental platforms for simulations and experiments, ultimately gaining the ability to design, implement, and optimize communication networks.

notes: 大研合開，核心課程

name.zh: 人工智慧於衛星系統應用
name.en: Artificial Intelligence in Satellite System Applications

description.zh: 本課程旨在培養學生掌握人工智慧技術於衛星影像分析的應用，涵蓋影像資料處理、模型訓練、最佳化與產業應用。學生將學習如何結合人工智慧模型進行精準偵測，並透過與業界合作解決實務問題，如海事監控及環境監測，提升跨領域協作與問題解決能力，問題導向學習的方式將促進學生獲取實務經驗及就業競爭力，為科技產業發展做好準備。
description.en: This course aims to equip students with expertise in applying artificial intelligence techniques to satellite image analysis, covering image data processing, model training, optimization, and industrial applications. Students will learn how to integrate AI models for precise detection tasks and collaborate with industry partners to solve practical problems, such as maritime surveillance and environmental monitoring. This will enhance students' cross-disciplinary collaboration and problem-solving skills. A problem-based learning approach will facilitate students in gaining practical experience and improving their competitiveness in the job market, thus preparing them for the advancement of the technology industry.

notes: 大研合開，核心課程

name.zh: 人工智慧於射頻模組優化
name.en: Artificial Intelligence in RF Module Optimization

description.zh: 本課程讓學生深入瞭解射頻模組的基本架構及其在無線通訊技術中的應用，並且掌握人工智慧與深度強化學習的基本概念，學習如何利用人工智慧技術優化射頻模組性能，如增強信號強度和降低干擾。此外，課程將涵蓋電磁模擬軟體及其在射頻模組中的應用，並指導學生設置環境，編寫人工智慧演算法，實現自動化模擬與優化，最終培養獨立解決問題的能力。
description.en: This course enables students to gain an in-depth understanding of the basic structure of RF modules and their applications in wireless communication technology. It also covers the fundamental concepts of artificial intelligence and deep reinforcement learning, teaching students how to use AI techniques to optimize RF module performance, such as enhancing signal strength and reducing interference. Additionally, the course will introduce electromagnetic simulation software and its applications in RF module simulation, guiding students to set up the environment, write AI algorithms, and achieve automated simulation and optimization, ultimately cultivating the ability to solve problems independently.

notes: 大研合開，核心課程

description.zh: 透過多元化的課程設計，培養學生職場中所需具備的技能及軟實力，為將來進入職場做好準備。課程涵蓋主題包含：協同合作 (collaboration)、溝通技巧 (communication)、分析式思維 (analytical thinking)、自我管理能力 (self-management)、激勵 (motivation)、領導力 (leadership) 等。搭配企業參訪 (worksite visits)、實習課程等安排，培養具備職場技能及競爭力。
description.en: Through diversified curriculum design, students need to have the skills and soft power in the workplace to prepare for the future. Topics covered in the course include: collaboration, communication, analytical thinking, self-management, motivation, leadership, etc. With the arrangement of enterprise visits (worksite visits), internship courses, etc., cultivate the skills and competitiveness in the workplace.

notes: 可外系選修

name.zh: 數位轉型與創新商業模式
name.en: Digital Transformation and Innovative Business Models

description.zh: 本課程在於協助同學了解數位轉型的浪潮趨勢，以及適應新科技所改變的商業模式。課程將介紹創新的商業模式例如共享經濟、金融科技、線上至離線、使用者生成內容等平台模式應用。每個模式將會連結到實務中企業個案，以協助同學進一步深入了解與分析創新的模式概念。本課程將涵蓋數位轉型與創新模式的基本概念，以數位轉型與科技適應角度，透過實務案例來了解創新商業模式。
description.en: This course aims to help students understand the trend of digital transformation and technology adaption in business models. The innovative business models will be introduced such as sharing economy, FinTech, online-to-offline, user-generated content, and so on. The matched cases will be selected to elaborate and analyze the innovative business models. This course will provide comprehensive knowledge of innovative business models by digital transformation and technology adaption (information and communication technology).

name.en: Course in English language Proficiency Tests

description.zh: 本課主旨在設計課程，提供練習，俾使學生嫻熟各式的英語測驗，如全民英檢、托福測驗、TOEIC 測驗或類似性質的測驗，希冀能夠藉由本課程的修習，提升學生不斷的學習外國語的興致，並且，藉由通過考試取得證照，增加未來職場的競爭力。
description.en: This course is designed to familiarize the students with various kinds of language proficiency tests such as GEPT, TOEFL, TOEIC and many others to the same end. It is our hope that the students who finish taking the course will go on with their enthusiasm on studying foreign languages; besides, through the acquisition of the certificate when the students pass the tests, they are sure to enhance their capability in the increasingly competitive job markets.

notes: 限特殊學生

name.zh: 數位超大型積體電路設計與佈局

description.zh: CMOS 電路簡介、金氧半電晶體理論、金氧半製程技術、電路特性分析、電路功能評估、CMOS 電路與邏輯設計、CMOS 設計方法、CMOS 測試、CMOS 次系統設計及 CMOS 案例討論等。
description.en: Introduction to CMOS Circuit, MOS Transistor Theory, CMOS Technology, Circuit Characterization, Performance Estimation, CMOS circuit and Logic Design, CMOS Design Methods, CMOS Testing, CMOS Subsystem Design, and CMOS Case Studies. （已有）

notes: 「連結新南向菁英培育專班」計畫

description.zh: 本課程之目的在於介紹一些廣泛、基本及實際的微電子製造程序（其中最主要者為積體電路之製造程序）。首先說明製造方法上之三個 主要部分：擴散（diffusion）、平版照相術（lithography）及薄膜沉積（thin-film deposition）然後再介紹這些方法如何應用在各種元件所需之物理特性及元件設計有關之訊息後者則需要了解各種製造策略之目的及限制時再隨時給予介紹。
description.en: An introduction to the semiconductor manufacturing process. Courses include diffusion, microlithography and deposition.

notes: 「連結新南向菁英培育專班」計畫

description.zh: 一、簡介 (Outline) 二、導電材料 (Conductors) 三、電阻材料 (Resistors) 四、絕緣材料 (Insulators) 五、半導體材料 (Semiconductors) 六、介電材料 (Dielectrics) 七、磁性材料 (Magnetics) 八、壓電材料 (Piezoelectrics) 九、超導材料 (Superconductors) 十、感測材料 (Sensors)
description.en: This course is a special topics of Electronic Materials.

notes: 「連結新南向菁英培育專班」計畫

description.zh: 以英語語言、教學法、及學生在專業領域的英語需求為主軸，專業英文 ESP 系列課程涵蓋以下關鍵面向：學術英文、專業實踐 / 應用英文、內容和語言整合英文教學，議題與趨勢，以及語言技巧能力。 此系列課程專為本校大二修習校訂共同英文的學生設計，強化英語能力，並應用英文於專業領域之發展。
description.en: Drawing upon the English language, pedagogy, students’ needs for English in specialized domains, the ESP series encompass the following key dimensions: English for general academic purposes, English for professional practice / application, content and language integrated learning, issues and trends, and integrative language skills for testing and communication. The courses are designed for the second year (sophomore), non-native English speaking students to strengthen their English competence and become more proficient in their fields of study.

notes: 限特殊學生

description.zh: 本課程提供大一學生必備之英語文語言技巧，強調專業領域之英文溝通能力之訓練。課程內容依學院專業內容區分，並整合英語文之聽、說、讀、寫之能力，提升英語文在專業領域的應用。
description.en: This course equips first-year students with essential English language skills, focusing on developing their communication abilities in specific professional fields. The content is customized to each college's discipline and integrates the four language skills (listening, speaking, reading, and writing), thereby enhancing the application of English in professional contexts.

notes: 限特殊學生

name.zh: 學習分析於 PBL 實務專題製作
name.en: PBL Based Projects in Learning Analysis

description.zh: 本課程強調資訊分析理論與實務的結合用，因此課程中會逐步教導學生相關分析理論與演算法，透過 Rapidminer，可以讓學生輕鬆在操作元件拖拉之中，完成一個妥善的分析流程，並可以產生多樣化的視覺化呈現，從實作中強化操作相關軟體的基本能力。並結合教育機構與產業引導實際場域發生之問題或整合校務研究資料於專題課程，參與校務分析研究：考量資安的個資議題，擬將校內部份去識別化後之資料，經過編碼變造處理後於課堂使用，讓學生將實際進行問題分析、模型發展、系統開發、模擬實驗及最後的研究結論與模型驗證。最後，透過特定主題教案的設計，讓學習者進一步的去思考數據分析的邏輯，從教學者的角度更深入理解教育大數據分析。
description.en: This course focuses on the integration of information analysis theory and practice. As such, students will be gradually introduced to relevant analysis theories and algorithms. By using Rapidminer, students can easily complete the proper analysis process by dragging and dropping operating components. This software allows students to generate a diverse range of visual presentations, strengthening their ability to operate related software through practical application.Additionally, this course will work in conjunction with educational institutions and industries to address real-world problems and integrate school research data in special courses. Students will participate in school affairs analysis and research, considering issues related to personal data and information security. The course will also involve planning to de-identify data in the school, which will be used in the classroom after being altered via code. This approach will allow students to conduct problem analysis, model

description.zh: 本課程透過系列主題講座，帶領學員從多元視角理解當代國際局勢、外交發展與跨文化溝通策略。課程邀請外交官、國際事務專家、駐外代表及具實務經驗的講者分享全球趨勢、國際關係熱點議題與外交談判技巧，幫助同學建立宏觀國際視野與外交思維，強化其在多元文化背景下的溝通與協調能力。課程將以專題講座、互動對談與案例分析等形式進行，並引導同學反思台灣在全球脈絡中的角色與機會，培養具備國際素養與行動力的未來領導者。
description.en: This course, delivered through a series of thematic lectures, guides students in understanding contemporary international affairs, diplomatic developments, and cross-cultural communication strategies from diverse perspectives. Diplomats, international affairs experts, overseas representatives, and experienced practitioners will be invited to share insights on global trends, key international issues, and diplomatic negotiation skills. The course aims to help students develop a broad international outlook and diplomatic mindset, enhancing their ability to communicate and collaborate effectively in multicultural contexts. Through lectures, interactive discussions, and case analyses, students will be encouraged to reflect on Taiwan’s role and opportunities in the global landscape, cultivating internationally competent and action-oriented future leaders.

notes: 大研合開，六週密集授課，0916 為第一週（二）567 上課

description.zh: 本課程透過系列主題講座，帶領學員從多元視角理解當代國際局勢、外交發展與跨文化溝通策略。課程邀請外交官、國際事務專家、駐外代表及具實務經驗的講者分享全球趨勢、國際關係熱點議題與外交談判技巧，幫助同學建立宏觀國際視野與外交思維，強化其在多元文化背景下的溝通與協調能力。課程將以專題講座、互動對談與案例分析等形式進行，並引導同學反思台灣在全球脈絡中的角色與機會，培養具備國際素養與行動力的未來領導者。
description.en: This course, delivered through a series of thematic lectures, guides students in understanding contemporary international affairs, diplomatic developments, and cross-cultural communication strategies from diverse perspectives. Diplomats, international affairs experts, overseas representatives, and experienced practitioners will be invited to share insights on global trends, key international issues, and diplomatic negotiation skills. The course aims to help students develop a broad international outlook and diplomatic mindset, enhancing their ability to communicate and collaborate effectively in multicultural contexts. Through lectures, interactive discussions, and case analyses, students will be encouraged to reflect on Taiwan’s role and opportunities in the global landscape, cultivating internationally competent and action-oriented future leaders.

notes: 大研合開，六週密集授課，0916 為第一週 (二) 567 上課

description.zh: 使學生認知測量是各項工程建設的一項重要基礎性先行的工作，使能適應各項測量外業觀測、內業計算及繪圖等作業。課程概要如下：1) 測量之基本概念、(2) 各種測量儀器的認識與使用、(3) 控制測量（括三角、三邊導線高程等) 之施測方法及計算、(4) 地形圖及地籍圖之測及應用、(5) 各項工程放樣測量。
description.en: Theory and practice with compass,transit,level,and stadia.Computations of area,earthwork volumes,and horizontal and vertical curves;astronomical observations;boundary surveying;and map plotting.

notes: 工程學士班學生請選此課號，土木系必修；餘 3 系選修

description.zh: 配合測量學之講授，作相互之印證，以期融會貫通，落實提昇測量教學之效果。課程概要：(1) 各項儀器之使用實習、(2) 距離、高程、角度測量實習、(3) 控制測量實習、(4) 地形測量實習、(5) 定線實習。
description.en: Theory and practice with compass,transit,level,and stadia.Computations of area,earthwork volumes,and horizontal and vertical curves;astronomical observations;boundary surveying;and map plotting.

notes: 工程學士班學生請選此課號，土木系必修；餘 3 系選修

description.zh: 機械振動、非線性振動、振動量測、振動抑制及隔離技術、振動與波之傳播、聲音之反射及折射、噪音之降低及吸音材料、消音器與噪音控制、法規及環境等。
description.en: Topics include: Mechanical vibration, Vibration transmission, Vibration measurement, The use of vibration isolators and absorbers, Fundamentals of acoustics, Noise control engineering, Instrumentation and Law.

description.zh: 本課程旨在提昇學生撰寫結構完整段落和短文之能力，並著重如何重寫、摘要、 轉述、 陳述、筆記、編排、起草、修改等相關技巧。
description.en: This course is expected to expand students’ writing capacity and experience by helping them to formulate, organize, and present ideas clearly in well-formed paragraphs and compositions. Students will learn about rewriting, outlining, paraphrasing, synthesizing, documenting, note-taking, writing the draft and editing their own work.

notes: A 組 - 學號尾號數奇數，僅限英文系學生修讀

description.zh: 本課程旨在提昇學生撰寫結構完整段落和短文之能力，並著重如何重寫、摘要、 轉述、 陳述、筆記、編排、起草、修改等相關技巧。
description.en: This course is expected to expand students’ writing capacity and experience by helping them to formulate, organize, and present ideas clearly in well-formed paragraphs and compositions. Students will learn about rewriting, outlining, paraphrasing, synthesizing, documenting, note-taking, writing the draft and editing their own work.

notes: B 組 - 學號尾號數偶數，僅限英文系學生修讀

description.zh: 本課程主要在培養各類型段落、短文的撰寫能力，包括描寫、敘述、說明及議論性質文章。
description.en: This course is intended for university-level EFL writing students with the aim of increasing their fluency in English writing. To achieve this goal, students in this course will have ample opportunities to write varying types of English paragraphs, for instance, paragraphs of definition and paragraphs focusing on cause and effect relationships. In addition, they will have plenty of opportunities to write various kinds of short English essays, including descriptions, narratives, and argumentative writings.

notes: A 組 - 學號尾號數奇數，僅限英文系學生修讀

description.zh: 本課程主要在培養各類型段落、短文的撰寫能力，包括描寫、敘述、說明及議論性質文章。
description.en: This course is intended for university-level EFL writing students with the aim of increasing their fluency in English writing. To achieve this goal, students in this course will have ample opportunities to write varying types of English paragraphs, for instance, paragraphs of definition and paragraphs focusing on cause and effect relationships. In addition, they will have plenty of opportunities to write various kinds of short English essays, including descriptions, narratives, and argumentative writings.

notes: B 組 - 學號尾號數偶數，僅限英文系學生修讀

name.en: Manufacturing Equipment and Process Technology Practical Course

description.zh: 協助學員在完成課程後：1. 對於 TFT-LCD 的製程有基礎認識 2. 對於 TFT-LCD 機台設備及元件的設備原理、操作、保養有基礎概念 3. 智慧化生產技術於 TFT-LCD 製造業的應用概念 4. 學校所學理論於產業應用的創意發想
description.en: Students achieve the following learning outcomes upon completing the course:1.Develop a fundamental understanding of the TFT-LCD manufacturing process.2.Gain basic concepts of the design principles, operation, and maintenance of TFT-LCD machine equipment and components.3.Understand the concept of applying intelligent production technology in the TFT-LCD manufacturing industry.4.Generate creative ideas for applying theoretical knowledge learned in school to industry practices.

notes: 密集授課，需至友達新竹實習工廠，週一 13:30~17:00 上課

description.zh: 大眾傳播與人類社會的關係，正隨科技的進步而日益擴大它的影響力。根據學者研究發現，人類的思想、態度與價值觀念受大眾傳播的影響日漸加深，大傳媒介不但塑造人的思想，同時也影響人們的行為及價值；然而從傳播的功能言，大眾傳播同時具有正面與負面的社會功能，故大眾傳播的發展與過程，殊值重視與探討。本課程兼顧理論與實例的探討，包括傳播特性與要素、大眾傳播的能及效果、新聞守門人理論等，並以實例分析新聞的公正客觀性、新聞自由與國家安全、媒體與選舉等傳播爭議性問題。修習本課程可培養學生閱讀新聞的正確性，不玫人云亦云，受媒體報導所擺佈；同時亦可增強學生人際溝通的技巧與能力。
description.en: With the advancement of technology, mass communication is enlarging its influence in human society. According to researches, the thoughts, attitudes and value judgements of humans are deeply affected by mass communication. The media not only shape persons' thoughts, but also have an impact on their behavior and values. Since mass communication has positive and negative social functions at the same time, its development and process are therefore worthy of paying much attention and exploration to us. This course includes the study of the theory and practice of mass communication, such as characteristics and elements functions and effects, as well as the theory of the news gatekeepers. It also uses stories to analyze disputed issues, for example, news objectivism, freedom of the press and national security, and media and election. Learning this course, students will be not only capable of cultivating the ability to read a news correctl

notes: 社會與法治向度，和外生班合開

description.zh: 面對科技發展日新月異，社會急驟變遷的新世紀，只習得專業上的一技之長，已不足以和協圓滿地實踐有意義的人生。有鑑於此，乃以生涯發展與生涯諮商的理論與研究為基礎，配合學生的發展，希翼能透過教育的歷程，使學生的專業知識能和未來的工作與生活規劃，產生有意義的聯結，進而為學生提供一個短程與長程的生涯發展與選擇的準備與指引。授課內容包括生涯理念介紹、興趣、性格、價值觀探索，生涯決定因素，生涯技巧，生涯角色調適，生涯選擇與規劃技巧，生涯訪談，生涯高原調適，轉型期調適，性別、職業歧視，雙生涯家庭，就業準備等主要生涯課題的研討與習作。
description.en: In face of a new century with continuous scientific development and rapid social changes, to learn one single professional skill is not enough to fulfill a meaningful life in a harmonic and satisfactory manner. In view of this, based on the theory and research of career development and consultation in association with the development of students, it is hoped to produce a meaningful linking between their professional knowledge and job and life planning through the course of eucation, and further to provide them a preparation and guide for short and long-range career development and choice. The contents of the course include the discussion and exercise related to major career topics such as introduction to the concept of career, the discussion of interest, character and value, decisive factors of career, skills of career, role adjustment in career, career choice and planning skill, career interview, uphill adjustment in career, adjustment in transit period, sex and occupation.

notes: 社會與法治向度

國立臺灣科技大學

description.zh: 本課程的目的在介紹生物反應工程，也就是如何將工程原理應用在生物程序。本課程內容可分為二大部分：生物系統的概述與工程的原理應用，第一部分將包括細胞的結構、複製與生長，生物化學反應的種類及其特性，細胞的主要代謝路徑等，第二部分則探討生物反應器的種類及其操作特性與應用，生物反應器內的質傳、熱傳及流動型態，產品回收與純化。
description.en: The objective of the course is to introduce the fundamental concepts of bioprocess engineering, which is the application of engineering principles to design, develop, and analyze bioprocesses. The course will first survey the basics ideas from microbiology and biochemistry. Subsequently, the emphasis will be the application of engineering concepts to biological problems. The following topics will be included: enzyme kinetics, major metabolic pathways, cell growth, stoichiometry, bioreactor operation, and product recovery and purification.

description.zh: 碩士學位論文寫作。
description.en: A student must write a thesis to fulfill the partial requirements for the Master degree.

notes: 經系所核准可修第二門論文始得修習

description.en: For the degree of Master of Engineering 3 to 6 credits with department approval.

notes: 經系所核准可修第二門論文始得修習

description.zh: 博士生與指導教授根據擬定之研究主題，於教授指導下，進行實驗與相關研究，以培養學生尋找相關資料，文獻及獨立研究的訓練，並將其研究成果撰寫成博士論文與期刊發表。
description.en: Introduction:This course focuses on making students able to carry out independent study in master level. Students will be assigned a research topic. An independent experimental design, data analysis, doctoral thesis writing, and paper publication are necessary for this course.

notes: 經系所核准可修第二門論文始得修習

description.en: Graduate students are required to complete a specific research topic under the instruction of their advisor. The results should be written as a thesis.

name.en: Internship of practical technology research and development

description.zh: 本課程之目的為讓技術導向博士班學生於學期間至本所各分組專業相關之企業、政府單位或具規模之其他機構從事全職實務技術研發工作，讓技術導向博士生除發展學術理論外，更擁有業界實務經驗，以成為學養精湛且具有實務技能之高階專業人才。
description.en: The main purpose of this course is to elevate an all-round ability for the technique-orientated Ph.D. students . During the semester, students are required to go to government-based organizations or industry / business-oriented agencies working as a full-time R & D practical job. Course takers are in addition to developing technology-oriented doctoral level academic theory, but also has practical experience in the industry, to become a highly specialized personnel with practical professional skills.

name.zh: 部份工時學期校外實習

description.zh: 本課程主要目的為增進學生之實務能力，學生須於學期中至光電工程相關機構連續實習 18 週，每週不得低於 2.5 天。實習期滿後須由實習機構出具實習證明及成績考核，學生應於校外實習完成後一週內繳交校外實習報告，由實習輔導老師評定實習成績。
description.en: This course is designed to enhance students' on-job practical experiences. Students will work at an electro-optical engineering related company or research organizations for 18 weeks(20 hours per week) during the semester. Through the program, students would learn the hands-on professional technology. Each student would be required to submit a written report right after the end of the internship for grading.

name.zh: 彈性工時學期校外實習

description.zh: 本課程主要目的為增進學生之實務能力，學生須於學期中至光電工程相關機構連續實習 18 週，工時可彈性安排週間但每週不得低於 32 小時。實習期滿後須由實習機構出具實習證明及成績考核，學生應於校外實習完成後一週內繳交校外實習報告，由實習輔導老師評定實習成績。
description.en: This course is designed to enhance students' on-job practical experiences. Students will work at an electro-optical engineering related company or research organizations for 18 weeks(flexible working hours and 32 hours at least per week) during the semester. Through the program, students would learn the hands-on professional technology. Each student would be required to submit a written report right after the end of the internship for grading.

description.zh: 本課程主要是讓學生在畢業之前即獲得短期體驗光電產業的職場經驗，此經驗包括有職場倫理外，也讓學生意識到學校教育與現實職場間的差異、產業對人才的選擇標準、自我能力基本要求的考驗、和未來可就業的相關企業。進而檢討自我的未來生涯規劃。
description.en: The course is designed to help students' career developments and to enhance their working experiences prior to their graduation. Students will work at a electric-optic engineering related company or research organization on-site. The duration is one full-time semester. Students would learn the real-life operations of professional technology, acknowledge the differences between the school and working environments, understand the business needs, and develop their professional ethics. Through the program, students would be able to self-evaluate the gaps between their own capabilities and the professional needs, and establish or adjust their career development plans accordingly. A student would require to work full-time on-site the company and submit a full semester paper to fulfill the program requirements.

description.zh: 本課程主要目的為增進學生之實務能力，學生須於學期中至相關機構連續實習 18 週，每週不得低於 2.5 天。實習期滿後須由實習機構出具實習證明及成績考核，學生應於校外實習完成後一週內繳交校外實習報告，由實習輔導老師評定實習成績。
description.en: This course is designed to enhance students' on-job practical experiences. Students will work at an engineering related company or research organizations for 18 weeks (20 hours per week) during the semester. Through the program, students would learn the hands-on professional technology. Each student would be required to submit a written report right after the end of the internship for grading.

description.zh: 本課程主要目的為增進學生之實務能力，學生須於學期中至資訊相關機構連續實習 18 週，每週不得低於 2.5 天。實習期滿後須由實習機構出具實習證明及成績考核，學生應於校外實習完成後一週內繳交校外實習報告，由實習輔導老師評定實習成績。
description.en: This course is designed to enhance students' on-job practical experiences. Students will work at a computer science (information engineering) related company or research organizations for 18 weeks(20 hours per week) during the semester. Through the program, students would learn the hands-on professional technology. Each student would be required to submit a written report right after the end of the internship for grading.

description.zh: 本課程主要是讓學生在畢業之前即獲得短期體驗車輛產業的職場經驗，此經驗包括有職場倫理外，也讓學生意識到學校教育與現實職場間的差異、產業對人才的選擇標準、自我能力基本要求的考驗、和未來可就業的相關企業。進而檢討自我的未來生涯規劃。
description.en: The course is designed to help students' career developments and to enhance their working experiences prior to their graduation. Students will work at a vehicle engineering related company or research organization on-site. The duration is one full-time semester. Students would learn the real-life operations of professional technology, acknowledge the differences between the school and working environments, understand the business needs, and develop their professional ethics. Through the program, students would be able to self-evaluate the gaps between their own capabilities and the professional needs, and establish or adjust their career development plans accordingly. A student would require to work full-time on-site the company and submit a full semester paper to fulfill the program requirements.

description.zh: 本課程主要目的為增進學生之實務能力，學生須於學期中至學校認可之校外電機相關機構連續實習 18 週，每週不得低於 2.5 天 (20 小時)。學生實習期滿後須由實習機構出具實習證明並應依據本系規定繳交實習相關成果報告，彙交本系保存，並作為成績核定之依據。
description.en: This course is designed to enhance students’ on-job practical experiences. Students will work at electrical-engineering related companies or research organizations recognized by the school for 18 weeks, at least 2.5 days (20 hours) per week during the semester. After students complete their internships, the internship certificates must be issued by the internship institutions and the relevant internship reports should be submitted in accordance with the regulations of the Department of Electrical Engineering for preservation and used as the basis for the assessment of grades.

description.zh: 本課程主要目的為增進學生之實務能力，學生利用學期間至相關機構實習（實習實際天數依「校外實習」實行辦法另訂之），參與校外合作機構所提供之訓練，觀摩學習專業企業之實際運作。實習期滿後須由實習機構出具實習證明及成績考核；學生必須撰寫實習心得報告，彙交系上保存。
description.en: The course is developed to increase students' capability of on-job practice. Participation in one of the corporative company during curriculum session, practice and learn the real operation of the ing related fields . A practice intern and a well-prepared report must be completed to the course requirement.

description.zh: 為培養大學部學生自主學習能力，由學生主動積極創造並實現自己有興趣之主題。學生於特定主題之創造與實現中，學習到思考批判與問題解決等能力。教師擔任輔助指導角色，引導學生從實踐中學習問題解決能力。 學生根據自己的興趣與能力訂定自主學習計畫，並於開學前向各系提出申請，由本系專任老師擔任指導教師，審查計畫及評核學期成績。
description.en: This course aims to develop undergraduates’ active learning skills by making students engage in the creation and realization of topics of students’ own interest. In the process of specific topic creation and realization, students will proactively learn critical-thinking and problem-solving skills. Instructors cultivate the active engagement of students in problem solving, without actually participating in it.

description.zh: 為培養大學部學生自主學習能力，由學生主動積極創造並實現自己有興趣之主題。學生於特定主題之創造與實現中，學習到思考批判與問題解決等能力。教師擔任輔助指導角色，引導學生從實踐中學習問題解決能力。學生根據自己的興趣與能力訂定自主學習計畫，並於開學前向各系提出申請，由本系專任老師擔任指導教師，審查計畫及評核學期成績。
description.en: This course aims to develop undergraduates’ active learning skills by making students engage in the creation and realization of topics of students’ own interest. In the process of specific topic creation and realization, students will proactively learn critical-thinking and problem-solving skills. Instructors cultivate the active engagement of students in problem solving, without actually participating in it. In this course, students are required to draw up self-learning plans based on their own interests and capabilities and then submit their plans to the departmental office for approval by the beginning of the semester.

description.zh: 本課程是為了培養學生自主學習的能力，由學生主動提出自己有興趣之主題。學生於特定主題中，學習到思考與問題解決的能力。教師擔任輔助指導角色，引導學生從實踐中學習。學生根據自己的興趣與能力訂定學習計畫，於開學前向辦公室提出申請。由專任老師擔任指導教師，審查及評核學期成績。
description.en: This course is to cultivate students' self-learning ability, and students take the initiative to put forward topics they are interested in. Students learn the ability to think and solve problems in specific topics. Teachers play the role of auxiliary guidance to guide students to learn from practice. Students formulate learning plans based on their interests and abilities, and apply to the office before the start of the semester. The full-time teacher acts as the instructor to review and evaluate the semester results.

description.zh: 為培養學生自主學習能力，透過學生自發性蒐集資料擬定研究主題，由學生自行建構課程內容，從中學習規劃與執行專案實務，培育學生在特定主題研究中，學習到團隊合作、溝通表達、思考批判與問題解決等能力，由教師擔任輔助指導角色，引導學生從實踐中學習問題解決能力。本課程的評量以書面報告或口頭報告進行。
description.en: To help students cultivate the ability of self-learning, this course allows students to engage themselves in developing course content, to plan and to execute a real-world project. "Active learning" encourages students to learn by interaction, communication, collaboration, critically analyzing arguments, and problem-solving. Instructors will assist to guide and to support in the process of learning. Students are expected to develop a process to solve real-life problems collaboratively. Written reports and oral presentations are required for course evaluation.

description.zh: (1) 藉由學生主動實現自己有興趣之主題，培養自我學習能力。(2) 於特定的主題當中，學習到思考批判與問題解決等能力。(3) 教師擔任輔助指導角色，引導學生從實踐中學習與成長。 (4) 學生根據自己的興趣與能力訂定學習計畫，並於開學前提出申請，由專任教師指導，審查及評核學期成績。
description.en: (1) Develop self-learning skills by actively implementing topics of interest to students(2) Among the specific topics, the ability to think critically and solve problems is learned.(3) Teachers act as mentors and guide students to learn and grow from practice(4) Students set up learning plans according to their own interests and abilities, and apply before the school starts. They are supervised by full-time teachers to review and evaluate semester performance.

description.zh: 為培養大學部學生自主學習能力，由學生主動積極創造並實現自己有興趣之主題。學生於特定主題之創造與實現中，學習到思考批判與問題解決等能力。教師擔任輔助指導角色，引導學生從實踐中學習問題解決能力。學生根據自己的興趣與能力訂定自主學習計畫，並於開學前向各系提出申請，由本系專任老師擔任指導教師，審查計畫及評核學期成績。
description.en: This course aims to develop undergraduates’ active learning skills by making students engage in the creation and realization of topics of students’ own interest. In the process of specific topic creation and realization, students will proactively learn critical-thinking and problem-solving skills. In this course, students are required to draw up self-learning plans based on their own interests and capabilities and then submit their plans to the departmental office for approval by the beginning of the semester.

description.zh: 本課程主要目的為增進學生之實務能力，學生利用整學期到工業工程與管理相關機構實習，參與校外合作機構所提供之訓練，觀摩學習專業工廠之實際運作。實習期滿後須由實習機構出具實習證明及成績考核；學生必須撰寫實習心得報告。須在同一機構連續實習 4.5 月，學生應全職於實習機構實習。
description.en: The course is developed to increase on-job practice capability of students. Participants practice and learn the real operation of the industrial engineering and management related fields in one of the corporative industrial engineering company during one semester. A practice intern and a well-prepared report must be completed to the course requirement. It is necessary to practice in one corporative industrial engineering and management company full-time at least 4.5 months.

description.zh: 本課程主要目的為增進學生之實務能力，學生利用學期間至相關機構實習（實習實際天數依「校外實習」實行辦法另訂之），參與校外合作機構所提供之訓練，觀摩學習專業企業之實際運作。實習期滿後須由實習機構出具實習證明及成績考核；學生必須撰寫實習心得報告，彙交系上保存。
description.en: The course is developed to increase students' capability of on-job practice. Participation in one of the corporative company during curriculum session, practice and learn the real operation of the ing related fields . A practice intern and a well-prepared report must be completed to the course requirement.

description.zh: 本課程主要目的為讓學生可以利用暑期或其它時間至學校認可之校外公私立機構進行或參與實習，以增進學生之實務能力。學生於學校認可之校外機構實習總累計時數不得低於 320 小時。學生實習期滿後，應依據各系規定繳交相關實習相關成果報告，彙交所屬系保存，並作為成績核定之依據。學生校外實習學期成績之評定比例原則：實習單位占 50%，輔導老師占 50%，各系得依其屬性調整之。
description.en: The main purpose of this course is to elevate an all-round ability for the students at NTUT. During the summer break or other periods of time, students are required to go to government-based organizations or industry/business-oriented agencies with respect to promoting practice of ability. The course takers will need to stay in the same individual organization or agency with an accumulated amount of time of no less than 320 hours. After the students complete the requirements in question, these organizations and agencies will offer them certificates -- or proof of any kind -- in accordance with the real performance on site. The grading principle will be equivalently decided by the thesis advisor (50%) and the on-site organization or agency (50%), respectively. The individual department or graduate institute may make proper adjustments according to the situations in need.

notes: 累計
